title: 3D Left Ventricular Strain and Volumes
description: Three-dimensional global left ventricular measures including end-diastolic volume (mL), end-systolic volume (mL), stroke volume, ejection fraction, LV mass, volume rate (volumes per second), and global circumferential, longitudinal, and area-change peak strain (%).

title: 3D Echo Quality Score and Type
description: Quality score for 3D echocardiographic images, accompanied by a scoring type that records the reason for scores below 3.

title: Consented to CT of Abdomen
description: Indicates whether the participant consented to CT scanning of the abdomen.

title: Abdominal CT Dose Index Volume (CTDIvol)
description: CT dose index volume (CTDIvol) recorded for the abdominal CT scan, a measure of radiation dose per unit volume delivered during the abdominal acquisition.

title: Abdominal CT Dose-Length Product (DLP)
description: Dose-length product (DLP) recorded for the abdominal CT scan, a measure of total radiation dose delivered during the abdominal acquisition.

title: Abdominal CT Image Number
description: Image number assigned to the abdominal CT acquisition.

title: Abdominal CT Series Number
description: Series number assigned to the abdominal CT acquisition.

title: ABP Monitor Comment
description: Free-text comment field associated with the ambulatory blood pressure monitor recording.

title: ABP Monitor 1st Condition Code
description: First of up to three condition codes recorded for an ambulatory blood pressure monitor observation.

title: ABP Monitor 2nd Condition Code
description: Second of up to three condition codes recorded for an ambulatory blood pressure monitor observation.

title: ABP Monitor 3rd Condition Code
description: Third of up to three condition codes recorded for an ambulatory blood pressure monitor observation.

title: Diastolic Blood Pressure, ABP Monitor
description: Diastolic blood pressure recorded by the ambulatory blood pressure monitor.

title: ABP Diastolic BP 1st Reading
description: First diastolic blood pressure reading from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor.

title: ABP Diastolic BP 10th Reading
description: Tenth diastolic blood pressure reading from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor.

title: ABP Diastolic BP 2nd Reading
description: Second diastolic blood pressure reading from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor.

title: ABP Diastolic BP 3rd Reading
description: Third diastolic blood pressure reading from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor.

title: ABP Diastolic BP 4th Reading
description: Fourth diastolic blood pressure reading from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor.

title: ABP Diastolic BP 5th Reading
description: Fifth diastolic blood pressure reading from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor.

title: ABP Diastolic BP 6th Reading
description: Sixth diastolic blood pressure reading from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor.

title: ABP Diastolic BP 7th Reading
description: Seventh diastolic blood pressure reading from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor.

title: ABP Diastolic BP 8th Reading
description: Eighth diastolic blood pressure reading from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor.

title: ABP Diastolic BP 9th Reading
description: Ninth diastolic blood pressure reading from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor.

title: ABP End-of-Test Date
description: Date on which the ambulatory blood pressure monitoring test ended.

title: ABP End-of-Test Diastolic BP 1st Reading
description: First diastolic blood pressure reading obtained from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor at the end of the test.

title: ABP End-of-Test Diastolic BP 2nd Reading
description: Second diastolic blood pressure reading obtained from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor at the end of the test.

title: ABP End-of-Test Diastolic BP 3rd Reading
description: Third diastolic blood pressure reading obtained from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor at the end of the test.

title: ABP End-of-Test Systolic BP 1st Reading
description: First systolic blood pressure reading obtained from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor at the end of the test.

title: ABP End-of-Test Systolic BP 2nd Reading
description: Second systolic blood pressure reading obtained from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor at the end of the test.

title: ABP End-of-Test Systolic BP 3rd Reading
description: Third systolic blood pressure reading obtained from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor at the end of the test.

title: ABP End-of-Test Y-Tubed Diastolic BP 1st Reading
description: First diastolic blood pressure reading obtained via Y-tube connection at the end of the ambulatory blood pressure monitor test.

title: ABP End-of-Test Y-Tubed Diastolic BP 2nd Reading
description: Second diastolic blood pressure reading obtained via Y-tube connection at the end of the ambulatory blood pressure monitor test.

title: ABP End-of-Test Y-Tubed Diastolic BP 3rd Reading
description: Third diastolic blood pressure reading obtained via Y-tube connection at the end of the ambulatory blood pressure monitor test.

title: ABP End-of-Test Y-Tubed Systolic BP 1st Reading
description: First systolic blood pressure reading obtained via Y-tube connection at the end of the ambulatory blood pressure monitor test.

title: ABP End-of-Test Y-Tubed Systolic BP 2nd Reading
description: Second systolic blood pressure reading obtained via Y-tube connection at the end of the ambulatory blood pressure monitor test.

title: ABP End-of-Test Y-Tubed Systolic BP 3rd Reading
description: Third systolic blood pressure reading obtained via Y-tube connection at the end of the ambulatory blood pressure monitor test.

title: Heart Rate, ABP Monitor
description: Heart rate recorded by the ambulatory blood pressure monitor.

title: Mean Arterial Pressure, ABP Monitor
description: Mean arterial pressure recorded by the ambulatory blood pressure monitor.

title: ABP Monitor Observation Date
description: Date of an ambulatory blood pressure monitor observation.

title: Systolic Blood Pressure, ABP Monitor
description: Systolic blood pressure recorded by the ambulatory blood pressure monitor.

title: ABP Systolic BP 1st Reading
description: First systolic blood pressure reading from the ambulatory blood pressure monitor.

title: ABP Systolic Blood Pressure 10th Reading
description: Tenth systolic blood pressure reading from ambulatory blood pressure monitoring.

title: ABP Systolic Blood Pressure 2nd Reading
description: Second systolic blood pressure reading from ambulatory blood pressure monitoring.

title: ABP Systolic Blood Pressure 3rd Reading
description: Third systolic blood pressure reading from ambulatory blood pressure monitoring.

title: ABP Systolic Blood Pressure 4th Reading
description: Fourth systolic blood pressure reading from ambulatory blood pressure monitoring.

title: ABP Systolic Blood Pressure 5th Reading
description: Fifth systolic blood pressure reading from ambulatory blood pressure monitoring.

title: ABP Systolic Blood Pressure 6th Reading
description: Sixth systolic blood pressure reading from ambulatory blood pressure monitoring.

title: ABP Systolic Blood Pressure 7th Reading
description: Seventh systolic blood pressure reading from ambulatory blood pressure monitoring.

title: ABP Systolic Blood Pressure 8th Reading
description: Eighth systolic blood pressure reading from ambulatory blood pressure monitoring.

title: ABP Systolic Blood Pressure 9th Reading
description: Ninth systolic blood pressure reading from ambulatory blood pressure monitoring.

title: ABP Monitor 1st Test Code
description: First of up to three test codes recorded for the ambulatory blood pressure monitoring session.

title: ABP Monitor 2nd Test Code
description: Second of up to three test codes recorded for the ambulatory blood pressure monitoring session.

title: ABP Monitor 3rd Test Code
description: Third of up to three test codes recorded for the ambulatory blood pressure monitoring session.

title: Had Acne in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant had acne during the past 12 months, as part of the menstrual history questionnaire.

title: Had Acne at Age 20–30
description: Indicates whether the participant had acne during the age range of 20 to 30 years.

title: Actigraphy Data Recorded
description: Indicates whether actigraphy data were recorded during the activity monitor encounter.

title: Reason Actigraphy Data Not Recorded
description: Reason why actigraphy data were not recorded during the activity monitor encounter. Documented reasons include equipment malfunction.

title: Activity Level Compared to Normal Day
description: Participant-reported assessment of their activity level on the ambulatory monitoring day compared to a normal day.

title: Reason Activity Monitor Not Received
description: Reason why the participant did not receive an activity monitor. Documented reasons include participant refusal.

title: Reason Activity Monitor Not Returned
description: Reason why the participant did not return the activity monitor after the monitoring period. Documented reasons include the monitor being lost.

title: Participant Received Activity Monitor
description: Indicates whether the participant received an activity monitor at the activity monitor encounter.

title: Participant Returned Activity Monitor
description: Indicates whether the participant returned the activity monitor following the monitoring period.

title: Address Status at Follow-Up
description: Status of the participant's mailing or residential address recorded at each follow-up contact interval, used for participant tracking and retention.

title: Have Enough Time to Get Job Done
description: Participant's self-reported agreement that their job allows adequate time to complete tasks. Responses are recorded on a 4-point scale from strongly disagree to strongly agree.

title: Average Adjusted Agatston Score
description: Adjudicated summary Agatston score for coronary artery calcium, set to missing if surgical stent or coronary artery bypass graft history is recorded. Also referred to as the average adjusted Agatston score.

title: Age at Time of Echo
description: Participant age in years at the time of the echocardiographic examination.

title: Age of Child or Stepchild #1 (Years)
description: Age in years of the participant's first child or stepchild. In early exams (A, B), the question asked specifically about children living with the participant; from exam C onward, it was broadened to any children or stepchildren regardless of living arrangement.

title: Age of Child or Stepchild #2 (Years)
description: Age in years of the participant's second child or stepchild. In early exams (A, B), the question asked specifically about children living with the participant; from exam C onward, it was broadened to any children or stepchildren regardless of living arrangement.

title: Age of Child or Stepchild #3 (Years)
description: Age in years of the participant's third child or stepchild. In early exams (A, B), the question asked specifically about children living with the participant; from exam C onward, it was broadened to any children or stepchildren regardless of living arrangement.

title: Age of Child or Stepchild #4 (Years)
description: Age in years of the participant's fourth child or stepchild. In early exams (A, B), the question asked specifically about children living with the participant; from exam C onward, it was broadened to any children or stepchildren regardless of living arrangement.

title: Age of Child or Stepchild #5 (Years)
description: Age in years of the participant's fifth child or stepchild. In early exams (A, B), the question asked specifically about children living with the participant; from exam C onward, it was broadened to any children or stepchildren regardless of living arrangement.

title: Age Discrimination at Home
description: Participant-reported experience of discrimination, being prevented from doing something, or being hassled or made to feel inferior at home because of their age (yes/no).

title: Age Discrimination at Home Frequency
description: Frequency with which the participant experienced age discrimination at home, among those who reported such discrimination (e.g., rarely).

title: Age Discrimination at School
description: Participant-reported experience of discrimination, being prevented from doing something, or being hassled or made to feel inferior at school because of their age (yes/no).

title: Age Discrimination at School Frequency
description: Frequency with which the participant experienced age discrimination at school, among those who reported such discrimination (e.g., rarely).

title: Age Discrimination at Work
description: Participant-reported experience of discrimination, being prevented from doing something, or being hassled or made to feel inferior at work because of their age (yes/no).

title: Age Discrimination at Work Frequency
description: Frequency with which the participant experienced age discrimination at work, among those who reported such discrimination (e.g., rarely).

title: Age Discrimination Getting Housing
description: Participant-reported experience of discrimination, being prevented from doing something, or being hassled or made to feel inferior when getting housing because of their age (yes/no).

title: Age Discrimination Getting Housing Frequency
description: Frequency with which the participant experienced age discrimination when getting housing, among those who reported such discrimination (e.g., rarely).

title: Age Discrimination Getting a Job
description: Participant-reported experience of discrimination, being prevented from doing something, or being hassled or made to feel inferior when getting a job because of their age (yes/no).

title: Age Discrimination Getting a Job Frequency
description: Frequency with which the participant experienced age discrimination when getting a job, among those who reported such discrimination (e.g., rarely).

title: Age Discrimination Getting Medical Care
description: Participant-reported experience of discrimination, being prevented from doing something, or being hassled or made to feel inferior when getting medical care because of their age (yes/no).

title: Age Discrimination Getting Medical Care Frequency
description: Frequency with which the participant experienced age discrimination when getting medical care, among those who reported such discrimination (e.g., rarely).

title: Age Discrimination in Public
description: Participant-reported experience of discrimination, being prevented from doing something, or being hassled or made to feel inferior in a public setting because of their age (yes/no).

title: Age Discrimination in Public Frequency
description: Frequency with which the participant experienced age discrimination in a public setting, among those who reported such discrimination (e.g., rarely).

title: Stress from Age Discrimination
description: Participant's rating of how stressful their experiences of age discrimination have been, among those who reported such discrimination (e.g., not at all stressful).

title: Age First Out of Control with Eating
description: Age at which the participant first felt out of control with eating, reported among those who endorsed loss of control over eating.

title: Age First Lost 10 or More Pounds by Dieting
description: Age at which the participant first lost 10 or more pounds through dieting.

title: Age First Told Had Diabetes
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or health professional that they had diabetes.

title: Age First Told Had Heart Problem
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or health professional that they had a heart problem.

title: Age First Told Had High Blood Pressure
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or health professional that they had high blood pressure.

title: Age First Told Had High Cholesterol
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or health professional that they had high cholesterol.

title: Age First Told Had Stroke or TIA
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or health professional that they had a stroke or transient ischemic attack (TIA).

title: Age When Periods Stopped (Years)
description: Age in years at which the participant's menstrual periods stopped, asked in the context of menopause.

title: Age of Stepchild #1 (Years)
description: Age in years of the participant's first stepchild living with the participant. This series is distinct from the later AGE_CHILD_* series, which merged children and stepchildren starting at exam C.

title: Age of Stepchild #2 (Years)
description: Age in years of the participant's second stepchild living with the participant. This series is distinct from the later AGE_CHILD_* series, which merged children and stepchildren starting at exam C.

title: Urinary Albumin/Creatinine Ratio (mg/g)
description: Urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio in mg/g, calculated as 1000 × (urinary albumin / urinary creatinine). This ratio is used to assess albuminuria and kidney function.

title: 3 mL Albumin QC Urine Sample Collected
description: Indicates whether a 3 mL albumin quality control urine sample was collected.

title: 3 mL Albumin Urine Sample Collected
description: Indicates whether a 3 mL albumin urine sample was collected.

title: Drank Alcohol During Monitoring Period
description: Indicates whether the participant drank alcohol during the monitoring period.

title: Drank Alcohol or Used Drugs More Than Intended in Last Year
description: Self-reported whether the participant drank alcohol or used drugs more than intended in the past year.

title: Reference Substance for More-Than-Intended Answer
description: Identifies whether the more-than-intended response (Q8) referred to alcohol or another substance.

title: Felt Need to Cut Down on Drinking or Drug Use in Last Year
description: Self-reported whether the participant felt a need to cut down on drinking or drug use in the past year.

title: Reference Substance for Need-to-Cut-Down Answer
description: Identifies whether the need-to-cut-down response (Q9) referred to alcohol or another substance.

title: Number of Alcoholic Drinks During Monitoring Period
description: The number of alcoholic drinks consumed by the participant during the monitoring period.

title: Alcohol Consumed in Past 24 Hours
description: Indicates whether the participant consumed any alcohol in the 24 hours prior to the exam visit.

title: Beer Consumed in Past 24 Hours
description: Indicates whether the participant consumed beer in the 24 hours prior to the exam visit.

title: Liquor Consumed in Past 24 Hours
description: Indicates whether the participant consumed liquor in the 24 hours prior to the exam visit.

title: Wine Consumed in Past 24 Hours
description: Indicates whether the participant consumed wine in the 24 hours prior to the exam visit.

title: Type of Alcohol Consumed During Monitoring Period
description: The type of alcoholic beverage consumed by the participant during the monitoring period.

title: Any Alert Findings on Current Echo
description: Indicates whether any alert findings were identified on the current echocardiogram. Serves as a flag leading to specification of individual alert finding types.

title: Alert Finding – Aortic Aneurysm
description: Indicates whether aortic aneurysm was identified as an alert finding on the echocardiogram. Recorded as part of the alert findings checklist on the echocardiography technician's worksheet.

title: Alert Finding – Flail Leaflet
description: Indicates whether a flail leaflet was identified as an alert finding on the echocardiogram. Recorded as part of the alert findings checklist on the echocardiography technician's worksheet.

title: Any Other Alert Findings (Other Category)
description: Indicates whether any other alert findings not listed in the standard checklist were identified on the echocardiogram. Recorded on the echocardiography technician's worksheet.

title: Alert Finding – Pericardial Tamponade
description: Indicates whether suspected pericardial tamponade was identified as an alert finding on the echocardiogram. Recorded as part of the alert findings checklist on the echocardiography technician's worksheet.

title: Any Alerts from Year 10 Echocardiogram
description: Records any alert codes from the participant's Year 10 echocardiogram, as reviewed by the technician at the time of the current exam. Captures a code or indicator of prior alert findings rather than a direct clinical measurement.

title: Any Alerts from Year 25 Echocardiogram
description: Records any alert findings from the participant's Year 25 echocardiogram, as reviewed at the time of the Year 30 exam.

title: Alert Finding – Severe LV Dysfunction
description: Indicates whether severe left ventricular dysfunction was identified as an alert finding on the echocardiogram. Recorded as part of the alert findings checklist on the echocardiography technician's worksheet.

title: Alert Finding – Cardiac Tumor
description: Indicates whether a cardiac tumor was identified as an alert finding on the echocardiogram. Recorded as part of the alert findings checklist on the echocardiography technician's worksheet.

title: Alert Finding – Valvular Vegetation
description: Indicates whether a valvular vegetation was identified as an alert finding on the echocardiogram. Recorded as part of the alert findings checklist on the echocardiography technician's worksheet.

title: All Urine Collections Complete
description: Indicates whether all urine collections in the 24-hour urine substudy were completed by the participant.

title: All Urine Collected
description: Indicates whether all urine was collected for the exam visit specimen collection procedure.

title: Always Had Health Insurance in Past 2 Years
description: Indicates whether the participant always had health insurance or other coverage for medical care during the past two years.

title: Always Notices How They Look
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I always notice how I look,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Always Trying to Improve Appearance
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I'm always trying to improve my appearance,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Activity at Time of Observation
description: Participant-reported activity at the time of each ambulatory monitoring unit (AMU) observation.

title: Location at Time of Observation
description: Participant-reported location at the time of each ambulatory monitoring unit (AMU) observation.

title: Number of AMU Observations
description: Total number of ambulatory monitoring unit (AMU) observations recorded for the participant.

title: Observation Questionable
description: Indicator of whether a given ambulatory monitoring unit (AMU) observation was flagged as questionable.

title: Smoked Since Last Cuff Inflation
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they smoked between the previous cuff inflation and the current ambulatory monitoring observation.

title: Stress at Time of Observation
description: Participant-reported stress level at the time of each ambulatory monitoring unit (AMU) observation.

title: History of Anemia (Ever Told by Doctor)
description: Participant-reported history of anemia, based on whether they were ever told by a doctor that they had anemia.

title: Argue With Others When Angry
description: Self-reported frequency of arguing with others when angry, rated on a 4-point scale from almost never to almost always. This is item 4 of the Anger Expression questionnaire.

title: Express My Anger
description: Self-reported frequency of expressing anger, rated on a 4-point scale from almost never to almost always. This is item 1 of the Anger Expression questionnaire.

title: Anger-In Item: Act as if Nothing Happened
description: Anger-in expression item asking how likely the participant is to try to act as though nothing much happened when handling anger. Responses are rated on a 3-point scale: very likely, somewhat likely, or not too likely.

title: Anger-In Item: Apologize Even When Right
description: Anger-in expression item asking how likely the participant is to apologize even though they are right when handling anger. Responses are rated on a 3-point scale: very likely, somewhat likely, or not too likely.

title: Anger-In Item: Keep It to Yourself
description: Anger-in expression item asking how likely the participant is to keep their anger to themselves when handling anger. Responses are rated on a 3-point scale: very likely, somewhat likely, or not too likely.

title: Let People Know When They Are Annoying
description: Self-reported frequency of letting people know when they are annoying, rated on a 4-point scale from almost never to almost always. This is item 8 of the Anger Expression questionnaire.

title: Lose My Temper
description: Self-reported frequency of losing one's temper, rated on a 4-point scale from almost never to almost always. This is item 7 of the Anger Expression questionnaire.

title: Make Sarcastic Remarks When Angry
description: Self-reported frequency of making sarcastic remarks when angry, rated on a 4-point scale from almost never to almost always. This is item 2 of the Anger Expression questionnaire.

title: Say Nasty Things When Angry
description: Self-reported frequency of saying nasty things when angry, rated on a 4-point scale from almost never to almost always. This is item 6 of the Anger Expression questionnaire.

title: Slam Doors When Angry
description: Self-reported frequency of slamming doors when angry, rated on a 4-point scale from almost never to almost always. This is item 3 of the Anger Expression questionnaire.

title: Strike Out at Whatever Makes Me Mad
description: Self-reported frequency of striking out at whatever provokes anger, rated on a 4-point scale from almost never to almost always. This is item 5 of the Anger Expression questionnaire.

title: History of Angina
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever had angina.

title: Angina or Chest Pain
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant has experienced angina or chest pain, assessed at follow-up interviews.

title: Doctor-Diagnosed Angina or Chest Pain Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant was told by a doctor that they have angina or chest pain since the last exam, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Current Status of Angina
description: Current status of angina, indicating whether the participant still has the condition, whether it is controlled by medication or something else, or whether it is completely cured or gone.

title: Angiogram or Heart Catheterization in Past Year
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant had an angiogram or heart catheterization in the past year.

title: Angiogram/Catheterization Required Overnight Stay
description: Indicates whether the angiogram or catheterization procedure required an overnight hospital stay.

title: Permission Given for Angiogram/Catheterization
description: Indicates whether the participant gave permission for an angiogram or cardiac catheterization procedure to be performed.

title: Reason for Angiogram/Catheterization
description: Reason the participant underwent an angiogram or catheterization procedure.

title: Angiogram Since Last CARDIA Exam
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant had an angiogram since the last CARDIA exam.

title: Antioxidant Combination Supplement Frequency
description: Frequency (per day, week, or month) that the participant took antioxidant combination supplements.

title: Number of Antioxidant Combination Supplements Taken
description: Number of antioxidant combination supplements taken per reported frequency period.

title: Antioxidant Combination Supplement Use
description: Indicates whether the participant reported taking an antioxidant combination supplement.

title: Any Abortions
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever had any abortions.

title: Blood Collected at First Blood Draw (Delayed OGTT)
description: Indicates whether any blood was collected at the first blood draw during the delayed oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT) protocol.

title: Blood Collected at Second Blood Draw
description: Indicates whether any blood was collected at the second blood draw during the phlebotomy visit.

title: Blood Collected at Second Blood Draw (Delayed OGTT)
description: Indicates whether any blood was collected at the second blood draw during the delayed oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT) protocol.

title: Any Blood Drawn at Exam
description: Indicates whether any blood was drawn at the phlebotomy visit during the exam.

title: Any Blood Drawn at Second Blood Draw
description: Indicates whether any blood was drawn at the second blood draw.

title: Any Bottles Used But Not Returned
description: Indicates whether any urine collection bottles were used by the participant but not returned.

title: Any Coronary Artery Calcium (CAC) Indicator
description: Binary indicator of whether any coronary artery calcium was detected at the exam visit.

title: Any Children or Stepchildren
description: Indicates whether the participant has any children or stepchildren.

title: Any Doctor Visit Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant visited a doctor since the last exam, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Any Miscarriages
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever had any miscarriages.

title: Any Complications of Pregnancy
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced any complications during pregnancy.

title: Any Stillbirths
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever had any stillbirths.

title: Any Visit Due to CARDIA Referral
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant had any medical visit as a result of a CARDIA study referral, reported at follow-up interviews.

title: Any Vitamin or Mineral Use in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant reported taking any vitamins or minerals in the past year.

title: Aortic Regurgitation (Moderate or Severe)
description: Indicator of moderate or severe aortic regurgitation as assessed by echocardiography.

title: Aortic Stenosis (Mild to Severe)
description: Indicator of aortic stenosis of any degree (mild, moderate, or severe) as assessed by echocardiography.

title: Aortic Valve Peak Velocity
description: Peak velocity (cm/s) across the aortic valve as measured by Doppler echocardiography.

title: Apolipoprotein A (mg/dL)
description: Apolipoprotein A concentration measured in mg/dL.

title: Apolipoprotein B (mg/dL)
description: Apolipoprotein B concentration measured in mg/dL.

title: Appearance Evaluation Subscale Score
description: Derived subscale score for appearance evaluation from the Body Image Questionnaire.

title: Appearance Orientation Subscale Score
description: Derived subscale score for appearance orientation from the Body Image Questionnaire.

title: Appointment Made for Urine Collection Return
description: Indicates whether an appointment was made for the participant to return the urine collection.

title: Criticize or Argue with Strangers
description: Self-reported indicator of whether the participant criticizes or argues with strangers, as part of a safety and accident questionnaire.

title: Arm Circumference (cm)
description: Arm circumference measured in centimeters, used to determine appropriate blood pressure cuff size.

title: Arm Used for Blood Pressure Measurement
description: Indicates whether the right or left arm was used for the blood pressure cuff measurement.

title: Arterial Compliance Substudy Performed
description: Indicates whether the arterial compliance substudy was performed at the echocardiography exam visit.

title: History of Arthritis or Rheumatism Lasting More Than 3 Months
description: Participant-reported history of arthritis or rheumatism lasting more than 3 months.

title: How Often Aspirin Taken as Prescribed
description: Self-reported frequency with which the participant takes aspirin as prescribed by their health care provider.

title: Currently Taking Aspirin
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking aspirin, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Aspirin Dose Category
description: Category of the aspirin dosage reported by the participant, such as extra strength.

title: Duration of Aspirin Use (Months)
description: Number of months the participant has taken aspirin.

title: Duration of Aspirin Use (Years)
description: Number of years the participant has taken aspirin.

title: Taking Aspirin for Arthritis
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking aspirin specifically for arthritis, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Taking Aspirin for Heart Attack or Stroke Prevention
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking aspirin for heart attack or stroke prevention, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Taking Aspirin for Other Conditions
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking aspirin for conditions other than arthritis or cardiovascular prevention, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Source of Aspirin Medication Name
description: Source from which the aspirin medication name was obtained, such as a prescription or bottle label.

title: Family Member Pays for Aspirin
description: Indicates whether a family member pays for the participant's aspirin medication.

title: Friend Pays for Aspirin
description: Indicates whether a friend pays for the participant's aspirin medication.

title: Medicaid Pays for Aspirin
description: Indicates whether Medicaid pays for the participant's aspirin medication.

title: Medicare Pays for Aspirin
description: Indicates whether Medicare pays for the participant's aspirin medication.

title: Other Payer for Aspirin (Indicator)
description: Indicates whether another unspecified source pays for the participant's aspirin medication.

title: Participant Pays for Aspirin
description: Indicates whether the participant themselves pays for their aspirin medication.

title: Private Insurance Pays for Aspirin
description: Indicates whether private insurance pays for the participant's aspirin medication.

title: Aspirin Prescribed by Doctor
description: Indicates whether the participant's aspirin was prescribed by a health care provider.

title: Ever Had Problems with Aspirin
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever had any problems with aspirin.

title: Purpose for Taking Aspirin
description: Purpose for which the participant takes aspirin, categorized as mentioning avoidance of heart attack and/or stroke or blood thinning versus not mentioning these reasons.

title: Purpose of Taking Aspirin (Detailed Code)
description: Coded purpose for which the participant takes aspirin, including whether prevention of heart attack and/or stroke or blood thinning was mentioned.

title: Aspirin Tablets Per Day
description: Number of aspirin tablets or capsules taken per day.

title: Aspirin Tablets Per Week
description: Number of aspirin tablets or capsules taken per week.

title: Age at Onset of Asthma
description: Age in years when asthma started, reported by participants who indicated a history of asthma.

title: Age When Asthma Symptoms Stopped
description: Age in years when asthma symptoms stopped, reported by participants with a history of asthma.

title: Doctor-Diagnosed Asthma Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant was told by a doctor that they have asthma since the last exam, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Asthma Confirmed by a Doctor
description: Indicates whether a participant's asthma was confirmed by a doctor.

title: Ever Had Asthma
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever had asthma.

title: Months of Asthma Medication Use
description: Duration of asthma medication use in months.

title: Asthma Medication Number
description: Sequential identifier for asthma medications recorded at the exam visit.

title: Source of Asthma Medication Name
description: Indicates the source from which the asthma medication name was obtained, either a prescription label or self-report.

title: Time Since Last Used Asthma Medication
description: Categorized time elapsed since the participant last used an asthma medication, with categories including 24 hours or more, one week or more, and one month or more.

title: Total Months of Asthma Medication Use
description: Total duration of asthma medication use, reported in months.

title: Years of Asthma Medication Use
description: Duration of asthma medication use, reported in years.

title: Still Has Asthma
description: Indicates whether the participant still has asthma at the time of the exam.

title: Ate or Drank More Than Water Since 9 AM
description: Indicates whether the participant consumed anything other than water since 9 AM on the day of the exam visit.

title: Attended Year 7 Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant attended the Year 7 exam.

title: Click Present
description: Indicates whether a click was detected during cardiac auscultation.

title: Click Response to Standing
description: Indicates the response of an auscultated click to the standing position.

title: Diastolic Murmur Present
description: Indicates whether a diastolic murmur was detected during cardiac auscultation.

title: Ejection Sound Present
description: Indicates whether an ejection sound was detected during cardiac auscultation.

title: First Heart Sound Characteristics
description: Characterization of the first heart sound (S1) detected during cardiac auscultation.

title: Second Heart Sound Component A
description: Characterization of component A of the second heart sound (S2) detected during cardiac auscultation.

title: Second Heart Sound Component B
description: Characterization of component B of the second heart sound (S2) detected during cardiac auscultation.

title: Area of Greatest Systolic Murmur Intensity
description: The anatomical area where the systolic murmur was heard with greatest intensity during cardiac auscultation.

title: Systolic Murmur Present
description: Indicates whether a systolic murmur was detected during cardiac auscultation.

title: Systolic Murmur Response to Handgrip (Loudness)
description: Change in loudness of the systolic murmur in response to handgrip maneuver during cardiac auscultation.

title: Systolic Murmur Response to Handgrip (Timing)
description: Change in timing of the systolic murmur in response to handgrip maneuver during cardiac auscultation.

title: Systolic Murmur Response to Standing (Loudness)
description: Change in loudness of the systolic murmur in response to standing during cardiac auscultation.

title: Systolic Murmur Response to Standing (Timing)
description: Change in timing of the systolic murmur in response to standing during cardiac auscultation.

title: Murmur Timing: Early Systolic
description: Indicates whether the systolic murmur occurs during the early systolic phase.

title: Murmur Timing: Holosystolic
description: Indicates whether the systolic murmur occurs throughout the entire systolic phase (holosystolic).

title: Murmur Timing: Late Systolic
description: Indicates whether the systolic murmur occurs during the late systolic phase.

title: Average Sleep Duration (Hours Per Night, Past Month)
description: Self-reported average number of hours of sleep per night over the past month.

title: Average Days Between Periods at Age 20–30
description: Categorized average number of days between menstrual periods during the age range of 20 to 30 years.

title: Average Number of Flow Days Per Period in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the average number of days of actual menstrual flow per period in the past 12 months was about the same all the time or variable.

title: Average Period Length (Days) in Past 12 Months
description: The approximate number of days the participant's period lasted on average during the past 12 months, recorded when flow duration was reported as about the same all the time.

title: Average Period Length (Days) at Age 20–30
description: The approximate number of days the participant's period lasted on average during the age range of 20 to 30 years.

title: Aware of Changes in Physical Health
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I am aware of changes in my physical health,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Baby Status at Birth
description: Whether the baby was a stillbirth at delivery. For multiple births, the status of each baby (up to three) is recorded separately.

title: Baby Birth Weight (Ounces)
description: The ounces component of the baby's weight at birth. For multiple births, separate variables capture the weight of each baby.

title: Became a Parent
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant became a parent during the follow-up period.

title: Being Fit Is Not a Strong Priority
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'Being fit isn't a strong priority,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Belief About Health Effects of Smoking
description: Participant's self-reported belief about the effect of smoking on health.

title: Belongs to Any Clubs or Organizations
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they belong to any organizations or clubs.

title: Beta-Carotene Supplement Frequency
description: Frequency (per day, week, or month) that the participant took beta-carotene supplements.

title: Number of Beta-Carotene Supplements Taken
description: Number of beta-carotene supplements taken per reported frequency period.

title: Beta-Carotene Supplement Use
description: Indicates whether the participant reported taking beta-carotene supplements.

title: BIA Protocol Modified
description: Indicates whether the bioelectrical impedance analysis protocol was modified for the participant.

title: BIA Reactance Average
description: Average reactance value from bioelectrical impedance analysis measurements.

title: BIA Reactance Reading 1
description: First reactance reading from bioelectrical impedance analysis.

title: BIA Reactance Reading 2
description: Second reactance reading from bioelectrical impedance analysis.

title: BIA Reactance Reading 3
description: Third reactance reading from bioelectrical impedance analysis.

title: BIA Reactance Reading 4
description: Fourth reactance reading from bioelectrical impedance analysis.

title: BIA Reactance Sum
description: Sum of reactance readings from bioelectrical impedance analysis.

title: BIA Resistance Average
description: Average resistance value from bioelectrical impedance analysis measurements.

title: BIA Resistance Reading 1
description: First resistance reading from bioelectrical impedance analysis.

title: BIA Resistance Reading 2
description: Second resistance reading from bioelectrical impedance analysis.

title: BIA Resistance Reading 3
description: Third resistance reading from bioelectrical impedance analysis.

title: BIA Resistance Reading 4
description: Fourth resistance reading from bioelectrical impedance analysis.

title: BIA Resistance Sum
description: Sum of resistance readings from bioelectrical impedance analysis.

title: Mean Biacromial Diameter (cm)
description: Mean biacromial diameter in centimeters, calculated as the average of two repeated measurements taken at the same visit.

title: Biacromial Diameter First Measurement (cm)
description: First measurement of biacromial diameter in centimeters.

title: Biacromial Diameter Second Measurement (cm)
description: Second measurement of biacromial diameter in centimeters.

title: Bicycle Helmet Use
description: Self-reported frequency of wearing a bicycle helmet, ranging from never to always.

title: Bicycle Use Frequency
description: Self-reported frequency of riding a bicycle, ranging from never or almost never to daily or almost daily.

title: Months Bicycling >10 mph or Hard Exercise Bike
description: Number of months in the past 12 months the participant bicycled faster than 10 miles per hour or exercised hard on a stationary exercise bicycle, among those who reported doing so for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Months Bicycling >10 mph or Hard Exercise Bike ≥2 Hours/Week
description: Number of months in the past 12 months the participant bicycled faster than 10 miles per hour or exercised hard on a stationary exercise bicycle for at least 2 hours per week, among those who reported doing so for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Bicycling >10 mph or Hard Exercise Bike Past Year (Any Month ≥1 Hour)
description: Indicates whether the participant bicycled faster than 10 miles per hour or exercised hard on a stationary exercise bicycle during the past 12 months for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Binge Eating Disorder (BED) Diagnosis
description: Indicates whether the participant meets criteria for a diagnosis of binge eating disorder (BED).

title: Ate Large Amount of Food in Any 2-Hour Period
description: Indicates whether the participant reported eating a large amount of food within any 2-hour period.

title: Loss of Control over Eating
description: Indicates whether the participant reported being unable to control how much they were eating during an eating episode.

title: Binge Eating Present
description: Indicates whether binge eating is present based on responses to the Binge Eating Disorder Questionnaire.

title: Binge Eating Syndrome Diagnosis
description: Indicates whether the participant meets criteria for a diagnosis of binge eating syndrome.

title: Binge Eating Syndrome with Distress
description: Indicates whether the participant meets criteria for binge eating syndrome accompanied by distress.

title: Disgusted After Overeating During Loss-of-Control Episode
description: Among participants who reported loss of control over eating, indicates whether they felt disgusted after overeating during such an episode.

title: Duration of Binge Episode in Minutes
description: Among participants who reported loss of control over eating, the number of minutes a typical loss-of-control eating episode lasted.

title: Ate Alone Due to Embarrassment During Loss-of-Control Episode
description: Among participants who reported loss of control over eating, indicates whether they ate alone because of embarrassment during such an episode.

title: Ate More Rapidly Than Usual During Loss-of-Control Episode
description: Among participants who reported loss of control over eating, indicates whether they ate more rapidly than usual during such an episode.

title: Ate Until Uncomfortably Full During Loss-of-Control Episode
description: Among participants who reported loss of control over eating, indicates whether they ate until uncomfortably full during such an episode.

title: Ate Large Amounts When Not Hungry During Loss-of-Control Episode
description: Among participants who reported loss of control over eating, indicates whether they ate large amounts when not physically hungry during such an episode.

title: Frequency of Loss-of-Control Eating Episodes
description: Among participants who reported loss of control over eating, the frequency of such episodes, ranging from less than one day a week to nearly every day.

title: Minutes Since Previous Meal Before Binge Episode
description: Among participants who reported loss of control over eating, the number of minutes elapsed since the previous meal before a typical loss-of-control eating episode began.

title: Time of Day Binge Episode Started
description: Among participants who reported loss of control over eating, the time of day at which a typical loss-of-control eating episode started, ranging from morning to night.

title: Birth Control Pill Adherence
description: Self-reported frequency with which the participant takes birth control pills as prescribed.

title: Currently Taking Birth Control Pills
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking birth control pills at the time of the exam.

title: Birth Control Medication Dose Unit 1
description: The unit of measurement for the first dose of birth control medication.

title: Birth Control Medication Dose Unit 2
description: The unit of measurement for the second dose of birth control medication.

title: Birth Control Medication Dose 1
description: The first of two recorded doses for the birth control medication.

title: Birth Control Medication Dose 2
description: The second of two recorded doses for the birth control medication.

title: Months on Birth Control Since Last Started
description: Total months the participant has been taking birth control pills since the last time they started using them.

title: Months Since Last Started Birth Control Pills
description: Number of months since the participant last started taking birth control pills.

title: Years Since Last Started Birth Control Pills
description: Number of years since the participant last started taking birth control pills.

title: Birth Control Medication Number
description: Sequential medication number assigned to the birth control pill record.

title: Months Took Birth Control Pills (Current User)
description: Number of months the participant (as a current user) has taken birth control pills.

title: Source of Birth Control Medication Name
description: Indicates the source from which the birth control medication name was obtained.

title: Source of Birth Control Medication Name (Exam G)
description: Indicates the source from which the birth control medication name was obtained, such as a prescription or bottle label.

title: Family Member Pays for Birth Control
description: Indicates whether a family member pays for the participant's birth control medication.

title: Friend Pays for Birth Control
description: Indicates whether a friend pays for the participant's birth control medication.

title: Medicaid Pays for Birth Control
description: Indicates whether Medicaid pays for the participant's birth control medication.

title: Medicare Pays for Birth Control
description: Indicates whether Medicare pays for the participant's birth control medication.

title: Other Payer for Birth Control (Indicator)
description: Indicates whether some other payer not otherwise listed pays for the participant's birth control medication.

title: Participant Pays for Birth Control
description: Indicates whether the participant pays for their own birth control medication.

title: Private Insurance Pays for Birth Control
description: Indicates whether private insurance pays for the participant's birth control medication.

title: Birth Control Prescribed by Doctor
description: Indicates whether the participant's birth control medication was prescribed by a doctor.

title: Ever Had Problems with Birth Control
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever experienced any problems with their birth control medication.

title: Date Last Stopped Birth Control Pills
description: The date on which the participant last stopped taking birth control pills.

title: Number of Birth Control Tablets Per Year
description: The number of birth control tablets or capsules taken per year.

title: Total Months of Birth Control Pill Use
description: Total number of months the participant took birth control pills altogether, combining current and ex-user duration since first started.

title: Total Months of Birth Control Use (Alternate)
description: Alternate variable capturing total duration of birth control pill use in months.

title: Total Months of Current Birth Control Use
description: Duration of current birth control pill use in months, for participants who are current users.

title: Months Took Birth Control Pills (Ex-User)
description: Number of months the participant took birth control pills, reported for ex-users of birth control pills.

title: Total Years of Birth Control Use (Alternate)
description: Alternate variable capturing total duration of birth control pill use in years.

title: Total Years of Current Birth Control Use
description: Duration of current birth control pill use in years, for participants who are current users.

title: Total Years of Birth Control Pill Use
description: Total number of years the participant took birth control pills altogether.

title: Years Took Birth Control Pills (Ex-User)
description: Number of years the participant took birth control pills, reported for ex-users of birth control pills.

title: Has Bleeding Disorders
description: Participant self-report of whether they have any bleeding disorders.

title: Doctor-Diagnosed Blood Clot Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant was told by a doctor that they have a blood clot since the last exam, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Blood Drawn
description: Indicates whether blood was successfully drawn from the participant during the exam visit.

title: Current Use of Prescribed Blood Pressure Medications
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking prescribed blood pressure medications, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Body Mass Index (kg/m–)
description: Participant body mass index in kg/m–.

title: Body Fat Mass (lb)
description: Body fat mass in pounds, derived from bioelectrical impedance analysis measurements.

title: Body Fat Percentage
description: Body fat expressed as a percentage of total body weight, derived from bioelectrical impedance analysis measurements.

title: Body Height (Inches)
description: Participant height in inches.

title: Body Image Discrepancy Score – Opposite Sex
description: Derived score reflecting the discrepancy between the respondent's self-perceived body image and the figure selected as most attractive to the opposite sex.

title: Body Image Discrepancy Score – Same Sex
description: Derived score reflecting the discrepancy between the respondent's self-perceived body image and the figure selected as most attractive to the same sex.

title: Body Image Discrepancy Score – Self
description: Derived score reflecting the discrepancy between the respondent's self-perceived current body figure and their ideal figure selection.

title: Body Image Dissatisfaction Score
description: Derived score reflecting overall body image dissatisfaction.

title: Lean Body Mass (lb)
description: Lean body mass in pounds, derived from bioelectrical impedance analysis measurements.

title: Lean Body Mass Percentage
description: Lean body mass expressed as a percentage of total body weight, derived from bioelectrical impedance analysis.

title: Perceives Body as Sexually Appealing
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'My body is sexually appealing,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Body Surface Area
description: Body surface area recorded at the time of echocardiographic examination.

title: Body Water (lb)
description: Total body water in pounds, derived from bioelectrical impedance analysis.

title: Body Water Percentage
description: Total body water expressed as a percentage of total body weight, derived from bioelectrical impedance analysis.

title: Body Weight (lb)
description: Participant body weight in pounds.

title: Bottle Used But Not Returned – 1st Collection
description: Indicates, for each of up to five bottles from the 1st urine collection, whether that bottle was used but not returned by the participant.

title: Bottle Used But Not Returned – 2nd Collection
description: Indicates, for each of up to five bottles from the 2nd urine collection, whether that bottle was used but not returned by the participant.

title: Bottle Used But Not Returned – 3rd Collection
description: Indicates, for each of up to five bottles from the 3rd urine collection, whether that bottle was used but not returned by the participant.

title: Any Used Bottles Lost
description: Indicates whether any used urine collection bottles that were not returned were reported as lost.

title: Months Bowling or Playing Golf
description: Number of months in the past 12 months the participant bowled or played golf, among those who reported doing so for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Months Bowling or Playing Golf ≥3 Hours/Week
description: Number of months in the past 12 months the participant bowled or played golf for at least 3 hours per week, among those who reported doing so for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Bowling or Golf Past Year (Any Month ≥1 Hour)
description: Indicates whether the participant bowled or played golf during the past 12 months for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Post-Exercise Blood Pressure Error
description: Flag indicating whether a blood pressure measurement error occurred during the post-exercise period of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Pre-Exercise Blood Pressure Error
description: Flag indicating whether a blood pressure measurement error occurred during the pre-exercise period of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Recovery Blood Pressure Error
description: Flag indicating whether a blood pressure measurement error occurred during the recovery period of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 1 Blood Pressure Error
description: Flag indicating whether a blood pressure measurement error occurred during stage 1 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 2 Blood Pressure Error
description: Flag indicating whether a blood pressure measurement error occurred during stage 2 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 3 Blood Pressure Error
description: Flag indicating whether a blood pressure measurement error occurred during stage 3 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 4 Blood Pressure Error
description: Flag indicating whether a blood pressure measurement error occurred during stage 4 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 5 Blood Pressure Error
description: Flag indicating whether a blood pressure measurement error occurred during stage 5 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 6 Blood Pressure Error
description: Flag indicating whether a blood pressure measurement error occurred during stage 6 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 7 Blood Pressure Error
description: Flag indicating whether a blood pressure measurement error occurred during stage 7 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 8 Blood Pressure Error
description: Flag indicating whether a blood pressure measurement error occurred during stage 8 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 9 Blood Pressure Error
description: Flag indicating whether a blood pressure measurement error occurred during stage 9 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Arm Used for Blood Pressure Measurement
description: Indicates which arm (right or left) was used for blood pressure measurement during the reactivity protocol.

title: Blood Pressure Measurement Method at Baseline
description: Indicates whether the auscultatory or oscillometric method was used for each blood pressure reading during the pre-instruction baseline phase of the reactivity protocol. Recorded across five readings.

title: Blood Pressure Measurement Method During Cold Pressor
description: Indicates whether the auscultatory or oscillometric method was used for each blood pressure reading during the cold pressor task phase of the reactivity protocol. Recorded across four readings.

title: Blood Pressure Measurement Method During Star-Tracing
description: Indicates whether the auscultatory or oscillometric method was used for each blood pressure reading during the star-tracing task phase of the reactivity protocol. Recorded across five readings.

title: Breakfast Frequency (Days/Week vs. Month, Categorical)
description: Categorical indicator of whether the participant's reported breakfast frequency is expressed in days per week or days per month.

title: Days per Week or Month Eating Breakfast
description: Number of days per week or per month the participant reported eating breakfast.

title: Breakout Task Indicator
description: Indicates which task version (Task 1 or Task 2) was administered during the breakout phase of the reactivity protocol.

title: Breastfed This Baby
description: Indicates whether the participant breastfed this baby.

title: Duration of Breastfeeding
description: Duration of breastfeeding, categorized as less than 6 weeks, 6 to 11 weeks, 3 to 6 months, or more than 6 months.

title: Brewer's Yeast Supplement Frequency
description: Frequency (per day, week, or month) that the participant took brewer's yeast supplements.

title: Number of Brewer's Yeast Supplements Taken
description: Number of brewer's yeast supplements taken per reported frequency period.

title: Brewer's Yeast Supplement Use
description: Indicates whether the participant reported taking brewer's yeast supplements.

title: Age at First Bronchitis Attack
description: Age in years at the time of the participant's first bronchitis attack.

title: Bronchitis Confirmed by a Doctor
description: Indicates whether the participant's bronchitis was confirmed by a doctor.

title: Ever Had Attacks of Bronchitis
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever had attacks of bronchitis.

title: Age When Chronic Bronchitis Started
description: Age in years when the participant's chronic bronchitis started.

title: Chronic Bronchitis Confirmed by a Doctor
description: Indicates whether the participant's chronic bronchitis was confirmed by a doctor.

title: Ever Had Chronic Bronchitis
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever had attacks of chronic bronchitis.

title: Still Has Chronic Bronchitis
description: Indicates whether the participant still has chronic bronchitis at the time of the exam.

title: Number of Brothers Who Smoke Cigarettes
description: Number of the participant's brothers who smoke cigarettes.

title: Number of Brothers Very Overweight
description: Number of the participant's brothers who are very overweight.

title: Number of Brothers with Asthma
description: Number of the participant's full brothers who have had asthma.

title: Number of Brothers with Cancer
description: Number of the participant's full brothers who have had cancer.

title: Number of Brothers with Gout
description: Number of the participant's brothers who have had gout.

title: Number of Brothers with Heart Failure
description: Number of the participant's full brothers who have had heart failure.

title: Number of Brothers with Kidney Failure or Dialysis
description: Number of the participant's full brothers who have had kidney failure or dialysis.

title: Bulimia Nervosa, Non-Purging Type
description: Indicates whether the participant meets criteria for a diagnosis of bulimia nervosa, non-purging type.

title: Bulimia Nervosa, Purging Type
description: Indicates whether the participant meets criteria for a diagnosis of bulimia nervosa, purging type.

title: Buys Clothes to Look Best
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I buy clothes that make me look my best,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Caffeine Consumed in Past 24 Hours
description: Indicates whether the participant consumed any caffeinated beverage in the 24 hours prior to the exam visit.

title: Coffee Consumed in Past 24 Hours
description: Indicates whether the participant consumed coffee in the 24 hours prior to the exam visit.

title: Cola Consumed in Past 24 Hours
description: Indicates whether the participant consumed cola in the 24 hours prior to the exam visit.

title: Hot Chocolate Consumed in Past 24 Hours
description: Indicates whether the participant consumed hot chocolate in the 24 hours prior to the exam visit.

title: Tea Consumed in Past 24 Hours
description: Indicates whether the participant consumed tea in the 24 hours prior to the exam visit.

title: Use of Calcium-Fortified Products
description: Indicates whether the participant reported using calcium-fortified products.

title: Estimated Daily Calcium Intake from Diet (mg)
description: Estimated daily calcium intake from diet, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Estimated Daily Calcium Intake from Diet and Supplements (mg)
description: Estimated daily calcium intake from both diet and supplements combined, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Calcium Supplement Frequency
description: Frequency (per day, week, or month) that the participant took calcium supplements.

title: Calcium Supplement Use
description: Indicates whether the participant reported taking calcium supplements.

title: Calibrated Average Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Calibrated average diastolic blood pressure, defined in later exams as the calibrated average of the second and third diastolic blood pressure readings.

title: Calibrated Fasting Insulin (Exam G)
description: Calibrated fasting insulin concentration measured in µU/mL.

title: Calibrated Average Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Calibrated average systolic blood pressure, defined in later exams as the calibrated average of the second and third systolic blood pressure readings.

title: Caltrac Code ACTM
description: Indicates whether the ACTM code was present on the Caltrac physical activity monitor readout.

title: Caltrac Code MET
description: Indicates whether the MET code was present on the Caltrac activity monitor readout.

title: Caltrac Code NCAL
description: Indicates whether the NCAL code was present on the Caltrac activity monitor readout.

title: Caltrac Code PM
description: Indicates whether the PM code was present on the Caltrac activity monitor readout.

title: Caltrac Codes Present
description: Indicates whether any Caltrac codes were present on the activity monitor readout.

title: Caltrac Count
description: The activity count recorded by the Caltrac monitor over the monitoring period.

title: Caltrac Kit Given
description: Indicates whether the Caltrac activity monitoring kit was given to the participant.

title: Caltrac Off-Hours
description: The number of hours the Caltrac activity monitor was not worn during the monitoring period.

title: Caltrac Off-Minutes
description: The number of minutes the Caltrac activity monitor was not worn during the monitoring period.

title: Caltrac Start Date
description: The date on which the participant began wearing the Caltrac activity monitor.

title: Staff Instructed Participant on Caltrac
description: Indicates whether study staff provided the participant with instructions on how to wear the Caltrac activity monitor.

title: Caltrac Worn for 24 Hours
description: Indicates whether the participant wore the Caltrac activity monitor for the full 24-hour monitoring period.

title: How Long Could Continue Living at Current Standard if Income Lost
description: Participant's self-reported assessment of how long they could continue to live at their current address and standard of living if all current sources of household income were lost. Response categories range from less than 1 month to more than 1 year.

title: Car Riding Frequency
description: Self-reported frequency of riding in a car, ranging from never or almost never to daily or almost daily.

title: Estimated Daily Total Carbohydrate Intake (g)
description: Estimated daily total carbohydrate intake, in grams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: 1 mL Urine Aliquot for CARDIA Quality Control
description: Indicates whether a 1 mL urine aliquot for albumin and creatinine quality control was collected for CARDIA quality control participants.

title: 3 mL Urine Aliquots for CARDIA Quality Control
description: Indicates whether six 3 mL urine aliquots for storage were collected for CARDIA quality control participants.

title: Participant Is CARDIA Quality Control
description: Indicates whether the participant is designated as a CARDIA quality control participant for urine specimen collection.

title: 1 mL Urine Aliquot for CARDIA Samples
description: Indicates whether a 1 mL urine aliquot for albumin and creatinine was collected as part of CARDIA urine samples.

title: Number of 1 mL Urine Aliquot Vials for CARDIA Samples
description: Number of filled vials for the 1 mL urine aliquot (albumin and creatinine) collected as part of CARDIA urine samples.

title: 3 mL Urine Aliquots for CARDIA Samples
description: Indicates whether six 3 mL urine aliquots for storage were collected as part of CARDIA urine samples.

title: Number of 3 mL Urine Aliquot Vials for CARDIA Samples
description: Number of filled vials for the three 3 mL urine aliquots for storage collected as part of CARDIA urine samples.

title: Cardiac History Exclusion: Heart Attack, Angina, or Valvular Prolapse
description: Indicates whether the participant reported a history of heart attack, angina, or valvular prolapse, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Cardiac History Exclusion: Enlarged Heart, Rheumatic Fever, or Rheumatic Heart Disease
description: Indicates whether the participant reported a history of enlarged heart, rheumatic fever, rheumatic heart disease, or related conditions, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Cardiac History Exclusion: Cardiovascular Disease Conditions
description: Indicates whether the participant had a history of cardiovascular disease conditions, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Cardiac History Exclusion: Cardiac Conditions
description: Indicates whether the participant had a history of cardiac conditions, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: History of Cardiomyopathy
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had cardiomyopathy.

title: Current Status of Cardiomyopathy
description: Current status of cardiomyopathy, indicating whether the participant still has the problem, whether it is controlled by medication or other means, or whether it is completely cured or gone.

title: Current Cardiovascular Medication Use
description: Indicates whether the participant was currently taking cardiovascular medications, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Care Recipient Personal Care Needs
description: Whether the participant's family member requires personal care.

title: Participant Provides Personal Care to Family Member
description: Whether the participant provides personal care to their family member.

title: Strain From Providing Personal Care
description: Self-reported level of strain the participant experiences from providing personal care to their family member.

title: Care Recipient Routine Help Needs
description: Whether the participant's family member requires help with routine needs.

title: Participant Provides Routine Help to Family Member
description: Whether the participant provides help with routine needs to their family member.

title: Strain From Providing Routine Help
description: Self-reported level of strain the participant experiences from providing help with routine needs to their family member.

title: Estimated Daily Carotene Intake (mg)
description: Estimated daily carotene intake, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Carotid Artery Ultrasound Since Last CARDIA Exam
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant had a carotid artery ultrasound since the last CARDIA exam.

title: Carotid IMT Scan Result (Part II)
description: Indicates whether the carotid intima-media thickness (IMT) scan (Part II of the carotid ultrasound procedure) was completed.

title: Carry Gun or Knife for Protection
description: Self-reported indicator of whether the participant carries a gun or knife for protection.

title: CT (CAT) Scan Since Last CARDIA Exam
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant had a CT (CAT) scan since the last CARDIA exam.

title: Ever Used Cannabidiol (CBD)
description: Self-reported whether the participant has ever used cannabidiol (CBD).

title: Times Used CBD in Past 30 Days
description: Number of times the participant used cannabidiol (CBD) in the past 30 days.

title: Reason CCA Video Scan Incomplete or Not Done (Code)
description: Coded reason why the common carotid artery (CCA) video scan (Part I) was incomplete or not performed (e.g., equipment malfunction).

title: CCA Video Scan Result (Part I)
description: Indicates whether the common carotid artery (CCA) video scan (Part I of the carotid ultrasound procedure) was completed.

title: Participant Census Occupation Code
description: Three-digit census occupation code assigned to the participant's reported occupation.

title: CES-D Item: Poor Appetite / Did Not Feel Like Eating
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant did not feel like eating and had a poor appetite. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: CES-D Item: Bothered by Things That Usually Do Not Bother
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant was bothered by things that usually do not bother them. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: CES-D Item: Could Not Get Going
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant could not 'get going.' Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: CES-D Item: Could Not Shake Off the Blues
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant felt they could not shake off the blues even with help from family and friends. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: CES-D Item: Enjoyed Life
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant enjoyed life. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.' This is a positively worded item.

title: CES-D Item: Everything I Did Was an Effort
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant felt that everything they did was an effort. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: CES-D Item: Felt as Good as Other People
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant felt they were just as good as other people. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.' This is a positively worded item.

title: CES-D Item: Felt Depressed
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant felt depressed. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: CES-D Item: Felt That People Dislike Me
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant felt that people disliked them. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: CES-D Item: Felt Fearful
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant felt fearful. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: CES-D Item: Felt Happy
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant felt happy. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.' This is a positively worded item.

title: CES-D Item: Felt Hopeful About the Future
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant felt hopeful about the future. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.' This is a positively worded item.

title: CES-D Item: Felt Life Had Been a Failure
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant thought their life had been a failure. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: CES-D Item: Felt Lonely
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant felt lonely. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: CES-D Item: Felt Sad
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant felt sad. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: CES-D Item: Had Crying Spells
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant had crying spells. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: CES-D Item: People Were Unfriendly
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant felt that people were unfriendly. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: CES-D Item: Sleep Was Restless
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant's sleep was restless. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: CES-D Item: Talked Less Than Usual
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, it seemed the participant talked less than usual. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: CES-D Item: Trouble Keeping Mind on Things
description: CES-D questionnaire item asking whether, during the past week, the participant had trouble keeping their mind on what they were doing. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale ranging from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: CES-D Total Score
description: Total score on the CES-D (Center for Epidemiologic Studies Depression) scale, derived from the individual questionnaire items administered during the past week.

title: Chance to Develop Special Abilities
