description: Participant's self-reported agreement that their job provides a chance to develop specialized skills or special abilities. Responses are recorded on a 4-point scale from strongly disagree to strongly agree.

title: Change in Activity Level Over Last 3 Months
description: Self-reported change in physical activity level over the preceding 3 months, categorized as more, less, or about the same.

title: Ever Used Varenicline (Chantix) to Quit Smoking
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever used varenicline (Chantix) as a smoking cessation aid.

title: Varenicline (Chantix) Use in Past Week
description: Indicates whether the participant used varenicline (Chantix) in the past week.

title: Frequently Checks Appearance in Mirror
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I frequently check my appearance in the mirror,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Cold Usually Goes to Chest
description: Indicates whether the participant's colds usually go to the chest. Response options include No, Yes, and Don't get colds.

title: Chest Cold Kept Off Work in Past 3 Years
description: Indicates whether a chest cold kept the participant off work in the past 3 years.

title: Usually Has Chest Colds
description: Indicates whether the participant usually has chest colds, with response options including No, Yes, and Do not get colds.

title: Consented to CT of Chest
description: Indicates whether the participant consented to CT scanning of the chest.

title: Chest Distance Between Origin and Electrode E
description: Distance between the origin reference point (0) and electrode E on the chest, measured during ECG electrode placement for the treadmill exercise test.

title: Chest Distance Between Origin and Electrode V4
description: Distance between the origin reference point (0) and electrode V4 on the chest, measured during ECG electrode placement for the treadmill exercise test.

title: Chest Distance Between Origin and Electrode V6
description: Distance between the origin reference point (0) and electrode V6 on the chest, measured during ECG electrode placement for the treadmill exercise test.

title: Chest CT Dose-Length Product (DLP)
description: Dose-length product (DLP) recorded for the chest CT scan, a measure of total radiation dose delivered during the chest acquisition.

title: Mean Chest Girth (cm)
description: Mean chest girth in centimeters, calculated as the average of two repeated measurements taken at the same visit.

title: Chest Girth First Measurement (cm)
description: First measurement of chest girth in centimeters.

title: Chest Girth Second Measurement (cm)
description: Second measurement of chest girth in centimeters.

title: Heart Rate During Chest CT
description: Heart rate recorded at the time of the chest CT acquisition.

title: Chest CT Image Number
description: Image number assigned to the chest CT acquisition.

title: Chest or Cardiac Abnormalities on Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant had chest or cardiac abnormalities detected on physical examination, including rales, wheezes, systolic murmur, or S3 gallop, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Action Taken When Chest Pain Occurs
description: Self-reported action taken by the participant when chest pain occurs.

title: Change in Chest Pain When Standing Still
description: Self-reported change in chest pain symptoms when the participant stands still.

title: Doctor's Explanation of Chest Pain
description: The explanation provided by a doctor regarding the participant's chest pain.

title: Saw Doctor for This Chest Pain
description: Indicates whether the participant has seen a doctor specifically regarding this chest pain.

title: Saw Doctor Because of Chest Pain
description: Indicates whether the participant ever saw a doctor because of chest pain.

title: Duration of Chest Pain Episodes
description: Self-reported duration of chest pain episodes.

title: Chest Pain Lasting at Least 30 Minutes
description: Indicates whether the participant's chest pain episodes last at least 30 minutes.

title: Ever Had Chest Pain or Discomfort
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever experienced pain or discomfort in the chest.

title: Frequency of Chest Pain Episodes
description: Self-reported frequency of chest pain episodes, ranging from more than once a day to less than once a month.

title: Chest Pain Location: Left Anterior Chest
description: Indicates whether chest pain is located in the left anterior chest.

title: Chest Pain Location: Left Arm
description: Indicates whether chest pain radiates to or is located in the left arm.

title: Chest Pain Location: Lower Sternum
description: Indicates whether chest pain is located at the lower sternum.

title: Chest Pain Location: Other
description: Indicates whether chest pain is located in an area other than the specified locations.

title: Chest Pain Location: Upper/Mid Sternum
description: Indicates whether chest pain is located at the upper or mid sternum.

title: Chest Pain in Last Year
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced chest pain in the last year.

title: Chest Pain Worse with Chest Pressure
description: Indicates whether pressing on the chest makes the pain worse.

title: Chest Pain Character/Quality
description: Self-reported quality of chest pain, characterized as sharp or knife-like, dull or aching, neither, or unknown.

title: Time Until Chest Pain Relief
description: Self-reported time until the chest pain is relieved.

title: Chest Pain Triggered by Anger or Anxiety
description: Indicates whether chest pain is initiated by anger or anxiety.

title: Chest Pain Triggered by Cold Weather
description: Indicates whether chest pain is initiated by cold weather.

title: Chest Pain Triggered by Exercise
description: Indicates whether chest pain is initiated by exercise.

title: Chest Pain Triggered by Food
description: Indicates whether chest pain is initiated by food intake.

title: Chest Pain Triggered by Other Causes
description: Indicates whether chest pain is initiated by causes other than those specified.

title: Chest Pain Trigger Unknown
description: Indicates whether the participant did not know what initiated their chest pain.

title: Chest Pain When Walking at Ordinary Pace
description: Indicates whether the participant experiences chest pain when walking at an ordinary pace.

title: Chest Pain When Walking Uphill or Quickly
description: Indicates whether the participant experiences chest pain when walking uphill or quickly.

title: Chest CT Series Number
description: Series number assigned to the chest CT acquisition.

title: Days per Week Did Childcare
description: Number of days per week the participant cared for a child.

title: Hours per Day Did Childcare
description: Number of hours per day the participant cared for a child.

title: Months in Past Year Cared for Child ≤10 Years
description: Number of months in the past year the participant cared for a child aged 10 years or younger.

title: Had Children at Year 0 Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant had children at the Year 0 (baseline) exam.

title: Had Children at Year 7 Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant had children at the Year 7 exam.

title: Cholesterol-Lowering Medication Classification Codes
description: Up to four medication classification codes assigned to each cholesterol-lowering medication reported by the participant.

title: Source of Cholesterol Medication Name
description: Indicates the source of the cholesterol-lowering medication name, either from a prescription label or self-report.

title: Estimated Daily Cholesterol Intake (mg)
description: Estimated daily dietary cholesterol intake, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Current Use of Prescribed Cholesterol-Lowering Medications
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking prescribed cholesterol-lowering medications, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Doctor-Diagnosed Chronic Bronchitis Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant was told by a doctor that they have chronic bronchitis since the last exam, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Chronic Burden: Serious Ongoing Health Problem With Children
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced a serious ongoing health problem with their children lasting longer than 6 months.

title: Chronic Burden: Ongoing Financial Strain
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced ongoing financial strain lasting longer than 6 months, rated from not stressful to very stressful.

title: Chronic Burden: Ongoing Difficulties With Job or Ability to Work
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced ongoing difficulties with their job or ability to work lasting longer than 6 months, rated from not stressful to very stressful.

title: Chronic Burden: Serious Ongoing Health Problem With Others Close to Participant
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced a serious ongoing health problem with others close to them lasting longer than 6 months.

title: Chronic Burden: Serious Ongoing Health Problem With Parents
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced a serious ongoing health problem with their parents lasting longer than 6 months.

title: Chronic Burden: Serious Ongoing Health Problem With Partner
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced a serious ongoing health problem with their partner lasting longer than 6 months.

title: Chronic Burden: Ongoing Relationship Difficulties With Someone Close
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced ongoing difficulties in a relationship with someone close to them lasting longer than 6 months, rated from not stressful to very stressful.

title: Chronic Burden: Serious Ongoing Health Problem With Self
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced a serious ongoing health problem with themselves lasting longer than 6 months, rated from not stressful to very stressful.

title: Chronic Disease Exclusion
description: Indicates whether the participant had a chronic disease, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Current Chronic Infectious Disease
description: Indicates whether the participant was currently experiencing a chronic infectious disease, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Ever Smoked Cigars Regularly
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever smoked cigars regularly for at least three months, where 'regularly' is defined as at least 2 cigars per week almost every week.

title: Ever Smoked Cigarettes Regularly
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever smoked cigarettes regularly for at least three months, where 'regularly' is defined as at least 5 cigarettes per week almost every week.

title: Number of Cigarettes Smoked During Monitoring Period
description: The number of cigarettes smoked by the participant during the monitoring period.

title: Smoked Cigarettes During Monitoring Period
description: Indicates whether the participant smoked cigarettes during the monitoring period.

title: Number of Cigarettes in Past 24 Hours
description: The number of cigarettes smoked by the participant in the 24 hours prior to the exam visit.

title: Average Cigarettes Per Day
description: Self-reported average number of cigarettes smoked per day.

title: Circumferential Peak Strain (%)
description: Global circumferential peak strain (%) of the left ventricle as measured by 2D echocardiography.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Cirrhosis (Years)
description: Age in years at the time of cirrhosis diagnosis.

title: History of Cirrhosis
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had cirrhosis.

title: Current Status of Cirrhosis
description: Current status of cirrhosis, indicating whether the participant still has the problem, whether it is controlled by medication or other means, or whether it is completely cured or gone.

title: MRI Clinical Alert Level
description: Clinical alert level assigned by the MRQC radiologist following review of the brain MRI, categorized as Level 1 through Level 4.

title: Clinician Concern About Participant Memory
description: Participant-reported indication of whether a doctor or nurse has expressed concern about the participant's memory.

title: Close Family Member Died in Past Year
description: Self-reported indication of whether a close family member died in the past year.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Admits When Making a Mistake
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 8) asking whether the respondent admits when they make a mistake. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Admits to Not Knowing
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 11) asking whether the respondent admits when they do not know something. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Always Courteous
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 12) asking whether the respondent is always courteous. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Feels Resentful When Not Getting Own Way
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 3) asking whether the respondent feels resentful when they do not get their way. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Tendency to Get Even
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 10) asking whether the respondent has a tendency to get even. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Willingness to Help Others
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 1) asking whether the respondent does not hesitate to help others. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Insists on Getting Own Way
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 13) asking whether the respondent insists on getting their own way. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Irritated by People Requesting Favors
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 19) asking whether the respondent is irritated by those who request favors. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Jealous of Others' Good Fortune
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 18) asking whether the respondent is jealous of others' good fortune. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Likes to Gossip
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 4) asking whether the respondent likes to gossip. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Never Disliked Anyone
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 2) asking whether the respondent has never disliked anyone. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Never Hurt Anyone's Feelings
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 20) asking whether the respondent has never hurt anyone's feelings. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: No Resentment When Asked to Return a Favor
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 16) asking whether the respondent feels no resentment when asked to return a favor. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Would Not Let Someone Else Be Punished
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 15) asking whether the respondent would not let someone else be punished. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Plays Sick to Avoid Things
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 6) asking whether the respondent plays sick in order to get out of things. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Practices What Is Preached
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 9) asking whether the respondent practices what they preach. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Rebels Even When Not Right
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 5) asking whether the respondent rebels even when they are not in the right. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Felt Like Smashing Things
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 14) asking whether the respondent has felt like smashing things. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Takes Advantage of People
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 7) asking whether the respondent takes advantage of people. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Crowne-Marlowe: Tolerant of Opposing Ideas
description: Crowne-Marlowe Social Desirability Scale item (Question 17) asking whether the respondent does not mind opposing ideas. Responses are coded as True or False.

title: Ever Injected Cocaine
description: Self-reported whether the participant has ever injected cocaine.

title: Days Used Other Forms of Cocaine in Past 30 Days
description: Number of days the participant used cocaine (other forms, excluding crack) in the past 30 days.

title: Ever Used Other Forms of Cocaine
description: Self-reported whether the participant has ever used cocaine in forms other than crack.

title: Used Cocaine in Past 24 Hours
description: Self-reported whether the participant used cocaine in the past 24 hours.

title: Cod Liver Oil Supplement Frequency
description: Frequency (per day, week, or month) that the participant took cod liver oil supplements.

title: Number of Cod Liver Oil Supplements Taken
description: Number of cod liver oil supplements taken per reported frequency period.

title: Cod Liver Oil Use
description: Indicates whether the participant reported taking cod liver oil.

title: Artificial Sweetener Added to Coffee
description: Indicates whether the participant added artificial sweetener (e.g., Equal, NutraSweet, Splenda, Sweet N Low, Stevia) to their coffee.

title: Cream Added to Coffee
description: Indicates whether the participant added cream, such as half and half, to their coffee.

title: Coffee Creamer Added to Coffee
description: Indicates whether the participant added coffee creamer (powdered or liquid) to their coffee.

title: Milk Added to Coffee
description: Indicates whether the participant added milk to their coffee.

title: Nothing Added to Coffee
description: Indicates whether the participant did not add anything to their coffee.

title: Sugar or Honey Added to Coffee
description: Indicates whether the participant added sugar or honey to their coffee.

title: Coffee Drinking Frequency (Past Month)
description: Self-reported frequency of coffee drinking during the past month.

title: Coffee Usual Amount per Occasion
description: Self-reported usual amount of coffee consumed per drinking occasion.

title: Frequency of Artistic Activities (Painting, Drawing, Sculpting)
description: Self-reported frequency of participation in artistic activities such as painting, drawing, sculpting, or similar pursuits.

title: Frequency of Crafts (Woodwork, Sewing, Knitting, Etc.)
description: Self-reported frequency of participation in craft activities including woodwork, pottery, ceramics, quilting, sewing, or knitting.

title: Frequency of Group Study or Discussion Activities
description: Self-reported frequency of participation in group intellectual activities such as religious study, book clubs, stock clubs, or discussion groups.

title: Frequency of Playing Musical Instruments or Singing
description: Self-reported frequency of participation in musical activities such as playing an instrument, singing in a choir, or performing in an orchestra or band.

title: Frequency of Playing Cards, Puzzles, or Board Games
description: Self-reported frequency of participation in mentally stimulating game activities such as playing cards, puzzles, or board games.

title: Frequency of Reading Books
description: Self-reported frequency of reading books.

title: Frequency of Reading Magazines
description: Self-reported frequency of reading magazines.

title: Frequency of Reading Newspapers
description: Self-reported frequency of reading newspapers.

title: Current Cold or Bronchitis
description: Indicates whether the participant currently had a cold or bronchitis, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Cold Sweats in Past 3 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced cold sweats in the past 3 months, assessed as part of a symptom checklist related to menstrual and menopausal changes.

title: Urine Collection Complete by Collection Number
description: Indicates whether each individual urine collection (1st, 2nd, or 3rd) was completed by the participant.

title: Urine Collection End Date by Collection
description: The end date for each of the three 24-hour urine collection periods.

title: Length of Collection Period (Hours) by Collection
description: The duration in hours of each of the three 24-hour urine collection periods.

title: Urine Collection Start Date by Collection
description: The start date for each of the three 24-hour urine collection periods.

title: Collection Time and/or Date Changed
description: Indicates whether the collection time and/or date was changed from the originally recorded values.

title: Frequency of Computer Use (Email, Web, Online Purchases, Games)
description: Self-reported frequency of computer use including activities such as email, web searching, online purchases, and games.

title: Confidence in Modifying Diet to Improve Health
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to modify diet to improve health, asked as: 'How confident are you that you can modify your diet to improve your health?' Response options include 'Not at all confident' at the low end of the scale.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Congenital Heart Disease (Years)
description: Age in years at the time of congenital heart disease diagnosis.

title: History of Congenital Heart Disease
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had congenital heart disease.

title: Current Status of Congenital Heart Disease
description: Current status of congenital heart disease, indicating whether the participant still has the problem, whether it is controlled by medication or other means, or whether it is completely cured or gone.

title: History of Congestive Heart Failure
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had congestive heart failure.

title: Current Status of Congestive Heart Failure
description: Current status of congestive heart failure, indicating whether the participant still has the problem, whether it is controlled by medication or other means, or whether it is completely cured or gone.

title: Participant Read and Signed Consent Form
description: Indicates whether the participant read and signed the consent form for the 24-hour urine substudy.

title: Contact Lenses Tinted
description: Indicates whether the contact lenses worn by the participant at the time of examination were tinted.

title: Wearing Contact Lenses
description: Indicates whether the participant was wearing contact lenses at the time of examination.

title: Continue Treadmill Test With New Criteria
description: Indicates whether the treadmill exercise test was continued under new criteria.

title: Continuous Wave Doppler Recorded
description: Indicates whether continuous wave Doppler was recorded at the echocardiography exam.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Frequently Ask People for Advice
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant frequently asks people for advice. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Most Will Use Unfair Means to Gain
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant believes most people will use unfair means to get ahead. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Not Easily Angered
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant considers themselves not easily angered. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Some Family Have Annoying Habits
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant finds that some family members have annoying habits. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Against Giving Money to Beggars
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant is against giving money to beggars. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Enjoy Vicarious Vengeance
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item (question 39, paraphrased) asking whether the participant enjoys vicarious vengeance. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Unusual Difficulty Concentrating
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant has unusual difficulty concentrating. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Takes Much Argument to Convince Others
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant feels it takes much argument to convince other people. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Boss Takes Credit and Gives Blame
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item (question 46) asking whether the participant's boss takes credit for successes and assigns blame to others. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Felt Strangers Looking at Me Critically
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant has felt that strangers were looking at them critically. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Strongly Defend Own Opinions
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant strongly defends their own opinions. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Others Ask for Rights They Deny Others
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant believes others demand rights that they themselves deny to others. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: People Often Disappoint Me
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant feels that people often disappoint them. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Others Exaggerate Their Misfortunes
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant believes others exaggerate their misfortunes. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Met Experts No Better Than Self
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant has met so-called experts who were no better than themselves. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Feel Failure When Hearing of Others' Success
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant feels like a failure when they hear of others' success. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Most Are Honest Through Fear of Punishment
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant believes most people are honest primarily through fear of being caught or punished. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Frequently Worries About Something
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant frequently worries about something. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Can Be Friendly With People Who Do Wrong
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant can be friendly with people who have done things they consider wrong. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Often Not in on Gossip of Group
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant is often not included in the gossip of their group. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: People Should Grab All They Can Get
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant believes people should grab everything they can get. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: On Guard With Friendlier-Than-Expected People
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant is on guard with people who are friendlier than expected. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Most Dislike Inconvenience of Helping Others
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant believes most people dislike the inconvenience of helping others. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Wonder What People's Hidden Reasons Are
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant wonders what hidden reasons people might have for their actions. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: People Are Jealous of Good Ideas
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant believes people are jealous of their good ideas. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Impatient With Interruptions of Important Work
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item (question 12) asking whether the participant is impatient with interruptions when doing important work. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Someone Has It in for Me
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant believes that someone has it in for them. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: No Blame for Those Who Take Advantage
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant believes there is no blame for those who take advantage of others. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Most People Would Lie to Get Ahead
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant thinks most people would lie to get ahead. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: No One Cares What Happens to You
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant feels that no one cares what happens to them. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Go Out of Way to Win Points Over Opponent
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant goes out of their way to win points against an opponent. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Prefer to Pass Friends Unless Spoken To
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant prefers to pass friends on the street without speaking unless spoken to first. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Should Pay Back Wrongs on Principle
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant feels that wrongs done to them should be paid back as a matter of principle. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Do Not Cover Poor Opinion or Pity
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant does not conceal their poor opinion or pity of others. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Often Punished Without Cause
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant feels they have often been punished without cause. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Have Had to Be Rough With Annoying People
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant has had to be rough with people who are rude or annoying. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: More Sensitive Than Most People
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant considers themselves more sensitive than most people. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Man Usually Thinks About Sex With Women
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant believes a man usually thinks about sex when he sees a woman. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Sometimes So Excited Cannot Sleep
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant sometimes gets so excited that they cannot sleep. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Do Not Speak Until Spoken To
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant does not speak to others until spoken to first. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Difficulty Starting to Do Things
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant has difficulty starting to do things. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Childhood Male Figure Was Very Strict
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether a significant male figure in the participant's childhood was very strict with them. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Relatives Nearly All in Sympathy With Me
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant feels their relatives are nearly all in sympathy with them. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Taken Orders From Those Less Capable
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant has had to take orders from people less capable than themselves. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Sure I Am Being Talked About
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant is sure they are being talked about by others. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Unimportant Thoughts Can Bother for Days
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant is bothered for days by unimportant thoughts. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Like Being Tipped Off Who to Cultivate
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant likes being tipped off about which people are worth cultivating. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Anxious Over Short Trips From Home
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant gets anxious over short trips away from home. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Safer to Trust Nobody
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant believes it is safer to trust nobody. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: People Make Friends Because of Their Use
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant believes people make friends primarily because of how useful those friends can be. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Item: Worry Over Money and Business
description: Cook-Medley Hostility Questionnaire item asking whether the participant worries about money and business matters. Responses are recorded as True or False.

title: Cook-Medley Hostility Total Score
description: Total Cook-Medley Hostility score derived from questionnaire responses.

title: Doctor-Diagnosed COPD Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant was told by a doctor that they have chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) since the last exam, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Participant Is CARDIA Core Quality Control
description: Indicates whether the participant is designated as a CARDIA core quality control participant at the phlebotomy visit.

title: Core QC Participant (Early Waves)
description: Indicates whether the participant was designated as a core quality control participant for urine specimen collection, recorded in early exam waves.

title: 2 mL QC Urine Aliquot Collected
description: Indicates whether a 2 mL quality control urine aliquot was collected.

title: 1 mL Core Urine Aliquot Collected
description: Indicates whether a 1 mL core urine aliquot was collected.

title: 2 mL Core Urine Aliquot Collected
description: Indicates whether a 2 mL core urine aliquot was collected.

title: Number of 3 mL Core Urine Aliquots for Storage
description: Number of 3 mL core urine aliquots prepared for storage.

title: 3 mL Core Urine Aliquots Collected
description: Indicates whether 3 mL core urine aliquots were collected.

title: Hospitalization for Coronary Angiogram or Heart Catheterization Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant was hospitalized for a coronary angiogram or heart catheterization since the last exam, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: First Corrected Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: First corrected diastolic blood pressure, calculated as the first diastolic reading minus the first random-zero offset (R1_D - RZ1_D).

title: Second Corrected Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Second corrected diastolic blood pressure, calculated as the second diastolic reading minus the second random-zero offset (R2_D - RZ2_D).

title: Third Corrected Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Third corrected diastolic blood pressure, calculated as the third diastolic reading minus the third random-zero offset (R3_D - RZ3_D).

title: First Corrected Systolic Blood Pressure
description: First corrected systolic blood pressure, calculated as the first systolic reading minus the first random-zero offset (R1_S - RZ1_S).

title: Second Corrected Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Second corrected systolic blood pressure, calculated as the second systolic reading minus the second random-zero offset (R2_S - RZ2_S).

title: Third Corrected Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Third corrected systolic blood pressure, calculated as the third systolic reading minus the third random-zero offset (R3_S - RZ3_S).

title: Salivary Cortisol Difference: Sample 2 Minus Sample 1
description: Difference in salivary cortisol concentration between sample 2 (45 minutes after waking) and sample 1 (awakening sample), calculated as FLHSCOR2 - FLHSCOR1.

title: Number of Missing Salivary Cortisol Samples
description: Number of salivary cortisol samples that were missing across the collection protocol.

title: Number of Valid Salivary Cortisol Samples
description: Number of valid salivary cortisol samples across the collection protocol.

title: Salivary Cortisol, Awakening Sample (nmol/L)
description: Salivary cortisol concentration (nmol/L) measured from the awakening sample (sample 1).

title: Undetectable Salivary Cortisol Flag, Awakening Sample
description: Flag (=1) indicating that salivary cortisol was undetectable in the awakening sample (sample 1).

title: Salivary Cortisol, 45 Minutes After Waking (nmol/L)
description: Salivary cortisol concentration (nmol/L) measured approximately 45 minutes after waking (sample 2).

title: Undetectable Salivary Cortisol Flag, 45 Minutes After Waking
description: Flag (=1) indicating that salivary cortisol was undetectable in the sample collected approximately 45 minutes after waking (sample 2).

title: Salivary Cortisol, 2.5 Hours After Waking (nmol/L)
description: Salivary cortisol concentration (nmol/L) measured approximately 2.5 hours after waking (sample 3).

title: Undetectable Salivary Cortisol Flag, 2.5 Hours After Waking
description: Flag (=1) indicating that salivary cortisol was undetectable in the sample collected approximately 2.5 hours after waking (sample 3).

title: Salivary Cortisol, 8 Hours After Waking (nmol/L)
description: Salivary cortisol concentration (nmol/L) measured approximately 8 hours after waking (sample 4).

title: Undetectable Salivary Cortisol Flag, 8 Hours After Waking
description: Flag (=1) indicating that salivary cortisol was undetectable in the sample collected approximately 8 hours after waking (sample 4).

title: Salivary Cortisol, 12 Hours After Waking (nmol/L)
description: Salivary cortisol concentration (nmol/L) measured approximately 12 hours after waking (sample 5).

title: Undetectable Salivary Cortisol Flag, 12 Hours After Waking
description: Flag (=1) indicating that salivary cortisol was undetectable in the sample collected approximately 12 hours after waking (sample 5).

title: Salivary Cortisol, Bedtime Sample (nmol/L)
description: Salivary cortisol concentration (nmol/L) measured from the bedtime sample (sample 6).

title: Undetectable Salivary Cortisol Flag, Bedtime Sample
description: Flag (=1) indicating that salivary cortisol was undetectable in the bedtime sample (sample 6).

title: Serum Cotinine Concentration
description: Serum cotinine concentration, measured in ng/mL.

title: Cough for 3 or More Months Per Year
description: Indicates whether the participant has a cough for 3 or more consecutive months per year.

title: Cough Frequency (Daily or Most Days)
description: Indicates whether the participant coughs 4 to 6 times per day or on 4 or more days per week.

title: Episodes of Cough and Phlegm 3+ Weeks Per Year
description: Indicates whether the participant has had problems with cough and phlegm lasting 3 or more weeks per year.

title: Years With Yearly Cough and Phlegm Episodes
description: Number of years the participant has had yearly episodes of cough and phlegm.

title: Cough on Getting Up or First Thing in Morning
description: Indicates whether the participant coughs on getting up or first thing in the morning.

title: Cough Rest of Day or at Night
description: Indicates whether the participant coughs during the rest of the day or at night.

title: Usually Has a Cough
description: Indicates whether the participant usually has a cough.

title: Years With Chronic Cough
description: Number of years the participant has had this cough.

title: Ever Received Counseling to Quit Smoking
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever received counseling to quit smoking.

title: Counseling to Quit Smoking in Past Week
description: Indicates whether the participant received counseling to quit smoking in the past week.

title: Covered by Medicare or Medicaid
description: Indicates whether the participant is covered by Medicare or Medicaid.

title: Covered by Military Health Care (CHAMPUS/TRICARE/VA)
description: Indicates whether the participant is covered by CHAMPUS/TRICARE, VA, or other military health care.

title: Days Used Crack or Cocaine in Past 30 Days
description: Number of days the participant used crack or cocaine in the past 30 days.

title: Ever Used Crack or Cocaine
description: Self-reported whether the participant has ever used crack or cocaine in their lifetime.

title: Crack Taken by Needle
description: Self-reported whether the participant has taken crack via needle injection.

title: Crack Taken by Smoking
description: Self-reported whether the participant has taken crack by smoking.

title: Crack Taken by Snorting
description: Self-reported whether the participant has taken crack by snorting.

title: Crack Taken by Swallowing
description: Self-reported whether the participant has taken crack by swallowing.

title: Used Crack in Past 24 Hours
description: Self-reported whether the participant used crack in the past 24 hours.

title: Cracker Sequence Code
description: Code indicating the sequence in which crackers were presented to the participant during the sodium taste test.

title: Cracker Sequence Code for Preferred Cracker
description: Code indicating the sequence position of the cracker selected as most preferred by the participant during the sodium taste test.

title: Created Skill Score
description: Derived score reflecting skill-related aspects of the participant's job, computed from responses to the Karasek Job Strain Questionnaire.

title: 2 mL Creatinine QC Urine Sample Collected
description: Indicates whether a 2 mL creatinine quality control urine sample was collected.

title: 2 mL Creatinine Urine Sample Collected
description: Indicates whether a 2 mL creatinine urine sample was collected.

title: C-Reactive Protein by BN II Method (–g/mL)
description: C-reactive protein concentration (–g/mL) measured by the BN II nephelometry method.

title: C-Reactive Protein, High Sensitivity (–g/mL)
description: High-sensitivity C-reactive protein concentration (–g/mL).

title: CT Scan Required Overnight Stay
description: Indicates whether the CT scan required an overnight hospital stay.

title: Reason for CT Scan
description: Reason the participant underwent a CT scan, including stroke, transient ischemic attack, head trauma, headache, or other.

title: Weight Above CT Table Upper Limit
description: Participant weight assessed as above or below the upper weight limit for the CT table, recorded as part of CT exam eligibility screening.

title: Blood Pressure Cuff Size
description: Size of the blood pressure cuff used for measurement, categorized as small (17.0–22.5 cm), regular arm, large arm, or thigh cuff.

title: Current Depression Status
description: Participant-reported current depression status, indicating whether the participant is depressed at the time of the assessment (Question 1b).

title: Currently on Kidney Dialysis
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently receiving kidney dialysis, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Date Current Menstrual Period Began
description: Date the participant's current menstrual period began.

title: Current Menstrual Period Date Exact vs Approximate
description: Indicates whether the date of the current menstrual period was reported as an exact or approximate date.

title: Currently Pregnant
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently pregnant, asked as a follow-up when no menstrual period was reported in the past 3 months.

title: Current Pregnancy Status
description: Participant self-report of whether they are currently pregnant, collected as part of CT exam screening.

title: Currently Menstruating
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently menstruating.

title: Currently Taking Insulin or Oral Diabetes Medications
description: Among participants who have been told by a physician that they have diabetes, indicates whether they are currently taking insulin or oral medications for diabetes.

title: Reason Daily Monitor Log Not Returned
description: Reason why the participant did not return the daily monitor log accompanying the activity monitor. Documented reasons include the log being lost.

title: Participant Returned Daily Monitor Log
description: Indicates whether the participant returned the daily monitor log accompanying the activity monitor.

title: Date Last Ate/Drank Non-Water (Delayed OGTT)
description: The date on which the participant last ate or drank anything other than water, including candy and chewing gum, prior to the delayed OGTT blood draw.

title: Date Subject Last Smoked
description: Date on which the participant last smoked, recorded at the blood pressure assessment visit.

title: Number of Days Employed in Last 7 Days
description: Number of days the participant was employed during the last 7 days.

title: Days in Past Month With Maximum-Drinking Day Amount
description: Number of days in the past month on which the participant consumed the same number of drinks as their reported maximum for a single day that month.

title: Pre-Instruction Baseline Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Diastolic blood pressure measured during the pre-instruction baseline phase of the reactivity protocol, recorded across up to four sequential readings.

title: Diastolic Blood Pressure Before GXT
description: Diastolic blood pressure measured before the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Breakout Diastolic Blood Pressure and Recovery
description: Diastolic blood pressure measured during the breakout task and subsequent recovery phase of the reactivity protocol, recorded across up to five readings including task and recovery measurements.

title: Cold Pressor Diastolic Blood Pressure and Recovery
description: Diastolic blood pressure measured during the cold pressor task and subsequent recovery phase of the reactivity protocol, recorded across up to five readings including task and recovery measurements.

title: Post-Exercise Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Diastolic blood pressure measured after completion of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Pre-Exercise Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Diastolic blood pressure measured before beginning the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Recovery Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Diastolic blood pressure measured during the recovery period following the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 1 Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Diastolic blood pressure measured during stage 1 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 2 Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Diastolic blood pressure measured during stage 2 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 3 Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Diastolic blood pressure measured during stage 3 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 4 Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Diastolic blood pressure measured during stage 4 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 5 Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Diastolic blood pressure measured during stage 5 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 6 Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Diastolic blood pressure measured during stage 6 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 7 Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Diastolic blood pressure measured during stage 7 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 8 Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Diastolic blood pressure measured during stage 8 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Star-Tracing Diastolic Blood Pressure and Recovery
description: Diastolic blood pressure measured during the star-tracing task and subsequent recovery phase of the reactivity protocol, recorded across up to five readings including task and recovery measurements.

title: Decision Authority Score
description: Derived score reflecting the degree of decision-making authority the participant has in their job, computed from responses to the Karasek Job Strain Questionnaire.

title: Decision Latitude Score
description: A derived composite score reflecting the participant's overall decision latitude in their job, from the Karasek Job Strain Questionnaire.

title: Diet Change: Decreased Caffeine
description: Indicates whether the participant reported decreasing caffeine intake as a dietary change.

title: Diet Change: Decreased Red Meat
description: Indicates whether the participant reported decreasing red meat consumption as a dietary change.

title: Diet Change: Decreased Sodium
description: Indicates whether the participant reported decreasing sodium intake as a dietary change.

title: Diet Change: Decreased Sugar/Simple Carbohydrates
description: Indicates whether the participant reported decreasing sugar or simple carbohydrate intake as a dietary change.

title: Visited a Dentist Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant visited a dentist since the last update.

title: Number of Dentist Visits
description: Total number of times the participant visited a dentist since the last update.

title: Type of Dentures
description: Type of dentures worn by the participant, recorded as part of the spirometry completion screening. Response options include full dentures.

title: Denture Use
description: Indicates whether the participant wears dentures, recorded as part of the spirometry completion screening.

title: Dentures Removed Prior to Spirometry
description: Indicates whether the participant's dentures were removed prior to spirometry testing.

title: Feeling Blue or Depressed in Past 3 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced feeling blue or depressed in the past 3 months, assessed as part of a symptom checklist related to menstrual and menopausal changes.

title: Depression Bother Severity
description: Participant-reported severity rating of how much depression has bothered them, rated on a five-point scale from 'Not at all' to 'Extremely' (Question 1c).

title: Has Developed a Healthy Lifestyle
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I have developed a healthy lifestyle,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Blood Pressure Device Used
description: Indicates which blood pressure measurement device was used at the exam visit.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Diabetes (Years)
description: Age in years at the time of first diabetes diagnosis.

title: Ever Told by Doctor You Have Diabetes
description: Participant self-report of whether they have ever been told by a physician that they have diabetes, recorded as part of the phlebotomy screening.

title: Doctor-Diagnosed Diabetes Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant was told by a doctor that they have diabetes since the last exam.

title: Current Use of Prescribed Medications for Diabetes or High Blood Sugar
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking prescribed medications for diabetes or high blood sugar, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Current Status of Diabetes
description: Current status of diabetes, categorized as still have, under control, or cured or gone.

title: Echo Diagnosis Code 5
description: Fifth diagnosis code recorded at the time of echocardiographic examination.

title: Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Diastolic blood pressure recorded at the echocardiography exam visit, as documented on the echocardiography technician's worksheet.

title: Diastolic Blood Pressure ≥100 mmHg Exclusion
description: Indicates whether the participant had a diastolic blood pressure of 100 mmHg or greater, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Other Reasons for Change of Diet (Indicator)
description: Indicates whether the participant reported other reasons for making dietary changes not covered by predefined response options.

title: Any Change in Diet in Past 5 Years
description: Indicates whether the participant reported making any change in their diet in the past 5 years.

title: Any Changes in Diet Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant reported any changes in their diet since the last exam.

title: Diet/Low-Calorie/Artificially Sweetened Fruit Drink Frequency (Past Month)
description: Self-reported frequency of drinking diet, low-calorie, or artificially sweetened fruit drinks, sports or energy drinks, or low-calorie flavored water during the past month. Examples include Crystal Light, sugar-free Red Bull, and Aquafina Flavor Splash; artificially sweetened drinks made at home are also included.

title: Diet/Low-Calorie/Artificially Sweetened Fruit Drink Usual Amount per Occasion
description: Self-reported usual amount of diet, low-calorie, or artificially sweetened fruit drinks, sports or energy drinks consumed per drinking occasion.

title: Frequency of Diet Pill Use to Lose Weight
description: Among participants who reported using diet pills to lose weight, the frequency of use, ranging from less than one day a week to more than five times a week.

title: Used Diet Pills to Lose Weight
description: Indicates whether the participant reported using diet pills as a weight loss method.

title: Diet Soda or Pop Drinking Frequency (Past Month)
description: Self-reported frequency of drinking diet soda or pop during the past month.

title: Diet Soda or Pop Usual Amount per Occasion
description: Self-reported usual amount of diet soda or pop consumed per drinking occasion.

title: Estimated Daily Dietary Fiber Intake (g)
description: Estimated daily dietary fiber intake, in grams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Frequency of Dietary Product Use to Lose Weight
description: Among participants who reported using dietary products to lose weight, the frequency of use, ranging from less than one day a week to more than five times a week.

title: Used Dietary Products to Lose Weight
description: Indicates whether the participant reported using dietary products as a weight loss method.

title: Frequency of Dieting in Adulthood
description: Participant-reported frequency of being on a diet during adulthood, ranging from none or hardly any of the time to nearly all the time.

title: Difficulty Getting Needed Health Services
description: Participant's self-reported assessment of how hard it has been overall to get the health services they have needed, rated from very hard to not hard at all.

title: Difficulty Making Ends Meet
description: Participant's self-reported frequency of difficulty making ends meet, with responses ranging from frequently having trouble to never having trouble.

title: Difficulty Meeting Social Demands
description: Participant's self-reported difficulty in meeting social demands, rated from very hard to not very hard.

title: Difficulty Paying for Medical Care
description: Participant's self-reported difficulty in paying for medical care for themselves and their family, rated from very hard to not very hard.

title: Dinner Frequency (Days/Week vs. Month, Categorical)
description: Categorical indicator of whether the participant's reported dinner frequency is expressed in days per week or days per month.

title: Days per Week or Month Eating Dinner
description: Number of days per week or per month the participant reported eating dinner.

title: History of Discoid Lupus (Ever Told by Doctor)
description: Participant-reported history of discoid lupus, based on whether they were ever told by a doctor that they had discoid lupus.

title: Discouraged from Job Hunting
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant was discouraged from job hunting during the follow-up period.

title: Dislikes Their Physique
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I dislike my physique,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Distance Moved from Clinic
description: Reported distance the participant moved from the CARDIA clinic site, recorded at follow-up contact intervals as part of participant tracking.

title: Distress About Inability to Stop or Control Eating
description: Participant-reported level of distress about being unable to stop or control eating, ranging from not at all to extremely upset.

title: Distress About Overeating
description: Participant-reported level of distress about overeating, ranging from not at all to extremely upset.

title: Frequency of Diuretic Use to Lose Weight
description: Among participants who reported using diuretics to lose weight, the frequency of use, ranging from less than one day a week to more than five times a week.

title: Used Diuretics to Lose Weight
description: Indicates whether the participant reported using diuretics as a weight loss method.

title: Got Divorced
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant got divorced during the follow-up period.

title: Does Not Care How Appearance Is Perceived
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I don't care how my appearance is perceived,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Does Not Do Things to Keep Fit
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I don't do things to keep fit,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Does Not Pay Attention to Symptoms When Sick
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'When sick, I don't pay attention to symptoms,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Does Not Threaten Their Health
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I don't threaten my health,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Does Things to Increase Strength
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I do things to increase my strength,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Doctor or Clinic Visit in Past Year
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant had a doctor or clinic visit in the past year, collected at multiple follow-up interviews.

title: Number of Doctor Visits Since Last Exam
description: Number of times the participant visited a doctor since the last exam, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Dominant Hand
description: The participant's dominant hand.

title: Doppler Test Since Last CARDIA Exam
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant had a Doppler test since the last CARDIA exam.

title: Frequency of Double Diet Pill Use to Lose Weight
description: Among participants who reported using double diet pills to lose weight, the frequency of use, ranging from less than one day a week to more than five times a week.

title: Used Double Diet Pills to Lose Weight
description: Indicates whether the participant reported using double diet pills as a weight loss method.

title: Drank Alcohol More Than Once or Twice in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant drank alcohol more than once or twice in the past year.

title: Drank Any Alcoholic Beverages in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant drank any alcoholic beverages in the past year.

title: Usual Drinks of Beer Per Week
description: Usual number of drinks of beer consumed per week. One beer is defined as a 12-ounce glass, can, or bottle.

title: Usual Drinks of Hard Liquor Per Week
description: Usual number of drinks of hard liquor consumed per week. Each shot, defined as 1– ounces, is counted as one drink.

title: Alcoholic Drinks Consumed in Past 24 Hours
description: Number of alcoholic drinks the participant consumed during the past 24 hours.

title: Usual Drinks of Wine Per Week
description: Usual number of drinks of wine consumed per week. One drink is defined as approximately a 5-ounce glass.

title: Took Drugs During Monitoring Period
description: Indicates whether the participant took drugs during the monitoring period.

title: History of Dry Mouth Awakening from Sleep Requiring Water
description: Participant-reported history of dry mouth severe enough to awaken them from sleep and require a drink of water.

title: Reason DSST Not Given: Hearing
description: Indicates that the Digit Symbol Substitution Test was not administered due to a hearing limitation on the part of the participant.

title: Reason DSST Not Given: Not Cooperative
description: Indicates that the Digit Symbol Substitution Test was not administered because the participant was not cooperative.

title: Reason DSST Not Given: Physical Limitation
description: Indicates that the Digit Symbol Substitution Test was not administered due to a physical limitation on the part of the participant.

title: Reason DSST Not Given: Vision
description: Indicates that the Digit Symbol Substitution Test was not administered due to a vision limitation on the part of the participant.

title: Digit Symbol Substitution Test Performed
description: Indicates whether the Digit Symbol Substitution Test was administered to the participant.

title: Digit Symbol Substitution Test Total Score
description: Total score on the Digit Symbol Substitution Test (DSST), a measure of cognitive processing speed and attention.

title: Times Drove Under Influence in Past 4 Weeks
description: Self-reported count of times the participant drove under the influence of alcohol or substances in the past 4 weeks.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Duodenal Ulcer (Years)
description: Age in years at first diagnosis of duodenal ulcer.

title: History of Duodenal Ulcer
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had a duodenal ulcer.

title: Current Status of Duodenal Ulcer
description: Current status of duodenal ulcer, indicating whether the participant still has the problem, it is controlled by medication or something else, or it is completely cured or gone.

title: Duration on Low Sodium Diet
description: The length of time the participant had been following a low sodium diet at the time of the urine collection.

title: Duration on Weight Loss Diet
description: The length of time the participant had been following a weight loss diet at the time of the urine collection.

title: Artificial Joint or Fracture Hardware
description: Indicates whether the participant had an artificial joint replacement or hardware from fracture repair, recorded as part of the DXA scan screening checklist.

title: Bone Implants
description: Indicates whether the participant had bone implants, recorded as part of the DXA scan screening checklist.

title: Both Upper Body Sides Out of DXA Scan Field
description: Indicates whether both the left and right upper body were out of the DXA scan field during image acquisition, recorded as a scan quality flag.

title: Breast Implants
description: Indicates whether the participant had breast implants, recorded as part of the DXA scan screening checklist.

title: Diaphragm, Cervical Cap, or IUD
description: Indicates whether the participant had a diaphragm, cervical cap, or intrauterine device (IUD) in place, recorded as part of the DXA scan screening checklist.

title: DXA Exclusion at Discretion of Test Personnel
description: Indicates whether the DXA scan was excluded at the discretion of test personnel.

title: DXA Equipment Malfunction
description: Indicates whether the DXA scan could not be completed due to equipment malfunction.

title: Feet Extend Beyond DXA Table
description: Indicates whether the participant's feet extended beyond the end of the DXA table during the scan, recorded as a scan quality flag.

title: Hands or Arms Overlying Torso During DXA
description: Indicates whether the participant's hands or arms were overlying the torso during the DXA scan, recorded as a positioning quality flag.

title: Soft Tissue of Hips Outside DXA Table Lines
description: Indicates whether the soft tissue of the participant's hips extended outside the DXA table lines during the scan, recorded as a positioning quality flag.

title: DXA Image Obtained
description: Indicates whether a DXA image was successfully obtained for the participant.

title: Left Arm Out of DXA Scan Field
description: Indicates whether the participant's left arm was out of the DXA scan field during image acquisition, recorded as a positioning quality flag.

title: Metallic Jewelry or Hairpins Not Removable
description: Indicates whether the participant had metallic jewelry or hairpins that could not be removed prior to the DXA scan, recorded as part of the screening checklist.

title: Metallic Surgical Staples
description: Indicates whether the participant had metallic staples from prior surgery, recorded as part of the DXA scan screening checklist.

title: History of Nuclear Medicine Isotope Study
description: Indicates whether the participant had previously undergone a nuclear medicine isotope study, recorded as part of the DXA scan screening checklist.

title: Ostomy Device
description: Indicates whether the participant had an ostomy device in place, recorded as part of the DXA scan screening checklist.

title: Other Permanent Metal In or On Body
description: Indicates whether the participant had any other metal permanently in or on their body, recorded as part of the DXA scan screening checklist.

title: Pacemaker or Implanted Cardiac Device
description: Indicates whether the participant had a pacemaker, defibrillator, or other implanted cardiac device, recorded as part of the DXA scan screening checklist.

title: DXA Participant Refusal
description: Indicates whether the participant refused to undergo the DXA scan.

title: Participant Unable to Maintain DXA Position
description: Indicates whether the participant was unable to maintain the required position during the DXA scan, recorded as a scan quality flag.

title: Pregnancy or Possible Pregnancy
description: Indicates whether the participant was pregnant or possibly pregnant, recorded as part of the DXA scan screening checklist.

title: Radioactive Seeds Present
description: Indicates whether the participant had radioactive seeds present in the body, recorded as part of the DXA scan screening checklist.

title: Ever Used E-Cigarettes
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever used e-cigarettes.

title: ECG Chest Measurement at Electrode E
description: ECG chest measurement recorded at electrode position E during the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: ECG Chest Measurement at Electrode V6
description: ECG chest measurement recorded at electrode position V6 during the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: ECG Exclusion Criteria Present
description: Indicates whether the participant had ECG findings meeting exclusion criteria for the graded exercise treadmill test, including possible ischemia on ECG.

title: Qualitative 2D Assessment 1
description: First qualitative 2D echocardiographic assessment recorded during the examination.

title: Qualitative 2D Assessment 2
description: Second qualitative 2D echocardiographic assessment recorded during the examination.

title: Overall Echo Quality Scores 1–5
description: Five overall quality scores recorded for the echocardiographic examination.

title: History of Elbow Swelling
description: Participant-reported history of swelling in the elbow.

title: Mean Elbow Width/Breadth (mm)
description: Mean elbow width (breadth) in millimeters, calculated as the average of two repeated measurements taken at the same visit.

title: Elbow Width/Breadth First Measurement (mm)
description: First measurement of elbow width (breadth) in millimeters.

title: Elbow Width/Breadth Second Measurement (mm)
description: Second measurement of elbow width (breadth) in millimeters.

title: Visited Emergency Room Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant visited an emergency room since the last update.

title: Emotional Support Score
description: Score reflecting the level of emotional support available to the participant.

title: Age When Emphysema Started
description: Age in years when the participant's emphysema started.

title: Doctor-Diagnosed Emphysema Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant was told by a doctor that they have emphysema since the last exam, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Emphysema Confirmed by a Doctor
description: Indicates whether the participant's emphysema was confirmed by a doctor.

title: Ever Had Emphysema
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever had emphysema.

title: Still Has Emphysema
description: Indicates whether the participant still has emphysema at the time of the exam.

title: Employment Status During Last 7 Days
description: Whether the participant was employed during the last 7 days, recorded as yes or no.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Enlarged Heart (Years)
description: Age in years at diagnosis of enlarged heart.

title: History of Enlarged Heart
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had an enlarged heart.

title: Current Status of Enlarged Heart Condition
description: Current status of enlarged heart condition, indicating whether the participant still has the problem, it is controlled by medication or something else, or it is completely cured or gone.

title: Entered Marriage-Like Relationship
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant entered a marriage-like (cohabiting) relationship during the follow-up period.

title: Seek Entertainment in High-Crime Area
description: Self-reported indicator of whether the participant seeks entertainment in high-crime areas.

title: HRV Epoch Duration
description: Duration of each epoch used in heart rate variability analysis, recorded for two separate epochs.

title: Equipment Malfunction
description: Indicates whether equipment malfunction was a reason for exclusion or rescheduling of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Plan of Escape Devised
description: Self-reported indicator of whether the participant has devised a plan of escape for dangerous situations.

title: Estimated METs During GXT
description: Estimated metabolic equivalents (METs) achieved during the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Evening Snack Frequency (Days/Week vs. Month, Categorical)
description: Categorical indicator of whether the participant's reported evening snack frequency is expressed in days per week or days per month.

title: Days per Week or Month Eating Evening Snack
description: Number of days per week or per month the participant reported eating an evening snack.

title: Ever Had ≥3 Months Without Period Since Age 18
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever experienced an interval of 3 or more consecutive months without a menstrual period since age 18, excluding times when pregnant or nursing.

title: Ever Attended Technical or Trade School
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever attended a technical or trade school.

title: Ever Been Divorced
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever been divorced.

title: Ever Had Kidney Dialysis
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever had kidney dialysis, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Ever Been Separated
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever been separated from a spouse.

title: Ever Snores
description: Self-reported indicator of whether the participant has ever snored.

title: Ever Been Widowed
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever been widowed.

title: Exam Center
description: CARDIA examining center at which the participant was enrolled at Year 0, carried as a participant-level identifier across exam files.

title: Calculated Age at Exam 1
description: Participant's calculated age at exam 1.

title: Age at Year 35 Exam (Phase 1 and Phase 2)
description: Participant's age at the Year 35 core exam, recorded separately for phase 1 and phase 2 of the two-phase exam structure.

title: Year 35 Core Exam Phase Indicator
description: Indicator of which phase(s) of the Year 35 core exam the participant completed, with code 1 denoting examined at phase 1 only.

title: Year 35 Phase 1 Ancillary Study Status
description: Participation status for the Year 35 phase 1 ancillary study, with code 1 indicating the participant was examined.

title: Year 35 Phase 1 Core Exam Status
description: Participation status for the Year 35 phase 1 core exam; codes E, A, H, 1, 2, 3, or 4 indicate the participant was examined.

title: Year 35 Phase 2 Ancillary Study Status
description: Participation status for the Year 35 phase 2 ancillary study, with code 1 indicating the participant was examined.

title: Year 35 Phase 2 Core Exam Status
description: Participation status for the Year 35 phase 2 core exam; codes E, A, H, 1, 2, 3, or 4 indicate the participant was examined.

title: Exam 2 Status Code (E or A = Examined)
description: Coded participation status for exam 2; codes E or A indicate the participant was examined.

title: Exam 2 Window Code
description: Code indicating the scheduling window for exam 2.

title: Calculated Age at Exam 3
description: Participant's calculated age at exam 3.

title: Pregnancy Status at Exam 3
description: Participant's pregnancy status recorded at exam 3.

title: Exam 3 Status Code (E or A = Examined)
description: Coded participation status for exam 3; codes E or A indicate the participant was examined.

title: Exam 3 Window Code
description: Code indicating the scheduling window for exam 3.

title: Calculated Age at Exam 4
description: Participant's calculated age at exam 4.

title: Pregnancy Status at Exam 4
description: Participant's pregnancy status recorded at exam 4.

title: Exam 4 Status Code (E or H = Examined)
description: Coded participation status for exam 4; codes E or H indicate the participant was examined.

title: Calculated Age at Exam 5
description: Participant's calculated age at the time of exam 5.

title: Pregnancy Status at Exam 5
description: Participant's pregnancy status recorded at exam 5.

title: Exam 5 Status
description: Participation status for exam 5, where codes E, H, 1, 2, 3, or 4 indicate the participant was examined.

title: Exam 5 Status Code (E,H,1,2,3,4 = Examined)
description: Participation status code for exam 5, where codes E, H, 1, 2, 3, or 4 indicate the participant was examined.

title: Calculated Age at Exam 6
description: Participant's calculated age at the time of exam 6.

title: Taking Diabetes Medications at Exam 6
description: Indicates whether the participant was taking diabetes medications at exam 6 (1 = No, 2 = Yes).

title: Pregnancy Status at Exam 6
description: Participant's pregnancy status recorded at exam 6.

title: Exam 6 Status
description: Participation status for exam 6, where codes E, A, H, 1, 2, 3, or 4 indicate the participant was examined.

title: Exam 6 Status Code (E,A,H,1,2,3,4 = Examined)
description: Participation status code for exam 6, where codes E, A, H, 1, 2, 3, or 4 indicate the participant was examined.

title: Calculated Age at Exam 7
description: Participant's calculated age in years at the time of exam 7.

title: Exam 7 CT-Only Examined Flag
description: Flag indicating that the participant was examined by CT only at exam 7.

title: Current Pregnancy Status at Exam 7
description: Indicates whether the participant was currently pregnant at exam 7.

title: Exam 7 Status
description: Participation status for exam 7, where codes E, A, H, 1, 2, 3, or 4 indicate the participant was examined.

title: Exam 7 Status Code (E,A,H,1,2,3,4 = Examined)
description: Participation status code for exam 7, where codes E, A, H, 1, 2, 3, or 4 indicate the participant was examined.

title: Calculated Age at Exam 8 (Year 25)
description: Participant's calculated age in years at the year 25 exam (exam 8).

title: Exam 8 Status
