description: Participation status for exam 8 (year 25), where codes E, A, H, 1, 2, 3, or 4 indicate the participant was examined.

title: Exam 8 Status Code (E,A,H,1,2,3,4 = Examined)
description: Participation status code for exam 8 (year 25), where codes E, A, H, 1, 2, 3, or 4 indicate the participant was examined.

title: Calculated Age at Exam 9 (Year 30)
description: Participant's calculated age at the year 30 exam (exam 9).

title: Exercise Barrier: Crime and Lack of Safety
description: Indicates whether crime and lack of safety affect the participant's ability to exercise outdoors in their neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Exercise Barrier: Hills
description: Indicates whether hills affect the participant's ability to exercise outdoors in their neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Exercise Barrier: Lack of Streetlights
description: Indicates whether lack of streetlights affects the participant's ability to exercise outdoors in their neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Exercise Barrier: No Family or Friends to Exercise With
description: Indicates whether having no family or friends to exercise with affects the participant's ability to exercise outdoors in their neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Exercise Barrier: No Sidewalks or Bicycle Paths or Facilities
description: Indicates whether the absence of sidewalks, bicycle paths, or exercise facilities affects the participant's ability to exercise outdoors in their neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Exercise Barrier: None of the Above
description: Indicates that none of the listed factors affect the participant's ability to exercise outdoors in their neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Exercise Barrier: Not Easy or Pleasant to Exercise There
description: Indicates whether the neighborhood not being easy or pleasant to exercise in affects the participant's ability to exercise outdoors, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Exercise Barrier: Amount and Speed of Traffic
description: Indicates whether the amount and speed of traffic affect the participant's ability to exercise outdoors in their neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Exercise Barrier: Unleashed Dogs
description: Indicates whether unleashed dogs affect the participant's ability to exercise outdoors in their neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Exercise Barrier: Weather
description: Indicates whether weather affects the participant's ability to exercise outdoors in their neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Frequency of Exercise to Lose Weight
description: Among participants who reported exercising to lose weight, the frequency of exercise, ranging from less than one day a week to more than five times a week.

title: History of Exercise-Induced Asthma
description: Indicates whether the participant had ever had an episode of exercise-induced asthma, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Exercises Outdoors in Neighborhood
description: Indicates whether the participant exercises outdoors in their neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Exercised to Lose Weight
description: Indicates whether the participant reported exercising as a method for weight loss.

title: Expectation of Reaching Career Goals
description: Indicates whether the participant expects to reach their career goals.

title: Expectation of Reaching Educational Goals
description: Indicates whether the participant expects to reach their educational goals.

title: Expectation of Reaching Family Life Goals
description: Indicates whether the participant expects to reach their goals in family life.

title: Expectation of Reaching Financial Goals
description: Indicates whether the participant expects to reach their financial goals or financial success.

title: Expectation of Reaching Marriage Goals
description: Indicates whether the participant expects to reach their goals in marriage.

title: Expected Time of Second Blood Collection AM/PM Indicator
description: AM or PM indicator for the expected time of the second blood collection, which is two hours after completion of the glucose drink during the oral glucose tolerance test.

title: Extra HCL Added
description: Indicates whether extra hydrochloric acid (HCL) was added during urine specimen processing.

title: Left Eye Color
description: Observed color of the participant's left eye, categorized as brown, hazel, green, grey, blue, or other.

title: Right Eye Color
description: Observed color of the participant's right eye, categorized as brown, hazel, green, grey, blue, or other.

title: Hysterectomy Reason: Abnormal Pap Smear
description: For women who had a hysterectomy, indicates whether they were told that abnormal pap smear was a reason for the procedure.

title: Age at Angina Diagnosis
description: Age (in years) at which a doctor or nurse first told the participant they have angina, a type of heart problem.

title: Currently Taking Medications for Asthma or Breathing Problem
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking medications for asthma, chronic bronchitis, emphysema, COPD, or any breathing problem.

title: Currently Taking Aspirin at Least Three Times per Week
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking aspirin at least three times a week, including medications that contain aspirin (e.g., Bayer, Excedrin, Ascriptin, Ecotrin) but not non-aspirin pain relievers (e.g., Tylenol, Aleve, or Advil).

title: Age at Asthma Diagnosis
description: Age (in years) at which a doctor or nurse first told the participant they have asthma.

title: Asthma Diagnosis
description: Indicates whether a doctor or nurse has ever told the participant that they have asthma.

title: Asthma in the Past Year
description: Among participants ever diagnosed with asthma, indicates whether they have had asthma in the past year.

title: Bariatric Surgery History
description: Indicates whether the participant has had bariatric surgery (surgery on the stomach or intestines to lose weight and/or treat obesity).

title: Age at Blood Clot (Leg Vein or Lung) Diagnosis
description: Age (in years) at which a doctor or nurse first told the participant they have a blood clot in the leg vein or lung requiring blood thinning medicine.

title: Currently Taking Birth Control Pills
description: For women, indicates whether the participant is currently taking birth control pills.

title: Blood Clot (Leg Vein or Lung) in the Past Year
description: Among participants ever diagnosed with a blood clot in the leg vein or lung requiring blood thinning medicine, indicates whether they have had this condition in the past year.

title: Age at Blood or Lymph Gland Cancer Diagnosis
description: Age (in years) at which a doctor or nurse first told the participant they have cancer or a malignant tumor of the blood or lymph glands.

title: Age at Bone Cancer Diagnosis
description: Age (in years) at which a doctor or nurse first told the participant they have cancer or a malignant tumor of the bone.

title: Benign Prostatic Hypertrophy Diagnosis
description: For men, indicates whether a doctor or nurse has ever told the participant they have benign prostatic hypertrophy.

title: Age at Benign Prostatic Hypertrophy Diagnosis
description: For men, age (in years) at which a doctor or nurse first told the participant they have benign prostatic hypertrophy.

title: Benign Prostatic Hypertrophy in the Past Year
description: For men ever diagnosed with benign prostatic hypertrophy, indicates whether they have had this condition in the past year.

title: Age at Brain Cancer Diagnosis
description: Age (in years) at which a doctor or nurse first told the participant they have cancer or a malignant tumor of the brain.

title: Age at Chronic Bronchitis Diagnosis
description: Age (in years) at which a doctor or nurse first told the participant they have chronic bronchitis.

title: Chronic Bronchitis Diagnosis
description: Indicates whether a doctor or nurse has ever told the participant they have chronic bronchitis.

title: Chronic Bronchitis in the Past Year
description: Among participants ever diagnosed with chronic bronchitis, indicates whether they have had this condition in the past year.

title: Breast Cancer Diagnosis
description: Indicates whether a doctor or nurse has ever told the participant they have cancer or a malignant tumor of the breast.

title: Age at Breast Cancer Diagnosis
description: Age (in years) at which a doctor or nurse first told the participant they have cancer or a malignant tumor of the breast.

title: Currently Breastfeeding
description: For women who have ever been pregnant, indicates whether they are currently breastfeeding.

title: Ever Taken Birth Control Pills or Other Birth Control Medication
description: For women, indicates whether the participant has ever taken birth control pills or other birth control medications.

title: Cancer or Malignant Tumor Diagnosis
description: Indicates whether a doctor or nurse has ever told the participant they have cancer or a malignant tumor.

title: Age at Cervical Cancer Diagnosis
description: Age (in years) at which a doctor or nurse first told the participant they have cancer or a malignant tumor of the cervix.

title: Currently Taking Medications to Lower Blood Cholesterol
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking medications to lower blood cholesterol.

title: Age at Colon Cancer Diagnosis
description: Age (in years) at which a doctor or nurse first told the participant they have cancer or a malignant tumor of the colon.

title: Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) Diagnosis
description: Indicates whether a doctor or nurse has ever told the participant they have chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD).

title: Age at COPD Diagnosis
description: Age (in years) at which a doctor or nurse first told the participant they have chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD).

title: COPD in the Past Year
description: Among participants ever diagnosed with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), indicates whether they have had this condition in the past year.

title: Depression Diagnosis (Ever Told)
description: Participant-reported diagnosis of depression, based on whether a doctor or nurse ever said the participant has depression.

title: Age at Depression Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they have depression.

title: Currently Taking Medications for Depression
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking medications for depression at the time of the exam.

title: Depression in the Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant has had depression in the past year, asked of those with a prior depression diagnosis.

title: Diabetes Diagnosis (Ever Told)
description: Participant-reported diagnosis of diabetes (high sugar in blood or urine), based on whether a doctor or nurse ever said the participant has diabetes.

title: Hysterectomy Reason: Do Not Know
description: Indicates that the participant did not know the reason they were given for their hysterectomy, selected from a checklist of conditions present at the time of the procedure.

title: Age at Emphysema Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they have emphysema.

title: Emphysema Diagnosis (Ever Told)
description: Participant-reported diagnosis of emphysema, based on whether a doctor or nurse ever said the participant has emphysema.

title: Emphysema in the Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant has had emphysema in the past year, asked of those with a prior emphysema diagnosis.

title: Hysterectomy Reason: Endometriosis
description: Indicates that the participant was told they had endometriosis at the time of their hysterectomy, selected from a checklist of conditions present at the time of the procedure.

title: Epilepsy Diagnosis (Ever Told)
description: Participant-reported diagnosis of epilepsy (seizures), based on whether a doctor or nurse ever said the participant has epilepsy.

title: Age at Epilepsy Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they have epilepsy (seizures).

title: Epilepsy or Seizures in the Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant has had epilepsy or seizures in the past year, asked of those with a prior epilepsy diagnosis.

title: Hysterectomy Reason: Fibroids or Benign Tumor
description: Indicates that the participant was told they had fibroids or a benign tumor or growth at the time of their hysterectomy, selected from a checklist of conditions present at the time of the procedure.

title: Age at Gallstones or Gallbladder Disease Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they have gallstones or gallbladder disease.

title: Gallstones or Gallbladder Disease Diagnosis (Ever Told)
description: Participant-reported diagnosis of gallstones or gallbladder disease, based on whether a doctor or nurse ever said the participant has gallstones or gallbladder disease.

title: Gallstones or Gallbladder Disease in the Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant has had gallstones or gallbladder disease in the past year, asked of those with a prior diagnosis.

title: Gestational Diabetes
description: For women, indicates whether the participant's diabetes diagnosis occurred during pregnancy, asked of those who reported a prior diabetes diagnosis.

title: Age at Gout Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they have gout.

title: Gout Diagnosis (Ever Told)
description: Participant-reported diagnosis of gout, based on whether a doctor or nurse ever said the participant has gout.

title: Gout in the Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant has had gout in the past year, asked of those with a prior gout diagnosis.

title: Currently Taking Medications for High Blood Pressure
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking medications for high blood pressure at the time of the exam.

title: High Blood Pressure or Hypertension Diagnosis (Ever Told)
description: Participant-reported diagnosis of high blood pressure or hypertension, based on whether a doctor or nurse ever said the participant has high blood pressure or hypertension.

title: High Blood Pressure During Pregnancy
description: For women, indicates whether the participant's high blood pressure or hypertension diagnosis occurred during pregnancy, asked of those who reported a prior hypertension diagnosis.

title: High Blood Cholesterol Diagnosis (Ever Told)
description: Participant-reported diagnosis of high blood cholesterol, based on whether a doctor or nurse ever said the participant has high blood cholesterol.

title: Heart Problems Diagnosis (Ever Told)
description: Participant-reported diagnosis of heart problems, based on whether a doctor or nurse ever said the participant has heart problems.

title: Age at Hepatitis Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they have hepatitis (as a type of liver disease).

title: Hepatitis in the Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant has had hepatitis in the past year, asked of those with a prior hepatitis diagnosis.

title: HIV Diagnosis (Ever Told)
description: Participant-reported diagnosis of HIV, based on whether a doctor or nurse ever said the participant has HIV.

title: Age at HIV Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they have HIV.

title: Currently Taking Hormones (Excluding Birth Control Pills)
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking hormones other than birth control pills.

title: Age at Hypothyroidism Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told they have hypothyroidism or underactive thyroid.

title: Age at Heart Attack Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told they had a heart attack.

title: Currently Taking Medications for Heart Condition
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking medications for a heart condition.

title: Hysterectomy – Cancer as Reason
description: Indicates whether the participant was told she had cancer at the time of her hysterectomy.

title: Hysterectomy History
description: Indicates whether a female participant has ever had a hysterectomy.

title: Age at Hyperthyroidism Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told they have hyperthyroidism or overactive thyroid (Graves Disease).

title: Hysterectomy – Infections as Reason
description: Indicates whether the participant was told she had infections at the time of her hysterectomy.

title: Degree to Which Medical Problems Interfered with Exercise
description: Self-reported degree to which medical problems interfered with the participant's ability to exercise over the past twelve months, rated on a scale from 1 (a little) to 5 (very much).

title: Medical Problems Interfering with Exercise in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant had any medical problems that interfered with their ability to exercise over the past twelve months.

title: Kidney Problems Diagnosis
description: Indicates whether a doctor or nurse has ever told the participant they have kidney problems.

title: Age at Kidney Failure/Dialysis/Transplant Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told they have kidney failure, required dialysis, or received a kidney transplant.

title: Kidney Failure/Dialysis/Transplant in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant has had kidney failure, dialysis, or a kidney transplant in the past year.

title: Age at Kidney Stones Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told they have kidney stones.

title: Kidney Stones in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant has had kidney stones in the past year.

title: Liver Disease Diagnosis
description: Indicates whether a doctor or nurse has ever told the participant they have liver disease.

title: Age at Lung Cancer Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told they have lung cancer or a malignant tumor of the lung.

title: Age at Melanoma Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told they have melanoma.

title: Age at Nervous, Emotional, or Mental Disorder Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told they have a nervous, emotional, or mental disorder.

title: Nervous, Emotional, or Mental Disorder Diagnosis
description: Indicates whether a doctor or nurse has ever told the participant they have a nervous, emotional, or mental disorder.

title: Nervous, Emotional, or Mental Disorder in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant has had a nervous, emotional, or mental disorder in the past year.

title: Migraine Headaches Diagnosis
description: Indicates whether a doctor or nurse has ever told the participant they have migraine headaches.

title: Age at Migraine Headaches Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told they have migraine headaches.

title: Migraine Headaches in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant has had migraine headaches in the past year.

title: Multiple Sclerosis in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant has had multiple sclerosis in the past year.

title: Age at Mitral Valve Prolapse Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told they have mitral valve prolapse.

title: Nephritis or Glomerulonephritis in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant had nephritis or glomerulonephritis in the past year, as part of a broader question about kidney problems ever diagnosed by a doctor or nurse.

title: Non-Insulin Diabetes Treatment
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever been treated for diabetes without insulin, for example with diet and pills only, among those with a doctor- or nurse-diagnosed history of diabetes.

title: Currently on Weight-Reducing Diet
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently on a weight-reducing diet, asked as a follow-up among those who reported being on such a diet in the past five years.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Other Liver Disease
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they had another type of liver disease.

title: Other Liver Disease in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant had another type of liver disease in the past year, as a follow-up among those with a prior diagnosis of other liver disease.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Other Cancer
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they had another type of cancer or malignant tumor.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Other Digestive Disease
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they had another type of digestive disease, such as Crohn's disease or ulcerative colitis.

title: Other Digestive Disease in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant had another type of digestive disease, such as Crohn's disease or ulcerative colitis, in the past year.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Other Heart Disease
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they had another type of heart problem not otherwise specified.

title: Hysterectomy – Other Indication
description: Indicates whether the participant was told at the time of hysterectomy that the reason was other than the listed conditions, as part of a question about indications for hysterectomy in women.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Other Kidney Problem
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they had another type of kidney problem not otherwise specified.

title: Other Kidney Problem in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant had another type of kidney problem in the past year, as a follow-up among those with a prior diagnosis of other kidney problems.

title: Currently Taking Other Prescription Medications
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking any prescription medications other than birth control pills.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Other Thyroid Disease
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they had another type of thyroid disease not otherwise specified.

title: Other Major Diseases or Health Problems
description: Indicates whether a doctor or nurse ever told the participant that they had any other major diseases or health problems not otherwise captured in the questionnaire.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Other Major Health Problems
description: Age in years at which the participant was first diagnosed with other major health problems not otherwise specified in the questionnaire.

title: Ovary Removal Surgery (Partial or Total)
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever had surgery involving the removal, either totally or partially, of one or both ovaries.

title: Hysterectomy – Pregnancy Complications Indication
description: Indicates whether the participant was told at the time of hysterectomy that pregnancy complications were the reason, as part of a question about indications for hysterectomy in women.

title: Pneumonia (Diagnosis)
description: Indicates whether a doctor or nurse ever told the participant that they have pneumonia.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Pneumonia
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they had pneumonia.

title: Pneumonia in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant had pneumonia in the past year, as a follow-up among those with a prior doctor- or nurse-diagnosed history of pneumonia.

title: Ever Been Pregnant
description: Indicates whether the female participant has ever been pregnant.

title: Currently Pregnant
description: Indicates whether the female participant is currently pregnant, asked as a follow-up among those who reported ever having been pregnant.

title: Hysterectomy – Prolapse Indication
description: Indicates whether the participant was told at the time of hysterectomy that uterine prolapse (fallen uterus or womb) was the reason, as part of a question about indications for hysterectomy in women.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Prostate Cancer
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they had prostate cancer.

title: Peripheral Vascular Disease (Ever Diagnosed)
description: Participant-reported history of peripheral vascular disease, based on whether a doctor or nurse has ever said that the participant has peripheral vascular disease.

title: Age at Peripheral Vascular Disease Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they have peripheral vascular disease.

title: Age at Rheumatic Heart Disease Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they have rheumatic heart disease.

title: Age at Skin Cancer (Non-Melanoma) Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they have skin cancer (not melanoma).

title: Age at Stomach Cancer Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they have stomach cancer.

title: Age at Tuberculosis or Positive TB Skin Test Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they have tuberculosis or a positive skin test for tuberculosis.

title: Tuberculosis or Positive TB Skin Test in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant had tuberculosis or a positive skin test for tuberculosis in the past year, among those with a prior diagnosis.

title: Thyroid Disease (Ever Diagnosed)
description: Participant-reported history of thyroid disease or thyroid problem, based on whether a doctor or nurse has ever said that the participant has a thyroid problem.

title: Stroke or Transient Ischemic Attack (Ever Diagnosed)
description: Participant-reported history of stroke or transient ischemic attack (TIA), based on whether a doctor or nurse has ever said that the participant has had a stroke or TIA.

title: Age at Stroke or TIA Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they have had a stroke or transient ischemic attack (TIA).

title: Stroke or TIA in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant had a stroke or transient ischemic attack (TIA) in the past year, among those with a prior diagnosis.

title: Tubal Ligation (Ever Had)
description: For women, indicates whether the participant has ever had a tubal ligation (tubes tied).

title: Age at Ulcer Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they have an ulcer, as a type of digestive disease.

title: Ulcer in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant had an ulcer in the past year, among those with a prior diagnosis of ulcer as a digestive disease.

title: Age at Kidney Urine Infection (Pyelonephritis) Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they have a urine infection from the kidney (pyelonephritis).

title: Age at Uterine Cancer Diagnosis
description: Age in years at which the participant was first told by a doctor or nurse that they have uterine cancer.

title: Age at Vasectomy
description: Age in years at which the participant had a vasectomy, asked among men who reported having had a vasectomy.

title: Vasectomy (Ever Had)
description: For men, indicates whether the participant has ever had a vasectomy.

title: Maximum Body Weight in Past 5 Years
description: The most the participant weighed during the past five years, in pounds.

title: Minimum Body Weight in Past 5 Years
description: The least the participant weighed during the past five years, in pounds.

title: On Weight-Reducing Diet in Past 5 Years
description: Indicates whether the participant has been on a weight-reducing diet during the past five years.

title: Facial Expressions Rating
description: Interviewer rating of the subject's facial expressions, scored as flat, neutral, or expressive.

title: Factor VII Activity (%)
description: Factor VII coagulation activity, expressed as a percentage.

title: Factor VIII Activity (%)
description: Factor VIII coagulation activity, expressed as a percentage.

title: Family/Friends Criticize You
description: Self-reported frequency with which members of the participant's family or friends criticize them, rated on a 4-point scale from 'Not at all' to 'A lot' (Question 6).

title: Family/Friends Make Too Many Demands
description: Self-reported frequency with which members of the participant's family or friends make too many demands on them, rated on a 4-point scale from 'Not at all' to 'A lot' (Question 5).

title: Family/Friends Let You Down
description: Self-reported frequency with which members of the participant's family or friends let them down when they are counting on them, rated on a 4-point scale from 'Not at all' to 'A lot' (Question 7).

title: Family/Friends Get on Your Nerves
description: Self-reported frequency with which members of the participant's family or friends get on their nerves, rated on a 4-point scale from 'Not at all' to 'A lot' (Question 8).

title: Immediate Family Member Diagnosed With Dementia
description: Self-reported history of an immediate family member diagnosed with dementia (Q1a), and whether that diagnosis occurred before age 65 (Q1b). Captured across two variables: I98DEMFM and I98DEMFM65.

title: Childhood Family Knowledge of Participant's Activities
description: Participant's retrospective report of how often their family knew what they were up to during childhood, rated on a four-point frequency scale from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: Perceived Family/Friend Care
description: Self-reported perception of how much members of the participant's family or friends really care about them, rated on a 4-point scale from 'Not at all' to 'A lot' (Question 1).

title: Ability to Open Up to Family/Friends About Serious Problems
description: Self-reported extent to which the participant can open up to family and friends when facing a serious problem, rated on a 4-point scale from 'Not at all' to 'A lot' (Question 4).

title: Ability to Rely on Family/Friends for Worries
description: Self-reported extent to which the participant can rely on family or friends when needing to talk about their worries, rated on a 4-point scale from 'Not at all' to 'A lot' (Question 3).

title: Feeling Understood by Family/Friends
description: Self-reported extent to which the participant feels that family or friends understand the way they feel about things, rated on a 4-point scale from 'Not at all' to 'A lot' (Question 2).

title: Fasted at Least 8 Hours
description: Indicates whether the participant fasted for at least eight hours prior to the blood draw, based on the reported time of last food or drink intake.

title: Number of Times Eating at Fast Food Restaurants
description: The number of times the participant reported eating at a fast food restaurant, used together with the corresponding frequency unit variable to characterize fast food consumption.

title: Frequency Unit for Eating at Fast Food Restaurants
description: The time unit (week or month) used by the participant when reporting how often they eat at fast food restaurants, paired with the count variable to express a complete frequency.

title: Fast Food Eating Frequency (Times/Week vs. Month, Categorical)
description: Categorical indicator of whether the participant's reported fast food eating frequency is expressed in times per week or times per month.

title: Fast Food Eating Frequency (Times per Month)
description: Number of times per month the participant reported eating at fast food restaurants.

title: Number of Minutes Fasting
description: The total number of minutes the participant fasted prior to the blood draw.

title: Frequency of Fasting to Lose Weight
description: Among participants who reported fasting to lose weight, the frequency of fasting, ranging from less than one day a week to more than five times a week.

title: Year 25 Fasting Glucose Delayed (mg/dL)
description: Fasting glucose concentration (mg/dL) measured from a delayed specimen at Year 25.

title: Year 30 Fasting Glucose Delayed (mg/dL)
description: Fasting glucose concentration (mg/dL) measured from a delayed specimen at Year 30.

title: Year 10 Fasting Glucose (mg/dL)
description: Fasting glucose concentration (mg/dL) measured at the Year 10 exam.

title: Year 10 Fasting Glucose Return Visit (mg/dL)
description: Fasting glucose concentration (mg/dL) measured at the Year 10 return visit.

title: Year 15 Fasting Glucose (mg/dL)
description: Fasting glucose concentration (mg/dL) measured at the Year 15 exam.

title: Year 20 Fasting Glucose (mg/dL)
description: Fasting glucose concentration (mg/dL) measured at the Year 20 exam.

title: Year 20 Fasting Glucose NIST Recalibrated (mg/dL)
description: Year 20 fasting glucose concentration (mg/dL) recalibrated using the NIST standard.

title: Year 25 Fasting Glucose Visit 1 (mg/dL)
description: Fasting glucose concentration (mg/dL) measured from the visit 1 specimen at the Year 25 exam.

title: Year 30 Fasting Glucose Visit 1 (mg/dL)
description: Fasting glucose concentration (mg/dL) measured from the visit 1 specimen at the Year 30 exam.

title: Year 7 Fasting Glucose (g/dL)
description: Fasting glucose concentration measured at the Year 7 exam. Units are uncertain: the concept ID and unit field indicate g/dL, while the VARDESC states ug/dL; neither is the standard clinical unit for glucose (mg/dL).

title: Fasting Insulin (Exam F)
description: Fasting insulin concentration measured in µU/mL.

title: Fasting Insulin Quantity-Not-Sufficient Flag (Year 25)
description: Flag indicating whether the fasting insulin specimen at Year 25 was quantity not sufficient (QNS); a value of 2 indicates QNS.

title: Fasting Insulin (Exam G)
description: Fasting insulin concentration measured in µU/mL.

title: Year 10 Fasting Insulin
description: Fasting insulin concentration at Year 10, measured in µU/mL.

title: Year 10 Fasting Insulin (Return Visit)
description: Fasting insulin concentration measured in µU/mL at the Year 10 return visit.

title: Year 25 Fasting Insulin
description: Fasting insulin concentration at Year 25, measured in µU/mL.

title: Year 30 Fasting Insulin
description: Fasting insulin concentration at Year 30, measured in µU/mL.

title: Fasted to Lose Weight
description: Indicates whether the participant reported fasting as a method for weight loss.

title: Types of Fat Used in Food Preparation (Numeric Codes)
description: Numeric codes identifying the types of fat used in the preparation of foods. Up to seven fat types are recorded per participant.

title: Father Age at Death
description: Age of the participant's natural father at the time of death, in years.

title: Father Age at Heart Attack
description: Age of the participant's natural father when he had a heart attack, in years.

title: Father Age Regardless of Vital Status
description: Age of the participant's natural father regardless of vital status.

title: Father Ever Had Angina
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural father ever had angina (chest pain related to heart disease). Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Father Ever Had Asthma
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural father ever had asthma. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Father's Body Build at Heaviest
description: Participant-reported description of the father's body build at his heaviest weight.

title: Father Body Figure Rating
description: Body figure rating for the participant's natural father.

title: Father Ever Had Cancer
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural father ever had cancer. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Father Cause of Death
description: Reported cause of the participant's natural father's death, with categories including accident, cancer, heart attack, stroke, other, or do not know.

title: Father Cause of Death (Other, Specify)
description: Specified cause of death for the participant's natural father when cause was reported as 'other.'

title: Father Current Age
description: Current age of the participant's natural father in years, if living.

title: Father Ever Had Diabetes
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural father ever had diabetes. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Father Ever Had Gout
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural father ever had gout. Response options are No, Yes, or Don't know.

title: Father Ever Had Heart Attack
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural father ever had a heart attack. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Father Ever Had Heart Failure
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural father ever had heart failure. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Father Ever Had High Blood Pressure
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural father ever had high blood pressure. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Father Ever Had Kidney Failure or Dialysis
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural father ever had kidney failure or dialysis. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Father Living Status
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural father is living. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Father Heart Attack Before Age 60
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural father had a heart attack before age 60. Response options are No, Yes, or Don't know.

title: Father Overweight Status
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural father is or was overweight.

title: Father Smokes Cigarettes
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural father smokes cigarettes.

title: Father Ever Had Stroke
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural father ever had a stroke. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Frequency of Feeling Lonely
description: Participant-reported frequency of feeling lonely, rated on a four-point scale from Frequently to Never.

title: Frequency of Feeling That Others Care
description: Participant-reported frequency of feeling that other people really care for them, rated on a four-point scale from Frequently to Never.

title: Felt Loved During Childhood
description: Participant's retrospective report of how often they felt loved during childhood, rated on a four-point frequency scale from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: Current Illness With Fever
description: Indicates whether the participant had an illness with fever on the day of the exam, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Fibrinogen (mg/dL)
description: Plasma fibrinogen concentration, measured in mg/dL.

title: Figure of Friend 1
description: Selected figure rating representing the body shape of the respondent's first friend.

title: Figure of Friend 2
description: Selected figure rating representing the body shape of the respondent's second friend.

title: Figure of Friend 3
description: Selected figure rating representing the body shape of the respondent's third friend.

title: Figure Reflecting How Respondent Often Feels
description: Selected figure rating reflecting how the respondent often feels about their body.

title: Figure Thought Preferable to Men
description: Selected figure rating reflecting the body shape the respondent believes is preferable to men.

title: Figure Thought Preferable to Women
description: Selected figure rating reflecting the body shape the respondent believes is preferable to women.

title: Figure Reflecting How Respondent Thinks They Look
description: Selected figure rating reflecting how the respondent thinks they currently look.

title: History of Fingers Unusually Sensitive to Cold
description: Participant-reported history of fingers being unusually sensitive to cold.

title: History of Unusual Finger Color Changes in Cold
description: Participant-reported history of unusual color changes in the fingers when exposed to cold.

title: Color of Fingers During Cold-Induced Change
description: Reported color of fingers during cold-induced color changes, asked as a follow-up to the question about unusual finger color changes in the cold.

title: History of Finger Joint Swelling
description: Participant-reported history of swelling in the fingers.

title: History of Sores Leaving Scars on Fingertips
description: Participant-reported history of sores on the fingertips that left scars.

title: History of Skin Thickening or Tightening of Fingers or Toes
description: Participant-reported history of skin thickening or tightening of the fingers or toes.

title: First Blood Collection After 10:30 AM
description: Indicates whether the time of the first blood collection was after 10:30 AM, used as an eligibility criterion for the oral glucose tolerance test.

title: First Procedure on Participant Today
description: Indicates whether the blood pressure assessment was the first procedure performed on the participant that day.

title: Fish Oil Supplement Frequency
description: Frequency of fish oil supplement use, recorded as the number of times taken per day, week, or month.

title: Number of Fish Oil Supplements Taken
description: The number of fish oil supplements taken per dose or per frequency interval reported.

title: Fish Oil Supplement Use
description: Indicates whether the participant has taken fish oil supplements. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Fist Clenching Rating
description: Interviewer rating of fist clenching observed in the subject, scored as none, occasional, or frequent.

title: Fitness Orientation Subscale Score
description: Derived subscale score for fitness orientation.

title: Average Number of Flow Days Per Period at Age 20–30
description: Indicates whether the average number of days of actual menstrual flow per period between ages 20 and 30 was about the same all the time or variable.

title: Menstrual Flow Rate on Heaviest Days in Past 12 Months
description: Categorized menstrual flow rate during the heaviest 2–3 days of the period in the past 12 months, ranging from light (3 or fewer pads/tampons per day) to heavy (more than 6 pads/tampons per day) or quite variable.

title: Menstrual Flow Rate on Heaviest Days at Age 20–30
description: Categorized menstrual flow rate during the heaviest days of the period between ages 20 and 30, ranging from light to heavy or quite variable.

title: Serum Folate
description: Serum folate concentration measured in ng/mL.

title: Date of Follow-Up Contact
description: Date on which the follow-up contact was conducted, recorded across multiple follow-up intervals.

title: Importance of Calories Per Serving on Food Label for Purchase Decision
description: Indicates whether calories per serving is a factor of greatest interest when deciding whether or not to purchase a food product, as reported from the food label.

title: Importance of Fat on Food Label for Purchase Decision
description: Indicates whether fat content is a factor of greatest interest when deciding whether or not to purchase a food product, as reported from the food label.

title: Importance of Fiber on Food Label for Purchase Decision
description: Indicates whether fiber content is a factor of greatest interest when deciding whether or not to purchase a food product, as reported from the food label.

title: Importance of Other Factor on Food Label for Purchase Decision
description: Indicates whether another unlisted factor is of greatest interest when deciding whether or not to purchase a food product, as reported from the food label.

title: Importance of Sodium on Food Label for Purchase Decision
description: Indicates whether sodium content is a factor of greatest interest when deciding whether or not to purchase a food product, as reported from the food label.

title: Importance of Sugar on Food Label for Purchase Decision
description: Indicates whether sugar content is a factor of greatest interest when deciding whether or not to purchase a food product, as reported from the food label.

title: Frequency of Using Food Label to Make Purchasing Decisions
description: Self-reported frequency with which the participant uses the food label to make decisions about purchasing a food product. Response options include 'Always' at the high end of the scale.

title: Any Food, Gum, or Candy in Last Hour
description: Indicates whether the participant consumed any food, gum, or candy in the hour preceding the sodium taste test.

title: Food Security in Household Last Year
description: Participant's self-report of the statement that best describes the food eaten in their household during the past year. Responses range from having enough food of the desired kinds to often not having enough food to eat.

title: Forgetfulness in Past 3 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced forgetfulness in the past 3 months, assessed as part of a symptom checklist related to menstrual and menopausal changes.

title: Age at Exam (Years)
description: Participant age in years recorded on Form 53 at the time of the exam visit.

title: How Urine Substudy Form Was Completed
description: Indicates how the 24-hour urine substudy form was completed, either by telephone or in person.

title: Form F69 Exam Date
description: Date of administration for Form 69 (Crowne-Marlowe Questionnaire).

title: Form 36 Exam Date
description: Date on which Form 36 (CES-D questionnaire) was administered.

title: Found Job and Stayed for 2 Years
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant found a job and stayed in it for at least 2 years during the follow-up period.

title: Framingham Type A/B Scale Score
description: Composite score from the Framingham Type A/B questionnaire (Form 16), summarizing Type A versus Type B behavioral tendencies across multiple items.

title: Frequency of Lifetime Depressive Episodes
description: Participant-reported frequency of depressive episodes experienced over their lifetime, categorized as once a week, 2–5 times, or more often (Question 1a).

title: Heart Rate During Frontal Scout CT
description: Heart rate recorded at the time of the frontal scout CT acquisition.

title: Frontal Scout CT Image Number
description: Image number assigned to the frontal scout CT acquisition.

title: Frontal Scout CT Series Number
description: Series number assigned to the frontal scout CT acquisition.

title: 100% Fruit Juice Drinking Frequency (Past Month)
description: Self-reported frequency of drinking 100% fruit juice (such as orange, mango, apple, grape, and pineapple juices) during the past month. Fruit-flavored drinks with added sugar and fruit juice made at home with added sugar are excluded.

title: 100% Fruit Juice Usual Amount per Occasion
description: Self-reported usual amount of 100% fruit juice consumed per drinking occasion.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Gallstone or Gallbladder Disease (Years)
description: Age in years at diagnosis of gallstone or gallbladder disease.

title: Age at Gallbladder Disease Cure or Disappearance (Years)
description: Age in years at cure or disappearance of gallbladder disease, or at gallbladder removal.

title: Current Status of Gallstone or Gallbladder Disease
description: Current status of gallstone or gallbladder disease, categorized as still have, under control, or cured or gone.

title: Gallbladder Removed
description: Indicates whether the participant's gallbladder has been removed.

title: Game Scores
description: Scores recorded for games played during the reactivity protocol, across up to nine game instances.

title: Gamma Glutamyl Transferase (IU/L)
description: Serum gamma glutamyl transferase concentration, measured in international units per liter (IU/L).

title: Garlic Supplement Frequency
description: Frequency of garlic supplement use, recorded as the number of times taken per day, week, or month.

title: Number of Garlic Supplements Taken
description: The number of garlic supplements taken per dose or per frequency interval reported.

title: Garlic Supplement Use
description: Indicates whether the participant has taken garlic supplements. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Gastric Ulcer (Years)
description: Age in years at first diagnosis of gastric ulcer.

title: History of Gastric Ulcer
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had a gastric ulcer.

title: Current Status of Gastric Ulcer
description: Current status of gastric ulcer, indicating whether the participant still has the problem, it is controlled by medication or something else, or it is completely cured or gone.

title: Gender Discrimination at Home Frequency
description: Among participants who reported ever experiencing gender discrimination at home, the frequency of such discrimination (rarely, sometimes, or often). Assessed by asking whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior at home because of their gender.

title: Gender Discrimination at School Frequency
description: Among participants who reported ever experiencing gender discrimination at school, the frequency of such discrimination (rarely, sometimes, or often). Assessed by asking whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior at school because of their gender.

title: Gender Discrimination at Work Frequency
description: Among participants who reported ever experiencing gender discrimination at work, the frequency of such discrimination (rarely, sometimes, or often). Assessed by asking whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior at work because of their gender.

title: Gender Discrimination Getting Housing Frequency
description: Among participants who reported ever experiencing gender discrimination when getting housing, the frequency of such discrimination (rarely, sometimes, or often). Assessed by asking whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior when getting housing because of their gender.

title: Gender Discrimination Getting a Job Frequency
description: Among participants who reported ever experiencing gender discrimination when getting a job, the frequency of such discrimination (rarely, sometimes, or often). Assessed by asking whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior when getting a job because of their gender.

title: Gender Discrimination Getting Medical Care Frequency
description: Among participants who reported ever experiencing gender discrimination when getting medical care, the frequency of such discrimination (rarely, sometimes, or often). Assessed by asking whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior when getting medical care because of their gender.

title: Gender Discrimination in Public Frequency
description: Among participants who reported ever experiencing gender discrimination in a public setting, the frequency of such discrimination (rarely, sometimes, or often). Assessed by asking whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior on the street or in a public setting because of their gender.

title: Gender Discrimination at Home
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior at home because of their gender (no/yes).

title: Gender Discrimination at School
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior at school because of their gender (no/yes).

title: Gender Discrimination at Work
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior at work because of their gender (no/yes).

title: Gender Discrimination Getting Housing
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior when getting housing because of their gender (no/yes).

title: Gender Discrimination Getting a Job
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior when getting a job because of their gender (no/yes).

title: Gender Discrimination Getting Medical Care
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior when getting medical care because of their gender (no/yes).

title: Gender Discrimination in Public
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior on the street or in a public setting because of their gender (no/yes).

title: Stress from Gender Discrimination
description: Participant's rating of how stressful their experiences of gender discrimination have been, among those who reported such discrimination (e.g., not at all stressful).

title: How Often Medication Taken as Prescribed
description: Self-reported frequency of taking a prescribed medication as directed, ranging from all or most of the time to never or almost never.

title: Medication Dose Unit
description: Unit of the medication dose (e.g., gram, milligram, milliliter, insulin unit), including units for combination or additional medication components.

title: Number of Doses Per Day
description: Number of doses of the medication taken per day.

title: Number of Doses Per Month
description: Number of doses of the medication taken per month.

title: Form 8 Item for Which This Is Follow-Up
description: Indicates which item on Form 8 (medication screening) the current Form 09-MED follow-up record corresponds to, such as high blood pressure, cholesterol, heart condition, asthma or breathing problems, depression, diabetes, other medications, or hormones other than birth control.

title: Source of Medication Name
description: Source from which the medication name was obtained, such as a prescription or bottle label, self-report, or a list of medications.

title: Medication Number (Sequence)
description: Sequential number identifying each medication reported on the general medication follow-up form.

title: Family Member Pays for Medication
description: Indicates whether a family member pays for the reported medication.

title: Friend Pays for Medication
description: Indicates whether a friend pays for the reported medication.

title: Medicaid Pays for Medication
description: Indicates whether Medicaid pays for the reported medication.

title: Medicare Pays for Medication
description: Indicates whether Medicare pays for the reported medication.

title: Other Payer for Medication (Indicator)
description: Indicates whether another unspecified source pays for the reported medication.

title: Participant Pays for Medication
description: Indicates whether the participant personally pays for the reported medication.

title: Private Insurance Pays for Medication
description: Indicates whether private health insurance pays for the reported medication.

title: Medication Prescribed by Doctor
description: Indicates whether the reported medication was prescribed by a health care provider.

title: Ever Had Problems With Medication
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever had any problems with a specific medication, as reported during the follow-up medication interview.

title: Total Number of Medications
description: Total number of medications reported by the participant during the follow-up medication questionnaire.

title: History of Skin Thickening or Lightening of Extremities or Trunk
description: Participant-reported history of skin thickening or lightening of the arms, legs, face, neck, or trunk.

title: Gestational Diabetes in Any Pregnancy
description: Indicates whether the participant had gestational diabetes during any pregnancy, as reported in the pregnancy questionnaire.

title: Gestational Hypertension in Any Pregnancy
description: Indicates whether the participant had high blood pressure without toxemia during any pregnancy, as reported in the pregnancy questionnaire.

title: Glomerular Filtration Rate (mL/min/1.73m–)
description: Estimated glomerular filtration rate expressed in mL/min/1.73m–.

title: Girth Measurement Protocol Modified
description: Indicates whether the standard protocol for girth measurement was modified during the examination.

title: Reason Girth Not Measured or Modified
description: Reason the girth measurement was not completed or the standard protocol was modified.

title: Year 10 2-Hour Glucose (mg/dL)
description: 2-hour post-load glucose concentration (mg/dL) measured at the Year 10 exam.

title: Year 10 2-Hour Glucose Return Visit (mg/dL)
description: 2-hour post-load glucose concentration (mg/dL) measured at the Year 10 return visit.

title: Year 20 2-Hour Glucose (mg/dL)
description: 2-hour glucose concentration (mg/dL) from the oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT) at the Year 20 exam.

title: Year 20 2-Hour Glucose NIST Recalibrated (mg/dL)
description: 2-hour glucose concentration (mg/dL) from the oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT) at Year 20, recalibrated using the NIST standard.

title: Year 25 2-Hour OGTT Glucose (mg/dL)
description: 2-hour glucose concentration (mg/dL) from the oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT) at the Year 25 exam.

title: Year 30 2-Hour OGTT Glucose (mg/dL)
description: Plasma glucose concentration measured 2 hours after an oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT), expressed in mg/dL.

title: Participant Completed Glucose Drink
description: Indicates whether the participant completed the glucose drink as part of the oral glucose tolerance test protocol.

title: Time Glucose Drink Completed AM/PM Indicator
description: AM or PM indicator for the time at which the participant completed the glucose drink during the oral glucose tolerance test.

title: Gluten-Free Diet Pattern
description: Indicates whether the participant follows a gluten-free diet pattern.

title: Goal Striving Current Status Step Number
description: The step number that best describes the participant's current status, as reported on the Goal Striving Stress form.

title: Goal Striving Desired Future Status Step Number
description: The step number that best describes where the participant would like to be in a few years, as reported on the Goal Striving Stress form.

title: Disappointment if Goal Not Reached
description: Participant's reported level of disappointment if they found out they could never reach their desired step, as assessed on the Goal Striving Stress form.

title: Goal Striving Expected Future Status Step Number
description: The step number that best describes where the participant expects to be in a few years, as reported on the Goal Striving Stress form.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Goiter (Years)
description: Age in years at which the participant was diagnosed with goiter.

title: History of Goiter
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had a goiter.

title: Current Status of Goiter
description: Current status of the participant's goiter condition, indicating whether the problem is still present, controlled by medication or other means, or completely cured or gone.

title: Good Health Is Very Important
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'Good health is very important to me,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Got Married
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant got married during the follow-up period.

title: Graduated from School
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant graduated from school during the follow-up period.

title: History of Gritty or Sandy Eye Sensation
description: Participant-reported history of a gritty or sandy sensation in the eyes.

title: Belong to Charity or Community Service Group
description: Indicates whether the participant belongs to a group concerned with community betterment, charity, or service.

title: Belong to Group Concerned with Children
description: Indicates whether the participant belongs to a group concerned with children, such as a PTA or Boy Scouts.

title: Belong to Church Group
description: Indicates whether the participant belongs to a church group.

title: Belong to Other Type of Group
description: Indicates whether the participant belongs to any other type of group not captured by the specific group membership categories. Participants who answered yes were asked to describe the group.

title: Belong to Labor Union or Professional/Commercial Group
description: Indicates whether the participant belongs to a labor union, commercial group, or professional organization.

title: Belong to Social or Recreational Group
description: Indicates whether the participant belongs to a social or recreational group.

title: GXT Duration
description: Total duration of the graded exercise treadmill test, recorded in seconds.

title: Number of 2-Minute GXT Periods Completed
description: The number of 2-minute periods completed during the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: History of Weakness Combing Hair Lasting More Than 3 Months
description: Participant-reported history of weakness when combing hair lasting more than 3 months.

title: Handshake Strength Rating
description: Interviewer rating of the strength of the subject's handshake, scored as limp/weak, average, or strong.

title: Handshake Temperature Rating
description: Interviewer rating of the temperature and moisture of the subject's handshake, scored as cold/moist, average, or warm/dry.

title: Year 20 Fasting Insulin Harmonized to Year 25
description: Year 20 fasting insulin value harmonized to the Year 25 assay scale, expressed in µU/mL.

title: Year 25 Fasting Insulin Harmonized to Year 25
description: Year 25 fasting insulin harmonized to the Year 25 assay scale (µU/mL); described as identical to the raw Year 25 fasting insulin value (HL7INS).

title: Has Children Not Living With Participant
description: Indicates whether the participant has children who do not live with them.

title: Has Health Insurance Through Employer
description: Indicates whether the participant is covered by employer-provided health insurance.

title: Has Military Health Coverage (VA/CHAMPUS/TRICARE)
description: Indicates whether the participant has health coverage through the VA, CHAMPUS/TRICARE, or other military health programs.

title: Has a Usual Source of Medical Care
description: Indicates whether the participant has a usual source of medical care, defined as the place they go if they need a check-up or are ill.

title: Age at First Hay Fever Attack
description: Age in years at the time of the participant's first hay fever attack.

title: Hay Fever Confirmed by a Doctor
description: Indicates whether the participant's hay fever was confirmed by a doctor.

title: Ever Had Hay Fever
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever had hay fever.

title: HbA1c Quantity-Not-Sufficient Flag
description: Flag indicating whether the HbA1c specimen was quantity-not-sufficient (QNS), with a value of 2 denoting QNS status.

title: Hemoglobin A1c (HbA1c)
description: Measured value of hemoglobin A1c (HbA1c), a marker of long-term glycemic control.

title: Months of Hypertension Medication Use
description: Duration of hypertension medication use expressed in months.

title: Currently Taking Hypertension Medication
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking hypertension medication at the time of the exam.

title: Time Since Last Used Hypertension Medication
description: Time elapsed since the participant last used a hypertension medication.

title: Total Months of Hypertension Medication Use
description: Total cumulative duration of hypertension medication use expressed in months.

title: Years of Hypertension Medication Use
description: Duration of hypertension medication use expressed in years.

title: Total HDL Cholesterol (mg/dL)
description: Total high-density lipoprotein (HDL) cholesterol concentration measured in mg/dL.

title: HDL2 Cholesterol (mg/dL)
description: HDL2 cholesterol subfraction concentration measured in mg/dL.

title: HDL3 Cholesterol (mg/dL)
description: HDL3 cholesterol subfraction concentration measured in mg/dL.

title: Ever Hospitalized or Treated for Head/Neck Injury
description: Self-reported history of ever having been hospitalized or treated for a head or neck injury.

title: Mechanism of Head/Neck Injury
description: Self-reported mechanism of head or neck injury, including whether the injury occurred in a vehicle crash, a fall or being hit by something, a fight or being hit by someone, or from being near a blast or explosion. Captured across four variables (I98LFTINJMV, I98LFTINJFALL, I98LFTINJFT, I98LFTINJEXP).

title: Headaches in Past 3 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced headaches in the past 3 months, assessed as part of a symptom checklist related to menstrual and menopausal changes.

title: Health Orientation Subscale Score
description: Derived subscale score for health orientation.

title: Heart Attack
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant experienced a heart attack, reported at follow-up interviews.

title: Count of Perceived Heart Attack Causes Listed
description: The total number of responses provided by the participant when asked about the most important causes of heart attack, with a maximum of five responses recorded.

title: Perceived Causes of Heart Attack (Up to 5 Responses)
description: Up to five responses provided by the participant identifying what they believe to be the most important causes of a heart attack, captured as separate encoded variables for each response position.

title: History of Myocardial Infarction (Heart Attack)
description: Indicates whether the participant has had a heart attack.

title: Current Status After Heart Attack
description: Current status following a heart attack, indicating whether the problem is still present, controlled by medication or other means, or completely cured or gone.

title: Heart Catheterization Since Last CARDIA Exam
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant had a heart catheterization since the last CARDIA exam.

title: Doctor-Diagnosed Heart Failure Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant was told by a doctor that they have heart failure since the last exam, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Months of Heart Medication Use
description: Duration of heart medication use expressed in months.

title: Currently Taking Heart Medication
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently taking a heart medication at the time of the exam.

title: Time Since Last Used Heart Medication
description: Time elapsed since the participant last used a heart medication, categorized from within the last hour to more than one month ago.

title: Total Months of Heart Medication Use
description: Total cumulative duration of heart medication use expressed in months.

title: Years of Heart Medication Use
description: Duration of heart medication use expressed in years.

title: Heart Problem Diagnosis
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant has been diagnosed with a heart problem, reported at follow-up interviews.

title: Doctor-Diagnosed Heart Problems Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant was told by a doctor that they have heart problems since the last exam, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Heart Rate
description: Heart rate in beats per minute recorded at the echocardiography exam visit, as documented on the echocardiography technician's worksheet.

title: Heart Rate (bpm)
description: Heart rate in beats per minute, recorded separately for two epochs (epoch 1 and epoch 2) during heart rate variability assessment.

title: Mean Heart Rate (bpm)
description: Mean average heart rate in beats per minute, calculated as the average of the two epoch-specific heart rate values (FRSHR1 and FRSHR2).

title: Heart Rate from M-Mode LV/RV
description: Heart rate in beats per minute derived from M-mode imaging of the left and right ventricles.

title: Heart Rate During Heart CT Scan 1
description: Heart rate recorded during the first cardiac CT scan acquisition, measured in beats per minute.

title: Heart CT Scan 1 Image Number
description: Image number assigned to the first cardiac CT scan acquisition.

title: Heart Rate During Heart CT Scan 2
description: Heart rate recorded during the second cardiac CT scan acquisition, measured in beats per minute.

title: Heart CT Scan 2 Image Number
description: Image number assigned to the second cardiac CT scan acquisition.

title: Heavy Physical Activity Intensity Score
description: Derived score reflecting the heavy-intensity physical activity level of the participant based on the Physical Activity Questionnaire.

title: Height at Time of Echo
description: Participant height recorded at the time of the echocardiographic examination.

title: Height Measurement Protocol Modified
description: Indicates whether the standard protocol for height measurement was modified during the examination.

title: Reason Height Not Measured or Modified
description: Reason the height measurement was not completed or the protocol was modified, such as participant height exceeding the device measuring range.

title: Sitting Height (cm)
description: Participant's height measured in the sitting position, in centimeters.

title: Standing Height (cm)
description: Participant's height measured in the standing position, in centimeters.

title: Source for Help When Sick – Family
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether family is a source of help when sick.

title: Source for Help When Sick – Friend
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether friends are a source of help when sick.

title: Source for Help When Sick – Paid Source
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether a paid source is used for help when sick.

title: Source for Help When Sick – Self
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they rely on themselves for help when sick.

title: Source for Help When Sick – Spouse
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether a spouse is a source of help when sick.

title: Source for Financial Help – Family
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether family is a source of help with financial problems.

title: Source for Financial Help – Friend
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether friends are a source of help with financial problems.

title: Source for Financial Help – Paid Source
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether a paid source is used for help with financial problems.

title: Source for Financial Help – Self
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they rely on themselves for help with financial problems.

title: Source for Financial Help – Spouse
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether a spouse is a source of help with financial problems.

title: Source for Help With House Repairs – Family
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether family is a source of help with house repairs.

title: Source for Help With House Repairs – Friend
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether friends are a source of help with house repairs.

title: Source for Help With House Repairs – Paid Source
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether a paid source is used for help with house repairs.

title: Source for Help With House Repairs – Self
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they rely on themselves for help with house repairs.

title: Source for Help With House Repairs – Spouse
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether a spouse is a source of help with house repairs.

title: Source for Help With Personal Problems – Family
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether family is a source of help with personal problems.

title: Source for Help With Personal Problems – Friend
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether friends are a source of help with personal problems.

title: Source for Help With Personal Problems – Paid Source
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether a paid source is used for help with personal problems.

title: Source for Help With Personal Problems – Self
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they rely on themselves for help with personal problems.

title: Source for Help With Personal Problems – Spouse
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether a spouse is a source of help with personal problems.

title: Source for Transportation Help – Family
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether family is a source of transportation help.

title: Source for Transportation Help – Friend
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether friends are a source of transportation help.

title: Source for Transportation Help – Paid Source
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether a paid source is used for transportation help.

title: Source for Transportation Help – Self
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they rely on themselves for transportation.

title: Source for Transportation Help – Spouse
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether a spouse is a source of transportation help.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Hepatitis (Years)
description: Age in years at which the participant was diagnosed with hepatitis.

title: History of Hepatitis
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had hepatitis.

title: Current Status of Hepatitis
description: Current status of the participant's hepatitis condition, indicating whether the problem is still present, controlled by medication or other means, or completely cured or gone.

title: Ever Used Heroin
description: Self-reported whether the participant has ever used heroin in their lifetime.

title: Ever Injected Heroin
description: Self-reported whether the participant has ever injected heroin.

title: Opiate Type Used: Demerol
description: Self-reported whether the participant used Demerol as one of the opiate types consumed.

title: Opiate Type Used: Dilaudid
description: Self-reported whether the participant used Dilaudid (hydromorphone) as one of the opiate types consumed.

title: Opiate Type Used: Heroin
description: Self-reported whether the participant used heroin as one of the opiate types consumed.

title: Opiate Type Used: Morphine
description: Self-reported whether the participant used morphine as one of the opiate types consumed.

title: Opiate Type Used: Other
description: Self-reported whether the participant used an opiate type other than those listed (heroin, morphine, Dilaudid, Demerol).

title: Heroin Taken by Needle
description: Self-reported whether the participant has taken heroin via needle injection.

title: Heroin Taken by Smoking
description: Self-reported whether the participant has taken heroin by smoking.

title: Heroin Taken by Snorting
description: Self-reported whether the participant has taken heroin by snorting.

title: Heroin Taken by Swallowing
description: Self-reported whether the participant has taken heroin by swallowing.

title: Used Heroin in Past 24 Hours
description: Self-reported whether the participant used heroin in the past 24 hours.

title: Mean High-Frequency HRV Power (msec²)
description: Mean high-frequency (HF) spectral power of heart rate variability, calculated as the average of the two epoch-specific HF power values (FRSHFP1 and FRSHFP2).

title: High-Frequency HRV Power (0.15–0.50 Hz, msec²)
description: High-frequency (HF) spectral power of heart rate variability in the 0.15–0.50 Hz frequency band, expressed in msec², recorded separately for two epochs (epoch 1 and epoch 2).

title: High Blood Pressure Diagnosis
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant has been diagnosed with high blood pressure, reported at follow-up interviews.

title: Age at Diagnosis of High Cholesterol (Years)
description: Age in years at which the participant was told they had high cholesterol.

title: Doctor-Diagnosed High Cholesterol Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant was told by a doctor that they have high cholesterol since the last exam, as reported in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Current Status of High Cholesterol
description: Current status of the participant's high cholesterol condition, indicating whether the problem is still present, under control, or cured or gone.

title: History of High CPK (Ever Told by Doctor)
description: Participant-reported history of elevated creatine phosphokinase (CPK), based on whether they were ever told by a doctor that they had high CPK.

title: High-Degree Atrioventricular Block
description: Indicates whether the participant had a high-degree atrioventricular block, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Participated in High School Sports
description: Indicates whether the participant participated in sports during high school.

title: High School Sports Physical Activity Rating
description: Self-rated physical activity level associated with participation in high school sports.

title: Highest Degree Earned
description: The highest academic degree the participant has earned. Response options include high school diploma or equivalency (GED), as well as grade-level codes (elementary through graduate school, grades 1–20+). The value label coding scheme appears to mix degree categories with grade-level codes, which may reflect a dual coding structure or data entry artifact.

title: Highest Degree Planned to Complete
