description: The highest academic degree the participant plans to earn, with options ranging from high school diploma or equivalency to professional degrees (e.g., MD, JD, DDS).

title: Mean Hip Girth (cm)
description: Mean hip girth in centimeters, calculated as the average of repeated measurements taken at the same visit.

title: Hip Girth First Measurement (cm)
description: First measurement of hip girth in centimeters.

title: Hip Girth Second Measurement (cm)
description: Second measurement of hip girth in centimeters.

title: Hip Girth Protocol Modified
description: Indicates whether any modification to the standard hip girth measurement protocol was made during the examination.

title: Reason Hip Girth Not Measured or Modified
description: Reason the hip girth measurement was not completed or the standard protocol was modified.

title: Completed Hip Questionnaire
description: Indicates whether the participant completed a hip questionnaire.

title: Willing to Complete Hip Questionnaire
description: Indicates whether the participant was willing to complete a hip questionnaire.

title: History of Abnormal Heart Rhythm
description: Indicates whether the participant had a history of abnormal heart rhythm, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: History of Angina
description: Indicates whether the participant had a history of angina, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: History of Aortic or Dissecting Aneurysm
description: Indicates whether the participant had a history of aortic or dissecting aneurysm, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: History of Cardiomyopathy
description: Indicates whether the participant had a history of cardiomyopathy, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: History of Coronary Heart Disease
description: Indicates whether the participant had a history of coronary heart disease, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: History of Heart Attack
description: Indicates whether the participant had a history of heart attack, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: History of Heart Failure Within the Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant had a history of heart failure within the past year, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: History of Heart Valve Disorder
description: Indicates whether the participant had a history of a heart valve disorder, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: History of Myocarditis Within the Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant had a history of myocarditis within the past year, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: History of Stroke
description: Indicates whether the participant had a history of stroke, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Hitch-Hike or Pick Up Hitch-Hikers
description: Self-reported indicator of whether the participant hitchhikes or picks up hitchhikers.

title: Months Doing Home Exercise or Calisthenics
description: Number of months in the past 12 months the participant did home exercise or calisthenics, among those who reported doing so for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Months Doing Home Exercise or Calisthenics ≥3 Hours/Week
description: Number of months in the past 12 months the participant did home exercise or calisthenics for at least 3 hours per week, among those who reported doing so for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Home Exercise or Calisthenics Past Year (Any Month ≥1 Hour)
description: Indicates whether the participant did home exercise or calisthenics during the past 12 months for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Months Doing Home Maintenance or Gardening
description: Number of months in the past 12 months the participant did home maintenance or gardening, including activities such as carpentry, painting, raking, or mowing, among those who reported doing so for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Months Doing Home Maintenance or Gardening ≥5 Hours/Week
description: Number of months in the past 12 months the participant did home maintenance or gardening, including activities such as carpentry, painting, raking, or mowing, for at least 5 hours per week, among those who reported doing so for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Home Maintenance or Gardening Past Year (Any Month ≥1 Hour)
description: Indicates whether the participant did home maintenance or gardening, including activities such as carpentry, painting, raking, or mowing, during the past 12 months for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Home Ownership / Residence Payment Status
description: Indicates how the participant is paying for or occupying their home, with categories including owned or being bought, rented for money, occupied without payment, or other.

title: Home or Leisure Heavy Activities Past Year (Any Month ≥1 Hour)
description: Indicates whether the participant did any home or leisure heavy activities, such as snow shoveling, moving heavy objects, or weight lifting, during the past 12 months for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Months Doing Home or Leisure Heavy Activities (e.g., Snow Shoveling)
description: Number of months in the past 12 months the participant did home or leisure heavy activities such as snow shoveling, moving heavy objects, or weight lifting, among those who reported doing so for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Months Doing Home or Leisure Heavy Activities ≥3 Hours/Week
description: Number of months in the past 12 months the participant did home or leisure heavy activities such as snow shoveling, moving heavy objects, or weight lifting for at least 3 hours per week, among those who reported doing so for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Plasma Homocysteine
description: Plasma homocysteine concentration measured in µmol/L.

title: Source of Hormone Medication Name
description: Indicates whether the hormone medication name was obtained from a prescription label or by self-report.

title: Date of Admission for Hospitalizations (Exam F, Composite)
description: Composite date of admission for each hospitalization reported at Exam F, covering up to seven hospitalizations.

title: Date of Care for Hospitalization (Exam D, Composite)
description: Composite date of care for each hospitalization reported at Exam D, covering up to six hospitalizations.

title: Care Year for Hospitalization
description: Year of care for each reported hospitalization, recorded for up to five hospitalizations since the last exam.

title: Hospitalization Date — Year
description: Year of hospitalization reported during follow-up, recorded as a two-digit year value.

title: Hospitalization Year — A Record
description: Year of hospitalization for the first (A) hospitalization record reported during follow-up, recorded as a two-digit year value.

title: Hospitalization Date (YYMMDD)
description: Date of hospitalization reported during follow-up, recorded in YYMMDD format.

title: Currently on Dialysis
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they are currently receiving dialysis at the time of the interview.

title: Date of Hospitalization Event (Composite, Exam D)
description: Composite date of the hospitalization event for each reported hospitalization since the last exam, available for up to six hospitalizations.

title: Hospitalization Event Year
description: Year of the hospitalization event for each reported hospitalization since the last exam.

title: Ever Had Kidney Dialysis Treatments
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they have ever had kidney dialysis treatments.

title: Hospitalization 3, Code 3
description: Third code assigned for the third reported hospitalization during follow-up.

title: Number of Hospitalizations Since Last Exam
description: Number of hospitalizations reported by the participant since the last exam.

title: Hospitalization Number
description: Sequential number identifying the hospitalization record within the follow-up report.

title: Hospitalization Due to Illness
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether a hospitalization since the last exam was the result of an illness.

title: Hospitalization Due to Injury
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether a hospitalization since the last exam was the result of an injury.

title: Hospitalization Due to Pregnancy
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether a hospitalization since the last exam was the result of pregnancy.

title: Satisfaction With Hospital Care
description: Participant-reported satisfaction with care received during hospitalization.

title: Admission Date for Hospitalization 1
description: Date of admission for the first reported hospitalization since the last exam.

title: Diagnosis Code 1 for Hospitalization 1
description: First diagnosis code assigned to the first reported hospitalization since the last exam, as recorded in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Diagnosis Code 2 for Hospitalization 1
description: Second diagnosis code assigned to the first reported hospitalization since the last exam, as recorded in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Diagnosis Code 3 for Hospitalization 1
description: Third diagnosis code assigned to the first reported hospitalization since the last exam, as recorded in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Admission Date for Hospitalization 2
description: Date of admission for the second reported hospitalization since the last exam.

title: Diagnosis Code 1 for Hospitalization 2
description: First diagnosis code assigned to the second reported hospitalization since the last exam, as recorded in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Diagnosis Code 2 for Hospitalization 2
description: Second diagnosis code assigned to the second reported hospitalization since the last exam, as recorded in the non-attending telephone questionnaire.

title: Admission Date for Hospitalization 3
description: Date of admission for the third reported hospitalization since the last exam.

title: Hospitalized Overnight in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant was hospitalized overnight in the past year, as reported during follow-up contact.

title: Hospitalized Overnight Since Last Exam
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they were a patient in a hospital overnight since the last study update.

title: Hot Flashes or Night Sweats in Past 3 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced hot flashes or night sweats in the past 3 months, assessed as part of the menstrual and menopausal changes questionnaire.

title: Bothered by Hot Flashes or Night Sweats
description: Indicates the degree to which hot flash or night sweat symptoms bothered the participant, asked as a follow-up among those reporting hot flashes or night sweats in the past 3 months.

title: Hot Flashes or Night Sweats Limited Activities
description: Indicates the degree to which hot flash or night sweat symptoms limited the participant's activities, asked as a follow-up among those reporting hot flashes or night sweats in the past 3 months.

title: Experienced Hot Flashes Since Age 40
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced hot flashes since age 40, with some exam versions specifying moderate or severe intensity.

title: Hours per Day Employed
description: Number of hours per day the participant was employed during the recall period.

title: Hours Per Week Exposed to Secondhand Smoke at Home
description: Average number of hours per week the participant is exposed to cigarette, cigar, or pipe smoke in their home due to smoking by others.

title: Hours Per Week Exposed to Secondhand Smoke in Large Indoor Area
description: Average number of hours per week the participant is exposed to cigarette, cigar, or pipe smoke in a large indoor area (such as a restaurant, hotel lobby, or lecture hall) due to smoking by others.

title: Hours Per Week Exposed to Secondhand Smoke in Small Indoor Area
description: Average number of hours per week the participant is exposed to cigarette, cigar, or pipe smoke in a small space other than their home (such as an airplane, office, or car) due to smoking by others.

title: Hours Slept
description: The number of hours the participant slept prior to the exam visit.

title: Household and Childcare Activity Score (kcal)
description: Derived score (in kilocalories) summarizing energy expenditure from household and childcare physical activities.

title: Hours per Week Did Light Household Chores
description: Number of hours per week the participant did light household chores.

title: Months in Past Year Did Light Household Chores
description: Number of months in the past year the participant did light household chores.

title: Months in Past Year Did Major Household Chores
description: Number of months in the past year the participant did major household chores.

title: Times per Month Did Major Household Chores
description: Number of times per month the participant did major household chores.

title: Childhood Household Organization and Management
description: Participant's retrospective report of how often their house was well organized or managed during childhood, rated on a four-point frequency scale from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: Childhood Household Alcohol or Drug Abuse Exposure
description: Participant's retrospective report of how often they lived with an alcohol or drug abuser during childhood, rated on a four-point frequency scale from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: Pre-Instruction Baseline Heart Rate
description: Heart rate measured during the pre-instruction baseline phase of the reactivity protocol, recorded across up to four sequential readings.

title: Heart Rate Before GXT
description: Heart rate measured before the start of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Breakout Heart Rate and Recovery
description: Heart rate measured during the breakout task and subsequent recovery phase of the reactivity protocol, recorded across up to five readings including task and recovery measurements.

title: GXT Stage 1 Heart Rate
description: Heart rate measured during stage 1 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 2 Heart Rate
description: Heart rate measured during stage 2 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 3 Heart Rate
description: Heart rate recorded during stage 3 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 4 Heart Rate
description: Heart rate recorded during stage 4 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 5 Heart Rate
description: Heart rate recorded during stage 5 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 6 Heart Rate
description: Heart rate recorded during stage 6 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 7 Heart Rate
description: Heart rate recorded during stage 7 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 8 Heart Rate
description: Heart rate recorded during stage 8 of the graded exercise treadmill test, measured in beats per minute.

title: GXT Stage 9 Heart Rate
description: Heart rate recorded during stage 9 of the graded exercise treadmill test, measured in beats per minute.

title: Star-Tracing Heart Rate and Recovery
description: Heart rate measured during the star-tracing task and subsequent recovery phase of the reactivity protocol, recorded across up to five readings including task and recovery measurements.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Hypertension (Years)
description: Age in years when the participant was told they had high blood pressure (hypertension).

title: Hypertension Diagnosis Based on More Than One Visit
description: Indicates whether the participant's hypertension diagnosis was based on more than one clinical visit.

title: Doctor-Diagnosed Hypertension Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant reported being told by a doctor that they have hypertension since the last exam.

title: Hypertension Medication Taken This Morning
description: Indicates whether the participant had taken blood pressure (hypertension) medication on the morning of the exam visit.

title: Current Status of Hypertension
description: Current status of the participant's hypertension, indicating whether they still have the condition, it is under control, or it is cured or gone.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Hyperthyroidism (Years)
description: Age in years at the time of hyperthyroidism diagnosis.

title: History of Hyperthyroidism
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had hyperthyroidism.

title: Current Status of Hyperthyroidism
description: Current status of the participant's hyperthyroidism, indicating whether the problem is still present, controlled by medication or other means, or completely cured or gone.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Hypothyroidism (Years)
description: Age in years at the time of hypothyroidism diagnosis.

title: History of Hypothyroidism
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had hypothyroidism.

title: Current Status of Hypothyroidism
description: Current status of the participant's hypothyroidism, indicating whether the problem is still present, controlled by medication or other means, or completely cured or gone.

title: History of Hysterectomy
description: Indicates whether the participant has had a hysterectomy, asked as a follow-up when no menstrual period was reported in the past 3 months.

title: History of Hysterectomy or Tubal Ligation
description: Indicates whether the participant has had a hysterectomy (removal of uterus) or tubal ligation (tubes tied), asked as a follow-up to the pregnancy status question for those who responded no or do not know.

title: Left ICA Doppler Blood Flow Detectable
description: Indicates whether internal carotid artery (ICA) Doppler blood flow signals were detectable on the left side during the carotid ultrasound examination.

title: Right ICA Doppler Blood Flow Detectable
description: Indicates whether internal carotid artery (ICA) Doppler blood flow signals were detectable on the right side during the carotid ultrasound examination.

title: Left ICA/Bulb Pulse Wave Doppler Velocity (cm/s)
description: Pulse wave Doppler velocity measurement (in cm/s) at the left internal carotid artery (ICA) or carotid bulb.

title: Right ICA/Bulb Pulse Wave Doppler Velocity (cm/s)
description: Pulse wave Doppler velocity measurement (in cm/s) at the right internal carotid artery (ICA) or carotid bulb.

title: Ideal Figure Selection
description: Selected figure rating reflecting the body shape the respondent considers ideal.

title: Total IgE Level (IU/mL)
description: Total immunoglobulin E (IgE) level measured in international units per milliliter (IU/mL).

title: Undetectable IgE Flag
description: Flag variable (equal to 1) indicating that the total IgE level was below the detectable range.

title: IGF-1 Level (ng/mL)
description: Insulin-like growth factor 1 (IGF-1) concentration measured in nanograms per milliliter (ng/mL).

title: IGF-1 Undetectable Flag
description: Flag variable (= 1) indicating that the IGF-1 level was below the assay detection threshold and therefore undetectable.

title: Ignores Signs of Flu or Cold
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I ignore signs of a flu or cold,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: IL-6 Level (pg/mL)
description: Interleukin-6 (IL-6) concentration measured in picograms per milliliter (pg/mL).

title: IL-6 Undetectable Flag
description: Flag variable (= 1) indicating that the interleukin-6 (IL-6) level was below the assay detection threshold and therefore undetectable.

title: Ill in Past 24 Hours
description: Participant self-report of whether they have been ill in the past 24 hours (e.g., cold, flu, fever, vomiting).

title: Illness in Last 24 Hours Affected Taste
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced an illness in the last 24 hours that affected their sense of taste at the time of the sodium taste test.

title: Illness Orientation Subscale Score
description: Derived subscale score for illness orientation.

title: 3D Left Heart Images Obtained
description: Indicates whether three-dimensional left heart images were obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: 3D Right Heart Images Obtained
description: Indicates whether three-dimensional right heart images were obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: Apical 2-Chamber 2D Cines Obtained
description: Indicates whether apical 2-chamber 2D cine images were obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: Apical 3-Chamber Long-Axis Doppler Images Obtained
description: Indicates whether apical 3-chamber long-axis Doppler images were obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: Apical 3-Chamber Long-Axis Images Obtained
description: Indicates whether apical 3-chamber long-axis images were obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: Apical 3-Chamber Mitral Valve Color Images Obtained
description: Indicates whether apical 3-chamber mitral valve color images were obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: Apical Images Obtained (General)
description: Indicates whether all apical images were obtained for the echocardiography exam, as assessed on the technician's worksheet.

title: Apical Speckle Tracking Imaging Obtained
description: Indicates whether apical speckle tracking images were obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: Apical 4-Chamber 2D Cines Full View Obtained
description: Indicates whether apical 4-chamber 2D cine images in full view were successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: Apical 4-Chamber 2D Cines Full View – Reason for No Image
description: Reason that apical 4-chamber 2D cine full-view images were not obtained during the echocardiography exam, as recorded on the technician's worksheet.

title: Apical 4-Chamber Mitral Valve Color/PW/CW Obtained
description: Indicates whether apical 4-chamber mitral valve color, pulsed-wave, and continuous-wave Doppler images were successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: Apical 4-Chamber Mitral Valve M-Mode Obtained
description: Indicates whether apical 4-chamber mitral valve M-mode images were successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: Apical 4-Chamber Pulmonary Valve Color/PW/CW Obtained
description: Indicates whether apical 4-chamber pulmonary valve color, pulsed-wave, and continuous-wave Doppler images were successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: Apical 4-Chamber TDI (Lateral/Septal/Right) Obtained
description: Indicates whether apical 4-chamber tissue Doppler imaging (TDI) of the lateral, septal, and right annular sites was successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: Other Echo Images Obtained
description: Indicates whether all images were obtained for other (unspecified) components of the echocardiography exam, as recorded on the technician's worksheet.

title: PLAX Color MV/AV Images Obtained
description: Indicates whether parasternal long-axis (PLAX) color Doppler images of the mitral valve and aortic valve were successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: PLAX M-Mode AV/LA/LV Images Obtained
description: Indicates whether parasternal long-axis (PLAX) M-mode images of the aortic valve, left atrium, and left ventricle were successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: PLAX Images Obtained
description: Indicates whether all parasternal long-axis (PLAX) images were successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: PSAX Color AV/PV/TV Images Obtained
description: Indicates whether parasternal short-axis (PSAX) color Doppler images of the aortic valve, pulmonary valve, and tricuspid valve were successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: PSAX M-Mode AV/LA/LV Images Obtained
description: Indicates whether parasternal short-axis (PSAX) M-mode images of the aortic valve, left atrium, and left ventricle were successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: PSAX Images Obtained
description: Indicates whether all parasternal short-axis (PSAX) images were successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: PSAX Speckle Tracking Images Obtained
description: Indicates whether parasternal short-axis (PSAX) speckle tracking images were successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: Speckle Tracking Live Analysis 4-Chamber Obtained
description: Indicates whether speckle tracking live analysis images for the apical 4-chamber view were successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: Speckle Tracking Live Analysis PSAX Mid Obtained
description: Indicates whether speckle tracking live analysis images for the parasternal short-axis (PSAX) mid view were successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: TAPSE Images Obtained
description: Indicates whether tricuspid annular plane systolic excursion (TAPSE) images were successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: TDI Images Obtained
description: Indicates whether all tissue Doppler imaging (TDI) images were successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam, as recorded on the technician's worksheet.

title: Apical 4-Chamber Tricuspid Valve Color Obtained
description: Indicates whether apical 4-chamber tricuspid valve color Doppler images were successfully obtained during the echocardiography exam.

title: Apical 4-Chamber TV CW Doppler Obtained
description: Indicates whether apical 4-chamber tricuspid valve continuous wave (CW) Doppler images were obtained during the echocardiography examination.

title: Subjective QC: Image Noise Level
description: Subjective quality control rating of image noise level for the CT heart scan, assessed separately for the first and second heart scans.

title: Number of Images Received for Heart Scan
description: Count of images received for the CT heart scan, recorded separately for the first and second heart scans.

title: Important to Always Look Good
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'It's always important that I look good,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Reason Carotid IMT Scan Incomplete or Not Done (Code)
description: Coded reason why the carotid intima-media thickness (IMT) scan (Part II) was incomplete or not performed (e.g., equipment malfunction).

title: In School Now as Main Daily Activity
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently in school as their main daily activity.

title: Diet Change: Increased Fiber
description: Indicates whether the participant has increased fiber as a dietary change. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Diet Change: Increased Fruits and Vegetables
description: Indicates whether the participant has increased consumption of fruits and vegetables as a dietary change. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Diet Change: Increased Poultry and Fish
description: Indicates whether the participant has increased consumption of poultry and fish as a dietary change. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Age at First Treatment for Infertility
description: Age in years when the participant first sought treatment for inability to become pregnant.

title: Blocked Tubes Identified as Infertility Cause
description: Indicates whether blocked tubes were identified as a reason for the participant's infertility.

title: Endometriosis as Infertility Cause
description: Indicates whether endometriosis was identified as a reason for the participant's infertility.

title: None of Listed Problems as Infertility Cause
description: Indicates that none of the listed problems were identified as a reason for the participant's infertility.

title: Other Infertility Problems as Cause
description: Indicates whether any other infertility problems not otherwise listed were identified as a reason for the participant's infertility.

title: Other Tube or Pelvic Problems as Infertility Cause
description: Indicates whether other tube or pelvic problems were identified as a reason for the participant's infertility.

title: Ovulation Problems as Infertility Cause
description: Indicates whether problems with ovulation were identified as a reason for the participant's infertility.

title: Semen or Sperm Problems as Infertility Cause
description: Indicates whether semen or sperm problems were identified as a reason for the participant's infertility.

title: Outcome of Infertility Treatment
description: Indicates the outcome of the participant's infertility treatment, with a documented response option of live birth (pregnancy lasting at least 20 weeks).

title: Saw Doctor or Medical Provider for Help Becoming Pregnant
description: Indicates whether the participant ever visited a doctor or other medical care provider to discuss ways to help become pregnant.

title: Sought Advice to Help Become Pregnant
description: Indicates whether the participant sought advice to help become pregnant as part of infertility treatment.

title: Used Artificial Insemination for Infertility
description: Indicates whether the participant sought artificial insemination to help become pregnant as part of infertility treatment.

title: Used Drugs to Improve Ovulation for Infertility
description: Indicates whether the participant used drugs to improve ovulation as part of infertility treatment to help become pregnant.

title: Surgery or Drug Treatment for Endometriosis for Infertility
description: Indicates whether the participant sought surgery or drug treatment for endometriosis to help become pregnant as part of infertility treatment.

title: Used In Vitro Fertilization (IVF) for Infertility
description: Indicates whether the participant sought in vitro fertilization (IVF) to help become pregnant as part of infertility treatment.

title: Other Medical Help to Become Pregnant
description: Indicates whether the participant sought other medical help not otherwise listed to help become pregnant as part of infertility treatment.

title: Other Female Pelvic Surgery for Infertility
description: Indicates whether the participant sought other female pelvic surgery to help become pregnant as part of infertility treatment.

title: Surgery to Correct Blocked Tubes for Infertility
description: Indicates whether the participant sought surgery to correct blocked tubes to help become pregnant.

title: Surgery or Treatment for Uterine Fibroids for Infertility
description: Indicates whether the participant sought surgery or treatment for uterine fibroids to help become pregnant.

title: Underwent Infertility Testing
description: Indicates whether the participant underwent infertility testing.

title: Tried to Become Pregnant More Than One Year Without Success
description: Indicates whether the participant ever tried to become pregnant for more than one year without becoming pregnant.

title: Influence of Convenience on Food Choice (Rank Score)
description: Ranked score indicating how much convenience influences the participant's choice of food.

title: Influence of Cost on Food Choice (Rank Score)
description: Ranked score indicating how much cost influences the participant's choice of food.

title: Influence of Nutritional Quality on Food Choice (Rank Score)
description: Ranked score indicating how much nutritional quality influences the participant's choice of food.

title: Influence of Other Factor on Food Choice (Rank Score)
description: Ranked score indicating how much another unlisted factor influences the participant's choice of food. The specific factor can be captured in a companion free-text variable.

title: Influence of Philosophical or Religious Beliefs on Food Choice (Rank Score)
description: Ranked score indicating how much philosophical or religious beliefs influence the participant's choice of food.

title: Influence of Taste on Food Choice (Rank Score)
description: Ranked score indicating how much taste influences the participant's choice of food.

title: Injured Body Part Code
description: Coded value indicating the body part injured during the reported injury event.

title: Number of Injured Body Parts
description: Number of body parts injured during the reported injury event.

title: Other Injury Event Description
description: Additional injury event description slot corresponding to a sixth reported injury, analogous to other injury event description variables in this form.

title: Alcohol or Illicit Drug Use Within 4 Hours of Injury
description: Indicates whether the participant used alcohol or illicit drugs within 4 hours of the injury event.

title: Head/Neck Injury Caused Loss of Consciousness
description: Indicates whether a head or neck injury sustained during the injury event caused loss of consciousness.

title: Had Health/Medical Insurance at Time of Injury
description: Indicates whether the participant had health or medical insurance at the time of the injury event.

title: Location Where Injury Event Occurred (Coded)
description: Coded value indicating where the injury event occurred.

title: Nature of Injury Code
description: Coded values describing the nature of the injury, with up to three codes recorded per injury event.

title: Number of Injury Events
description: Total number of injury events reported by the participant since the last exam.

title: Has Physical or Emotional Problems Due to Injury
description: Indicates whether the participant has physical or emotional problems resulting from the injury event.

title: Injury Event Prevented Usual Activity
description: Indicates whether the accident or injury prevented the participant from performing usual activities.

title: Usual Activities Restricted by Injury
description: Indicates whether and to what degree the participant's usual activities were restricted as a result of the injury event.

title: Sought Care for Accident or Injury Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant sought medical care for an accident or injury since the last exam.

title: Year of Injury Event
description: Year component of the date for each reported injury event, captured for up to six injury events per participant.

title: Injury Limiting Walking or Exercise
description: Indicates whether the participant had an injury preventing or making difficult walking or jogging, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Insomnia or Sleep Disturbances in Past 3 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced insomnia or sleep disturbances in the past three months.

title: Instrumental Support Score
description: Score reflecting the level of instrumental support available to the participant.

title: Year 10 2-Hour Post-Load Insulin
description: Insulin concentration measured 2 hours after a glucose challenge at Year 10, expressed in µU/mL.

title: Year 10 2-Hour Post-Load Insulin (Return Visit)
description: Insulin concentration measured 2 hours after a glucose challenge at the Year 10 return visit, expressed in µU/mL.

title: Fasting Insulin (Exam A)
description: Insulin concentration measured in µU/mL at Exam A (Year 0).

title: Year 0 Insulin
description: Insulin concentration at Year 0, measured in µU/mL, as recorded in the Exam D dataset.

title: Year 7 Insulin
description: Insulin concentration at Year 7, measured in µU/mL, as reported in the Exam D dataset.

title: Intensive Physical Activity in Past 2 Hours
description: Indicates whether the participant had engaged in intensive physical activity in the two hours prior to the blood pressure measurement.

title: Estimated Daily Iron Intake from Diet (mg)
description: Estimated daily iron intake from diet, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Estimated Daily Iron Intake from Diet and Supplements (mg)
description: Estimated daily iron intake from both diet and supplements combined, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Iron Supplement Frequency
description: Frequency of iron supplement use, recorded as the number of times taken per day, week, or month.

title: Number of Iron Supplements Taken
description: The number of iron supplements taken per dose or per frequency interval reported.

title: Iron Supplement Use
description: Indicates whether the participant has taken iron supplements. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Irritability or Grouchiness in Past 3 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced irritability or grouchiness in the past three months.

title: Plasma Isoprostane (pg/mL)
description: Plasma isoprostane concentration, measured in picograms per milliliter (pg/mL).

title: Interventricular Septal Thickness in Diastole
description: Thickness of the interventricular septum measured at end-diastole by M-mode and 2D echocardiography, available as individual readings and standard deviation.

title: Interventricular Septal Thickness in Systole
description: Thickness of the interventricular septum measured at end-systole by M-mode echocardiography, available as individual readings and standard deviation.

title: Jaw Clenching Rating
description: Interviewer rating of whether the subject exhibited jaw clenching, scored as no or yes.

title: John Henryism Item – Seldom Disappointed by Work Results
description: Individual item from the John Henryism Active Coping questionnaire assessing whether the respondent is seldom disappointed by the results of their work. Responses are rated on a 4-point scale from 'Completely true' to 'Completely false'.

title: John Henryism Item – Must Do Things Right Oneself
description: Individual item from the John Henryism Active Coping questionnaire assessing whether the respondent feels they must do things themselves to ensure they are done correctly. Responses are rated on a 4-point scale from 'Completely true' to 'Completely false'.

title: John Henryism Item – Find Way to Accomplish Necessary Tasks
description: Individual item from the John Henryism Active Coping questionnaire assessing whether the respondent finds a way to accomplish tasks that need to be done. Responses are rated on a 4-point scale from 'Completely true' to 'Completely false'.

title: John Henryism Item – Never Lost Sight of Goals
description: Individual item from the John Henryism Active Coping questionnaire assessing whether the respondent has never lost sight of their goals. Responses are rated on a 4-point scale from 'Completely true' to 'Completely false'.

title: John Henryism Item – Hard Work Has Helped Me Get Ahead
description: Individual item from the John Henryism Active Coping questionnaire assessing whether the respondent believes hard work has helped them get ahead. Responses are rated on a 4-point scale from 'Completely true' to 'Completely false'.

title: John Henryism Item – Like Doing Things Others Thought Impossible
description: Individual item from the John Henryism Active Coping questionnaire assessing whether the respondent enjoys doing things that others thought were impossible. Responses are rated on a 4-point scale from 'Completely true' to 'Completely false'.

title: John Henryism Item – Can Make of Life What Wanted
description: Individual item from the John Henryism Active Coping questionnaire assessing whether the respondent feels they can make of their life what they have wanted. Responses are rated on a 4-point scale from 'Completely true' to 'Completely false'.

title: John Henryism Item – Stay with Job Until Done
description: Individual item from the John Henryism Active Coping questionnaire assessing whether the respondent stays with a job until it is done. Responses are rated on a 4-point scale from 'Completely true' to 'Completely false'.

title: John Henryism Item – Must Do Things the Way I Want
description: Individual item from the John Henryism Active Coping questionnaire assessing whether the respondent feels they must do things in the way they want them done. Responses are rated on a 4-point scale from 'Completely true' to 'Completely false'.

title: John Henryism Item – Don't Let Personal Feelings Interfere
description: Individual item from the John Henryism Active Coping questionnaire assessing whether the respondent avoids letting personal feelings interfere with their work or goals. Responses are rated on a 4-point scale from 'Completely true' to 'Completely false'.

title: John Henryism Item – Stands Up for Beliefs Regardless of Consequences
description: Individual item from the John Henryism Active Coping questionnaire assessing whether the respondent stands up for their beliefs regardless of the consequences. Responses are rated on a 4-point scale from 'Completely true' to 'Completely false'.

title: John Henryism Item – Work Harder in Adverse Circumstances
description: Individual item from the John Henryism Active Coping questionnaire assessing whether the respondent works harder when faced with adverse circumstances. Responses are rated on a 4-point scale from 'Completely true' to 'Completely false'.

title: John Henryism Total Score (12 Items)
description: Total score derived from the 12-item John Henryism Active Coping questionnaire, summarizing the respondent's overall level of active coping.

title: Job Allows Decision Making
description: Participant's self-reported agreement that their job allows them to make decisions. Responses are recorded on a 4-point scale from strongly disagree to strongly agree.

title: Job Allows Little Decision Making
description: Participant's self-reported agreement that their job allows little opportunity for decision making. Responses are recorded on a 4-point scale from strongly disagree to strongly agree.

title: Job Allows Worker Input
description: Participant's self-reported agreement that their job allows worker input. Responses are recorded on a 4-point scale from strongly disagree to strongly agree.

title: Job Free From Conflicting Demands
description: Participant's self-reported agreement that their job is free from conflicting demands. Responses are recorded on a 4-point scale from strongly disagree to strongly agree.

title: Job Does Not Require Excessive Work
description: Participant's self-reported agreement that their job does not require excessive work. Responses are recorded on a 4-point scale from strongly disagree to strongly agree.

title: Job Offers Variety
description: Participant's self-reported agreement that their job offers variety in tasks. Responses are recorded on a 4-point scale from strongly disagree to strongly agree.

title: Job Requires Creativeness
description: Participant's self-reported agreement that their job requires creativeness. Responses are recorded on a 4-point scale from strongly disagree to strongly agree.

title: Job Requires a High Skill Level
description: Participant's self-reported agreement that their job requires a high skill level. Responses are recorded on a 4-point scale from strongly disagree to strongly agree.

title: Job Requires Learning New Things
description: Participant's self-reported agreement that their job requires learning new things. Responses are recorded on a 4-point scale from strongly disagree to strongly agree.

title: Job Requires Repetitive Work
description: Participant's self-reported agreement that their job requires repetitive work. Responses are recorded on a 4-point scale from strongly disagree to strongly agree.

title: Job Requires Working Very Fast
description: Participant's self-reported agreement that their job requires working very fast. Responses are recorded on a 4-point scale from strongly disagree to strongly agree.

title: Job Requires Working Very Hard
description: Participant's self-reported agreement that their job requires working very hard. Responses are recorded on a 4-point scale from strongly disagree to strongly agree.

title: Stiffness or Soreness in Joints, Neck, or Shoulders in Past 3 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced stiffness or soreness in joints, neck, or shoulders in the past three months.

title: Keep Gun at Home for Protection
description: Self-reported indicator of whether the participant keeps a gun at home for protection.

title: Keeping House/Children as Main Daily Activity
description: Indicates whether the participant's main daily activity is keeping house or caring for children.

title: Keeping House Full Time
description: Indicates whether the participant's current main daily activity includes keeping house full time.

title: Ever Had Kidney Dialysis Treatments
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever had kidney dialysis treatments.

title: On Dialysis Now
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently on dialysis at the time of the exam.

title: Doctor-Diagnosed Kidney Problems Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant reported being told by a doctor that they have kidney problems since the last exam.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Kidney Stones (Years)
description: Age in years at the time of kidney stones diagnosis.

title: History of Kidney Stones
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had kidney stones.

title: Current Status of Kidney Stones
description: Current status of the participant's kidney stones, indicating whether the problem is still present, controlled by medication or other means, or completely cured or gone.

title: History of Kidney Transplant
description: Indicates whether the participant reported having had a kidney transplant, as a follow-up to kidney problems reported since the last exam.

title: History of Knee Swelling
description: Participant-reported history of swelling in the knee.

title: Knows a Lot About Physical Fitness
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I know a lot about physical fitness,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Knows What Affects Physical Health
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I know what affects my physical health,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Lactose-Free Diet Pattern
description: Indicates whether the participant follows a lactose-free diet pattern.

title: Agatston Score in Left Anterior Descending (LAD) Coronary Artery
description: Agatston calcium score calculated for the left anterior descending coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Number of Lesions in Left Anterior Descending (LAD) Coronary Artery
description: Count of calcified lesions identified in the left anterior descending coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Calcium Mass of Lesions in Left Anterior Descending (LAD) Coronary Artery
description: Calcium mass of calcified lesions identified in the left anterior descending coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Mean Lesion Value in Left Anterior Descending (LAD) Coronary Artery
description: Mean value of calcified lesions identified in the left anterior descending coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Volume of Lesions in Left Anterior Descending (LAD) Coronary Artery
description: Volume of calcified lesions identified in the left anterior descending coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Date of Last Menstrual Period
description: The date of the participant's last menstrual period, recorded at the exam visit.

title: Month and Year of Last Menstrual Period (Combined)
description: The month and year of the participant's last menstrual period, combined into a single date variable. Participants unable to recall the exact month were asked to estimate as closely as possible.

title: Month of Last Menstrual Period
description: The month of the participant's last menstrual period.

title: Year of Last Menstrual Period
description: The year of the participant's last menstrual period.

title: Heart Rate During Lateral Scout CT
description: Heart rate recorded at the time of the lateral scout CT acquisition.

title: Lateral Scout CT Image Number
description: Image number assigned to the lateral scout CT acquisition.

title: Lateral Scout CT Series Number
description: Series number assigned to the lateral scout CT acquisition.

title: Laughter Rating
description: Interviewer rating of the subject's laughter, scored as none, natural, or lateral smile.

title: Frequency of Laxative Use to Lose Weight
description: Among participants who reported using laxatives to lose weight, the frequency of use, ranging from less than one day a week to more than five times a week.

title: Used Laxatives to Lose Weight
description: Indicates whether the participant reported using laxatives as a weight loss method.

title: Agatston Score in Left Circumflex (LCX) Coronary Artery
description: Agatston calcium score calculated for the left circumflex coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Number of Lesions in Left Circumflex (LCX) Coronary Artery
description: Count of calcified lesions identified in the left circumflex coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Calcium Mass of Lesions in Left Circumflex (LCX) Coronary Artery
description: Calcium mass of calcified lesions identified in the left circumflex coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Mean Lesion Value in Left Circumflex (LCX) Coronary Artery
description: Mean value of calcified lesions identified in the left circumflex coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Volume of Lesions in Left Circumflex (LCX) Coronary Artery
description: Volume of calcified lesions identified in the left circumflex coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: LDL Cholesterol (mg/dL)
description: Low-density lipoprotein (LDL) cholesterol concentration measured in mg/dL.

title: Ever Diagnosed With Learning Disorder
description: Self-reported history of ever having been diagnosed with a learning disorder.

title: Left Atrial Area (2D)
description: Left atrial area measured by two-dimensional echocardiography, assessed from four-chamber and two-chamber views, reported in cm².

title: Left Atrial Long-Axis Dimension (2D)
description: Left atrial long-axis dimension measured by two-dimensional echocardiography from four-chamber and two-chamber views, reported in cm.

title: Left Atrial Volume (2D)
description: Left atrial volume measured by two-dimensional echocardiography from four-chamber and two-chamber views, reported in mL.

title: Left Marriage-Like Relationship
description: Indicates whether the participant left a marriage-like relationship in the period since the previous contact.

title: Blood Clot in the Legs
description: Indicates whether the participant reported having a blood clot in the legs since the last exam.

title: Amount of Physical Activity During Leisure Time (Self-Rated)
description: Self-rated amount of physical activity during leisure time, reported on a scale from much less to much more compared with others.

title: Bike During Leisure Time (Yes/No)
description: Indicates whether the participant rides a bike during leisure time.

title: How Often Ride Bike in Leisure Time
description: Frequency with which the participant rides a bike during leisure time, rated from never to very often.

title: How Often Play Sports During Leisure Time
description: Frequency with which the participant plays sports or exercises during leisure time, rated from never to very often.

title: How Often Sweat During Leisure Time
description: Frequency with which the participant sweats during leisure time, rated from never to very often.

title: Leisure-Time Physical Activity Index
description: Derived index summarizing leisure-time physical activity.

title: Hours per Day Watching TV or Video During Leisure
description: Average number of hours per day the participant watches television or video.

title: Watch Television During Leisure Time
description: Indicates whether the participant watches television during leisure time.

title: Watch TV or Video Programming During Leisure Time
description: Indicates whether the participant watches television or other video programming during leisure time.

title: Minutes Spent Walking or Biking to Work or Shopping
description: Self-reported minutes spent walking or biking to and from work or shopping, recorded as an ordinal category ranging from less than 5 minutes to 45 or more minutes.

title: Walk During Leisure Time
description: Indicates whether the participant walks during leisure time.

title: How Often Walk in Leisure Time
description: Self-reported frequency of walking during leisure time, rated on a scale from never to very often.

title: Low-Frequency to High-Frequency HRV Power Ratio
description: Ratio of low-frequency to high-frequency spectral power of heart rate variability, reflecting the balance between sympathetic and parasympathetic autonomic modulation.

title: Mean Low-Frequency HRV Power (msec²)
description: Mean low-frequency (LF) spectral power of heart rate variability, calculated as the average of the two epoch-specific LF power values (FRSLFP1 and FRSLFP2).

title: Low-Frequency HRV Power (0.04–0.15 Hz, msec²)
description: Low-frequency (LF) spectral power of heart rate variability in the 0.04–0.15 Hz frequency band, expressed in msec², recorded separately for two epochs (epoch 1 and epoch 2).

title: Life Event: Had an Abortion
description: Indicates whether the participant had an abortion, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Accused of Imprisonable Offense
description: Indicates whether the participant was accused of an imprisonable offense, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Gave Up Child for Adoption
description: Indicates whether the participant gave up a child for adoption, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Problems from Use of Alcohol
description: Indicates whether the participant had problems from use of alcohol, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Was Arrested
description: Indicates whether the participant was arrested, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Assaulted, Attacked, or Robbed
description: Indicates whether the participant was assaulted, attacked, or robbed, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Became Engaged
description: Indicates whether the participant became engaged, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Birth of First Child
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced the birth of a first child, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Birth of Second or Later Child
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced the birth of a second or later child, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Broke Engagement
description: Indicates whether the participant broke an engagement, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Broke Up with a Close Friend
description: Indicates whether the participant broke up with a close friend, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Found Out Cannot Have Children
description: Indicates whether the participant found out that they cannot have children, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Change in Family Get-Togethers
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced a change in the frequency of family get-togethers, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Changed Jobs for a Better One
description: Indicates whether the participant changed jobs for a better one, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Changed Jobs for a Worse One
description: Indicates whether the participant changed jobs for a worse one, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Changed Schools
description: Indicates whether the participant changed schools, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Was Convicted or Found Guilty
description: Indicates whether the participant was convicted or found guilty, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Events: Number of Positive Events
description: Count of positive life events reported by the participant on the Life Events Questionnaire.

title: Life Event: Death of a Child
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced the death of a child, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Death of a Close Friend
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced the death of a close friend, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Death of Another Family Member
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced the death of another family member, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Death of a Parent
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced the death of a parent, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Death of Spouse or Mate
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced the death of a spouse or mate, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Got Demoted at Work
description: Indicates whether the participant was demoted at work, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Discriminated Against at Work
description: Indicates whether the participant was discriminated against at work, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Became Divorced
description: Indicates whether the participant became divorced, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Ended a Love Affair
description: Indicates whether the participant ended a love affair, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Fired from a Job
description: Indicates whether the participant was fired from a job, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Got Married
description: Indicates whether the participant got married. Unlike most other life events items, response options are limited to No or Yes without a timing qualifier distinguishing events within the last year from earlier events.

title: Life Event: Graduated from School
description: Indicates whether the participant graduated from school, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Increased Church or Club Activity
description: Indicates whether the participant increased their church or club activity, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Greatly Increased Work Load
description: Indicates whether the participant had a greatly increased work load, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Was Jailed
description: Indicates whether the participant was jailed, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Laid Off from a Job
description: Indicates whether the participant was laid off from a job, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Made a Large Purchase on Installment
description: Indicates whether the participant made a large purchase on installment, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Lost Custody of Child Through Divorce
description: Indicates whether the participant lost custody of a child through divorce, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Lost Home Due to Flood or Fire
description: Indicates whether the participant lost their home due to flood or fire, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Major Illness or Injury
description: Indicates whether the participant had a major illness or injury, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Living in a Marriage-Like Relation
description: Indicates whether the participant was living in a marriage-like relationship, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Married Couple Separated
description: Indicates whether the participant, as part of a married couple, became separated, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Had a Miscarriage
description: Indicates whether the participant had a miscarriage, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Moved to a Better Residence
description: Indicates whether the participant moved to a better residence, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Moved Out of Parents' Home
description: Indicates whether the participant moved out of their parents' home, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Moved to a Worse Residence
description: Indicates whether the participant moved to a worse residence, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Took Up a New Hobby
description: Indicates whether the participant took up a new hobby, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Took a Cut in Pay with No Demotion
description: Indicates whether the participant took a cut in pay with no demotion, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Pay Increase with No Promotion
description: Indicates whether the participant received a pay increase with no promotion, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Became Pregnant and Wanted Baby
description: Indicates whether the participant became pregnant and wanted the baby, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Problems Getting a New Job
description: Indicates whether the participant had problems getting a new job, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Had Problems in School
description: Indicates whether the participant had problems in school, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Promoted at Work
description: Indicates whether the participant was promoted at work, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Quit a Job
description: Indicates whether the participant quit a job, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Spouse or Mate Returned to Work
description: Indicates whether the participant's spouse or mate returned to work, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Spouse or Mate Started First Full-Time Job
description: Indicates whether the participant's spouse or mate started their first full-time job, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Spouse or Mate Stopped Work
description: Indicates whether the participant's spouse or mate stopped working, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Started a Business
description: Indicates whether the participant started a business, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Started First Full-Time Job
description: Indicates whether the participant started their first full-time job, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Started a Love Affair
description: Indicates whether the participant started a love affair, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Started School
description: Indicates whether the participant started school, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Stopped Work for a Long Period
description: Indicates whether the participant stopped work for a long period, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Had Success at Work
description: Indicates whether the participant had success at work, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Took Out a Mortgage on a House
description: Indicates whether the participant took out a mortgage on a house, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Had Troubles with Boss
description: Indicates whether the participant had troubles with their boss, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Unable to Move After Expecting To
description: Indicates whether the participant was unable to move after expecting to do so, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Unwanted Pregnancy
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced an unwanted pregnancy, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Events: Weighted Score
description: Weighted composite score summarizing the life events reported by the participant on the Life Events Questionnaire.

title: Life Event: Went Off Welfare
description: Indicates whether the participant went off welfare, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Went on Welfare
description: Indicates whether the participant went on welfare, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Life Event: Worsened Relations with Spouse or Mate, No Divorce
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced worsened relations with their spouse or mate without divorce, with response options distinguishing events occurring within the last year from those occurring earlier.

title: Lifetime History of ≥2 Weeks of Depression
description: Participant-reported lifetime history of experiencing at least two weeks of depression (Question 1).

title: Likes the Way Clothes Fit
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I like the way my clothes fit,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Likes the Way They Look
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I like the way I look,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Likes the Way They Look Without Clothes
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I like the way I look without clothes,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Estimated Daily Linoleic Acid Intake (g)
description: Estimated daily linoleic acid intake, in grams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Live or Work at Night in High-Crime Area
description: Self-reported indicator of whether the participant lives or works at night in a high-crime area.

title: Lives With Aunts/Uncles
description: Indicates whether aunts or uncles live with the participant.

title: Lives With Children
description: Indicates whether children live with the participant.

title: Lives With Grandparents
description: Indicates whether grandparents live with the participant.

title: Lives With In-Laws
description: Indicates whether in-laws live with the participant.

title: Lives With Nieces/Nephews
description: Indicates whether nieces or nephews live with the participant.

title: Lives With Other Persons
description: Indicates whether other persons (not otherwise categorized) live with the participant.

title: Lives With Parents
description: Indicates whether the participant's parents live with them.

title: Lives With Roommate(s)
description: Indicates whether the participant has one or more roommates living with them.

title: Lives With Siblings
description: Indicates whether brothers or sisters live with the participant.

title: Lives With Significant Other
description: Indicates whether the participant lives with a significant other.

title: Lives With Spouse
description: Indicates whether the participant lives with their spouse.

title: Lives With Stepchildren
description: Indicates whether stepchildren live with the participant.

title: Living in a Marriage-Like Relationship
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently living in a marriage-like relationship.

title: Agatston Score in Left Main Coronary Artery
description: Agatston calcium score calculated for the left main coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Number of Lesions in Left Main Coronary Artery
description: Count of calcified lesions identified in the left main coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Calcium Mass of Lesions in Left Main Coronary Artery
description: Calcium mass of calcified lesions identified in the left main coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Mean Lesion Value in Left Main Coronary Artery
description: Mean value of calcified lesions identified in the left main coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Volume of Lesions in Left Main Coronary Artery
description: Volume of calcified lesions identified in the left main coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Date of Last Menstrual Period
description: Date of the participant's last menstrual period.

title: Last Menstrual Period Date Exact vs Approximate
description: Indicates whether the reported date of last menstrual period is exact or approximate.

title: Log Low-Frequency to High-Frequency HRV Power Ratio
description: Logarithm of the low-frequency to high-frequency spectral power ratio of heart rate variability.

title: Log Mean High-Frequency HRV Power
description: Logarithm of the mean high-frequency spectral power of heart rate variability.

title: Log Mean Low-Frequency HRV Power
description: Logarithm of the mean low-frequency spectral power of heart rate variability.

title: Log Mean RMSSD
description: Logarithm of the mean root mean square of successive differences (RMSSD) of NN intervals, a log-transformed time-domain measure of heart rate variability.

title: Log Standard Deviation of NN Intervals
description: Logarithm of the standard deviation of NN intervals, a log-transformed time-domain measure of heart rate variability.

title: Longest Period Length (Days) in Past 12 Months
description: The longest number of days of actual menstrual flow at any single period during the past 12 months, for participants whose period length was variable or uncertain.

title: Longest Period Length (Days) at Age 20–30
description: The longest period length in days reported for the participant's menstrual periods during ages 20–30.

title: Longitudinal Peak Strain, 2-Chamber and 3-Chamber (%)
description: Longitudinal peak strain (%) measured from two-chamber and three-chamber echocardiographic views.

title: Longitudinal Peak Strain, 4-Chamber (%)
description: Longitudinal peak strain (%) measured from the four-chamber echocardiographic view.

title: Currently Looking for Work
description: Indicates whether the participant is currently looking for work, asked as part of questions about current main daily activities.

title: Looking for Work for More Than 2 Months Since Last Exam
description: Among participants unemployed for more than two months since the last CARDIA exam (not including disability or retirement), indicates whether they have been looking for work for more than two months during that time.

title: Low-Carbohydrate Diet Pattern
description: Indicates whether the participant follows a low-carbohydrate diet pattern.

title: Low-Fat Diet Pattern
description: Indicates whether the participant follows a reduced-fat diet pattern.

title: History of Low Platelet Count (Ever Told by Doctor)
description: Participant-reported history of low platelet count, based on whether they were ever told by a doctor that they had low platelet count.

title: On Low Sodium Diet During Collection
description: Indicates whether the participant was following a low sodium diet during the urine collection period.

title: Frequency of Low Sodium Diet Intake
description: The reported frequency with which the participant followed a low sodium diet.

title: History of Low White Cell Count (Ever Told by Doctor)
description: Participant-reported history of low white blood cell count, based on whether they were ever told by a doctor that they had low white cell count.

title: Lunch Frequency (Days/Week vs. Month, Categorical)
description: Categorical indicator of whether the participant's lunch frequency is reported in days per week or days per month.

title: Days per Week or Month Eating Lunch
description: The number of days per week or per month that the participant eats lunch. The frequency unit (week or month) is captured in the companion variable LUNCH_FREQUENCY_CATEGORY.

title: Doctor-Diagnosed Lung Disease Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant reported being told by a doctor that they have lung disease since the last exam.

title: Any Lung Trouble Before Age 16
description: Indicates whether the participant had any lung trouble before age 16.

title: History of Blood Test for Lupus
description: Participant-reported history of having had a blood test for lupus.

title: Result of Blood Test for Lupus
description: Participant-reported result of a blood test for lupus, asked as a follow-up to those who reported having had such a test.

title: LV Cardiac Output
description: Left ventricular cardiac output derived from M-mode LV and RV measurements.

title: LV Ejection Fraction
description: Left ventricular ejection fraction (%) assessed by M-mode, two-dimensional (two-chamber and four-chamber views), and three-dimensional echocardiography.

title: LV End-Diastolic Volume
description: Left ventricular end-diastolic volume (mL) assessed by M-mode, two-dimensional (two-chamber and four-chamber views), and three-dimensional echocardiography.

title: LV End-Systolic Volume
description: Left ventricular end-systolic volume (mL) assessed by M-mode, two-dimensional (two-chamber and four-chamber views), and three-dimensional echocardiography.

title: LV Percent Fractional Shortening
description: Left ventricular percent fractional shortening derived from M-mode echocardiography.

title: LV Internal Dimension in Diastole
description: Left ventricular internal dimension measured in diastole by M-mode and two-dimensional echocardiography.

title: LV Internal Dimension in Systole
description: Left ventricular internal dimension measured in systole by M-mode and two-dimensional echocardiography.

title: Left Ventricular Mass
description: Left ventricular mass (g) derived from M-mode (CoC calculated), two-dimensional, and three-dimensional echocardiography.

title: LV Posterior Wall Thickness in Diastole
description: Left ventricular posterior wall thickness measured in diastole by M-mode and two-dimensional echocardiography.

title: LV Posterior Wall Thickness in Systole
description: Left ventricular posterior wall thickness measured in systole by M-mode echocardiography. Earlier exam variables include repeated individual readings.

title: LV Stroke Volume
description: Left ventricular stroke volume (mL) derived from M-mode, two-dimensional, and three-dimensional echocardiography.

title: LV Tissue Doppler Lateral A′ Velocity
description: Tissue Doppler lateral annular A-wave prime (late diastolic) velocity measured by Doppler echocardiography.

title: LV Tissue Doppler Lateral E′ Velocity
description: Tissue Doppler lateral annular E-wave prime (early diastolic) velocity measured by Doppler echocardiography.

title: LV Tissue Doppler Lateral S′ Velocity
description: Tissue Doppler lateral annular S-wave (systolic) velocity measured by Doppler echocardiography.

title: LV Tissue Doppler Septal A′ Velocity
description: Tissue Doppler septal annular A-wave prime (late diastolic) velocity measured by Doppler echocardiography.

title: LV Tissue Doppler Septal E′ Velocity
description: Tissue Doppler septal annular E-wave prime (early diastolic) velocity measured by Doppler echocardiography.

title: LV Tissue Doppler Septal S′ Velocity
description: Tissue Doppler septal annular S-wave (systolic) velocity measured by Doppler echocardiography, reported in cm/s.

title: Semi-Quantitative LV Wall Motion Summary
