description: Semi-quantitative summary of left ventricular regional wall motion.

title: Age at First Major Health Problem (Years)
description: Age in years at the time of diagnosis of the participant's first self-reported major health problem.

title: Current Status of First Major Health Problem
description: Current status of the participant's first major health problem, indicating whether they still have it, it is under control, or it is cured or gone.

title: Age at Second Major Health Problem (Years)
description: Age in years at the time of diagnosis of the participant's second self-reported major health problem.

title: Current Status of Second Major Health Problem
description: Current status of the participant's second major health problem, indicating whether they still have it, it is under control, or it is cured or gone.

title: Age at Third Major Health Problem (Years)
description: Age in years at the time of diagnosis of the participant's third self-reported major health problem.

title: Current Status of Third Major Health Problem
description: Current status of the participant's third major health problem, indicating whether they still have it, it is under control, or it is cured or gone.

title: Major Illness or Injury in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced a major illness or injury in the past year, as reported during follow-up contact.

title: History of Rash on Cheeks
description: Participant-reported history of a rash on the cheeks.

title: Pre-Instruction Baseline Mean Arterial Pressure
description: Mean arterial pressure measured during the pre-instruction baseline phase of the reactivity protocol, recorded across up to four sequential readings.

title: Breakout Mean Arterial Pressure and Recovery
description: Mean arterial pressure measured during the breakout task and subsequent recovery phase of the reactivity protocol, recorded across up to five readings including task and recovery measurements.

title: Star-Tracing Mean Arterial Pressure and Recovery
description: Mean arterial pressure measured during the star-tracing task and subsequent recovery phase of the reactivity protocol, recorded across up to five readings including task and recovery measurements.

title: Consumed Edible or Liquid Marijuana in Past 30 Days
description: Self-reported whether the participant consumed marijuana in edible or liquid form in the past 30 days.

title: Consumed Marijuana by Other Route in Past 30 Days
description: Self-reported whether the participant consumed marijuana by a route other than those listed in the past 30 days.

title: Consumed Smokable Marijuana in Past 30 Days
description: Self-reported whether the participant consumed marijuana in smokable form in the past 30 days.

title: Used Topical Marijuana on Skin in Past 30 Days
description: Self-reported whether the participant applied marijuana topically to the skin in the past 30 days.

title: Consumed Vaporized Marijuana in Past 30 Days
description: Self-reported whether the participant consumed marijuana in vaporized form in the past 30 days.

title: Days Used Marijuana in Past 30 Days
description: Number of days the participant used marijuana in the past 30 days.

title: Ever Used Marijuana
description: Self-reported whether the participant has ever used marijuana in their lifetime.

title: Used Marijuana for Medical Reasons in Past 30 Days
description: Self-reported reason for marijuana use in the past 30 days, indicating whether use was for medical reasons only.

title: Used Marijuana in Past 24 Hours
description: Self-reported whether the participant used marijuana in the past 24 hours.

title: Marital Status at Year 0 Exam
description: Self-reported marital status of the participant at the Year 0 (baseline) exam, with categories including single, married, widowed, separated, or living with someone in a marriage-like relationship.

title: Marital Status at Year 7 Exam
description: Self-reported marital status of the participant at the Year 7 exam, with categories including single, married, widowed, separated, or living with someone in a marriage-like relationship.

title: Mastery: Feeling Pushed Around in Life
description: Participant's response to the Personal Control/Mastery Questionnaire item: 'I am being pushed around in life' (Question 5). Responses range from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Mastery: Belief Can Do Anything Set Mind To
description: Participant's response to the Personal Control/Mastery Questionnaire item: 'I can do anything I set my mind to' (Question 7). Responses range from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Mastery: Belief That Future Depends on Oneself
description: Participant's response to the Personal Control/Mastery Questionnaire item: 'My future depends on me' (Question 6). Responses range from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Mastery: Helpless Feeling Dealing With Life Events
description: Participant's response to the Personal Control/Mastery Questionnaire item regarding feeling helpless when dealing with life events (Question 4). Responses range from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Mastery: Perceived Inability to Change Important Things
description: Participant's response to the Personal Control/Mastery Questionnaire item indicating there is little one can do to change things (Question 3). Responses range from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Mastery: Perceived Lack of Control Over Things Happening
description: Participant's response to the Personal Control/Mastery Questionnaire item: 'No control over things happening to me' (Question 1). Responses range from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Mastery: Perceived Inability to Solve Personal Problems
description: Participant's response to the Personal Control/Mastery Questionnaire item: 'No way to solve personal problems' (Question 2). Responses range from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Maximum Days Between Periods in Past 12 Months
description: The greatest number of days between the beginning of one period and the beginning of the next during the past 12 months, for participants whose cycles were irregular or uncertain. Times on birth control pills, pregnant, or nursing were excluded. Response categories range from less than 20 days to more than 45 days.

title: Maximum Days Between Periods at Age 20–30
description: The greatest number of days between the beginning of one period and the beginning of the next during ages 20–30. Response categories range from less than 20 days to more than 45 days.

title: Largest Number of Drinks in One Day in Past Month
description: The largest number of alcoholic drinks the participant consumed in a single day during the past month.

title: Maximum Heart Rate During GXT
description: Maximum heart rate achieved during the graded exercise treadmill test, measured in beats per minute.

title: Maximum Number of Moderate or Severe Hot Flashes per Day
description: The maximum number of moderate or severe hot flashes experienced per day by the participant.

title: Maximum Rating of Perceived Exertion During GXT
description: Maximum rating of perceived exertion (RPE) recorded during the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Use of Any Listed Diet Products (Indicator)
description: Indicates whether the participant uses any of the diet-related products shown on a cue card.

title: Days per Month Eating Breakfast
description: The number of days per month that the participant eats breakfast.

title: Days per Week Eating Breakfast
description: The number of days per week that the participant eats breakfast.

title: Days per Month Eating Dinner
description: The number of days per month that the participant eats dinner.

title: Days per Week Eating Dinner
description: The number of days per week that the participant eats dinner.

title: Days per Month Eating Evening Snack
description: The number of days per month that the participant eats an evening snack.

title: Days per Week Eating Evening Snack
description: The number of days per week that the participant eats an evening snack.

title: Days per Month Eating Lunch
description: The number of days per month that the participant eats lunch.

title: Days per Week Eating Lunch
description: The number of days per week that the participant eats lunch.

title: Days per Month Eating Mid-Afternoon Snack
description: The number of days per month that the participant eats a mid-afternoon snack.

title: Days per Week Eating Mid-Afternoon Snack
description: The number of days per week that the participant eats a mid-afternoon snack.

title: Days Per Month Eating Mid-Morning Snack
description: Number of days per month the participant reports eating a mid-morning snack.

title: Days Per Week Eating Mid-Morning Snack
description: Number of days per week the participant reports eating a mid-morning snack.

title: Average Diastolic Blood Pressure (2nd and 3rd Readings)
description: Average diastolic blood pressure computed as the mean of the second and third readings (DSUM/2).

title: Mean Milliliters of Alcohol Consumed Per Day
description: Mean milliliters of absolute alcohol consumption per day, derived from the alcohol use questionnaire responses.

title: Average Systolic Blood Pressure (2nd and 3rd Readings)
description: Average systolic blood pressure computed as the mean of the second and third readings (SSUM/2).

title: Ever Careless in Taking Pills
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever been careless in taking their pills.

title: Ever Forget to Take Pills
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever forgotten to take their pills.

title: Miss Pills for Any Other Reason
description: Indicates whether the participant missed taking their pills for any reason other than those specifically asked about in the adherence questionnaire.

title: Miss Pills When Feeling Better
description: Indicates whether the participant has missed taking their pills when feeling better.

title: Miss Pills When Feeling Sick
description: Indicates whether the participant has missed taking their pills when feeling sick.

title: History of Being Dazed or Having a Memory Gap
description: Self-reported history of ever having been dazed or experienced a gap in memory, assessed as part of the head injury and concussion history section.

title: Age at Menarche (Years)
description: Age in years at the time of menarche (first menstrual period).

title: Has Undergone Menopause
description: Indicates whether the participant has undergone menopause.

title: Gone Through Menopause in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant has gone through menopause or the change of life.

title: Menstrual Cycles Regular in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant's menstrual cycles were regular (at least half the time) during the past 12 months, excluding times when on birth control pills, pregnant, or nursing.

title: Menstruated in Last 3 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant menstruated in the 3 months prior to the exam.

title: Current Metabolic Disease
description: Indicates whether the participant was currently experiencing a metabolic disease, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Days Used Methamphetamines in Past 30 Days
description: Number of days the participant used methamphetamines in the past 30 days.

title: Ever Used Methamphetamines
description: Self-reported whether the participant has ever used methamphetamines.

title: Times Used Methamphetamines in Lifetime
description: Self-reported lifetime frequency of methamphetamine use, coded in ordinal categories.

title: Mid-Afternoon Snack Frequency (Days/Week vs. Month, Categorical)
description: Categorical indicator of whether the participant's mid-afternoon snack frequency is reported in days per week or days per month.

title: Mid-Afternoon Snack Frequency (Days Per Week or Month)
description: Number of days per week or per month the participant reports eating a mid-afternoon snack; the time unit (week vs. month) is captured in the companion categorical variable.

title: Mid-Morning Snack Frequency (Days/Week vs. Month, Categorical)
description: Categorical indicator of whether the participant's mid-morning snack frequency is reported in days per week or days per month.

title: Mid-Morning Snack Frequency (Days Per Week or Month)
description: Number of days per week or per month the participant reports eating a mid-morning snack; the time unit (week vs. month) is captured in the companion categorical variable.

title: Miles Traveled in a Motor Vehicle
description: Self-reported number of miles traveled in a motor vehicle.

title: Minimum Days Between Periods in Past 12 Months
description: The smallest number of days between the beginning of one period and the beginning of the next during the past 12 months, for participants whose cycles were irregular or uncertain. Times on birth control pills, pregnant, or nursing were excluded. Response categories range from less than 20 days to more than 45 days.

title: Minimum Days Between Periods at Age 20–30
description: The smallest number of days between the beginning of one period and the beginning of the next during ages 20–30. Response categories range from less than 20 days to more than 45 days.

title: Minutes Slept
description: The number of additional minutes slept (beyond whole hours) by the participant prior to the exam visit.

title: Minutes From Home to Usual Source of Medical Care
description: The number of minutes it takes to travel directly from home to the participant's usual source of medical care.

title: Subjective QC: Mis-Registration
description: Subjective quality control rating of mis-registration artifacts in the CT heart scan, assessed separately for the first and second heart scans.

title: Mitral A-Wave Duration
description: Duration of the mitral valve A-wave measured by Doppler echocardiography, reported in milliseconds.

title: Mitral Valve E-Wave Deceleration Time
description: Deceleration time of the mitral valve E-wave measured by Doppler echocardiography, reported in milliseconds.

title: Mitral Inflow E/A Ratio
description: Ratio of the mitral valve peak E-wave velocity to peak A-wave velocity measured by Doppler echocardiography.

title: Mitral Valve Isovolumic Relaxation Time
description: Isovolumic relaxation time measured by Doppler echocardiography at the mitral valve.

title: Mitral Inflow Peak A-Wave Velocity
description: Peak velocity of the mitral valve A-wave (late diastolic filling) measured by Doppler echocardiography.

title: Mitral Inflow Peak E-Wave Velocity
description: Peak velocity of the mitral valve E-wave (early diastolic filling) measured by Doppler echocardiography.

title: Mitral Valve Propagation Velocity
description: Mitral valve propagation velocity measured by M-mode echocardiography.

title: Mitral Regurgitation (Moderate or Severe)
description: Indicator of moderate or severe mitral regurgitation assessed by echocardiography.

title: Mitral Stenosis (Any Grade)
description: Indicates the presence of mitral stenosis of any severity (mild, moderate, or severe) as assessed by echocardiography.

title: Mitral Valve Prolapse (Moderate or Severe)
description: Indicates the presence of mitral valve prolapse of moderate or severe degree as assessed by echocardiography.

title: Mode of Follow-Up Response
description: The mode by which the participant completed the follow-up contact.

title: Moderate Physical Activity Intensity Score
description: A summary score reflecting moderate-intensity physical activity, derived from the Physical Activity Questionnaire (Form 18).

title: Months Living in Marriage-Like Relationship
description: The number of months the participant has been living in a marriage-like relationship.

title: Months Married
description: The number of months the participant has been married.

title: Months Since Last Menstrual Period
description: Number of months since the participant's last menstrual period.

title: Months Unemployed Since Last Exam
description: The total number of months the participant has been unemployed since their last CARDIA exam (not including disability or retirement), among those unemployed for more than two months.

title: Months Without Health Insurance Coverage in Past 2 Years
description: The number of months during the past two years that the participant did not have health insurance or other coverage for medical care.

title: Mood at Sample 1: Worried/Anxious/Fearful
description: Self-reported mood state of worried, anxious, or fearful at the time of the first saliva sample during the monitoring period.

title: Mood at Sample 2: Worried/Anxious/Fearful
description: Self-reported mood state of worried, anxious, or fearful at the time of saliva sample 2 during the monitoring period.

title: Mood at Sample 3: Worried/Anxious/Fearful
description: Self-reported mood state of worried, anxious, or fearful at the time of saliva sample 3 during the monitoring period.

title: Mood at Sample 4: Worried/Anxious/Fearful
description: Self-reported mood state of worried, anxious, or fearful at the time of saliva sample 4 during the monitoring period.

title: Mood at Sample 5: Worried/Anxious/Fearful
description: Self-reported mood state of worried, anxious, or fearful at the time of saliva sample 5 during the monitoring period.

title: Mood at Sample 6: Worried/Anxious/Fearful
description: Self-reported mood state of worried, anxious, or fearful at the time of saliva sample 6 during the monitoring period.

title: Frequent Mood Changes in Past 3 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced frequent mood changes in the past three months.

title: Mood at Sample 1: Happy/Excited/Content
description: Self-reported mood state of happy, excited, or content at the time of the first saliva sample during the monitoring period.

title: Mood at Sample 2: Happy/Excited/Content
description: Self-reported mood state of happy, excited, or content at the time of saliva sample 2 during the monitoring period.

title: Mood at Sample 3: Happy/Excited/Content
description: Self-reported mood state of happy, excited, or content at the time of saliva sample 3 during the monitoring period.

title: Mood at Sample 4: Happy/Excited/Content
description: Self-reported mood state of happy, excited, or content at the time of saliva sample 4 during the monitoring period.

title: Mood at Sample 5: Happy/Excited/Content
description: Self-reported mood state of happy, excited, or content at the time of saliva sample 5 during the monitoring period.

title: Mood at Sample 6: Happy/Excited/Content
description: Self-reported mood state of happy, excited, or content at the time of saliva sample 6 during the monitoring period.

title: Indicator of Additional Hospitalizations Beyond Three
description: Flag indicating whether the participant reported more than three hospitalizations since the last exam, beyond those captured in the standard three-hospitalization fields.

title: Morning Activity: Brushed Teeth Before Saliva Sample 1
description: Indicates whether the participant brushed their teeth before providing saliva sample 1 on the monitoring day.

title: Morning Activity: Drank Before Saliva Sample 1
description: Indicates whether the participant drank anything before providing saliva sample 1 on the monitoring day.

title: Morning Activity: Ate Before Saliva Sample 1
description: Indicates whether the participant ate before providing saliva sample 1 on the monitoring day.

title: Morning Activity: Exercised Before Saliva Sample 1
description: Indicates whether the participant exercised before providing saliva sample 1 on the monitoring day.

title: History of Morning Joint Stiffness Lasting at Least 1 Hour for More Than 6 Weeks
description: Participant-reported history of joint stiffness in the morning lasting at least one hour for more than 6 weeks.

title: Most Attractive Opposite-Sex Figure Selection
description: Selected figure rating representing the body shape the respondent considers most attractive in the opposite sex.

title: Most Important Factor in Making Diet Changes
description: The single most important factor the participant identifies as motivating their dietary changes, with response options including doctor recommendation, personal health concerns, pregnancy or birth of a child, influence of family or friends, desire to improve physical appearance, publicity regarding diet and health issues, or other.

title: Mother Age at Death
description: Age of the participant's natural mother at the time of death, in years.

title: Mother Age at Heart Attack
description: Age of the participant's natural mother when she had a heart attack, in years.

title: Mother Age Regardless of Vital Status
description: Age of the participant's natural mother regardless of vital status.

title: Mother Ever Had Angina
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural mother ever had angina (chest pain related to heart disease). Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Mother Ever Had Asthma
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural mother ever had asthma. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Mother's Body Build at Heaviest
description: Participant-reported description of the mother's body build at her heaviest weight.

title: Mother Body Figure Rating
description: Body figure rating for the participant's natural mother.

title: Mother Ever Had Cancer
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural mother ever had cancer. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Mother Cause of Death
description: Reported cause of the participant's natural mother's death, with categories including accident, cancer, heart attack, stroke, other, or do not know.

title: Mother Cause of Death (Other, Specify)
description: Specified cause of death for the participant's natural mother when cause was reported as 'other.'

title: Mother Current Age
description: Current age of the participant's natural mother in years, if living.

title: Mother Ever Had Diabetes
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural mother ever had diabetes. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Mother Ever Had Gout
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural mother ever had gout. Response options are No, Yes, or Don't know.

title: Mother Heart Attack Status (Exam H, Variable 1)
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural mother ever had a heart attack, recorded as the first of two variables at exam H.

title: Mother Ever Had Heart Attack
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural mother ever had a heart attack. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Mother Ever Had Heart Failure
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural mother ever had heart failure. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Mother Ever Had High Blood Pressure
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural mother ever had high blood pressure. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Mother Ever Had Kidney Failure or Dialysis
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural mother ever had kidney failure or dialysis. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Mother Living Status
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural mother is living. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Mother Heart Attack Before Age 60
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural mother had a heart attack before age 60. Response options are No, Yes, or Don't know.

title: Mother Overweight Status
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural mother is or was overweight.

title: Mother Toxemia/Preeclampsia/High Blood Pressure in Pregnancy
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural mother had toxemia, preeclampsia, or high blood pressure during pregnancy. Response options are No, Yes, or Don't know.

title: Mother Smokes Cigarettes
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural mother smokes cigarettes.

title: Mother Ever Had Stroke
description: Indicates whether the participant's natural mother ever had a stroke. Response options are No, Yes, or Do not know.

title: Subjective QC: Streak Artifacts from Motion Unsharpness
description: Subjective quality control rating of streak artifacts related to motion unsharpness in the CT heart scan, assessed separately for the first and second heart scans.

title: Motor Pace Rating
description: Interviewer rating of the subject's motor pace, scored as slow, average, or hurried.

title: Motorcycle Helmet Use
description: Self-reported frequency of wearing a motorcycle helmet, ranging from never to always.

title: Motorcycle Use Frequency
description: Self-reported frequency of riding a motorcycle, ranging from never or almost never to daily or almost daily.

title: Lateral Mouth Movement Rating
description: Interviewer rating of whether the subject exhibited lateral mouth movement, scored as no or yes.

title: Moved Out of Parents' Home
description: Indicates whether the participant moved out of their parents' home in the period since the previous contact.

title: 3D FLAIR Sequences Obtained
description: Indicates whether all 3D FLAIR MRI protocol imaging sequences were obtained during the brain MRI exam, as reported by the MRI technologist.

title: 3DT1 Sequences Obtained
description: Indicates whether all 3DT1 MRI protocol imaging sequences were obtained during the brain MRI exam, as reported by the MRI technologist.

title: 3DT2 Sequences Obtained
description: Indicates whether all 3DT2 MRI protocol imaging sequences were obtained during the brain MRI exam, as reported by the MRI technologist.

title: Additional MRI Sequences and Comments
description: Records any additional MRI sequences performed beyond the standard protocol and any additional comments from the MRI acquisition form.

title: Specific Participant-Related Issues During MRI
description: Details specific participant-related issues encountered during the brain MRI scan, including difficulty breathing, claustrophobia, movement, pain or discomfort, and other issues.

title: ASL Calibration Sequences Obtained
description: Indicates whether all ASL calibration MRI protocol imaging sequences were obtained during the brain MRI exam, as reported by the MRI technologist.

title: ASL Sequences Obtained
description: Indicates whether all ASL MRI protocol imaging sequences were obtained during the brain MRI exam, as reported by the MRI technologist.

title: Attempted MRI Scan Completed
description: Indicates whether an attempted brain MRI scan was completed, with a response option for attempted but not completed.

title: Reason BOLD Breath-Hold Sequences Not Obtained
description: Records the reason why BOLD breath-hold MRI protocol imaging sequences were not obtained during the brain MRI exam, as reported by the MRI technologist.

title: BOLD Breath-Hold Sequences Obtained
description: Indicates whether all BOLD breath-hold MRI protocol imaging sequences were obtained during the brain MRI exam, as reported by the MRI technologist.

title: BOLD Resting Sequences Obtained
description: Indicates whether all BOLD resting MRI protocol imaging sequences were obtained during the brain MRI exam, as reported by the MRI technologist.

title: Reason Breath-Hold Compliant Sequences Not Obtained
description: Records the reason why breath-hold compliant MRI protocol imaging sequences were not obtained during the brain MRI exam, as reported by the MRI technologist.

title: Breath-Hold Compliant Sequences Obtained
description: Indicates whether all breath-hold compliant MRI protocol imaging sequences were obtained during the brain MRI exam, as reported by the MRI technologist.

title: MRI Clinical Read Date and Results
description: Records the date of the clinical read of the brain MRI, the results of that read, and whether health provider follow-up was indicated.

title: Brain MRI Consent Form Signed
description: Indicates whether the participant signed the brain MRI consent form prior to the scan.

title: DTI Sequences Obtained
description: Indicates whether all DTI MRI protocol imaging sequences were obtained during the brain MRI exam, as reported by the MRI technologist.

title: DTI (Repeat) Sequences Obtained
description: Indicates whether all DTI (repeat) MRI protocol imaging sequences were obtained during the brain MRI exam, as reported by the MRI technologist.

title: Initial Contact Anthropometrics (Height, Weight, BMI, Waist Circumference)
description: Anthropometric measures collected at the Brain MRI initial contact screening, including height (inches), weight (lbs), calculated BMI, and waist/hip circumference.

title: Initial Contact: Willingness to Participate in Brain MRI
description: Captures the participant's willingness to participate in the brain MRI sub-study at initial contact, including whether they agreed, declined, or wished to be contacted at a later time.

title: Initial Contact: Reasons for Refusal to Participate in Brain MRI
description: Records the reasons given by participants who declined to participate in the brain MRI sub-study at initial contact, including being too busy, fear, health reasons, not interested, transportation, transplant, or other reasons.

title: Initial Contact: MRI Safety Screening Items
description: Documents responses to MRI safety screening questions at initial contact, including items on pacemakers, stents, cochlear implants, magnetically or electrically activated devices, metal fragment exposure, severe claustrophobia, difficulty lying flat, and tattoos.

title: Year 25 MRI Participation and Findings (for Year 30 Eligibility)
description: Captures whether the participant took part in the Year 25 brain MRI sub-study and whether any Level 3 or Level 4 clinical findings were identified at that time, used to assess Year 30 MRI eligibility.

title: MRI Required Overnight Stay
description: Indicates whether the participant's MRI required an overnight hospital stay.

title: Participant-Related MRI Scan Issues
description: Indicates whether any participant-related issues occurred during the brain MRI scan, as reported by the MRI technologist.

title: Permission Given for MRI
description: Indicates whether the participant gave permission for their MRI records to be accessed.

title: Pregnancy Test Completed Prior to MRI Scan
description: Indicates whether a pregnancy test was completed prior to the brain MRI scan, with response options including pregnant or at risk for pregnancy, yes (test completed), or exempt.

title: Date of Pregnancy Test
description: Date on which a pregnancy test was administered prior to the brain MRI scan, as recorded by field center staff.

title: Pregnancy Test Result
description: Result of the pregnancy test completed prior to the brain MRI scan, recorded as negative or positive by field center staff.

title: Reason for MRI Scan
description: Reason for which the participant underwent an MRI scan.

title: MRI Study Completeness and Reasons
description: Captures whether the brain MRI study was completed, not attempted, or rescheduled, along with reasons such as consent withdrawal, failure to show, not eligible, technical problems, claustrophobia, participant break, subject or motion artifact, or insurance coverage issues.

title: Reason SWI Sequences Not Obtained
description: Free-text reason provided when susceptibility-weighted imaging (SWI) sequences were not obtained during the brain MRI acquisition.

title: SWI Sequences Obtained
description: Indicates whether susceptibility-weighted imaging (SWI) sequences were obtained during the brain MRI acquisition.

title: Technical MRI Scan Issues
description: Indicates whether any technical issues occurred during the brain MRI scan, as recorded by the MRI technologist.

title: Number of MRI Scans Transmitted and Received
description: Records the number of brain MRI scans transmitted from the CARDIA site and the number received at the reading center.

title: Current Disorder of Muscles
description: Indicates whether the participant was currently experiencing a disorder of muscles, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: History of Muscle Weakness Lasting More Than 3 Months
description: Participant-reported history of muscle weakness lasting more than 3 months.

title: Doctor-Diagnosed Heart Attack Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant reported being told by a doctor that they had a heart attack since the last exam, as a follow-up to reported heart problems.

title: History of Myocarditis
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had myocarditis. Response options include No, Yes, and Don't know.

title: Current Status of Myocarditis
description: Current status of myocarditis, indicating whether the participant still has the problem, whether it is controlled by medication or something else, or whether it is completely cured or gone.

title: Close-Knit Neighborhood
description: Participant's level of agreement with the statement that their neighborhood is close-knit. Responses are rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Neighborhood People Do Not Get Along
description: Participant's level of agreement with the statement that people in their neighborhood do not get along. Responses are rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Values Different Among Neighbors
description: Participant's level of agreement with the statement that neighbors hold different values. Responses are rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Exercise Facility Present in Neighborhood
description: Indicates whether there is an exercise facility in the participant's neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Exercise Facility by Bike
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the exercise facility in their neighborhood by bicycle, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Exercise Facility by Car
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the exercise facility in their neighborhood by car, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Exercise Facility by Public Transportation
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the exercise facility in their neighborhood by public transportation (bus, train, or subway), as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Exercise Facility by Walking
description: Indicates whether the participant walks to the exercise facility in their neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Frequency of Using Neighborhood Exercise Facility
description: Self-reported frequency of using an exercise facility in the participant's neighborhood over the past year, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Used Neighborhood Exercise Facility in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant used an exercise facility in their neighborhood in the past year, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Fast Food Restaurant Present in Neighborhood
description: Indicates whether there is a fast food restaurant in the participant's neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Fast Food Restaurant by Bike
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the fast food restaurant in their neighborhood by bicycle, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Fast Food Restaurant by Car
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the fast food restaurant in their neighborhood by car, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Fast Food Restaurant by Public Transportation
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the fast food restaurant in their neighborhood by public transportation, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Fast Food Restaurant by Walking
description: Indicates whether the participant walks to the fast food restaurant in their neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Frequency of Using Neighborhood Fast Food Restaurant
description: Self-reported frequency of using a fast food restaurant in the participant's neighborhood over the past year, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Used Neighborhood Fast Food Restaurant in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant used a fast food restaurant in their neighborhood in the past year, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Grocery Store Present in Neighborhood
description: Indicates whether there is a grocery store in the participant's neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Grocery Store by Bike
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the grocery store in their neighborhood by bicycle, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Grocery Store by Car
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the grocery store in their neighborhood by car, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Grocery Store by Public Transportation
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the grocery store in their neighborhood by public transportation (bus, train, or subway), as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Grocery Store by Walking
description: Indicates whether the participant walks to the grocery store in their neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Frequency of Using Neighborhood Grocery Store
description: Self-reported frequency of using the grocery store in the participant's neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Used Neighborhood Grocery Store in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant used a grocery store in their neighborhood in the past year, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Helpful Neighbors
description: Participant's level of agreement with the statement that their neighbors are helpful. Responses are rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Park Present in Neighborhood
description: Indicates whether there is a park in the participant's neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Park by Bike
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the park in their neighborhood by bicycle, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Park by Car
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the park in their neighborhood by car, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Park by Public Transportation
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the park in their neighborhood by public transportation (bus, train, or subway), as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Park by Walking
description: Indicates whether the participant walks to the park in their neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Frequency of Using Neighborhood Park
description: Self-reported frequency of using the park in the participant's neighborhood, as reported on the Neighborhood Environment Questionnaire.

title: Used Neighborhood Park in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant used a park in their neighborhood in the past year.

title: Public Transit Stop Present in Neighborhood
description: Indicates whether there is a subway, bus, or trolley stop in the participant's neighborhood.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Public Transit Stop by Bike
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the subway, bus, or trolley stop in their neighborhood by bicycle.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Public Transit Stop by Car
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the subway, bus, or trolley stop in their neighborhood by car.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Public Transit Stop by Public Transportation
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the subway, bus, or trolley stop in their neighborhood by public transportation (bus, train, or subway).

title: Travel to Neighborhood Public Transit Stop by Walking
description: Indicates whether the participant walks to the subway, bus, or trolley stop in their neighborhood.

title: Frequency of Using Neighborhood Public Transit Stop
description: Self-reported frequency of using a subway, bus, or trolley stop in the participant's neighborhood.

title: Used Neighborhood Public Transit Stop in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant used a subway, bus, or trolley stop in their neighborhood in the past year.

title: Sidewalks Present in Neighborhood
description: Indicates whether there are sidewalks in the participant's neighborhood.

title: Sit-Down Restaurant Present in Neighborhood
description: Indicates whether there is a sit-down restaurant in the participant's neighborhood.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Sit-Down Restaurant by Bike
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the sit-down restaurant in their neighborhood by bicycle.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Sit-Down Restaurant by Car
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the sit-down restaurant in their neighborhood by car.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Sit-Down Restaurant by Public Transportation
description: Indicates whether the participant travels to the sit-down restaurant in their neighborhood by public transportation.

title: Travel to Neighborhood Sit-Down Restaurant by Walking
description: Indicates whether the participant walks to the sit-down restaurant in their neighborhood.

title: Frequency of Using Neighborhood Sit-Down Restaurant
description: Self-reported frequency of using a sit-down restaurant in the participant's neighborhood.

title: Used Neighborhood Sit-Down Restaurant in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant used a sit-down restaurant in their neighborhood in the past year.

title: Neighborhood People Can Be Trusted
description: Participant's level of agreement with the statement that people in their neighborhood can be trusted. Responses are rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Walking and/or Bicycle Paths Present in Neighborhood
description: Indicates whether there are walking and/or bicycle paths in the participant's neighborhood.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Nervous Disorder (Years)
description: Age at diagnosis of a nervous disorder, reported in years.

title: Current Status of Nervous Disorder
description: Current status of a nervous disorder, indicating whether the participant still has the problem, whether it is under control, or whether it is cured or gone.

title: Social Network Adequacy Score
description: Score reflecting the adequacy of the participant's social network.

title: Never Thinks About Appearance
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent never thinks about their appearance (Question 40). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Estimated Daily Niacin Intake (mg)
description: Estimated daily niacin intake, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Niacin Supplement Frequency
description: Frequency (per day, week, or month) at which the participant reports taking niacin supplements.

title: Number of Niacin Supplements Taken
description: Number of niacin supplement doses taken per intake occasion.

title: Niacin Supplement Use
description: Indicates whether the participant reports having taken niacin supplements (Yes/No).

title: Ever Used Nicotine Gum
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever used nicotine gum as a smoking cessation aid.

title: Nicotine Gum Use in Past Week
description: Among participants who have ever used nicotine gum, indicates whether they used it in the past week.

title: Ever Used Nicotine Patch
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever used a nicotine patch as a smoking cessation aid.

title: Nicotine Patch Use in Past Week
description: Among participants who have ever used a nicotine patch, indicates whether they used it in the past week.

title: Did Not Use Birth Control Pills in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates that the participant did not use oral contraceptive pills during the past 12 months.

title: Did Not Use Birth Control at Age 20–30
description: Indicates that the participant did not use birth control during ages 20–30.

title: Makes No Effort to Eat a Balanced Diet
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent makes no effort to eat a balanced diet (Question 30). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Did Not Experience Listed Symptoms in Past 3 Months
description: Indicates that the participant did not experience any of the listed symptoms in the past three months.

title: No Anthropometry Measurements Taken
description: Indicates that no anthropometry measurements were taken at the examination visit, such as when a participant was wheelchair-bound.

title: Did Not Seek Medical Care Due to Cost or Lack of Coverage
description: Indicates whether there was any time during the past two years when the participant did not seek medical care because it was too expensive or was not covered by health insurance. Dental care is excluded.

title: Feels No Need to Improve Physical Activity Ability
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent feels no need to improve their physical activity ability (Question 35). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: No Physical Activity for 12 Hours
description: Indicates whether the participant refrained from physical activity for at least 12 hours prior to the exam visit.

title: Serious Non-Hospital Event Due to Illness
description: Indicates whether a serious event not resulting in hospitalization was due to illness.

title: Serious Non-Hospital Event Due to Injury
description: Indicates whether a serious event not resulting in hospitalization was due to injury.

title: Serious Non-Hospital Event Due to Pregnancy
description: Indicates whether a serious event not resulting in hospitalization was due to pregnancy.

title: Serious Non-Hospital Injury Occurred at Work
description: Indicates whether a serious non-hospital injury event occurred at work or while in the Armed Services.

title: Location Where Serious Non-Hospital Injury Occurred
description: Coded location where the serious non-hospital injury event occurred, with categories including home, street or highway, farm, industrial place, school, place of recreation or sports, and other.

title: Date of Non-Overnight Hospitalization 1 for Coronary Angiogram
description: Date of the first non-overnight hospitalization for a coronary angiogram since the last exam.

title: Date of Non-Overnight Hospitalization 2 for Coronary Angiogram
description: Date of the second non-overnight hospitalization for a coronary angiogram since the last exam.

title: Took Non-Prescription Black Cohosh in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant took non-prescription black cohosh in the past 12 months for relief of menstrual irregularities, hot flashes, or night sweats.

title: Took Non-Prescription DHEA in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant took non-prescription DHEA pills in the past 12 months for relief of menstrual irregularities, hot flashes, or night sweats.

title: Took Non-Prescription Ginseng in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant took non-prescription ginseng in the past 12 months for relief of menstrual irregularities, hot flashes, or night sweats.

title: Did Not Take Any Listed Non-Prescription Treatments in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates that the participant did not take any of the listed non-prescription medications for relief of menstrual irregularities, hot flashes, or night sweats in the past 12 months.

title: Took Other Non-Prescription Treatment in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant took another non-prescription medication or treatment not otherwise listed for relief of menstrual irregularities, hot flashes, or night sweats in the past 12 months.

title: Took Non-Prescription Phytoestrogens in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant took non-prescription phytoestrogen pills, creams, or phytoestrogen-containing foods (such as flax, tofu, soy, or soybeans) in the past 12 months for relief of menstrual irregularities, hot flashes, or night sweats.

title: Took Non-Prescription Progesterone in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant used non-prescription progesterone suppositories or creams in the past 12 months for relief of menstrual irregularities, hot flashes, or night sweats.

title: Took Non-Prescription St. John's Wort in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant took non-prescription St. John's Wort in the past 12 months for relief of menstrual irregularities, hot flashes, or night sweats.

title: Used Non-Prescription Therapy (Vitamins, Supplements) for Hot Flashes
description: Indicates whether the participant used non-prescription therapy, such as vitamins or supplements, for hot flashes.

title: Took Non-Prescription Vitamin B for Symptoms in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant took non-prescription B vitamins in the past 12 months for relief of menstrual irregularities, hot flashes, or night sweats.

title: Took Non-Prescription Wild Yams in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant took non-prescription wild yams or wild yam pills in the past 12 months for relief of menstrual irregularities, hot flashes, or night sweats.

title: Months Doing Non-Strenuous Leisure Sports
description: Number of months in the past 12 months during which the participant engaged in non-strenuous sports such as softball, shooting baskets, volleyball, ping pong, or leisurely jogging, swimming, or biking, for at least one hour total in any month.

title: Months Doing Non-Strenuous Leisure Sports ≥3 Hours/Week
description: Number of months in the past 12 months during which the participant engaged in non-strenuous leisure sports (e.g., softball, volleyball, ping pong, leisurely jogging, swimming, or biking) for at least 3 hours per week.

title: Non-Strenuous Leisure Sports Past Year (Any Month ≥1 Hour)
description: Indicates whether the participant engaged in non-strenuous sports such as softball, shooting baskets, volleyball, ping pong, or leisurely jogging, swimming, or biking during the past 12 months for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Not Involved in Regular Exercise
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent is not involved in regular exercise (Question 6). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Number of People in Household
description: Self-reported count of the number of people currently living in the participant's household, including the participant.

title: Number of Abortions
description: Total number of abortions reported by the participant.

title: Number of Babies Born ≥9 Pounds
description: Total number of babies born weighing 9 pounds or more, as reported by the participant.

title: Number of Live Babies Birthed
description: Total number of live babies birthed, as reported by the participant.

title: Number of Miscarriages
description: Total number of miscarriages reported by the participant.

title: Number of Most Preferred Cracker
description: The number identifying the cracker rated as most preferred by the participant during the sodium taste test.

title: Number of Aliquots by Collection
description: The number of aliquots prepared from each of the three urine collections.

title: Number of Collection Bottles Given (If Not 12)
description: The number of urine collection bottles given to the participant, recorded when the standard number of 12 bottles was not provided.

title: Number of Urine Bottles Returned
description: The total number of urine collection bottles returned by the participant.

title: Number of Bottles Used by Collection
description: The number of urine collection bottles used by the participant for each of the three collection periods.

title: Number of Children at Year 0 Exam
description: Self-reported number of children the participant had at the Year 0 (baseline) exam.

title: Number of Children at Year 7 Exam
description: Self-reported number of children the participant had at the Year 7 exam.

title: Number of Clubs or Organizations Belonged To
description: Participant-reported count of clubs or organizations they belong to.

title: Number of Doctor or Clinic Visits in Past Year
description: Self-reported count of doctor or clinic visits in the past year, collected during follow-up contact.

title: Number of Echo Frames
description: Number of echocardiographic frames recorded during the examination, as documented on the echocardiography technician's worksheet.

title: Frequency of Reading Nutrition Labels
description: Self-reported frequency with which the participant reads nutrition labels, rated on a five-point scale from Never to Most of the time.

title: Self-Rated Nutritional Quality of Diet
description: Self-reported rating of the nutritional quality of the participant's diet, asked as: 'Which of the following statements best describes the nutritional quality of your diet?' Response options include 'I really watch what I eat.'

title: Code of Most Recent Oral Contraceptive Used
description: Medication code identifying the most recent oral contraceptive used by the participant, recorded for both past and current users.

title: Longest Continuous Interval of Oral Contraceptive Use (Months)
description: The longest continuous interval of oral contraceptive use, reported in months.

title: Months of Most Recent Oral Contraceptive Use (Current User)
description: For current oral contraceptive users, the number of months of most recent use.

title: Months Since Last Episode of Oral Contraceptive Use
description: For past oral contraceptive users, the number of months since the last episode of use.

title: Total Months of Oral Contraceptive Use
description: Total number of months of oral contraceptive use reported by the participant.

title: Oral Contraceptive Status at Exam
description: Oral contraceptive use status as of the exam date.

title: Used Oral Contraceptives in 3 Months Before Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant used oral contraceptives in the 3 months before the exam date.

title: Year Began Using Oral Contraceptives
description: The year in which the participant began using oral contraceptives.

title: Occupational Code Score
description: A score derived from the participant's occupational code, reflecting the physical activity demands associated with their occupation.

title: Often Reads Health Books or Magazines
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent often reads health books or magazines (Question 23). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Consent to Participate in OGTT
description: Indicates whether the participant consented to participate in the oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT).

title: Year 25 OGTT Specimen Flag
description: Specimen flag for the oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT) at Year 25, indicating specimen quality issues such as quantity not sufficient (QNS; value 2).

title: Participant Is OGTT Quality Control
description: Indicates whether the participant is designated as an oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT) quality control participant.

title: Estimated Daily Oleic Acid Intake (g)
description: Estimated daily oleic acid intake, in grams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: One-A-Day Multivitamin Frequency
description: Frequency (per day, week, or month) at which the participant reports taking One-A-Day multiple vitamins.

title: Number of One-A-Day Multivitamins Taken
description: Number of One-A-Day multiple vitamin doses taken per intake occasion.

title: One-A-Day Multivitamin Use
description: Indicates whether the participant reports having taken One-A-Day multiple vitamins (Yes/No).

title: One-Minute Pulse at Each Blood Pressure Reading (Automated)
description: Pulse count over one minute recorded at each of the three blood pressure readings.

title: Optimism Item: Always Optimistic About the Future
description: Participant response to the statement 'Always optimistic about the future' (Question 3 of the Optimism Questionnaire), rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Optimism Item: Expect Best During Uncertain Times
description: Participant response to the statement 'Expect best during uncertain times' (Question 1 of the Optimism Questionnaire), rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Optimism Item: Expect More Good Than Bad to Happen
description: Participant response to the statement 'Expect more good than bad to happen' (Question 6 of the Optimism Questionnaire), rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Optimism Item: Hardly Expect Things to Go My Way
description: Participant response to the statement 'Hardly expect things to go my way' (Question 4 of the Optimism Questionnaire), rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Optimism Item: If Something Can Go Wrong, It Will
description: Participant response to the statement 'If something can go wrong, it will' (Question 2 of the Optimism Questionnaire), rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: Optimism Item: Rarely Count on Good Things Happening
description: Participant response to the statement 'Rarely count on good things happening' (Question 5 of the Optimism Questionnaire), rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree.

title: History of Sores in Mouth or Nose
description: Participant-reported history of sores in the mouth or nose.

title: Any Over-the-Counter Medications at Time 1
description: Indicates whether the participant took any over-the-counter medications at time 1 during the monitoring period.

title: Any Over-the-Counter Medications at Time 2
description: Indicates whether the participant took any over-the-counter medications at time 2 during the monitoring period.

title: Any Over-the-Counter Medications at Time 3
description: Indicates whether the participant took any over-the-counter medications at time 3 during the monitoring period.

title: Any Over-the-Counter Medications at Time 4
description: Indicates whether the participant took any over-the-counter medications at time 4 during the monitoring period.

title: Any Over-the-Counter Medications at Time 5
description: Indicates whether the participant took any over-the-counter medications at time 5 during the monitoring period.

title: Any Over-the-Counter Medications at Time 6
description: Indicates whether the participant took any over-the-counter medications at time 6 during the monitoring period.

title: Subjective QC: Other Artifacts
description: Subjective quality control rating of other artifacts in the CT heart scan, assessed separately for the first and second heart scans.

title: Agatston Score in Other Coronary Segments
description: Agatston calcium score calculated for coronary segments designated as 'other' (not LAD, LCX, LM, or RCA) from the CT scan.

title: Number of Lesions in Other Coronary Segments
description: Count of calcified lesions designated as 'other' coronary segments from the CT scan, recorded separately for the first and second heart scans.

title: Calcium Mass of Lesions in Other Coronary Segments
description: Calcium mass of calcified lesions designated as 'other' coronary segments from the CT scan, recorded separately for the first and second heart scans.

title: Mean Lesion Value in Other Coronary Segments
description: Mean value of calcified lesions designated as 'other' coronary segments from the CT scan, recorded separately for the first and second heart scans.

title: Volume of Lesions in Other Coronary Segments
description: Volume of calcified lesions designated as 'other' coronary segments from the CT scan, recorded separately for the first and second heart scans.

title: Other Diet Changes (Indicator)
description: Indicates whether the participant reports having made other dietary changes not captured by the listed specific diet change categories (Yes/No).

title: Any Other Echocardiographic Findings
description: Indicates whether any other echocardiographic findings beyond those specifically catalogued were identified by the technician during the examination.

title: Age at Onset of Other Heart Problem (Years)
description: Age at diagnosis or onset of a heart problem other than those specifically enumerated in the questionnaire, reported in years.

title: History of Other Heart Problem
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had a heart problem other than those specifically enumerated in the questionnaire. Response options include No, Yes, and Don't know.

title: Current Status of Other Heart Problem
description: Current status of a heart problem other than those specifically enumerated, indicating whether the participant still has the problem, whether it is controlled by medication or something else, or whether it is completely cured or gone.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Other Kidney Problem (Years)
description: Age at diagnosis of a kidney problem other than those specifically enumerated in the questionnaire, reported in years.

title: History of Other Kidney Problems
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had a kidney problem other than those specifically enumerated in the questionnaire. Response options include No, Yes, and Don't know.

title: Current Status of Other Kidney Problem
description: Current status of a kidney problem other than those specifically enumerated in the questionnaire, indicating whether the participant still has the problem, whether it is controlled by medication or something else, or whether it is completely cured or gone.

title: History of Other Liver Disease
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had a liver disease other than those specifically enumerated. Response options include No, Yes, and Don't know.

title: Current Status of Other Liver Disease
description: Current status of a liver disease other than those specifically enumerated, indicating whether the participant still has the problem, whether it is controlled by medication or something else, or whether it is completely cured or gone.

title: Has Other Main Daily Activity
description: Indicates whether the participant reported having a main daily activity other than those listed as standard response options.

title: Months of Other Medication Use
description: Duration of use of another prescription medication, reported in months.

title: Source of Other Medication Name
description: Source from which the other medication name was obtained, either from the prescription label or by self-report.

title: Time Since Last Used Other Medication
description: Time elapsed since the participant last used a specified other prescription medication.

title: Total Months of Other Medication Use
description: Total duration of use of a specified other prescription medication, recorded in months.

title: Years of Other Medication Use
description: Duration of use of a specified other prescription medication, recorded in years.

title: Other Anthropometry Protocol Modifications
description: Indicates whether any other protocol modifications not captured by specific protocol fields were made during the anthropometry assessment.

title: Other Referral
description: Indicates whether the participant received a referral for a reason other than those specifically enumerated in the follow-up form.

title: Other Supplements Used (Indicator)
description: Indicates whether the participant reports using any other dietary supplements not captured by the listed supplement categories (Yes).

title: History of Other Thyroid Problem
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had a thyroid problem other than those separately enumerated in the questionnaire.

title: Current Status of Other Thyroid Problem
description: Current status of the participant's other thyroid problem, indicating whether the condition is still present, controlled by medication or other means, or completely cured or gone.

title: Other Vitamin Supplements Frequency
description: Frequency (per day, week, or month) at which the participant reports taking other vitamin supplements not listed individually.

title: Number of Other Vitamin Supplements Taken
description: Number of other vitamin supplement doses taken per intake occasion.

title: Other Vitamin Supplements Use
description: Indicates whether the participant reports having taken other vitamin supplements not listed individually (Yes/No).

title: Others Would Consider Respondent Good-Looking
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether others would consider the respondent good-looking (Question 17). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Outpatient Procedure for Blocked Arteries Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant reported having an outpatient procedure for blocked arteries since the last exam.

title: Visited Doctor, Clinic, or ER as Outpatient Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant visited a doctor's office, outpatient clinic, or emergency room as an outpatient since the last exam. Note: at Exam J the question was scoped to doctor's office or outpatient clinic only (excluding ER).

title: Any Outpatient Visit Due to CARDIA Referral
description: Indicates whether any outpatient visit since the last exam was due to a CARDIA referral.

title: Number of Outpatient Doctor/Clinic Visits
description: Number of times the participant visited a doctor's office or outpatient clinic since the last update.

title: Satisfaction With Outpatient Care
description: Participant's reported satisfaction with outpatient care received since the last exam, rated as very satisfied, somewhat satisfied, or not at all satisfied.

title: Month of Ovarian Surgery
description: Month in which the participant underwent an ovarian surgery operation. Up to three separate surgeries are recorded across relevant exams.

title: Ovarian Surgery Number
description: Sequence number identifying which ovarian surgery is being described for the participant.

title: Reason for Ovarian Surgery
description: Reason for the ovarian surgery operation, such as simple ovarian cysts. Up to three separate surgeries are recorded across relevant exams.

title: What Was Removed During Ovarian Surgery
description: Indicates what was removed during each ovarian surgery operation, such as one entire ovary. Up to three separate surgeries are recorded.

title: Year of Ovarian Surgery
description: Year in which the participant underwent an ovarian surgery operation. Up to three separate surgeries are recorded across relevant exams.

title: Either Ovary Removed
description: Indicates whether either ovary has been surgically removed.

title: One or Both Ovaries Removed
description: Indicates whether one ovary or both ovaries have been surgically removed.

title: Subjective QC: Overall Series Quality
description: Subjective quality control rating of the overall series quality for the CT heart scan, assessed separately for the first and second heart scans.

title: Disgusted or Guilty After Overeating
description: Indicates whether the participant reported feeling disgusted or guilty after overeating.

title: Eat Alone Because Embarrassed When Overeating
description: Indicates whether the participant ate alone because of embarrassment during overeating episodes, as assessed on the Binge Eating Disorder Questionnaire (Question 3d).

title: Eat More Rapidly Than Usual When Overeating
description: Indicates whether the participant ate more rapidly than usual during overeating episodes, as assessed on the Binge Eating Disorder Questionnaire (Question 3a).

title: Eat Until Uncomfortably Full When Overeating
description: Indicates whether the participant ate until uncomfortably full during overeating episodes, as assessed on the Binge Eating Disorder Questionnaire (Question 3b).

title: Eat Large Amounts When Not Hungry When Overeating
description: Indicates whether the participant ate large amounts of food when not physically hungry during overeating episodes, as assessed on the Binge Eating Disorder Questionnaire (Question 3c).

title: Any Overnight Hospitalization Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant reported being hospitalized overnight since the last exam.

title: Saw Doctor for Palpitations
description: Indicates whether the participant has seen a doctor regarding heart palpitations.

title: Duration of Heart Palpitations
description: Reported duration of heart palpitation episodes, categorized as less than one minute, 1–10 minutes, 11–60 minutes, more than one hour, or don't know.

title: Frequency of Heart Palpitations
description: Reported frequency of heart palpitation episodes, categorized as more than once a day, 2–7 times per week, once every 1–4 weeks, or less than once a month.

title: Heart Palpitations in Last Year
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced heart palpitations in the last year.

title: Palpitations Triggered by Anger or Anxiety
description: Indicates whether heart palpitations were initiated by anger or anxiety.

title: Palpitations Triggered by Cold Weather
description: Indicates whether heart palpitations were initiated by cold weather.

title: Palpitations Triggered by Exercise
description: Indicates whether heart palpitations were initiated by exercise.

title: Palpitations Triggered by Food
description: Indicates whether heart palpitations were initiated by food.

title: Palpitations Triggered by Other Causes
description: Indicates whether heart palpitations were initiated by causes other than those specifically listed.

title: Palpitations Trigger Unknown
description: Indicates whether the participant did not know what initiated their heart palpitations.

title: Participant Height (cm)
description: Participant height in centimeters, recorded on the echocardiography technician's worksheet.

title: Participant Is Quality Control
description: Indicates whether the participant is designated as a quality control participant for the urine collection protocol.

title: Participant Refusal of Graded Exercise Test
description: Indicates whether the participant refused to undergo the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Participant Weight (lb)
description: Participant weight in pounds, recorded on the echocardiography technician's worksheet.

title: Participation Affected by CARDIA Interest
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether their behavior or activities during the monitoring period were affected by their interest in or awareness of CARDIA study goals.

title: Previously Drank Beer
description: Indicates whether the participant previously drank beer prior to stopping alcohol consumption.

title: Previously Drank Liquor
description: Indicates whether the participant previously drank liquor prior to stopping alcohol consumption.

title: Previously Drank Other Alcoholic Beverages
description: Indicates whether the participant previously drank other alcoholic beverages (not beer, wine, or liquor) prior to stopping alcohol consumption.

title: Previously Drank Wine
description: Indicates whether the participant previously drank wine prior to stopping alcohol consumption.

title: Pays Close Attention for Signs of Illness
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent pays close attention for signs of illness (Question 37). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Pays by Other Method for Medical Care
description: Indicates whether the participant pays for their usual source of medical care by a method other than those listed as standard options.

title: Pays Out of Pocket for Medical Care
description: Indicates whether the participant pays out of pocket or via co-payment for their usual source of medical care.

title: Pays Out of Pocket (Full Payment or Co-Payment) for Medical Care
description: Indicates whether the participant pays for their usual source of medical care fully out of pocket or via a co-payment.

title: Pays with Insurance or HMO for Medical Care
description: Indicates whether the participant pays for their usual source of medical care using insurance or an HMO.

title: Pays with Medicare or Medicaid for Medical Care
description: Indicates whether the participant pays for their usual source of medical care using Medicare or Medicaid.

title: Pays More Than Half of Someone Else's Support
description: Indicates whether the participant pays more than half of another person's financial support.

title: Peak Inflation Level (Random-Zero)
description: Peak inflation level recorded using the random-zero device during the blood pressure assessment.

title: Peak Inflation Level (Standard, POP + 30)
description: Peak inflation level calculated as the pulse obliteration pressure plus 30 mmHg (POP + 30).

title: Pedometer Log Day Date
description: Calendar date recorded for each day of pedometer wear in the Pedometer Log. Up to eight daily dates are captured across the wear period.

title: Pedometer Steps Per Day
description: Number of steps taken as recorded by the pedometer for each day of wear. Up to eight daily step counts are captured across the wear period.

title: Perceived Blood Pressure Status
description: Participant's self-reported perception of their own blood pressure level, categorized as low, normal, high, or don't know.

title: Perceived Cholesterol Status
description: Participant's self-reported perception of their own cholesterol level, categorized as low, normal, high, or don't know.

title: Percent of Kilocalories from Carbohydrates
description: Percentage of estimated daily total kilocaloric intake derived from carbohydrates, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Percent of Kilocalories from Fat
description: Percentage of estimated daily total kilocaloric intake derived from fat, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Percent of Kilocalories from Protein
description: Percentage of estimated daily total kilocaloric intake derived from protein, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Had Menstrual Period in Past 3 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant had a menstrual period in the past three months.

title: Periods Changed in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates how the participant's menstrual periods changed during the past 12 months, with response options including becoming farther apart, closer together, more variable, staying the same, stopping completely, or no period in more than 12 months.

title: Doctor-Diagnosed Peripheral Vascular Disease Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant reported being told by a doctor that they have peripheral vascular disease since the last exam.

title: Permission to Review Medical Records
description: Indicates whether the participant granted permission for review of their medical records.

title: Permission to Obtain Medical Records
description: Indicates whether the participant gave permission for CARDIA to obtain medical records from hospitalizations and procedures listed on the form.

title: Exclusion at Discretion of Exam Personnel
description: Indicates whether the participant was excluded from the graded exercise treadmill test at the discretion of exam personnel.

title: Subjective QC: Placement of QCT Phantom
description: Subjective quality control rating of the placement of the QCT phantom during the CT heart scan, assessed separately for the first and second heart scans.

title: Brings Up Phlegm for 3 or More Months Per Year
description: Indicates whether the participant brings up phlegm for 3 or more consecutive months per year.

title: Brings Up Phlegm Twice Per Day or Most Days
description: Indicates whether the participant brings up phlegm twice per day on 4 or more days per week.

title: Brings Up Phlegm First Thing in the Morning
description: Indicates whether the participant brings up phlegm first thing in the morning.

title: Brings Up Phlegm Rest of Morning or in Afternoon/Evening
description: Indicates whether the participant brings up phlegm during the rest of the morning or in the afternoon or evening.

title: Usually Brings Up Phlegm from Chest
description: Indicates whether the participant usually brings up phlegm from the chest (productive cough).

title: Produced Phlegm with Respiratory Illnesses
description: Indicates whether the participant produced phlegm in association with respiratory illnesses.

title: Years with Phlegm Trouble
description: Number of years the participant has had trouble with bringing up phlegm (productive cough).

title: Estimated Daily Phosphorus Intake (mg)
description: Estimated daily phosphorus intake, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Physical Activity Year Before Baseline Exam (Self-Rated)
description: Self-rated level of physical activity during the year before the Year 0 (baseline) exam, rated on a 5-point scale from 1 (physically inactive) to 5 (very active), with 3 indicating moderately active.

title: Physical Activity During High School (Self-Rated)
description: Self-rated level of physical activity during high school, rated on a scale from 1 (physically inactive) to 5 (very active), with 3 indicating moderately active.

title: Self-Rated Physical Activity Past Year (Global Rating)
description: Global self-rated level of physical activity during the past year, rated on a scale from 1 (physically inactive) to 5 (very active), with 3 indicating moderately active.

title: Physical Activity Prior to High School (Self-Rated)
description: Self-rated level of physical activity prior to high school, rated on a scale from 1 (physically inactive) to 5 (very active), with 3 indicating moderately active.

title: Physical Affection Received During Childhood
description: Participant's retrospective report of how often they received physical affection during childhood, rated on a four-point frequency scale from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'
