title: Perceives Physical Endurance as Good
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent believes their physical endurance is good (Question 12). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Physical Marks from Being Hit During Childhood
description: Participant's retrospective report of how often they were left with physical marks from being hit during childhood, rated on a four-point frequency scale from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: Perceives Self as Physically Unattractive
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent considers themselves physically unattractive (Question 39). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Ever Smoked a Tobacco Pipe Regularly
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever smoked a tobacco pipe regularly for at least three months, where 'regularly' is defined as at least 2 pipes full of tobacco per week almost every week.

title: Plasma Fibrinogen
description: Plasma fibrinogen concentration measured in mg/dL.

title: Plasma Renin Activity (ng/mL/hr)
description: Plasma renin activity measured in ng/mL/hr from the renin-aldosterone substudy.

title: Plays a Sport Regularly Year-Round
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent plays a sport regularly year-round (Question 43). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Pleasantness Rating of 0.8% Sodium Cracker
description: Participant's pleasantness rating of the cracker containing 0.8% sodium during the sodium taste test.

title: Pleasantness Rating of 1.6% Sodium Cracker
description: Participant's pleasantness rating of the cracker containing 1.6% sodium during the sodium taste test.

title: Pleasantness Rating of 2.4% Sodium Cracker
description: Participant's pleasantness rating of the cracker containing 2.4% sodium during the sodium taste test.

title: Pleasantness Rating of 3.2% Sodium Cracker
description: Participant's pleasantness rating of the cracker containing 3.2% sodium during the sodium taste test.

title: Pleasantness Rating of 4.0% Sodium Cracker
description: Participant's pleasantness rating of the cracker containing 4.0% sodium during the sodium taste test.

title: Pleasantness Rating of Trial Cracker
description: Participant's pleasantness rating of the trial cracker during the sodium taste test.

title: History of Pleurisy or Pleuritic Chest Pain
description: Participant-reported history of pleurisy or chest pain made worse with deep breaths.

title: Age at First Pneumonia Attack
description: Age of the participant at the time of their first pneumonia attack.

title: Pneumonia Confirmed by a Doctor
description: Indicates whether the participant's pneumonia was confirmed by a doctor.

title: Ever Had Pneumonia
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever had pneumonia.

title: Ratio of Polyunsaturated to Saturated Fat Intake
description: Ratio of estimated daily polyunsaturated fat intake to saturated fat intake, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Weight Lost Since Delivery
description: Amount of weight the participant reported losing since delivery.

title: Estimated Daily Potassium Intake (mg)
description: Estimated daily potassium intake, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Number of Pregnancies With Live Births
description: Number of pregnancies that resulted in one or more live births.

title: Number of Pregnancies With Stillbirths
description: Number of pregnancies that resulted in one or more stillbirths.

title: Date Pregnancy Ended
description: Date on which the pregnancy ended; for participants currently pregnant at the time of the exam, the expected delivery date was recorded.

title: Day/Month/Year of Pregnancy End Date
description: Day, month, and year components of the date on which the pregnancy ended, recorded as separate variables.

title: Pregnancy Outcome Status
description: Indicates how the pregnancy ended, with categories including natural birth, cesarean section, miscarriage, abortion, tubal or ectopic pregnancy, and molar pregnancy.

title: Pregnancy Test Date
description: Date on which the pregnancy test was performed prior to the CT scan.

title: Pregnancy Test Date More Than 3 Days Prior to Exam
description: Indicates whether the pregnancy test date was more than 3 days prior to the CT exam date.

title: Weeks of Pregnancy at End
description: Number of weeks of gestation at the time the pregnancy ended; for participants currently pregnant at the time of the exam, the current gestational age in weeks was recorded.

title: Weight Gained During Pregnancy
description: Amount of weight the participant reported gaining during pregnancy.

title: Any Pregnancies Without Live Births
description: Indicates whether the participant had any pregnancies that did not result in a live birth.

title: Currently Pregnant
description: Participant self-report of current pregnancy status, asked of female participants only as part of phlebotomy screening.

title: Took Prescribed Female Hormones for Hot Flashes
description: Indicates whether the participant took prescribed female hormones for hot flashes.

title: Prescribed Female Hormones for Hot Flash Symptoms
description: Indicates whether a gynecologist or primary care physician prescribed female hormones (estrogen and/or progesterone) for hot flash or night sweat symptoms. Responses include No, Yes, and Not sure.

title: Prescribed Non-Hormonal Medication for Hot Flashes
description: Indicates whether a participant took a prescribed non-hormonal medication for hot flashes or night sweats.

title: Days Used Prescription Pain Medicine Non-Medically in Past 30 Days
description: Number of days the participant used prescription pain medicine non-medically in the past 30 days.

title: Used Demerol Non-Medically
description: Self-reported whether the participant used Demerol non-medically.

title: Used Dilaudid Non-Medically
description: Self-reported whether the participant used Dilaudid (hydromorphone) non-medically.

title: Ever Used Prescription Pain Medicine Non-Medically
description: Self-reported whether the participant has ever used prescription pain medicine for non-medical purposes.

title: Used Hydrocodone Non-Medically
description: Self-reported whether the participant used hydrocodone non-medically.

title: Times Used Prescription Pain Medicine Non-Medically in Lifetime
description: Self-reported lifetime frequency of non-medical prescription pain medicine use, coded in ordinal categories.

title: Used Morphine Non-Medically
description: Self-reported whether the participant used morphine non-medically.

title: Used Other Medicine Non-Medically
description: Self-reported whether the participant used another medicine (not otherwise listed) non-medically.

title: Used Other Prescription Pain Medicine Non-Medically
description: Self-reported whether the participant used another prescription pain medicine not otherwise listed non-medically.

title: Used Oxycodone Non-Medically
description: Self-reported whether the participant used oxycodone non-medically.

title: Used Other Synthetic Opiate Non-Medically
description: Self-reported whether the participant used another synthetic opiate non-medically.

title: Consent to PRF HbA1c
description: Indicates whether the participant consented to provide a specimen for PRF HbA1c measurement.

title: PRF HbA1c Quality Control Participation
description: Indicates whether the participant is designated as a quality control participant for the PRF HbA1c specimen.

title: Number of 0.3 mL Whole Blood HbA1c QC Aliquots
description: The number of 0.3 mL heparinized whole blood HbA1c quality control aliquots collected.

title: Number of HbA1c Vials Filled
description: The number of HbA1c vials filled, with options including 0.3 mL whole blood HbA1c vials with black stripe for ARDL.

title: Number of Primary Cardiovascular Risk Factors Known
description: A score reflecting the number of primary cardiovascular risk factors correctly identified by the participant, out of a possible three.

title: History of Year 25 Echocardiogram
description: Indicates whether the participant had a CARDIA echocardiogram at the Year 25 examination, as recorded by the technician.

title: Urine Specimen Processing Date by Collection
description: The date on which each urine collection specimen was processed.

title: Proinsulin Concentration (µU/mL)
description: Proinsulin concentration in microunits per milliliter (µU/mL).

title: Estimated Daily Total Protein Intake (g)
description: Estimated daily total protein intake, in grams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: History of Protein in Urine (Ever Told by Doctor)
description: Participant-reported history of protein in the urine, based on whether they were ever told by a doctor that they had proteinuria.

title: Psychological Job Demands Score
description: A derived score reflecting the psychological demands of the participant's job, from the Karasek Job Strain Questionnaire.

title: History of Puffy or Swollen Fingers
description: Participant-reported history of puffy, swollen fingers.

title: Blood Clot in the Lung (Pulmonary Embolism)
description: Indicates whether the participant reported having a blood clot in the lung (pulmonary embolism) since the last exam.

title: History of Pulmonary Fibrosis (Ever Told by Doctor)
description: Participant-reported history of pulmonary fibrosis, based on whether they were ever told by a doctor that they had pulmonary fibrosis.

title: Pulmonary Exclusion Criterion: Abnormal Pulmonary Function or History of Pulmonary Embolus
description: Indicates whether the participant had an abnormal pulmonary function test or a history of pulmonary embolus within the past year, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Pulmonary Vein A-Wave Duration
description: Duration of the pulmonary vein A-wave as measured by Doppler echocardiography.

title: Pulmonary Vein A-Wave Reversal Velocity
description: Peak reversal velocity of the pulmonary vein A-wave as measured by Doppler echocardiography.

title: Pulmonary Vein Diastolic Velocity
description: Peak diastolic velocity of pulmonary vein flow as measured by Doppler echocardiography.

title: Pulmonary Vein Systolic Velocity
description: Peak systolic velocity of pulmonary vein flow as measured by Doppler echocardiography.

title: Palpated Pulse Beats in 30 Seconds
description: Number of palpated pulse beats counted over a 30-second period during the blood pressure assessment.

title: Pulse Obliteration Pressure
description: Pulse obliteration pressure recorded in mmHg during the blood pressure assessment.

title: 20 mL QC Aliquot Filled
description: Indicates whether the 20 mL quality control blood aliquot was filled during specimen collection.

title: 2 mL EDTA QC Aliquot Filled
description: Indicates whether the 2 mL EDTA quality control blood aliquot was filled during specimen collection.

title: 2 mL Heparin QC Aliquot Filled
description: Indicates whether the 2 mL heparin quality control blood aliquot was filled during specimen collection.

title: 4 mL QC Aliquot Filled
description: Indicates whether the 4 mL quality control blood aliquot was filled during specimen collection.

title: Which Urine Collection Was Used for QC
description: Identifies which of the three urine collections was designated for quality control purposes.

title: Participant Is Quality Control
description: Indicates whether the participant served as a quality control subject in the 24-hour urine substudy.

title: First Reading Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Diastolic blood pressure recorded at the first reading, measured in mmHg.

title: First Reading Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Systolic blood pressure recorded at the first reading, measured in mmHg.

title: Second Reading Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Diastolic blood pressure recorded at the second reading, measured in mmHg.

title: Second Reading Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Systolic blood pressure recorded at the second reading, measured in mmHg.

title: Third Reading Diastolic Blood Pressure
description: Diastolic blood pressure recorded at the third reading, measured in mmHg.

title: Third Reading Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Systolic blood pressure recorded at the third reading, measured in mmHg.

title: Race
description: Participant's race, verified at the participant's last exam or at exam 2.

title: Race Discrimination at Home Frequency
description: Among participants who reported ever experiencing racial discrimination at home, the frequency of such discrimination (rarely, sometimes, or often). Assessed by asking whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior at home because of their race or color.

title: Race Discrimination at School Frequency
description: Among participants who reported ever experiencing racial discrimination at school, the frequency of such discrimination (rarely, sometimes, or often). Assessed by asking whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior at school because of their race or color.

title: Race Discrimination at Work Frequency
description: Among participants who reported ever experiencing racial discrimination at work, the frequency of such discrimination (rarely, sometimes, or often). Assessed by asking whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior at work because of their race or color.

title: Race Discrimination Getting Housing Frequency
description: Among participants who reported ever experiencing racial discrimination when getting housing, the frequency of such discrimination (rarely, sometimes, or often). Assessed by asking whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior when getting housing because of their race or color.

title: Race Discrimination Getting a Job Frequency
description: Among participants who reported ever experiencing racial discrimination when getting a job, the frequency of such discrimination (rarely, sometimes, or often). Assessed by asking whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior when getting a job because of their race or color.

title: Race Discrimination Getting Medical Care Frequency
description: Among participants who reported ever experiencing racial discrimination when getting medical care, the frequency of such discrimination (rarely, sometimes, or often). Assessed by asking whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior when getting medical care because of their race or color.

title: Race Discrimination in Public Frequency
description: Participant-reported frequency of discrimination experienced on the street or in a public setting because of race or color, among those who reported ever experiencing such discrimination. Responses are coded as Rarely, Sometimes, or Often.

title: Race Discrimination at Home
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior at home because of their race or color. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Race Discrimination at School
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior at school because of their race or color. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Race Discrimination at Work
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior at work because of their race or color. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Average Race Discrimination Score
description: Average score summarizing the frequency of race discrimination experiences across settings, derived from individual discrimination items.

title: Race Discrimination Getting Housing
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior when getting housing because of their race or color. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Race Discrimination Getting a Job
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior when getting a job because of their race or color. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Race Discrimination Getting Medical Care
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior when getting medical care because of their race or color. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Race Discrimination in Public
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior on the street or in a public setting because of their race or color. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Stress From Race Discrimination
description: Participant-reported level of stress resulting from experiences of discrimination because of their race or color. Responses range from Not at all stressful to higher levels of stress.

title: Race Discrimination Sum Scale
description: Sum scale score summarizing race discrimination experiences across settings, derived from individual discrimination items.

title: Indicator for White Race
description: Indicator variable denoting whether the participant is white.

title: Months Doing Vigorous Racket Sports
description: Number of months in the past 12 months during which the participant engaged in vigorous racket sports for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Months Doing Vigorous Racket Sports ≥3 Hours/Week
description: Number of months in the past 12 months during which the participant engaged in vigorous racket sports for at least 3 hours per week.

title: Vigorous Racket Sports Past Year (Any Month ≥1 Hour)
description: Indicates whether the participant engaged in vigorous racket sports during the past 12 months for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Raising Children Full Time
description: Indicates whether raising children full time is among the participant's current main daily activities and responsibilities.

title: Number of Own Children Raised Full Time
description: Count of the participant's own children that they are raising full time, reported as part of the question on current main daily activities and responsibilities.

title: History of Rapid Loss of Large Amounts of Hair
description: Participant-reported history of rapid loss of large amounts of hair.

title: RAVLT Word Recall: Bell
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'bell' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test. Recorded across immediate recall trials (Trials 1–5), short-delay free recall (Trial 6), and long-delay free recall (Trial 7).

title: RAVLT Word Recall: Coffee
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'coffee' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test. Recorded across immediate recall trials (Trials 1–5), short-delay free recall (Trial 6), and long-delay free recall (Trial 7).

title: RAVLT Word Recall: Color
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'color' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test. Recorded across immediate recall trials (Trials 1–5), short-delay free recall (Trial 6), and long-delay free recall (Trial 7).

title: RAVLT Word Recall: Curtain
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'curtain' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test. Recorded across immediate recall trials (Trials 1–5), short-delay free recall (Trial 6), and long-delay free recall (Trial 7).

title: RAVLT Word Recall: Drum
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'drum' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test. Recorded across immediate recall trials (Trials 1–5), short-delay free recall (Trial 6), and long-delay free recall (Trial 7).

title: RAVLT Exam Date (Form 87)
description: Date on which the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test (Form 87) was administered.

title: RAVLT Word Recall: Farmer
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'farmer' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test. Recorded across immediate recall trials (Trials 1–5), short-delay free recall (Trial 6), and long-delay free recall (Trial 7).

title: RAVLT Word Recall: Garden
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'garden' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test. Recorded across immediate recall trials (Trials 1–5), short-delay free recall (Trial 6), and long-delay free recall (Trial 7).

title: RAVLT Word Recall: Hat
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'hat' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test. Recorded across immediate recall trials (Trials 1–5), short-delay free recall (Trial 6), and long-delay free recall (Trial 7).

title: RAVLT Word Recall: House
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'house' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test. Recorded across immediate recall trials (Trials 1–5), short-delay free recall (Trial 6), and long-delay free recall (Trial 7).

title: RAVLT Interference Word Recall: Bird
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'bird' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B).

title: RAVLT Interference Word Recall: Boat
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'boat' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B).

title: RAVLT Interference Word Recall: Church
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'church' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B).

title: RAVLT Interference Word Recall: Cloud
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'cloud' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B).

title: RAVLT Interference Word Recall: Desk
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'desk' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B).

title: RAVLT Interference Word Recall: Fish
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'fish' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B).

title: RAVLT Interference Trial Given
description: Indicates whether the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B) was administered to the participant.

title: RAVLT Interference Word Recall: Glasses
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'glasses' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B).

title: RAVLT Interference Word Recall: Gun
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'gun' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B).

title: RAVLT Interference Word Recall: Lamb
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'lamb' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B).

title: RAVLT Interference Word Recall: Mountain
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'mountain' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B).

title: Reason RAVLT Interference Trial Not Given: Hearing
description: Indicates that the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B) was not administered was due to a hearing limitation.

title: Reason RAVLT Interference Trial Not Given: Not Cooperative
description: Indicates that the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B) was not administered was that the participant was not cooperative.

title: Reason RAVLT Interference Trial Not Given: Physical
description: Indicates that the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B) was not administered was due to a physical limitation.

title: Reason RAVLT Interference Trial Not Given: Vision
description: Indicates that the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B) was not administered was due to a vision limitation.

title: RAVLT Interference Word Recall: Pencil
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'pencil' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B).

title: RAVLT Interference Word Recall: Ranger
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'ranger' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B).

title: RAVLT Interference Trial Score
description: Total score for the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B), reflecting the number of words correctly recalled from the interference word list.

title: RAVLT Interference Word Recall: Shoe
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'shoe' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B).

title: RAVLT Interference Word Recall: Stove
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'stove' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B).

title: RAVLT Interference Word Recall: Towel
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'towel' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test interference trial (List B).

title: RAVLT Long-Delay Recall Given
description: Indicates whether the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test long-delay free recall trial was administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Long-Delay Recall Not Given: Hearing
description: Indicates that the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test long-delay free recall trial was not administered was due to a hearing limitation.

title: Reason RAVLT Long-Delay Recall Not Given: Not Cooperative
description: Indicates that the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test long-delay free recall trial was not administered was that the participant was not cooperative.

title: Reason RAVLT Long-Delay Recall Not Given: Physical
description: Indicates that the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test long-delay free recall trial was not administered was due to a physical limitation.

title: Reason RAVLT Long-Delay Recall Not Given: Vision
description: Indicates that the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test long-delay free recall trial was not administered was due to a vision limitation.

title: RAVLT Word Recall: Moon
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'moon' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test. Recorded across immediate recall trials (Trials 1–5), short-delay free recall (Trial 6), and long-delay free recall (Trial 7).

title: RAVLT Word Recall: Nose
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'nose' during the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test. Recorded across immediate recall trials (Trials 1–5), short-delay free recall (Trial 6), and long-delay free recall (Trial 7).

title: RAVLT Word Recall: Parent
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'parent' during each trial of the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test, spanning immediate recall trials (Trials 1–5), short-delay free recall (Trial 6), and long-delay free recall (Trial 7).

title: RAVLT Word Recall: River
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'river' during each trial of the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test, spanning immediate recall trials (Trials 1–5), short-delay free recall (Trial 6), and long-delay free recall (Trial 7).

title: RAVLT Same Date as Blood Pressure Taken
description: Indicates whether the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test was administered on the same date as blood pressure was taken.

title: RAVLT Word Recall: School
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'school' during each trial of the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test, spanning immediate recall trials (Trials 1–5), short-delay free recall (Trial 6), and long-delay free recall (Trial 7).

title: RAVLT Total Delay Between Trial 6 and Long-Delay Recall (Min)
description: Total delay in minutes between the completion of Trial 6 (short-delay free recall) and the start of the long-delay free recall trial of the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test.

title: RAVLT Trials Given (1–6)
description: Flags indicating whether each of the six Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test trials (Trials 1–5 immediate recall and Trial 6 short-delay free recall) was administered to the participant. A value of 'No' indicates the trial was not given.

title: RAVLT Trial Scores
description: Numeric scores for each trial of the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test, including immediate recall trials (Trials 1–5), short-delay free recall (Trial 6), and long-delay free recall (Trial 7), reflecting the number of words correctly recalled per trial.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 1 Not Given: Hearing
description: Indicates that a hearing impairment was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 1 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 1 Not Given: Not Cooperative
description: Indicates that lack of cooperation was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 1 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 1 Not Given: Physical
description: Indicates that a physical limitation was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 1 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 1 Not Given: Vision
description: Indicates that a vision impairment was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 1 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 2 Not Given: Hearing
description: Indicates that a hearing impairment was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 2 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 2 Not Given: Not Cooperative
description: Indicates that lack of cooperation was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 2 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 2 Not Given: Physical
description: Indicates that a physical limitation was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 2 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 2 Not Given: Vision
description: Indicates that a vision impairment was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 2 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 3 Not Given: Hearing
description: Indicates that a hearing impairment was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 3 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 3 Not Given: Not Cooperative
description: Indicates that lack of cooperation was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 3 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 3 Not Given: Physical
description: Indicates that a physical limitation was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 3 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 3 Not Given: Vision
description: Indicates that a vision impairment was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 3 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 4 Not Given: Hearing
description: Indicates that a hearing impairment was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 4 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 4 Not Given: Not Cooperative
description: Indicates that lack of cooperation was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 4 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 4 Not Given: Physical
description: Indicates that a physical limitation was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 4 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 4 Not Given: Vision
description: Indicates that a vision impairment was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 4 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 5 Not Given: Hearing
description: Indicates that a hearing impairment was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 5 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 5 Not Given: Not Cooperative
description: Indicates that lack of cooperation was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 5 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 5 Not Given: Physical
description: Indicates that a physical limitation was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 5 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 5 Not Given: Vision
description: Indicates that a vision impairment was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 5 (immediate recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: RAVLT Trial 6 Completion Time
description: Records the time of day at which Trial 6 (short-delay free recall) of the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test was completed, including AM/PM designation.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 6 Not Given: Hearing
description: Indicates that a hearing impairment was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 6 (short-delay free recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 6 Not Given: Not Cooperative
description: Indicates that lack of cooperation was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 6 (short-delay free recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 6 Not Given: Physical
description: Indicates that a physical limitation was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 6 (short-delay free recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: Reason RAVLT Trial 6 Not Given: Vision
description: Indicates that a vision impairment was the reason the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test Trial 6 (short-delay free recall) was not administered to the participant.

title: RAVLT Word Recall: Turkey
description: Indicates whether the participant correctly recalled the word 'turkey' during each trial of the Rey Auditory-Verbal Learning Test, spanning immediate recall trials (Trials 1–5), short-delay free recall (Trial 6), and long-delay free recall (Trial 7).

title: Agatston Score in Right Coronary Artery (RCA)
description: Agatston calcium score calculated for the right coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Number of Lesions in Right Coronary Artery (RCA)
description: Count of calcified lesions identified in the right coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Calcium Mass of Lesions in Right Coronary Artery (RCA)
description: Calcium mass of calcified lesions identified in the right coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Mean Lesion Value in Right Coronary Artery (RCA)
description: Mean value of calcified lesions identified in the right coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Volume of Lesions in Right Coronary Artery (RCA)
description: Volume of calcified lesions identified in the right coronary artery from the CT scan.

title: Feels Safe in Most Places
description: Self-reported agreement with the statement that the participant feels safe in most places, rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree. Item 6 of the Reactive Responding questionnaire.

title: Importance of Planning Life
description: Self-reported agreement with the statement that it is important to plan one's life, rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree. This is item 2 of the Reactive Responding form.

title: Keep Cool When Angry or Frightened
description: Self-reported agreement with the statement that the participant keeps cool when angry or frightened, rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree. This is item 7 of the Reactive Responding form.

title: Let Emotions Cool Before Reacting
description: Self-reported agreement with the statement that the participant lets emotions cool before reacting, rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree. This is item 4 of the Reactive Responding form.

title: Many Long-Term Goals to Achieve
description: Self-reported agreement with the statement that the participant has many long-term goals to achieve, rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree. This is item 5 of the Reactive Responding form.

title: Does Not Think About Long-Term Goals
description: Self-reported agreement with the statement that the participant does not think about long-term goals, rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree. Item 8 of the Reactive Responding questionnaire.

title: On Guard in Most Situations
description: Self-reported agreement with the statement that the participant is on guard in most situations, rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree. This is item 3 of the Reactive Responding form.

title: Quick Emotional Response
description: Self-reported agreement with the statement that the participant has a quick and emotional response, rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree. Item 1 of the Reactive Responding questionnaire.

title: Does Not Worry About Who Is Behind
description: Self-reported agreement with the statement that the participant does not worry about who is behind them, rated on a 5-point scale from Strongly Agree to Strongly Disagree. This is item 9 of the Reactive Responding form.

title: Reading Nutrition Label Information About Calories
description: Indicates whether the participant reads calorie information on nutrition labels.

title: Reading Nutrition Label Information About Cholesterol
description: Indicates whether the participant reads cholesterol information on nutrition labels.

title: Reading Nutrition Label Information About Fats
description: Indicates whether the participant reads fat content information on nutrition labels.

title: Reading Nutrition Label Information About Fiber
description: Indicates whether the participant reads fiber content information on nutrition labels.

title: Reading Nutrition Label Information About General Ingredients
description: Indicates whether the participant reads general ingredient information on nutrition labels.

title: Reading Nutrition Label Information About Other Items
description: Indicates whether the participant reads any other information on nutrition labels beyond the specific categories assessed.

title: Reading Nutrition Label Information About Preservatives
description: Indicates whether the participant reads preservative information on nutrition labels.

title: Reading Nutrition Label Information About Salt/Sodium
description: Indicates whether the participant reads salt or sodium information on nutrition labels.

title: Reading Nutrition Label Information About Sugar/Sweeteners
description: Indicates whether the participant reads sugar or sweetener information on nutrition labels.

title: Reading Nutrition Label Information About Vitamins/Minerals
description: Indicates whether the participant reads vitamin and mineral information on nutrition labels.

title: Reason Urine Collections Incomplete
description: The reported reason why one or more urine collections were not completed, including menstruation, illness, logistics, forgetting, or other reasons.

title: Reason for Neighborhood Choice: Amenities (Parks, Playgrounds, Recreation, Sidewalks)
description: Indicates whether amenities such as parks, playgrounds, recreation centers, and sidewalks were among the most important reasons the participant moved to or stays in their neighborhood.

title: Reason for Neighborhood Choice: Cost of Housing
description: Indicates whether cost of housing was among the most important reasons the participant moved to or stays in their neighborhood.

title: Reason for Neighborhood Choice: Family and Friends Close By
description: Indicates whether having family and friends close by was among the most important reasons the participant moved to or stays in their neighborhood.

title: Reason for Neighborhood Choice: Grocery Stores, Restaurants, and Corner Stores
description: Indicates whether proximity to grocery stores, restaurants, and corner stores was among the most important reasons the participant moved to or stays in their neighborhood.

title: Reason for Neighborhood Choice: Low Crime
description: Indicates whether low crime was among the most important reasons the participant moved to or stays in their neighborhood.

title: Reason for Neighborhood Choice: None of the Listed Reasons
description: Indicates whether none of the listed reasons applied to the participant's decision to move to or stay in their neighborhood.

title: Reason for Neighborhood Choice: Proximity to Job
description: Indicates whether proximity to job was among the most important reasons the participant moved to or stays in their neighborhood.

title: Reason for Neighborhood Choice: Access to Public Transportation
description: Indicates whether access to public transportation options such as trains, bus, trolley, or subway was among the most important reasons the participant moved to or stays in their neighborhood.

title: Reason for Neighborhood Choice: Quality of Housing
description: Indicates whether quality of housing was among the three to four most important reasons the participant moved to or stays in their neighborhood.

title: Reason for Neighborhood Choice: School Availability and Quality
description: Indicates whether school availability and quality were among the most important reasons the participant moved to or stays in their neighborhood.

title: Reason Periods Stopped
description: Indicates how menstrual periods stopped, with response options including naturally, by surgery, other (specify), or still having periods.

title: Reason for Stopping Treadmill Test
description: Reason the graded exercise treadmill test was stopped, categorized as general or leg fatigue, shortness of breath, test completion, chest pain or pressure, abnormal ECG, abnormal blood pressure, other medical reason, participant refusal, or equipment failure.

title: Shortness of Breath with Chest Pain in Past Week
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced shortness of breath with pain in the chest within the past week, recorded as a spirometry safety screening item.

title: Recent Myocardial Infarction or Stroke (Past Month)
description: Indicates whether the participant was told they had a heart attack or stroke in the last month, recorded as a spirometry safety screening item.

title: Smoked Within Last Hour Before Spirometry
description: Indicates whether the participant smoked a cigarette, pipe, or cigar during the last hour prior to spirometry testing.

title: Recovery Heart Rate at 1 Minute Post-GXT
description: Heart rate recorded at the first recovery measurement following the graded exercise treadmill test, measured in beats per minute.

title: Recovery Heart Rate at 2 Minutes Post-GXT
description: Heart rate recorded at the second recovery measurement following the graded exercise treadmill test, measured in beats per minute.

title: Recovery Heart Rate at 3 Minutes Post-GXT
description: Heart rate recorded at the third recovery measurement following the graded exercise treadmill test, measured in beats per minute.

title: Diet Change: Reduced Calories
description: Indicates whether the participant reports having reduced caloric intake as a dietary change (Yes/No).

title: Diet Change: Reduced Cholesterol and/or Saturated Fat
description: Indicates whether the participant reports having reduced dietary cholesterol and/or saturated fat as a dietary change (Yes/No).

title: Diet Change: Reduced Fat
description: Indicates whether the participant reports having reduced dietary fat intake as a dietary change (Yes/No).

title: Referral for Blood Pressure
description: Indicates whether the participant received a referral for blood pressure evaluation.

title: Referral for Lipids
description: Indicates whether the participant received a referral for lipid evaluation.

title: Referral for Resting ECG
description: Indicates whether the participant received a referral for a resting ECG at the follow-up contact.

title: Referral for Treadmill Test
description: Indicates whether the participant received a referral for a treadmill test.

title: Regular Hard Labor or Exercise
description: Indicates whether the participant reported engaging in regular hard labor or exercise at the follow-up contact.

title: Regular Menstrual Periods at Age 20–30
description: Indicates whether the participant had regular menstrual periods between ages 20 and 30, with options including No, Yes, always on birth control pills/pregnant/nursing, and Not sure.

title: Regular Soda or Pop Drinking Frequency (Past Month)
description: Self-reported frequency of drinking regular soda or pop containing sugar (such as Coke, Pepsi, or Mountain Dew) during the past month. Diet soda or pop is excluded.

title: Regular Soda or Pop Usual Amount per Occasion
description: Self-reported usual amount of regular sugar-containing soda or pop consumed per drinking occasion.

title: Religion Discrimination at School
description: Participant-reported experience of discrimination based on religion at school. Responses are coded as Yes or No.

title: Religion Discrimination at Work
description: Participant-reported experience of discrimination based on religion at work. Responses are coded as Yes or No.

title: Religion Discrimination From Police
description: Participant-reported experience of discrimination based on religion from police. Responses are coded as Yes or No.

title: Religion Discrimination Getting Housing
description: Participant-reported experience of discrimination based on religion when getting housing. Responses are coded as Yes or No.

title: Religion Discrimination Getting a Job
description: Participant-reported experience of discrimination based on religion when getting a job. Responses are coded as Yes or No.

title: Religion Discrimination Getting Medical Care
description: Participant-reported experience of discrimination based on religion when getting medical care. Responses are coded as Yes or No.

title: Religion Discrimination in Public
description: Participant-reported experience of discrimination based on religion on the street or in a public setting. Responses are coded as Yes or No.

title: Religion Discrimination Summary Score
description: Summary score reflecting religion discrimination experiences across multiple settings, likely representing the number of settings in which discrimination was endorsed.

title: Frequency of Participation in Religious Activities
description: Participant-reported frequency of participation in religious activities, ranging from more than once a week to never.

title: Religious Denomination
description: Participant-reported religious denomination.

title: Frequency of Attending Religious Services
description: Participant-reported frequency of attending religious services, ranging from every day to never.

title: Religious Service Attendance Frequency
description: Self-reported frequency of attendance at religious services at a church, synagogue, or house of worship.

title: Restaurant/Cafeteria Eating Frequency (Times/Week vs. Month, Categorical)
description: Categorical indicator of whether the participant's frequency of eating at a restaurant or cafeteria, or taking out meals from a deli, grocery store, or other eating establishment, is reported in times per week or times per month.

title: Restaurant/Cafeteria Eating Frequency (Times Per Month)
description: Number of times per month the participant reports eating out at a restaurant, cafeteria, or similar establishment.

title: Need to Restrict Carbohydrate Intake Due to Medical Condition
description: Indicates whether the participant needs to restrict carbohydrate intake because of a medical condition such as weight loss surgery or another serious condition; this does not include following a low-carbohydrate diet for weight loss.

title: Consent to PRF OGTT in Women Study
description: Indicates whether the participant consented to participate in the PRF OGTT component of the women's study.

title: Estimated Daily Retinol Equivalents Intake
description: Estimated daily retinol equivalents intake, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Estimated Daily Retinol Intake (mg)
description: Estimated daily retinol intake, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Mode of Urine Return
description: The mode by which the urine collection was to be returned.

title: Ability to Return to Sleep After Awakening
description: Self-reported ability to get back to sleep after waking during the night.

title: Year 10 Return Visit Indicator
description: Indicator of whether the Year 10 insulin data were obtained from a return visit (1 = No, 2 = Yes).

title: Year 10 Glucose Return-Visit Indicator
description: Indicator of whether the Year 10 glucose data were collected at a return visit rather than the primary exam visit.

title: Reviewed Year 25 Form 40
description: Indicates whether the technician reviewed the participant's Year 25 echocardiography technician worksheet (Form 40) prior to the current examination.

title: Age at Rheumatic Fever or Chorea (Years)
description: Participant's age in years at the time of diagnosis of rheumatic fever or chorea.

title: History of Rheumatic Fever or Chorea
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had rheumatic fever or chorea.

title: Current Status of Rheumatic Fever or Chorea
description: Current status of the participant's rheumatic fever or chorea, indicating whether the condition is still present, controlled by medication or other means, or completely cured or gone.

title: History of Rheumatic Heart Disease
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had rheumatic heart disease.

title: Current Status of Rheumatic Heart Disease
description: Current status of the participant's rheumatic heart disease, indicating whether the condition is still present, controlled by medication or other means, or completely cured or gone.

title: History of Blood Test for Rheumatoid Arthritis
description: Participant-reported history of having had a blood test for rheumatoid arthritis.

title: Result of Blood Test for Rheumatoid Arthritis
description: Participant-reported result of a blood test for rheumatoid arthritis, asked as a follow-up to those who reported having had such a test.

title: Rhythmic Movement Rating
description: Interviewer rating of rhythmic movement observed in the subject, scored as none, occasional, or frequent.

title: Estimated Daily Riboflavin Intake (mg)
description: Estimated daily riboflavin intake, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Mean RMSSD of NN Intervals (msec)
description: Mean root mean square of successive differences (RMSSD) of NN intervals in milliseconds, calculated as the average of the two epoch-specific RMSSD values (FRSRMSSD1 and FRSRMSSD2).

title: RMSSD of NN Intervals (msec)
description: Root mean square of successive differences (RMSSD) of NN intervals in milliseconds, recorded separately for two epochs (epoch 1 and epoch 2).

title: Room Temperature (–C)
description: Room temperature in degrees centigrade recorded at the time of the blood pressure assessment.

title: GXT Stage 1 Rating of Perceived Exertion
description: Rating of perceived exertion (RPE) recorded during stage 1 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 2 Rating of Perceived Exertion
description: Rating of perceived exertion (RPE) recorded during stage 2 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 3 Rating of Perceived Exertion
description: Rating of perceived exertion (RPE) recorded during stage 3 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 4 Rating of Perceived Exertion
description: Rating of perceived exertion (RPE) recorded during stage 4 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 5 Rating of Perceived Exertion
description: Rating of perceived exertion (RPE) recorded during stage 5 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: GXT Stage 6 Rating of Perceived Exertion
description: Rating of perceived exertion (RPE) recorded during stage 6 of the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Months Jogged or Ran in Past Year
description: Number of months in the past 12 months during which the participant jogged or ran for at least one hour total time in any month (e.g., three 20-minute sessions within the month).

title: Months Jogged or Ran ≥2 Hours/Week
description: Number of months in the past 12 months during which the participant jogged or ran for at least 2 hours per week.

title: Jogging or Running Past Year (Any Month ≥1 Hour)
description: Indicates whether the participant jogged or ran during the past 12 months for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Right Ventricular Systolic Pressure
description: Right ventricular systolic pressure estimated by Doppler echocardiography, reported in mmHg.

title: RV Tissue Doppler A-Wave Velocity
description: Right ventricular tissue Doppler A-wave velocity measured in cm/second.

title: RV Tissue Doppler E-Wave Velocity
description: Right ventricular tissue Doppler E-wave velocity measured in cm/second.

title: RV Tissue Doppler S-Wave Velocity
description: Right ventricular tissue Doppler S-wave (systolic) velocity measured in cm/second.

title: Random-Zero Offset: First Diastolic Reading
description: Random-zero offset for the first diastolic blood pressure reading, used to calculate the corrected diastolic value.

title: Random-Zero Offset: First Systolic Reading
description: Random-zero offset for the first systolic blood pressure reading, used to calculate the corrected systolic value.

title: Random-Zero Offset: Second Diastolic Reading
description: Random-zero offset for the second diastolic blood pressure reading, used to calculate the corrected diastolic value.

title: Random-Zero Offset: Second Systolic Reading
description: Random-zero offset for the second systolic blood pressure reading, used to calculate the corrected systolic value.

title: Random-Zero Offset: Third Diastolic Reading
description: Random-zero offset for the third diastolic blood pressure reading, used to calculate the corrected diastolic value.

title: Random-Zero Offset: Third Systolic Reading
description: Random-zero offset for the third systolic blood pressure reading, used to calculate the corrected systolic value.

title: Amount of Salt or Salt-Containing Seasoning Added at the Table
description: Self-reported amount of salt or salt-containing seasoning usually added to foods at the table. Response options include 'Do not use.'

title: Frequency of Adding Salt or Salt-Containing Seasoning at the Table
description: Self-reported frequency of adding salt or salt-containing seasoning to food at the table. Response options include 'Never.'

title: Amount of Salt Added to Foods at the Table
description: Self-reported amount of salt the participant typically adds to foods at the table, ranging from light to heavy.

title: Amount of Salt Usually Added During Cooking
description: Self-reported amount of salt the participant typically adds during cooking, ranging from light to heavy.

title: Frequency of Adding Salt to Food at Table
description: Self-reported frequency with which the participant adds salt to food at the table, ranging from never to almost always.

title: Frequency of Salt Use in Home Cooking
description: Self-reported frequency with which the participant uses salt in home cooking, ranging from never to almost always.

title: Frequency of Salt or Salt-Containing Seasoning Use in Cooking at Home
description: Self-reported frequency with which salt or salt-containing seasoning is used in cooking at home. Response options include 'Never.'

title: Saltiness Rating of 0.8% Sodium Cracker
description: Participant's perceived saltiness rating of the cracker containing 0.8% sodium during the sodium taste test.

title: Saltiness Rating of 1.6% Sodium Cracker
description: Participant's perceived saltiness rating of the cracker containing 1.6% sodium during the sodium taste test.

title: Saltiness Rating of 2.4% Sodium Cracker
description: Participant's perceived saltiness rating of the cracker containing 2.4% sodium during the sodium taste test.

title: Saltiness Rating of 3.2% Sodium Cracker
description: Participant's perceived saltiness rating of the cracker containing 3.2% sodium during the sodium taste test.

title: Saltiness Rating of 4.0% Sodium Cracker
description: Participant's perceived saltiness rating of the cracker containing 4.0% sodium during the sodium taste test.

title: Saltiness Rating of Trial Cracker
description: Participant's perceived saltiness rating of the trial cracker during the sodium taste test.

title: Admitted for Same-Day Surgery
description: Indicates whether the participant was admitted to a hospital for same-day surgery since the last update.

title: Date of Same-Day Surgery Admission
description: Date of admission for same-day surgery.

title: Saliva Sample 1 Collection Time AM/PM Indicator
description: AM or PM indicator for the clock time at which saliva sample 1 (awakening sample) was collected (1=AM).

title: Saliva Sample 1 Time Since Waking (Minutes)
description: Elapsed time in minutes between waking and collection of saliva sample 1.

title: Saliva Sample 2 Collection Time AM/PM Indicator
description: AM or PM indicator for the clock time at which saliva sample 2 (approximately 45 minutes after waking) was collected (1=AM).

title: Saliva Sample 2 Time Since Waking (Minutes)
description: Elapsed time in minutes between waking and collection of saliva sample 2 (approximately 45 minutes after waking).

title: Saliva Sample 3 Collection Time AM/PM Indicator
description: AM or PM indicator for the clock time at which saliva sample 3 (approximately 2.5 hours after waking) was collected (1=AM).

title: Saliva Sample 3 Time Since Waking (Minutes)
description: Elapsed time in minutes between waking and collection of saliva sample 3 (approximately 2.5 hours after waking).

title: Saliva Sample 4 Collection Time AM/PM Indicator
description: AM or PM indicator for the clock time at which saliva sample 4 (approximately 8 hours after waking) was collected (1=AM).

title: Saliva Sample 4 Time Since Waking (Minutes)
description: Elapsed time in minutes between waking and collection of saliva sample 4 (approximately 8 hours after waking).

title: Saliva Sample 5 Collection Time AM/PM Indicator
description: AM or PM indicator for the clock time at which saliva sample 5 (approximately 12 hours after waking) was collected (1=AM).

title: Saliva Sample 5 Time Since Waking (Minutes)
description: Elapsed time in minutes between waking and collection of saliva sample 5 (approximately 12 hours after waking).

title: Saliva Sample 6 Collection Time AM/PM Indicator
description: AM or PM indicator for the clock time at which saliva sample 6 (bedtime sample) was collected (1=AM).

title: Saliva Sample 6 Time Since Waking (Minutes)
description: Elapsed time in minutes between waking and collection of saliva sample 6 (bedtime sample).

title: Estimated Daily Saturated Fat Intake (g)
description: Estimated daily saturated fat intake, in grams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Short-Axis (SAX) View Quality Score
description: Quality score assigned to short-axis (SAX) echocardiographic images.

title: Pre-Instruction Baseline Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Systolic blood pressure measured during the pre-instruction baseline phase of the reactivity protocol, recorded across up to four sequential readings.

title: Systolic Blood Pressure Before GXT
description: Systolic blood pressure measured before the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Breakout Systolic Blood Pressure and Recovery
description: Systolic blood pressure measured during the breakout task and subsequent recovery phase of the reactivity protocol, recorded across up to five readings including task and recovery measurements.

title: Cold Pressor Systolic Blood Pressure and Recovery
description: Systolic blood pressure measured during the cold pressor task and subsequent recovery phase of the reactivity protocol, recorded across up to five readings including task and recovery measurements.

title: Post-Exercise Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Systolic blood pressure measured after completion of the graded exercise treadmill test, recorded in mmHg.

title: Pre-Exercise Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Systolic blood pressure measured before the graded exercise treadmill test, recorded in mmHg.

title: Recovery Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Systolic blood pressure measured during the recovery period following the graded exercise treadmill test, recorded in mmHg.

title: GXT Stage 1 Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Systolic blood pressure recorded during stage 1 of the graded exercise treadmill test, measured in mmHg.

title: GXT Stage 2 Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Systolic blood pressure recorded during stage 2 of the graded exercise treadmill test, measured in mmHg.

title: GXT Stage 3 Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Systolic blood pressure recorded during stage 3 of the graded exercise treadmill test, measured in mmHg.

title: GXT Stage 4 Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Systolic blood pressure recorded during stage 4 of the graded exercise treadmill test, measured in mmHg.

title: GXT Stage 5 Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Systolic blood pressure recorded during stage 5 of the graded exercise treadmill test, measured in mmHg.

title: GXT Stage 6 Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Systolic blood pressure recorded during stage 6 of the graded exercise treadmill test, measured in mmHg.

title: GXT Stage 7 Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Systolic blood pressure recorded during stage 7 of the graded exercise treadmill test, measured in mmHg.

title: GXT Stage 8 Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Systolic blood pressure recorded during stage 8 of the graded exercise treadmill test, measured in mmHg.

title: Star-Tracing Systolic Blood Pressure and Recovery
description: Systolic blood pressure measured during the star-tracing task and subsequent recovery phase of the reactivity protocol, recorded across up to five readings including task and recovery measurements.

title: Self-Efficacy Scale: Reducing Calories (Mean of Items 6–10)
description: Mean score across items 6 through 10 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale, reflecting the participant's perceived ability to reduce caloric intake.

title: Self-Efficacy Scale: Reducing Fat (Mean of Items 16–20)
description: Mean score across items 16 through 20 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale, reflecting the participant's perceived ability to reduce dietary fat intake.

title: Self-Efficacy Scale: Reducing Salt (Mean of Items 11–15)
description: Mean score across items 11 through 15 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale, reflecting the participant's perceived ability to reduce dietary salt intake.

title: Self-Efficacy Scale: Sticking to It (Mean of Items 1–5)
description: Mean score across items 1 through 5 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale, reflecting the participant's perceived ability to stick to healthy eating behaviors.

title: Date of CT Scan
description: Date of the computed tomography scan as recorded in the DICOM header.

title: Carotid Ultrasound Scan Quality
description: Rated quality of the carotid ultrasound scan (e.g., Good).

title: Scout CT Heart Rate
description: Heart rate recorded at the time of the scout CT acquisition, measured in beats per minute.

title: Scout Image Number
description: Image number associated with the scout CT scan series.

title: Mean Standard Deviation of NN Intervals (msec)
description: Mean standard deviation of NN intervals in milliseconds, calculated as the average of the two epoch-specific standard deviation values (FRSSD1 and FRSSD2).

title: Standard Deviation of NN Intervals (msec)
description: Standard deviation of NN intervals in milliseconds, recorded separately for two epochs (epoch 1 and epoch 2).

title: Seat Belt Use Frequency
description: Self-reported frequency of wearing a seat belt while riding in a car, ranging from never to always.

title: Weekday Sedentary Time Using Computer for Non-Work Activities
description: Self-reported time spent sitting while using a computer, including phone or tablet, for non-work activities such as using the internet or playing video games on a typical weekday.

title: Weekday Sedentary Time Listening to Music, Reading, or Doing Arts and Crafts
description: Self-reported time spent sitting while listening to music, reading a book or magazine, or doing arts and crafts on a typical weekday.

title: Weekday Sedentary Time Doing Non-Job Paperwork
description: Self-reported time spent sitting while doing non-computer office work or paperwork not related to one's job (such as paying bills) on a typical weekday.

title: Weekday Sedentary Time Talking on the Phone or Texting
description: Self-reported time spent sitting and talking on the phone or texting while sitting on a typical weekday.

title: Weekday Sedentary Time in Transportation
description: Self-reported time spent sitting in a car, bus, train, or other mode of transportation on a typical weekday.

title: Weekday Sedentary Time Watching Television
description: Self-reported time spent sitting while watching television on a typical weekday.

title: Weekend Sedentary Time Using Computer for Non-Work Activities
description: Self-reported time spent sitting while using a computer, including phone or tablet, for non-work activities such as using the internet or playing video games on a typical weekend day.

title: Weekend Sedentary Time Listening to Music, Reading, or Doing Arts and Crafts
description: Self-reported time spent sitting while listening to music, reading a book or magazine, or doing arts and crafts on a typical weekend day.

title: Weekend Sedentary Time Doing Non-Job Paperwork
description: Self-reported time spent sitting while doing non-computer office work or paperwork not related to one's job (such as paying bills) on a typical weekend day.

title: Weekend Sedentary Time Talking on the Phone or Texting
description: Self-reported time spent sitting and talking on the phone or texting while sitting on a typical weekend day.

title: Weekend Sedentary Time in Transportation
description: Self-reported time spent sitting in a car, bus, train, or other mode of transportation on a typical weekend day.

title: Weekend Sedentary Time Watching Television
description: Self-reported time spent sitting while watching television on a typical weekend day.

title: Sought Help from Dietician for Weight Control
description: Indicates whether the participant sought help from a dietician in the past 12 months to lose weight or stay about the same weight.

title: Sought Help from Doctor for Weight Control
description: Indicates whether the participant sought help from a doctor in the past 12 months to lose weight or stay about the same weight.

title: Sought Help for Weight Control – Do Not Know
description: Indicates that the participant responded 'do not know' when asked whether they sought help from a health professional in the past 12 months to lose weight or stay about the same weight.

title: Sought Professional Help for Weight Control
description: Indicates whether the participant sought help from a personal trainer, dietician, doctor, or other health professional in the past 12 months to lose weight or stay about the same weight.

title: Sought Help from Nutritionist for Weight Control
description: Indicates whether the participant sought help from a nutritionist in the past 12 months to lose weight or stay about the same weight.

title: Sought Help from Other Health Professional for Weight Control
description: Indicates whether the participant sought help from another health professional (not a personal trainer, dietician, doctor, or nutritionist) in the past 12 months to lose weight or stay about the same weight.

title: Sought Help for Weight Control – Response Refused
description: Indicates that the participant refused to answer whether they sought help from a health professional in the past 12 months to lose weight or stay about the same weight.

title: Sought Help from Personal Trainer for Weight Control
description: Indicates whether the participant sought help from a personal trainer in the past 12 months to lose weight or stay about the same weight.

title: Seeks Medical Help at First Sign of Illness
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent seeks medical help at the first sign of illness (Question 45). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Seismocardiogram Substudy Performed
description: Indicates whether the seismocardiogram substudy was performed during the echocardiography examination visit.

title: History of Seizure, Convulsion, or Fit
description: Participant-reported history of having ever had a seizure, convulsion, or fit.

title: Seldom Thinks About Athleticism
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent seldom thinks about their athleticism (Question 27). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Selenium Supplement Frequency
description: Frequency (per day, week, or month) at which the participant reports taking selenium supplements.

title: Number of Selenium Supplements Taken
description: Number of selenium supplement doses taken per intake occasion.

title: Selenium Supplement Use
description: Indicates whether the participant reports having taken selenium supplements (Yes/No).

title: Self-Conscious About Grooming
description: Respondent's agreement with the statement 'I am self-conscious about my grooming,' rated on a 5-point scale from Definitely disagree to Definitely agree.

title: Self-Efficacy: Add Less Salt Than Recipe Calls For
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to add less salt than a recipe calls for, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 11 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Avoid Adding Salt at the Table
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to avoid adding salt at the table, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 13 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Avoid Ordering Red Meat at a Restaurant
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to avoid ordering red meat at a restaurant, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 20 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Cook Less So There Are No Leftovers
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to cook less so there are no leftovers, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 7 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Cut Down on Gravies and Cream Sauces
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to cut down on gravies and cream sauces, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 18 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Eat Less at a Party
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to eat less at a party, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 9 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Eat Meatless Entrées for Dinner
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to eat meatless entrées for dinner, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 16 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Eat Poultry and Fish Instead of Red Meat
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to eat poultry and fish instead of red meat, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 19 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Eat Salads for Lunch
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to eat salads for lunch, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 10 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Eat Unsalted Nuts, Chips, Crackers, Pretzels
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to eat unsalted peanuts, chips, crackers, and pretzels, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 12 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Eat Unsalted, Unbuttered Popcorn
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to eat unsalted, unbuttered popcorn, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 14 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Exercise After a Long Tiring Day of Work
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to exercise after a long, tiring day of work, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 22 of Form 49).

title: Self-Efficacy: Exercise and Then Attend a Party
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to exercise and then attend a party, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 27 of Form 49).

title: Self-Efficacy: Exercise During Stressful Life Changes
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to exercise during stressful life changes, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 26 of Form 49).

title: Self-Efficacy: Exercise Even When Feeling Depressed
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to exercise even when feeling depressed, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 23 of Form 49).

title: Self-Efficacy: Exercise When Family Demands More Time
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to exercise when family demands more of one's time, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 28 of Form 49).

title: Self-Efficacy: Exercise When Work Demands Are Excessive
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to exercise when work demands are excessive, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 30 of Form 49).

title: Self-Efficacy: Exercise With Others Even If Too Slow or Fast
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to exercise with others even if their pace is too slow or too fast, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 25 of Form 49).

title: Self-Efficacy: Exercise When Having Social Obligations
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to exercise when having social obligations, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 31 of Form 49).

title: Self-Efficacy: Get Up Early to Exercise
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to get up early to exercise, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 21 of Form 49).

title: Self-Efficacy: Keep Salt Shaker Off Kitchen Table
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to keep the salt shaker off the kitchen table, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 15 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Eat Low-Fat Foods When Depressed
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to choose low-fat foods when feeling depressed, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 1 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Eat Low-Fat Foods When Dining With Friends
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to choose low-fat foods when dining with friends, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 3 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Eat Low-Fat Foods at a Party With High-Fat Foods
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to choose low-fat foods at a party where high-fat foods are available, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 2 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Eat Low-Fat Foods When Vending Machine Is Nearby
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to choose low-fat foods when a vending machine is nearby, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 4 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Eat Low-Fat Foods When Alone
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to choose low-fat foods when eating alone, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 5 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Use Low/Non-Fat Milk for Breakfast
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to use low or non-fat milk for breakfast, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 17 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Eat Lunch as Main Meal Instead of Dinner
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to eat lunch as the main meal instead of dinner, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 8 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Read or Study Less to Exercise More
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to reduce reading or studying in order to exercise more, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 32 of Form 49).

title: Self-Efficacy: Eat Smaller Portions at Dinner
description: Self-reported confidence in ability to eat smaller portions at dinner, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 6 of the Self-Efficacy for Eating Behavioral Scale).

title: Self-Efficacy: Find Time to Exercise 30 Min/Day, 3 Days/Week
