description: Self-reported confidence in ability to find time to exercise 30 minutes per day, 3 days per week, rated on a 5-point scale from 'I know I cannot' to 'I know I can' (item 24 of Form 49).

title: Self-Insured for Health Insurance
description: Indicates whether the participant or someone else pays entirely for their health insurance, i.e., they are self-insured.

title: Self-Rated Memory Compared to Others
description: Participant's self-assessment of their memory relative to other people of the same age, ranging from much worse to better than others.

title: Serious Illness or Injury Not Resulting in Hospitalization
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced a serious illness or injury since the last update that did not result in hospitalization.

title: Serum Aldosterone (pg/mL)
description: Serum aldosterone concentration measured in pg/mL from the renin-aldosterone substudy.

title: Serum Creatinine (mg/dL)
description: Serum creatinine concentration measured in milligrams per deciliter (mg/dL).

title: Serum Leptin
description: Serum leptin concentration measured in nanograms per milliliter (ng/mL).

title: Serum Uric Acid (mg/dL)
description: Serum uric acid concentration measured in milligrams per deciliter (mg/dL).

title: Serum Uric Acid, NIST Recalibrated (mg/dL)
description: Serum uric acid concentration in mg/dL, recalibrated to the NIST (National Institute of Standards and Technology) standard.

title: Serum Uric Acid, YALTA III Assay (mg/dL)
description: Serum uric acid concentration in mg/dL measured using the YALTA III assay.

title: Socioeconomic Status Discriminated at Home (Frequency)
description: Participant-reported frequency of discrimination experienced at home because of socioeconomic position or social class, among those who reported ever experiencing such discrimination. Responses are coded as Rarely, Sometimes, or Often.

title: Socioeconomic Status Discriminated at School (Frequency)
description: Participant-reported frequency of discrimination experienced at school because of socioeconomic position or social class, among those who reported ever experiencing such discrimination. Responses are coded as Rarely, Sometimes, or Often.

title: Socioeconomic Status Discriminated at Work (Frequency)
description: Participant-reported frequency of discrimination experienced at work because of socioeconomic position or social class, among those who reported ever experiencing such discrimination. Responses are coded as Rarely, Sometimes, or Often.

title: Socioeconomic Status Discriminated Getting Housing (Frequency)
description: Participant-reported frequency of discrimination experienced when getting housing because of socioeconomic position or social class, among those who reported ever experiencing such discrimination. Responses are coded as Rarely, Sometimes, or Often.

title: Socioeconomic Status Discriminated Getting a Job (Frequency)
description: Participant-reported frequency of discrimination experienced when getting a job because of socioeconomic position or social class, among those who reported ever experiencing such discrimination. Responses are coded as Rarely, Sometimes, or Often.

title: Socioeconomic Status Discriminated Getting Medical Care (Frequency)
description: Participant-reported frequency of discrimination experienced when getting medical care because of socioeconomic position or social class, among those who reported ever experiencing such discrimination. Responses are coded as Rarely, Sometimes, or Often.

title: Socioeconomic Status Discriminated in Public (Frequency)
description: Participant-reported frequency of discrimination experienced on the street or in a public setting because of socioeconomic position or social class, among those who reported ever experiencing such discrimination. Responses are coded as Rarely, Sometimes, or Often.

title: Socioeconomic Status Discrimination at Home
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior at home because of their socioeconomic position or social class. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Socioeconomic Status Discrimination at School
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior at school because of their socioeconomic position or social class. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Socioeconomic Status Discrimination at Work
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior at work because of their socioeconomic position or social class. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Average SES Discrimination Score
description: Average score summarizing the frequency of socioeconomic status discrimination experiences across settings, derived from individual discrimination items.

title: Socioeconomic Status Discrimination Getting Housing
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior when getting housing because of their socioeconomic position or social class. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Socioeconomic Status Discrimination Getting a Job
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior when getting a job because of their socioeconomic position or social class. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Socioeconomic Status Discrimination Getting Medical Care
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior when getting medical care because of their socioeconomic position or social class. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Socioeconomic Status Discrimination in Public
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior on the street or in a public setting because of their socioeconomic position or social class. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Stress From Socioeconomic Status Discrimination
description: Participant-reported level of stress resulting from experiences of discrimination because of their socioeconomic position or social class. Responses range from Not at all stressful to higher levels of stress.

title: SES Discrimination Sum Scale
description: Sum scale score summarizing socioeconomic status discrimination experiences across settings, derived from individual discrimination items.

title: Severe Hypertension at Rest
description: Indicates whether the participant had severe hypertension at rest, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Sex
description: Participant's biological sex, verified at Exam 2.

title: Sex Discrimination at Home
description: Participant-reported experience of ever having been discriminated against, prevented from doing something, or hassled or made to feel inferior at home because of their sex. Responses are coded as No or Yes.

title: Sex Discrimination at Home Frequency
description: Frequency of sex discrimination experienced at home, as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sex Discrimination at School
description: Whether the participant experienced sex discrimination at school, as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sex Discrimination at School Frequency
description: Frequency of sex discrimination experienced at school, as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sex Discrimination at Work
description: Whether the participant experienced sex discrimination at work, as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sex Discrimination at Work Frequency
description: Frequency of sex discrimination experienced at work, as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Average Sex Discrimination Score
description: Average sex discrimination score derived from the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sex Discrimination Getting Housing
description: Whether the participant experienced sex discrimination when getting housing, as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sex Discrimination Getting Housing Frequency
description: Frequency of sex discrimination experienced when getting housing, as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sex Discrimination Getting a Job
description: Whether the participant experienced sex discrimination when getting a job, as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sex Discrimination Getting a Job Frequency
description: Frequency of sex discrimination experienced when getting a job, as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sex Discrimination Getting Medical Care
description: Whether the participant experienced sex discrimination when getting medical care, as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sex Discrimination Getting Medical Care Frequency
description: Frequency of sex discrimination experienced when getting medical care, as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sex Discrimination in Public
description: Whether the participant experienced sex discrimination in public, as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sex Discrimination in Public Frequency
description: Frequency of sex discrimination experienced in public, as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Stress from Sex Discrimination
description: Participant-rated level of stress attributed to sex discrimination, as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sex Discrimination Sum Scale
description: Sum scale score for sex discrimination derived from the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sexual Orientation Discrimination at Home
description: Whether the participant experienced discrimination based on sexual preference at home (yes/no), as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sexual Orientation Discrimination at School
description: Whether the participant experienced discrimination based on sexual preference at school (yes/no), as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sexual Orientation Discrimination at Work
description: Whether the participant experienced discrimination based on sexual preference at work (yes/no), as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sexual Orientation Discrimination Getting a Job
description: Whether the participant experienced discrimination based on sexual preference when getting a job (yes/no), as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sexual Orientation Discrimination Getting Medical Care
description: Whether the participant experienced discrimination based on sexual preference when getting medical care (yes/no), as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sexual Orientation Discrimination in Family
description: Whether the participant experienced discrimination based on sexual preference within the family (yes/no), as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sexual Orientation Discrimination in Public
description: Whether the participant experienced discrimination based on sexual preference in public (yes/no), as reported on the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Sexual Orientation Discrimination Summary Score
description: Summary score for discrimination based on sexual preference, derived from the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: SF-12 Emotional Health Limited Accomplishment (Past 4 Weeks)
description: SF-12 item (Q6) asking whether the participant accomplished less than they would like in their work or other regular daily activities during the past 4 weeks as a result of emotional problems such as feeling depressed or anxious. Responses are Yes or No.

title: SF-12 Emotional Health Limited Work or Activities (Past 4 Weeks)
description: SF-12 item (Q7) asking whether the participant was limited in the kind of work or other activities they could perform during the past 4 weeks as a result of emotional problems such as feeling depressed or anxious. Responses are Yes or No.

title: SF-12 General Health Status
description: SF-12 item (Q1) asking the participant to rate their general health. Responses range from 'Excellent' to 'Poor' on a 5-point scale.

title: SF-12 Mental Component Summary Score (MCS-12)
description: Derived Mental Component Summary score (MCS-12) calculated from the SF-12 mental health component items.

title: SF-12 Limitation in Moderate Activities
description: SF-12 item (Q2) asking whether the participant's health limits them in performing moderate activities such as moving a table, pushing a vacuum cleaner, bowling, or playing golf. Responses are 'No, not limited,' 'Yes, limited a little,' or 'Yes, limited a lot.'

title: SF-12 Pain Interfered with Normal Work (Past 4 Weeks)
description: SF-12 item (Q8) asking how much pain interfered with normal work, including work outside the home and housework, during the past 4 weeks. Responses range from 'Not at all' to 'Extremely' on a 5-point scale.

title: SF-12 Physical Component Summary Score (PCS-12)
description: Derived Physical Component Summary score (PCS-12) calculated from the SF-12 physical health component items.

title: SF-12 Physical Health Limited Accomplishment (Past 4 Weeks)
description: SF-12 item (Q4) asking whether the participant accomplished less than they would like in their work or other regular daily activities during the past 4 weeks as a result of their physical health. Responses are Yes or No.

title: SF-12 Physical Health Limited Work or Activities (Past 4 Weeks)
description: SF-12 item (Q5) asking whether the participant was limited in the kind of work or other activities they could perform during the past 4 weeks as a result of their physical health. Responses are Yes or No.

title: SF-12 Limitation in Climbing Several Flights of Stairs
description: SF-12 item (Q3) asking whether the participant's health limits them in climbing several flights of stairs. Responses are 'No, not limited,' 'Yes, limited a little,' or 'Yes, limited a lot.'

title: Shortest Period Length in Past 12 Months (Days)
description: The shortest number of days of actual menstrual flow at any single period during the past 12 months, reported when period length was variable or uncertain.

title: Shortest Period Length at Age 20–30 (Days)
description: The shortest period length in days during the age 20–30 recall period, reported when period length was variable or uncertain.

title: Short of Breath When Hurrying or Walking Up Slight Hill
description: Indicates whether the participant experiences shortness of breath when hurrying on level ground or walking up a slight hill.

title: Stops for Breath Walking at Own Pace
description: Indicates whether the participant stops for breath while walking at their own pace on level ground.

title: Stops for Breath on a Short Walk
description: Indicates whether the participant stops for breath during a short walk.

title: Short of Breath Walking on Level Ground
description: Indicates whether the participant walks slowly on level ground or experiences shortness of breath when walking on level ground.

title: Short of Breath When Dressing or Undressing
description: Indicates whether the participant experiences shortness of breath when dressing or undressing.

title: Age at First Diagnosis of Sickle Cell Trait (Years)
description: Participant's age in years at the time of first diagnosis of sickle cell trait.

title: Sighing Rating
description: Interviewer rating of sighing observed in the subject, scored as none, occasional, or frequent.

title: Number of Sisters with Toxemia/Preeclampsia/High Blood Pressure in Pregnancy
description: Number of the participant's sisters who have had toxemia, preeclampsia, or high blood pressure during pregnancy.

title: Number of Sisters Who Smoke Cigarettes
description: Number of the participant's sisters who smoke cigarettes.

title: Number of Sisters Very Overweight
description: Number of the participant's sisters who are very overweight.

title: Number of Sisters with Asthma
description: Number of the participant's full sisters who have had asthma.

title: Number of Sisters with Cancer
description: Number of the participant's full sisters who have had cancer.

title: Number of Sisters with Gout
description: Number of the participant's sisters who have had gout.

title: Number of Sisters with Heart Failure
description: Number of the participant's full sisters who have had heart failure.

title: Number of Sisters with Kidney Failure or Dialysis
description: Number of the participant's full sisters who have had kidney failure or dialysis.

title: History of Weakness Rising from Sitting Position Lasting More Than 3 Months
description: Participant-reported history of weakness when rising from a sitting position lasting more than 3 months.

title: Skill Discretion Score
description: A derived score reflecting the degree of skill discretion in the participant's job, from the Karasek Job Strain Questionnaire.

title: Skin Color Calibration Category
description: Calibration standard category used during skin color reflectance measurement, classified as white standard, light gray standard, or dark gray standard.

title: Skin Reflectance with Amber Filter (%)
description: Percentage of light reflectance from the participant's skin measured using an amber filter.

title: Skin Reflectance with Blue Filter (%)
description: Percentage of light reflectance from the participant's skin measured using a blue filter.

title: Skin Reflectance with Green Filter (%)
description: Percentage of light reflectance from the participant's skin measured using a green filter.

title: Skinfold Measurement Protocol Modified
description: Indicates whether the standard protocol for skinfold measurement was modified during the examination.

title: Amount of Sleep Lost Wearing Monitor
description: Participant-reported amount of sleep lost on the night the ambulatory monitor was worn.

title: Awakened 1–2 Times
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they were awakened 1 to 2 times during the night while wearing the ambulatory monitor.

title: Awakened 3–4 Times
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they were awakened 3 to 4 times during the night while wearing the ambulatory monitor.

title: Awakened 5 or More Times
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they were awakened 5 or more times during the night while wearing the ambulatory monitor.

title: Awakened Early
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they woke up earlier than intended during the night while wearing the ambulatory monitor.

title: Could Not Sleep at All
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they were unable to sleep at all during the night while wearing the ambulatory monitor.

title: Hours of Sleep in a Normal Night
description: Participant-reported number of hours typically slept on a normal night, collected in the context of the ambulatory monitoring protocol.

title: Lost Any Sleep Wearing Monitor
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they lost any sleep on the night the ambulatory monitor was worn.

title: Self-Rated Sleep Quality
description: Participant's self-rated overall sleep quality over the past month.

title: Slept Lighter Than Usual
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they slept lighter than usual during the night while wearing the ambulatory monitor.

title: Unable to Fall Asleep
description: Participant-reported indicator of whether they were unable to fall asleep during the night while wearing the ambulatory monitor.

title: Daytime Sleepiness
description: Self-reported indicator of whether the participant feels sleepy during the daytime.

title: Smoke Detector in Home
description: Self-reported indicator of whether a smoke detector is present in the participant's home.

title: Time Last Smoked (AM/PM Indicator)
description: Indicates whether the time the participant last smoked was in the AM or PM.

title: Smoked in Past 24 Hours
description: Indicates whether the participant smoked in the 24 hours prior to the blood pressure assessment, with responses of no, yes, or does not smoke or use tobacco.

title: Smoked in Past 24 Hours
description: Indicates whether the participant smoked in the 24 hours prior to the exam visit.

title: Ever Used Smokeless Tobacco Regularly
description: Indicates whether the participant has regularly used smokeless tobacco products such as snuff or chewing tobacco for at least three months, where 'regularly' is defined as at least once per week almost every week.

title: Anyone Ever Smoke in Bed in Household
description: Self-reported indicator of whether anyone in the participant's household ever smokes in bed, with a response option for households where no one smokes.

title: Snoring Frequency
description: Self-reported frequency of snoring among participants who reported ever snoring.

title: Frequency of Social Outings (Movies, Concerts, Going Out)
description: Self-reported frequency of social outings such as going to movies, concerts, or going out with friends.

title: Social Network Index
description: Composite index summarizing the participant's social network, derived from social support questionnaire items.

title: Sodium Content of Preferred Cracker
description: The sodium content of the cracker selected as most preferred by the participant during the sodium taste test.

title: Estimated Daily Sodium Intake (mg)
description: Estimated daily sodium intake, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Ratio of Sodium to Potassium Intake
description: Ratio of estimated daily sodium intake to potassium intake, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Source of Usual Medical Care
description: Categorical description of the participant's usual source of medical care — defined as the place they go for a check-up or when ill — with options including private or personal physician/HMO, walk-in clinic, other clinic, hospital emergency room, or other.

title: Use of Soy Products
description: Indicates whether the participant reports using soy products (Yes).

title: First Special Diet Type
description: Type of the first special diet reported by the participant, as recorded on the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Second Special Diet Type
description: Type of the second special diet reported by the participant, as recorded on the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Ever in Special Education Classes
description: Self-reported history of ever having been placed in special education classes.

title: Speckle Tracking Quality Score and Type
description: Quality score and scoring type for speckle tracking echocardiography; the scoring type indicates the reason for a score below 3.

title: Speech Hurrying Rating
description: Interviewer rating of speech hurrying observed in the subject, scored as none, occasional, or frequent.

title: Ever Used Amphetamines (Speed)
description: Self-reported whether the participant has ever used amphetamines (speed), not including methamphetamines.

title: Ever Injected Speed/Amphetamines
description: Self-reported whether the participant has ever injected speed or amphetamines.

title: Speed/Amphetamines Taken by Needle
description: Self-reported whether the participant has taken speed or amphetamines via needle injection.

title: Speed/Amphetamines Taken by Smoking
description: Self-reported whether the participant has taken speed or amphetamines by smoking.

title: Speed/Amphetamines Taken by Snorting
description: Self-reported whether the participant has taken speed or amphetamines by snorting.

title: Speed/Amphetamines Taken by Swallowing
description: Self-reported whether the participant has taken speed or amphetamines by swallowing.

title: Used Speed/Amphetamines in Past 24 Hours
description: Self-reported whether the participant used speed or amphetamines in the past 24 hours.

title: Spends a Lot of Time on Appearance
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent spends a lot of time on their appearance (Question 11). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Spirometry Trial Acceptability Codes
description: Acceptability codes for each spirometry trial, indicating whether individual trials met quality criteria.

title: Age at Spirometry (Years)
description: Age of the participant in years at the time of spirometry, recorded as part of the spirometry protocol for reference equation calculations.

title: Spirometry Extrapolated Volume >0.1*FVC Flags by Trial
description: Flags indicating whether the extrapolated volume exceeded 0.1 times the FVC for each spirometry trial, used as a quality indicator for test start acceptability.

title: Barometric Pressure During Spirometry
description: Barometric pressure recorded at the time of spirometry testing, used as an environmental condition for volume corrections.

title: Exhalation Time by Trial
description: Exhalation time recorded for each individual spirometry trial.

title: FEF25 by Trial
description: Forced expiratory flow rate at 25% of FVC (FEF25) recorded for each individual spirometry trial.

title: FEF50 by Trial
description: Forced expiratory flow rate at 50% of FVC (FEF50) recorded for each individual spirometry trial.

title: FEF75 by Trial
description: Forced expiratory flow rate at 75% of FVC (FEF75) recorded for each individual spirometry trial.

title: Ratio of Maximum FEV1 to FVC
description: Ratio of the maximum FEV1 to FVC derived across spirometry trials.

title: FEV1 by Trial
description: Forced expiratory volume in 1 second (FEV1) recorded for each individual spirometry trial.

title: FEV3 by Trial
description: Forced expiratory volume in 3 seconds (FEV3) recorded for each individual spirometry trial.

title: FVC by Trial
description: Forced vital capacity (FVC) recorded for each individual spirometry trial.

title: Height for Spirometry (Inches)
description: Height of the participant in inches, recorded for use in spirometry reference calculations.

title: Exhalation Time from Maximum Flow-Volume Curve
description: Exhalation time derived from the maximum flow-volume curve across spirometry trials.

title: Trial Number of Maximum Flow-Volume Curve
description: The trial number corresponding to the maximum flow-volume curve selected from spirometry testing.

title: FEF at 25% from Maximum Curve
description: Forced expiratory flow rate at 25% of FVC (FEF25) derived from the maximum flow-volume curve across spirometry trials.

title: FEF at 50% from Maximum Curve
description: Forced expiratory flow rate at 50% of FVC (FEF50) derived from the maximum flow-volume curve across spirometry trials.

title: FEF at 75% from Maximum Curve
description: Forced expiratory flow rate at 75% of FVC (FEF75) derived from the maximum flow-volume curve across spirometry trials.

title: Maximum FEV1
description: Maximum forced expiratory volume in 1 second (FEV1) recorded across spirometry trials.

title: Exhalation Time of Maximum FEV1 Trial
description: Exhalation time recorded for the trial that produced the maximum FEV1.

title: Trial Number of Maximum FEV1
description: The trial number corresponding to the maximum FEV1 value from spirometry testing.

title: Maximum FEV3
description: Maximum forced expiratory volume in 3 seconds (FEV3) recorded across spirometry trials.

title: Exhalation Time of Maximum FEV3 Trial
description: Exhalation time recorded for the trial that produced the maximum FEV3.

title: Trial Number of Maximum FEV3
description: The trial number corresponding to the maximum FEV3 value from spirometry testing.

title: Maximum FVC
description: Maximum forced vital capacity (FVC) recorded across spirometry trials.

title: Exhalation Time of Maximum FVC Trial
description: Exhalation time recorded for the trial in which the maximum forced vital capacity (FVC) was obtained during spirometry.

title: Trial Number of Maximum FVC
description: The trial number from which the maximum forced vital capacity (FVC) value was obtained during spirometry.

title: Maximum Mid-Expiratory Flow Rate from Maximum Curve
description: Maximum mid-expiratory flow rate (MMEF) derived from the maximum flow-volume curve across spirometry trials.

title: Peak Expiratory Flow Rate from Maximum Curve
description: Peak expiratory flow rate (PEFR) derived from the maximum flow-volume curve across spirometry trials.

title: Mid-Expiratory Flow Rate by Trial
description: Maximum mid-expiratory flow rate (MMEF) recorded for each individual spirometry trial, with separate variables for each trial number.

title: Peak Expiratory Flow Rate by Trial
description: Peak expiratory flow rate (PEFR) recorded for each individual spirometry trial, with separate variables for each trial number.

title: Posture During Spirometry
description: The participant's posture during spirometry, recorded as standing or sitting.

title: Race Code for Spirometry
description: Race code recorded during spirometry, used to indicate whether a race-based correction was applied to spirometry reference values.

title: Spirometry Reconstructed Data Flag
description: Flag indicating that spirometry data for the participant were reconstructed rather than directly recorded.

title: Reproducibility of Maximum FEV1 (Volume Difference)
description: A measure of the reproducibility of the maximum FEV1, expressed as the volume difference between the highest and next-highest FEV1 values across spirometry trials.

title: Reproducibility of Maximum FEV3 (Volume Difference)
description: A measure of the reproducibility of the maximum FEV3, expressed as the volume difference between the highest and next-highest FEV3 values across spirometry trials.

title: Reproducibility of Maximum FVC (Volume Difference)
description: A measure of the reproducibility of the maximum FVC, expressed as the volume difference between the highest and next-highest FVC values across spirometry trials.

title: Room Temperature During Spirometry (°C)
description: Room temperature in degrees Celsius recorded at the time of the spirometry examination.

title: Sex for Spirometry
description: Sex of the participant as entered into the spirometer for use in spirometry reference calculations.

title: Total Number of Pulmonary Function Trials
description: The total number of pulmonary function (spirometry) trials performed by the participant during the exam visit.

title: Pulmonary Function Trial Index
description: Index number identifying a pulmonary function trial within a spirometry session.

title: Spirometry Test Completed
description: Indicates whether the spirometry (pulmonary function test) was completed.

title: Sport Physical Activity Index
description: A summary index of sport-related physical activity, derived from the Physical Activity Questionnaire.

title: Sports Participation Is Important
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether sports participation is important to the respondent (Question 13). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Bleeding or Spotting Between Periods at Age 20–30
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced bleeding or spotting between periods for at least 6 months in a year during ages 20–30.

title: Bleeding or Spotting Between Periods in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant bled or spotted between menstrual periods at least half of the year (at least 6 months) during the past 12 months.

title: Spouse/Mate Attended Technical or Trade School
description: Indicates whether the participant's spouse or mate ever attended a technical or trade school.

title: Spouse/Mate Census Occupation Code
description: Three-digit census occupation code assigned to the participant's spouse or mate based on their reported occupation.

title: Spouse or Partner Currently Smokes Cigarettes
description: Indicates whether the participant's spouse or significant other currently smokes cigarettes.

title: Spouse/Mate Highest Degree Earned
description: The highest academic degree earned by the participant's spouse or mate, ranging from high school diploma or equivalency through doctorate or professional degree.

title: Spouse/Mate Highest Grade of School Completed
description: The highest grade of school completed by the participant's spouse or mate, ranging from elementary school through graduate school.

title: Spouse/Mate Currently in School
description: Indicates whether the participant's spouse or mate is currently attending school.

title: Spouse/Mate Keeping House or Caring for Children
description: Indicates whether the participant's spouse or mate is currently keeping house or caring for children as their main daily activity.

title: Spouse/Mate Has Other Main Daily Activity
description: Indicates whether the participant's spouse or mate has a main daily activity other than those listed as standard response options.

title: Spouse/Mate Unemployed or Laid Off
description: Indicates whether the participant's spouse or mate is currently unemployed or laid off.

title: Spouse/Mate Working Part Time
description: Indicates whether the participant's spouse or mate is currently working part time.

title: STAI Trait Item: I Am Calm, Cool and Collected
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 27 asking how often the respondent feels calm, cool, and collected. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Am Content
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 36 asking how often the respondent feels content. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Feel Difficulties Are Piling Up
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 28 asking how often the respondent feels that difficulties are piling up. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Have Disturbing Thoughts
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 31 asking how often the respondent has disturbing thoughts. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Feel Like a Failure
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 25 asking how often the respondent feels like a failure. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Feel Rested
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 26 asking how often the respondent feels rested. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Feel Secure
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 33 asking how often the respondent feels secure. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Am Happy
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 30 asking how often the respondent feels happy. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Feel Inadequate
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 35 asking how often the respondent feels inadequate. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Lack Self-Confidence
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 32 asking how often the respondent feels they lack self-confidence. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Make Decisions Easily
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 34 asking how often the respondent makes decisions easily. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Feel Nervous and Restless
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 22 asking how often the respondent feels nervous and restless. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Feel Pleasant
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 21 asking how often the respondent feels pleasant. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Feel Satisfied With Myself
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 23 asking how often the respondent feels satisfied with themselves. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Am a Steady Person
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 39 asking how often the respondent considers themselves a steady person. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Take Disappointments Very Keenly
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 38 asking how often the respondent takes disappointments very keenly. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Get Tense When Thinking About Concerns
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 40 asking how often the respondent gets tense when thinking about their concerns. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: Unimportant Thoughts Bother Me
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 37 asking how often unimportant thoughts bother the respondent. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Wish to Be as Happy as Others Seem to Be
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 24 asking how often the respondent wishes to be as happy as others seem to be. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: STAI Trait Item: I Worry Too Much Over Trivial Things
description: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Questionnaire item 29 asking how often the respondent worries too much over trivial things. Responses are rated on a 4-point frequency scale from 1 (Almost never) to 4 (Almost always).

title: Spielberger Trait Anxiety Total Score
description: Total score derived from the 20-item Spielberger Trait Anxiety Inventory (STAI). Summarizes an individual's general tendency to experience anxiety across situations.

title: Flights of Stairs Taken Per Day
description: Self-reported average number of flights of stairs taken per day.

title: Standing Blood Pressure: 1st Diastolic Reading
description: First diastolic blood pressure reading taken in the standing position.

title: Standing Blood Pressure: 2nd Diastolic Reading
description: Second diastolic blood pressure reading taken in the standing position.

title: Standing Blood Pressure: 1st Systolic Reading
description: First systolic blood pressure reading taken in the standing position.

title: Standing Blood Pressure: 2nd Systolic Reading
description: Second systolic blood pressure reading taken in the standing position.

title: Number of Completed Stars
description: The total number of stars completed by the participant during the star-tracing task of the reactivity protocol.

title: Total Number of Star-Tracing Errors
description: The total number of errors made by the participant during the star-tracing task of the reactivity protocol.

title: Star-Tracing Task Indicator
description: Indicates which task version (Task 1 or Task 2) was administered during the star-tracing phase of the reactivity protocol.

title: Frequency of Steel Cookware Use
description: Number of times the participant used steel cookware, reported to assess potential metal exposure sources that could affect toenail mineral content.

title: Months Doing Other Strenuous Sports
description: Number of months in the past 12 months during which the participant engaged in other strenuous sports such as basketball, football, skating, or skiing for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Months Doing Other Strenuous Sports ≥3 Hours/Week
description: Number of months in the past 12 months during which the participant engaged in strenuous sports such as basketball, football, skating, or skiing for at least 3 hours per week.

title: Other Strenuous Sports Past Year (Any Month ≥1 Hour)
description: Indicates whether the participant engaged in strenuous sports such as basketball, football, skating, or skiing during the past 12 months for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Duration of Stressful Event (Minutes)
description: The duration in minutes of the stressful event reported by the participant during the monitoring period.

title: Stress Intensity During Stressful Event
description: The participant's self-reported level of stress experienced during the stressful event in the monitoring period.

title: Stress Level Compared to Normal Day
description: Participant-reported assessment of their stress level on the ambulatory monitoring day compared to a normal day.

title: Stress-Tab Multivitamin Frequency
description: Frequency (per day, week, or month) at which the participant reports taking Stress-Tab multiple vitamins.

title: Number of Stress-Tab Multivitamins Taken
description: Number of Stress-Tab multiple vitamin doses taken per intake occasion.

title: Stress-Tab Multivitamin Use
description: Indicates whether the participant reports having taken Stress-Tab multiple vitamins (Yes/No).

title: Stroke or TIA
description: Indicates whether the participant reported having a stroke or transient ischemic attack (TIA) since the last CARDIA exam.

title: Doctor-Diagnosed Stroke or TIA Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant reported being told by a doctor that they had a stroke or transient ischemic attack (TIA) since the last exam.

title: Stroop Subtest 1 Administered
description: Indicates whether Stroop subtest 1 was administered to the participant.

title: Reason Stroop Subtest 1 Not Given: Cannot Read
description: Indicates that Stroop subtest 1 was not administered because the participant cannot read.

title: Reason Stroop Subtest 1 Not Given: Hearing
description: Indicates that Stroop subtest 1 was not administered due to a hearing-related reason.

title: Reason Stroop Subtest 1 Not Given: Not Cooperative
description: Indicates that Stroop subtest 1 was not administered because the participant was not cooperative.

title: Reason Stroop Subtest 1 Not Given: Physical
description: Indicates that Stroop subtest 1 was not administered due to a physical reason.

title: Reason Stroop Subtest 1 Not Given: Vision
description: Indicates that Stroop subtest 1 was not administered due to a vision-related reason.

title: Stroop Subtest 1 Number Correct
description: The number of correct responses given by the participant during Stroop subtest 1.

title: Stroop Subtest 1 Number of Errors
description: The number of errors made by the participant during Stroop subtest 1.

title: Stroop Subtest 1 Completion Time (Minutes)
description: The time in minutes taken by the participant to complete Stroop subtest 1.

title: Stroop Subtest 1 Completion Time (Seconds)
description: The time in seconds (seconds component) taken by the participant to complete Stroop subtest 1.

title: Stroop Subtest 1 Total Completion Time (Seconds)
description: The total time to complete Stroop subtest 1, converted to total seconds.

title: Stroop Subtest 2 Administered
description: Indicates whether Stroop subtest 2 was administered to the participant.

title: Reason Stroop Subtest 2 Not Given: Cannot Read
description: Indicates that Stroop subtest 2 was not administered because the participant cannot read.

title: Reason Stroop Subtest 2 Not Given: Hearing
description: Indicates that Stroop subtest 2 was not administered due to a hearing-related reason.

title: Reason Stroop Subtest 2 Not Given: Not Cooperative
description: Indicates that Stroop subtest 2 was not administered because the participant was not cooperative.

title: Reason Stroop Subtest 2 Not Given: Physical
description: Indicates that Stroop subtest 2 was not administered due to a physical reason.

title: Reason Stroop Subtest 2 Not Given: Vision
description: Indicates that Stroop subtest 2 was not administered due to a vision-related reason.

title: Stroop Subtest 2 Number Correct
description: The number of correct responses given by the participant during Stroop subtest 2.

title: Stroop Subtest 2 Number of Errors
description: The number of errors made by the participant during Stroop subtest 2.

title: Stroop Subtest 2 Completion Time (Minutes)
description: The time in minutes taken by the participant to complete Stroop subtest 2.

title: Stroop Subtest 2 Completion Time (Seconds)
description: The time in seconds (seconds component) taken by the participant to complete Stroop subtest 2.

title: Stroop Subtest 2 Total Completion Time (Seconds)
description: The total time to complete Stroop subtest 2, converted to total seconds.

title: Stroop Subtest 3 Administered
description: Indicates whether Stroop subtest 3 was administered to the participant.

title: Reason Stroop Subtest 3 Not Given: Cannot Read
description: Indicates that Stroop subtest 3 was not administered because the participant cannot read.

title: Reason Stroop Subtest 3 Not Given: Hearing
description: Indicates that Stroop subtest 3 was not administered due to a hearing-related reason.

title: Reason Stroop Subtest 3 Not Given: Not Cooperative
description: Indicates that Stroop subtest 3 was not administered because the participant was not cooperative.

title: Reason Stroop Subtest 3 Not Given: Physical
description: Indicates that Stroop subtest 3 was not administered due to a physical reason.

title: Reason Stroop Subtest 3 Not Given: Vision
description: Indicates that Stroop subtest 3 was not administered due to a vision-related reason.

title: Stroop Subtest 3 Number Correct
description: The number of correct responses given by the participant during Stroop subtest 3.

title: Stroop Subtest 3 Number of Errors
description: The number of errors made by the participant during Stroop subtest 3.

title: Stroop Subtest 3 Completion Time (Minutes)
description: The time in minutes taken by the participant to complete Stroop subtest 3.

title: Stroop Subtest 3 Completion Time (Seconds)
description: The time in seconds (seconds component) taken by the participant to complete Stroop subtest 3.

title: Stroop Subtest 3 Total Completion Time (Seconds)
description: The total time to complete Stroop subtest 3, converted to total seconds.

title: Student Status at Year 0 Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant was a student at the Year 0 (baseline) exam.

title: Student Status at Year 7 Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant was a student at the Year 7 exam.

title: History of Nodules or Bumps Under Skin Near Elbow or Ankle
description: Participant-reported history of nodules or bumps under the skin around the elbow or ankle.

title: Subject Alertness Rating
description: Interviewer rating of the subject's alertness, scored as no or yes.

title: Subject Appearance Rating
description: Interviewer rating of the subject's overall appearance, scored as calm, nervous, or tense.

title: Subject Attitude Rating
description: Interviewer rating of the subject's attitude, scored as friendly, neutral, or hostile.

title: Subject Body Build at Age 14–15 Years
description: Participant's recalled body build at ages 14–15 years, as assessed on the Binge Eating Disorder Questionnaire (Question 23B).

title: Subject Body Build at Age 9–10 Years
description: Participant's recalled body build at ages 9–10 years, as assessed on the Binge Eating Disorder Questionnaire (Question 23A).

title: Mean Subscapular Skinfold (mm)
description: Mean subscapular skinfold thickness in millimeters, calculated as the average of repeated measurements taken at the same visit.

title: Subscapular Skinfold First Measurement (mm)
description: First measurement of subscapular skinfold thickness, recorded in millimeters.

title: Subscapular Skinfold Second Measurement (mm)
description: Second measurement of subscapular skinfold thickness, recorded in millimeters.

title: Subscapular Skinfold Third Measurement (mm)
description: Third measurement of subscapular skinfold thickness, recorded in millimeters.

title: Subscapular Skinfold Fourth Measurement (mm)
description: Fourth measurement of subscapular skinfold thickness, recorded in millimeters.

title: Sum of 2nd and 3rd Diastolic Blood Pressure Readings
description: Sum of the second and third diastolic blood pressure readings, used as an intermediate value in the calculation of average diastolic blood pressure.

title: Sum of 2nd and 3rd Systolic Blood Pressure Readings
description: Sum of the second and third systolic blood pressure readings, used as an intermediate value in the calculation of average systolic blood pressure.

title: History of Skin Rash After Sun Exposure
description: Participant-reported history of a skin rash (breakout) after being in the sun.

title: Having Superior Strength Is Important
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether having superior strength is important to the respondent (Question 4). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Supine Heart Rate
description: Heart rate measured while the participant was in the supine position during the graded exercise treadmill test visit, recorded in beats per minute.

title: Mean Suprailiac Skinfold (mm)
description: Mean suprailiac skinfold thickness in millimeters, calculated as the average of repeated measurements taken at the same visit.

title: Suprailiac Skinfold First Measurement (mm)
description: First measurement of suprailiac skinfold thickness, recorded in millimeters.

title: Suprailiac Skinfold Second Measurement (mm)
description: Second measurement of suprailiac skinfold thickness, recorded in millimeters.

title: Suprailiac Skinfold Third Measurement (mm)
description: Third measurement of suprailiac skinfold thickness, recorded in millimeters.

title: Suprailiac Skinfold Fourth Measurement (mm)
description: Fourth measurement of suprailiac skinfold thickness, recorded in millimeters.

title: Sweetened Coffee or Tea (Sugar or Honey) Drinking Frequency (Past Month)
description: Self-reported frequency of drinking coffee or tea with sugar or honey added during the past month, including self-sweetened beverages and presweetened drinks such as Arizona Iced Tea and Frappuccino. Artificially sweetened coffee and diet tea are excluded.

title: Sweetened Coffee or Tea (Sugar or Honey) Usual Amount per Occasion
description: Self-reported usual amount of coffee or tea with sugar or honey consumed per drinking occasion.

title: Sweetened Fruit, Sports, or Energy Drink Frequency (Past Month)
description: Self-reported frequency of drinking sweetened fruit drinks, sports or energy drinks (such as Kool-Aid, lemonade, Hi-C, cranberry drink, Gatorade, Red Bull, or Vitamin Water) during the past month, including fruit juices made at home with added sugar. Diet, low-calorie, or artificially sweetened drinks are excluded.

title: Sweetened Fruit, Sports, or Energy Drink Usual Amount per Occasion
description: Self-reported usual amount of sweetened fruit drinks, sports or energy drinks consumed per drinking occasion.

title: Months Swimming in Past Year
description: Number of months in the past 12 months during which the participant swam for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Months Swimming ≥2 Hours/Week
description: Number of months in the past 12 months during which the participant swam for at least 2 hours per week.

title: Swimming Past Year (Any Month ≥1 Hour)
description: Indicates whether the participant swam during the past 12 months for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Sworn At or Insulted During Childhood
description: Participant's retrospective report of how often they were sworn at or insulted during childhood, rated on a four-point frequency scale from 'Rarely or none of the time' to 'Most or all of the time.'

title: Systolic Blood Pressure
description: Systolic blood pressure recorded on the echocardiography technician's worksheet at the time of the echocardiography examination.

title: Systolic Blood Pressure ≥160 mmHg Exclusion
description: Indicates whether the participant had a systolic blood pressure of 160 mmHg or greater, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Tachyarrhythmias or Bradyarrhythmias
description: Indicates whether the participant had tachyarrhythmias or bradyarrhythmias, assessed as an exclusion criterion for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Takes Health for Granted
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent takes their health for granted (Question 22). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Takes Special Care When Grooming Hair
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent takes special care when grooming their hair (Question 33). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Tuberculosis in Lungs or Other Body Parts
description: Indicates whether the participant had tuberculosis present in the lungs or other parts of the body, beyond a positive skin test.

title: Positive Tuberculosis Skin Test
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever had a positive tuberculosis skin test.

title: Artificial Sweetener Added to Tea
description: Indicates whether the participant added artificial sweetener (e.g., Equal, NutraSweet, Splenda, Sweet N Low, Stevia) to their tea.

title: Cream Added to Tea
description: Indicates whether the participant added cream, such as half and half, to their tea.

title: Coffee Creamer Added to Tea
description: Indicates whether the participant added coffee creamer (powdered or liquid) to their tea.

title: Milk Added to Tea
description: Indicates whether the participant added milk to their tea.

title: Nothing Added to Tea
description: Indicates whether the participant did not add anything to their tea.

title: Sugar or Honey Added to Tea
description: Indicates whether the participant added sugar or honey to their tea.

title: Tea Drinking Frequency (Past Month)
description: Self-reported frequency of drinking tea during the past month.

title: Tea Usual Amount per Occasion
description: Self-reported usual amount of tea consumed per drinking occasion.

title: Technician Comment
description: Free-text or coded comment entered by the echocardiography technician on the worksheet.

title: Technician Instructed on 24-Hour Urine Collection
description: Indicates whether the technician provided the participant with instructions for the 24-hour urine collection.

title: Echocardiography Technical Rating
description: Overall technical quality rating of the echocardiography examination assigned by the technician, rated on a scale from Poor to Excellent.

title: Reasons for Exercise Test Termination (Coded)
description: Coded reasons for termination of the graded exercise treadmill test. Response options include fatigue among others.

title: Therapeutic/Theragran Multivitamin Frequency
description: Frequency (per day, week, or month) at which the participant reports taking therapeutic or Theragran multiple vitamins.

title: Number of Therapeutic/Theragran Multivitamins Taken
description: Number of therapeutic/Theragran-type multivitamin supplements taken per dose, as reported in the dietary supplement assessment.

title: Therapeutic/Theragran Multivitamin Use
description: Indicates whether the participant took therapeutic or Theragran-type multivitamin supplements, with response options of No or Yes.

title: Estimated Daily Thiamine Intake (mg)
description: Estimated daily thiamine intake, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Mean Thigh Circumference (cm)
description: Mean thigh circumference in centimeters, calculated as the average of repeated measurements taken at the same visit.

title: Thigh Circumference First Measurement (cm)
description: First measurement of thigh circumference, recorded in centimeters.

title: Thigh Circumference Second Measurement (cm)
description: Second measurement of thigh circumference, recorded in centimeters.

title: Spends Time Around Smokers
description: Indicates whether the participant spends time around smokers.

title: Time Blood Drawn AM/PM Indicator
description: AM or PM indicator for the time at which blood was drawn at the first draw.

title: Time Last Ate/Drank AM/PM Indicator
description: AM or PM indicator for the time the participant last ate or drank anything other than water, including candy and chewing gum.

title: Time Last Non-Water Intake AM/PM (Delayed OGTT)
description: AM or PM indicator for the time the participant last ate or drank anything other than water, including candy and chewing gum, prior to the delayed OGTT.

title: Time of Follow-Up (Months)
description: Time elapsed since study enrollment, expressed in months.

title: Time Participant Got Out of Bed (AM/PM)
description: AM or PM indicator for the time the participant got out of bed on the day of urine collection, used to contextualize the urine collection timing.

title: Time Participant Got Out of Bed (Encoded)
description: Encoded time the participant got out of bed on the day of urine collection, as recorded in exams using an encoded format.

title: Time of Second Blood Collection AM/PM Indicator
description: AM or PM indicator for the time of the second blood collection performed during the oral glucose tolerance test.

title: Time Since Last Meal (AM/PM)
description: AM or PM indicator for the clock time of the participant's last meal, recorded prior to the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Time First Specimen Frozen AM/PM Indicator
description: AM or PM indicator for the time the first blood specimen was frozen after collection.

title: Time Second Specimen Frozen AM/PM Indicator
description: AM or PM indicator for the time the second blood specimen was frozen after collection.

title: Time Specimens Spun (First) AM/PM Indicator
description: AM or PM indicator for the time the first blood specimen was spun (centrifuged) after collection.

title: Time Second Specimen Spun AM/PM Indicator
description: AM or PM indicator for the time the second blood specimen was spun (centrifuged) after collection.

title: Time to Heart Rate 130
description: Time in seconds for the participant to reach a heart rate of 130 beats per minute during the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Time Urine Collected (AM/PM)
description: AM or PM designation for the time the urine specimen was collected.

title: Time Urine Collected (Encoded)
description: Encoded time the urine specimen was collected, as recorded in exams using an encoded format.

title: Times Changed Residence Since Baseline or Last Exam
description: The number of times the participant changed their place of residence since the last CARDIA exam or, at baseline, in the past two years.

title: Age Started Smoking Regularly (Years)
description: Age in years at which the participant started smoking cigarettes regularly, defined as at least 5 cigarettes per week, almost every week. Coded 88 if the participant does not remember.

title: New Smoker in Last 3 Months Still Smokes
description: Among participants who started smoking regularly in the last three months, indicates whether they still smoke cigarettes regularly (within the past week) at the time of the exam.

title: How Far Cigarette Is Allowed to Burn
description: Indicates how far the participant allows a cigarette to burn before extinguishing it.

title: Ever Participated in Cessation Program
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever participated in a smoking cessation program.

title: Aware of Cessation Programs in Community
description: Indicates whether the participant is aware of smoking cessation programs available in their community.

title: Still Smokes Cigars
description: Indicates whether the participant still smokes cigars regularly, with response options distinguishing regular from occasional cigar use.

title: Number of Cigarettes Smoked Per Day
description: Average number of cigarettes the participant smokes per day, with 1 pack equaling 20 cigarettes.

title: Cigarettes Per Day on Smoking Days
description: Among participants who do not smoke every day, the usual number of cigarettes smoked per day on the days that they do smoke.

title: FTC Carbon Monoxide of Current Cigarette Brand
description: The 1985 FTC-rated carbon monoxide yield of the participant's current cigarette brand.

title: Current Brand Filtered vs Unfiltered
description: Indicates whether the participant's current cigarette brand is filtered or unfiltered.

title: Current Brand Menthol vs Non-Menthol
description: Indicates whether the participant's current cigarette brand is mentholated or non-mentholated.

title: Current Brand Soft vs Hard Pack
description: Indicates whether the participant's current cigarette brand comes in a soft or hard pack.

title: Current Brand Size (Regular/King/Long)
description: Size of the participant's current cigarette brand, categorized as regular (70 mm), king, long, or extra long.

title: Still Smokes Cigarettes Regularly
description: Indicates whether the participant currently smokes cigarettes regularly, defined as at least 5 cigarettes per week, almost every week.

title: Expects to Smoke in 5 Years
description: Indicates whether the participant expects to still be smoking cigarettes in 5 years.

title: How Soon After Waking First Cigarette
description: Indicates how soon after waking the participant smokes their first cigarette, with categories ranging from within 30 minutes to more than 1 hour after waking.

title: How Often Smoke Is Inhaled
description: Indicates how often the participant inhales cigarette smoke, with responses ranging from always to never.

title: FTC Nicotine of Current Cigarette Brand
description: The 1985 FTC-rated nicotine yield of the participant's current cigarette brand.

title: Old Brand Filtered vs Unfiltered
description: Indicates whether each of up to four previously used cigarette brands was filtered or unfiltered.

title: Old Brand Menthol vs Non-Menthol
description: Indicates whether each of up to four previously used cigarette brands was mentholated or non-mentholated.

title: Old Brand Soft vs Hard Pack
description: Indicates whether each of up to four previously used cigarette brands came in a soft or hard pack.

title: Old Brand Size (Regular/King/Long)
description: Size category of each of up to four previously used cigarette brands, categorized as regular, king, or long.

title: Calculated Cigarette Pack-Years
description: Calculated number of cigarette pack-years for the participant, representing cumulative smoking exposure.

title: Still Smokes a Pipe
description: Indicates whether the participant still smokes a pipe regularly, with response options distinguishing regular from occasional pipe use.

title: Ever Used Any Tobacco Product
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever used any tobacco product, including cigarettes, cigars, tobacco pipe, chewing tobacco, snuff, e-cigarettes, nicotine chewing gum, or a nicotine patch.

title: Number of Quit Attempts ≥48 Hours
description: Number of attempts to stop smoking cigarettes in the past five years that lasted 48 hours or more, categorized as none, 1, 2–3, 4–5, or 6 or more attempts.

title: Interest in Quitting Smoking (0–10 Score)
description: Participant's self-reported interest in quitting smoking, rated on a scale from 0 (not at all interested) to 10 (very interested).

title: Methods Used in Quit Attempts
description: Indicates which methods were used during quit attempts, including cold turkey, reducing the number of cigarettes smoked, seeking professional help, and other methods.

title: Reasons for Quitting Smoking
description: Indicates which reasons motivated the participant to quit smoking, including physician recommendation, health concern, pregnancy or recent birth, family or friends' suggestion, and expense of the habit.

title: Number of Days Smoked in Last 30 Days
description: The number of days on which the participant smoked cigarettes in the past 30 days, asked of participants who do not smoke every day.

title: Smokes Cigarettes Every Day
description: Indicates whether the participant smokes cigarettes every day or only some days.

title: Still Uses Smokeless Tobacco
description: Indicates whether the participant currently uses smokeless tobacco.

title: Ever Spent Money to Quit Smoking
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever spent money in an attempt to quit smoking.

title: Started Smoking Regularly in Past 3 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant started smoking cigarettes regularly (at least 5 cigarettes per week, almost every week) in the last three months.

title: FTC Tar of Current Cigarette Brand
description: Federal Trade Commission (FTC) tar yield of the participant's current cigarette brand, based on 1985 FTC data.

title: Tried to Quit Smoking in Recent Years
description: Indicates whether the participant made any attempts to stop smoking cigarettes in the past five years.

title: Portion of Cigarette Left Unsmoked
description: Describes how much of each cigarette is typically left unsmoked, categorized as very little, some, a moderate amount, or a great deal.

title: Years Since Quit Smoking
description: For former smokers, the number of years since the participant quit smoking cigarettes regularly.

title: Years Smoked Cigarettes Regularly
description: The total number of years the participant has smoked or did smoke cigarettes regularly, where regularly is defined as at least 5 cigarettes per week, almost every week. This question is asked of both current and former regular smokers.

title: Ever Used Nail Hardener on Toenails
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever used nail hardener on their toenails, reported to assess potential metal exposure sources that could affect toenail mineral content.

title: Frequency of Nail Hardener Use Per Year
description: Number of times per year the participant used nail hardener on their toenails, reported to assess potential metal exposure sources that could affect toenail mineral content.

title: Duration of Toenail Medication #1 Use (Days)
description: Length of use in days for the first medication applied to the toenails, reported as part of the toenail collection questionnaire.

title: Duration of Toenail Medication #2 Use (Days)
description: Length of use in days for the second medication applied to the toenails, reported as part of the toenail collection questionnaire.

title: Toenail Medication Applied
description: Indicates whether the participant applied any medication to their toenails prior to toenail sample collection.

title: Use of Metal-Tone Toenail Polish
description: Indicates whether the participant used toenail polish with a metal tone, reported to assess potential metal exposure sources that could affect toenail mineral content.

title: Ever Used Toenail Polish
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever used nail polish on their toes, reported to assess potential metal exposure sources that could affect toenail mineral content.

title: Frequency of Toenail Polish Use Per Year
description: Number of times per year the participant used nail polish on their toes, reported to assess potential metal exposure sources that could affect toenail mineral content.

title: Toenail Sample Obtained
description: Indicates whether a toenail sample was successfully obtained from the participant.

title: Took Medications
description: Indicates whether the participant took any medications prior to or on the day of the exam visit.

title: Estimated Total Assets
description: Categorical estimate of the total value of the participant's family assets — including checking and savings accounts, stocks and bonds, and real estate (including principal home) — if liquidated.

title: Total Adjudicated CAC Agatston Score
description: Total adjudicated coronary artery calcium (CAC) Agatston score summed across all coronary arteries from the CT scan.

title: Estimated Daily Total Caloric Intake
description: Estimated daily total caloric intake, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Total Plasma Cholesterol (mg/dL)
description: Total plasma cholesterol concentration measured in mg/dL.

title: Number of Lesions in All Coronary Arteries
description: Total count of calcified lesions across all coronary arteries from the CT scan, not including lesions designated as 'other'.

title: Calcium Mass of Lesions in All Coronary Arteries
description: Total calcium mass of calcified lesions across all coronary arteries from the CT scan, not including lesions designated as 'other'.

title: Mean Lesion Value in All Coronary Arteries
description: Mean value of calcified lesions across all coronary arteries from the CT scan, not including lesions designated as 'other'.

title: Volume of Lesions in All Coronary Arteries
description: Total volume of calcified lesions across all coronary arteries from the CT scan, not including lesions designated as 'other'.

title: Estimated Daily Total Fat Intake (g)
description: Estimated daily total fat intake, in grams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Total Number of Hospitalizations Reported
description: Total number of overnight hospitalizations reported by the participant since the last exam.

title: Total Physical Activity Intensity Score
description: A summary score reflecting total physical activity intensity, calculated as the sum of heavy and moderate intensity scores, derived from the Physical Activity Questionnaire (Form 18).

title: Total Urine Volume (dL) by Collection
description: The total urine volume in deciliters collected during each of the three 24-hour collection periods.

title: Tourniquet Limit Exceeded
description: Indicates whether the tourniquet application time exceeded the protocol limit during blood draw.

title: Tourniquet 2-Minute Limit Exceeded at First Draw
description: Indicates whether the two-minute limit for tourniquet application was exceeded at the first blood draw.

title: Tourniquet 2-Minute Limit Exceeded at Second Draw
description: Indicates whether the two-minute limit for tourniquet application was exceeded at the second blood draw.

title: Toxemia in Any Pregnancy
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced toxemia during any pregnancy, defined as the combination of high blood pressure, albumin (protein) in the urine, and swelling of the ankles.

title: Number of Tracking Segments (2CH/3CH/4CH/SAX)
description: Count of speckle tracking segments in long-axis 2-chamber, 3-chamber, 4-chamber, and short-axis images. Values range from 0 to 6; a count of 3–6 is considered acceptable.

title: Acceptable Tracking Segments in 4-Chamber Images
description: Indicates whether the number of tracking segments in long-axis 4-chamber images is acceptable (1=Yes, 0=No).

title: Acceptable Tracking Segments in Short-Axis Images
description: Indicates whether the number of tracking segments in short-axis (SAX) images is acceptable (1=Yes, 0=No).

title: Treadmill Device Used
description: Identifies which treadmill device was used for the graded exercise treadmill test.

title: Mean Triceps Skinfold (mm)
description: Mean triceps skinfold thickness in millimeters, calculated as the average of repeated measurements taken at the same visit.

title: Triceps Skinfold First Measurement (mm)
description: First measurement of triceps skinfold thickness, recorded in millimeters.

title: Triceps Skinfold Second Measurement (mm)
description: Second measurement of triceps skinfold thickness, recorded in millimeters.

title: Triceps Skinfold Third Measurement (mm)
description: Third measurement of triceps skinfold thickness, recorded in millimeters.

title: Triceps Skinfold Fourth Measurement (mm)
description: Fourth measurement of triceps skinfold thickness, recorded in millimeters.

title: Tricuspid Annular Peak Systolic Excursion (TAPSE)
description: M-mode measurement of tricuspid annular peak systolic excursion (TAPSE), a measure of right ventricular systolic function.

title: Tricuspid Regurgitation Peak Velocity
description: Doppler-measured peak velocity of tricuspid regurgitation, reported in cm/second.

title: Tricuspid Regurgitation with RVSP > 40 mmHg
description: Indicates the presence of tricuspid regurgitation associated with a right ventricular systolic pressure (RVSP) greater than 40 mmHg.

title: Made Any Attempts to Stop Drinking in Past 5 Years
description: Indicates whether the participant made any attempts to stop drinking in the past five years.

title: Triglycerides >400 mg/dL Flag
description: Flag (coded 1) indicating that the participant's triglyceride level exceeded 400 mg/dL.

title: Triglycerides (mg/dL)
description: Triglyceride concentration measured in mg/dL.

title: Trouble Falling Asleep
description: Self-reported indicator of whether the participant has trouble falling asleep.

title: Tries to Be Physically Active
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent tries to be physically active (Question 36). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Age at Diagnosis of Tumor (Years)
description: Age in years at which the participant was diagnosed with a tumor.

title: Current Status of Tumor
description: Current status of the participant's tumor, categorized as still present, under control, or cured or gone.

title: Average Hours Per Day Watching TV
description: Self-reported average number of hours per day the participant watches television.

title: How Often Watch TV or Video Programming During Leisure Time
description: Self-reported frequency of watching television or other video programming during leisure time, rated from never to very often.

title: Given 12 Urine Collection Bottles
description: Indicates whether the participant was given the standard 12 urine collection bottles.

title: Satisfaction of Life Ambitions
description: Participant's self-reported assessment of whether they have been able to satisfy most of their life ambitions, or have had to settle for less (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 17).

title: Need to Be Bossy or Dominating
description: Self-reported degree to which the participant feels a need to be bossy or dominating, rated on a four-point scale (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 2).

title: Current Primary Role
description: Participant's current primary occupational or life role, categorized as working, student, unemployed, homemaker, or other (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 7).

title: Eating Too Quickly
description: Self-reported degree to which the participant tends to eat too quickly, rated on a four-point scale (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 5).

title: Reaches Energy Limits Due to Work or Activities
description: Participant's self-report of whether they generally reach their energy limits by the end of the day due to work or other activities (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 10).

title: Strong Need to Excel
description: Self-reported degree to which the participant feels a strong need to excel in most areas, rated on a four-point scale (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 1).

title: Perceived Fair Opportunity to Make the Most of Self
description: Participant's self-reported perception of whether they have had a fair opportunity to make the most of themselves in life, or have been held back (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 18).

title: Feeling Very Pressed for Time at End of Day
description: Participant's self-report of whether they generally feel very pressed for time at the end of the day (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 8).

title: Hard Driving and Competitive
description: Self-reported degree to which the participant feels a need to be hard driving and competitive, rated on a four-point scale (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 4).

title: Housework: Big Strain
description: Participant's self-report of whether they generally find housework to be a big strain (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 15).

title: Housework: Feeling Dissatisfied
description: Participant's self-report of whether they feel dissatisfied with housework (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 13).

title: Housework: Feeling Pressed for Time
description: Participant's self-report of whether they feel pressed for time in relation to housework (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 16).

title: Housework: Thinking About It All Day
description: Participant's self-report of whether thoughts about housework stay with them throughout the day (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 14).

title: Satisfaction with Life as a Whole
description: Participant's self-reported overall satisfaction with life, ranging from 'very satisfied' to 'very dissatisfied' (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 16).

title: Primary Occupation (Coded Category)
description: Participant's primary occupation or role at Exam B, categorized as working, student, unemployed, homemaker, or other.

title: Primary Role at First CARDIA Exam
description: Participant's retrospectively reported primary occupational or life role at the time of their first CARDIA exam, collected at Exam G.

title: Feeling Pressured for Time (General)
description: Self-reported degree to which the participant generally feels pressured for time, rated on a four-point scale (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 3).

title: Uncertain or Uncomfortable About Performance at Work or Daily Activities
description: Participant's self-report of whether they generally feel uncertain or uncomfortable about how well they are doing at work or in daily activities at the end of the day (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 11).

title: Upset When Having to Wait
description: Participant's self-report of whether they get upset when they have to wait for anything (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 6).

title: Thinking About Work After Hours
description: Participant's self-report of whether thoughts about work stay with them after working hours at the end of the day (Framingham Type A questionnaire, Question 9).

title: Type of Employment
description: Categorical description of the participant's type of employment, including private company employee, federal, state or local government employee, self-employed (incorporated or unincorporated), or unpaid family business worker.

title: Whether Monitoring Day Was a Typical Day
