description: Indicates whether the participant considered the monitoring day to be a typical day for them.

title: Average Unadjusted Agatston Score
description: Average unadjusted Agatston calcium score across all coronary arteries from the CT scan, not including other segments.

title: Undetectable Insulin Indicator (Exam F)
description: Flag indicating whether the fasting insulin value was below the detectable limit at Exam F; a value of 1 indicates the insulin level was less than 2 µU/mL.

title: Currently Unemployed or Laid Off
description: Indicates whether being unemployed or laid off is among the participant's current main daily activities and responsibilities.

title: Unemployed for More Than Two Months Since Last Exam
description: Indicates whether the participant has been unemployed for more than two months since the last CARDIA exam, not including periods of disability or retirement.

title: Unemployed or Laid Off as Main Daily Activity
description: Indicates whether being unemployed, laid off, or looking for work is the participant's main daily activity.

title: Total Months Unemployed Since Last Exam
description: Total length of time (in months) the participant has been unemployed since the last CARDIA exam, asked only of those who reported being unemployed for more than two months (not including disability or retirement).

title: Total Years Unemployed Since Last Exam
description: Total length of time (in years) the participant has been unemployed since the last CARDIA exam, asked only of those who reported being unemployed for more than two months (not including disability or retirement).

title: Accept Unfair Treatment
description: Participant's reported reaction after being treated unfairly, indicating whether they accepted it as a fact of life or tried to do something about it.

title: Reaction to Unfair Treatment Summary Score
description: Summary score reflecting the participant's reaction or response to experiences of unfair treatment, derived from the Discrimination Questionnaire.

title: Talk About Unfair Treatment
description: Participant's reported response after being treated unfairly, indicating whether they talked to others about it or kept it to themselves.

title: On Diet in Past 72 Hours
description: Indicates whether the participant was following an unusual or restricted diet in the 72 hours prior to the exam visit.

title: Unusual Diet
description: Indicates whether the participant reported being on an unusual diet at the time of the exam visit.

title: Unusual Event
description: Indicates whether the participant reported an unusual event on the day of the exam visit, which may have affected specimen collection or measurement results.

title: Unwanted Facial or Body Hair in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant had unwanted hair growing on the face, back, chest, arms, thighs, or legs during the past 12 months. Lower leg and underarm hair growth are explicitly excluded from this assessment.

title: Unwanted Facial Hair at Age 20–30
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced unwanted facial hair during ages 20–30.

title: Urinary Albumin (mg/dL)
description: Concentration of albumin in a urine specimen, measured in mg/dL.

title: Undetectable Albuminuria Flag
description: Flag indicating that urinary albumin was undetectable (1 = undetectable).

title: Urinary Cortisol Concentration
description: Urinary cortisol concentration measured in nanograms per milliliter (ng/mL).

title: Urinary Cortisol Total Amount
description: Total urinary cortisol load in nanograms (ng), calculated as cortisol concentration multiplied by total urine collection volume.

title: Urinary Creatinine
description: Urinary creatinine concentration measured from a urine specimen, used as a normalizing factor for catecholamine excretion.

title: Urinary Creatinine (mg/24 hr) by Day
description: Urinary creatinine excretion in milligrams per 24 hours, measured for each of the three collection days.

title: Urinary Creatinine (mg/dL)
description: Concentration of creatinine in a urine specimen, measured in mg/dL. Used in the calculation of the urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio.

title: Urinary Creatinine (Unadjusted) by Day
description: Unadjusted urinary creatinine values for each of the three collection days, prior to any volume or time adjustment.

title: Urinary Dopamine Concentration
description: Concentration of dopamine measured in a urine specimen.

title: Urinary Epinephrine Concentration
description: Concentration of epinephrine measured in a urine specimen.

title: Urinary Leakage in Past 3 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced leaking urine in the past 3 months.

title: Urinary Magnesium (mg/24 hr) by Day
description: Urinary magnesium excretion expressed in mg per 24 hours, recorded separately for each of up to three 24-hour urine collection days (Day 1, Day 2, Day 3).

title: Urinary Magnesium (Unadjusted) by Day
description: Unadjusted urinary magnesium values recorded for each of up to three 24-hour urine collection days (Day 1, Day 2, Day 3), prior to any adjustment or normalization.

title: Urinary Norepinephrine Concentration
description: Concentration of norepinephrine measured in a urine specimen.

title: Urinary Potassium (mmol/24 hr) by Day
description: Urinary potassium excretion expressed in mmol per 24 hours, recorded separately for each of up to three 24-hour urine collection days (Day 1, Day 2, Day 3).

title: Urinary Potassium (Unadjusted) by Day
description: Unadjusted urinary potassium values recorded for each of up to three 24-hour urine collection days (Day 1, Day 2, Day 3), prior to any adjustment or normalization.

title: Urinary Sodium (mmol/24 hr) by Day
description: Urinary sodium excretion expressed in mmol per 24 hours, recorded separately for each of up to three 24-hour urine collection days (Day 1, Day 2, Day 3).

title: Urinary Sodium (Unadjusted) by Day
description: Unadjusted urinary sodium values recorded for each of up to three 24-hour urine collection days (Day 1, Day 2, Day 3), prior to any adjustment or normalization.

title: 20 mL Urine Aliquot Filled
description: Indicates whether the 20 mL urine aliquot was filled during specimen processing.

title: Number of 20 mL Urine Aliquots
description: The number of 20 mL urine aliquots filled during specimen processing.

title: 2 mL EDTA Urine Aliquot Filled
description: Indicates whether the 2 mL EDTA urine aliquot was filled during specimen processing.

title: Number of 2 mL EDTA Urine Aliquots
description: The number of 2 mL EDTA urine aliquots filled during specimen processing.

title: 2 mL Heparin Urine Aliquot Filled
description: Indicates whether the 2 mL heparin urine aliquot was filled during specimen processing.

title: Number of 2 mL Heparin Urine Aliquots
description: The number of 2 mL heparin urine aliquots filled during specimen processing.

title: 4 mL Urine Aliquot Filled
description: Indicates whether the 4 mL urine aliquot was filled during specimen processing.

title: Number of 4 mL Urine Aliquots
description: The number of 4 mL urine aliquots filled during specimen processing.

title: Urine Cyclic GMP Excretion (pmol/24 h, Adjusted)
description: 24-hour urinary cyclic GMP excretion, expressed in picomoles per 24 hours, reported as an adjusted value.

title: Urine Cyclic GMP Concentration (pmol/mL, Unadjusted)
description: Unadjusted urinary cyclic GMP concentration, expressed in picomoles per milliliter.

title: Any Urine Collected
description: Indicates whether any urine specimen was collected from the participant at the exam visit.

title: Urine Sample Collection Day
description: The day on which the urine sample was collected.

title: Urine Collection End Date
description: The date on which urine collection was completed.

title: Urine Collection Start Date
description: The date on which urine collection was initiated.

title: Urine Collection Period 1 Duration (Hours)
description: Length of the first urine collection period, expressed in hours.

title: Urine Collection Period 1 Total Volume (dL)
description: Total urine volume collected during the first collection period, expressed in deciliters.

title: Urine Collection Period 2 Duration (Hours)
description: Length of the second urine collection period, expressed in hours.

title: Urine Collection Period 2 Total Volume (dL)
description: Total urine volume collected during the second collection period, expressed in deciliters.

title: Urine Collection Period 3 Duration (Hours)
description: Length of the third urine collection period, expressed in hours.

title: Urine Collection Period 3 Total Volume (dL)
description: Total urine volume collected during the third collection period, expressed in deciliters.

title: Final Urine pH
description: Final pH of the urine specimen, measured after any pH adjustment.

title: Number of Times Forgot to Save Urine
description: The number of times the participant forgot to save urine during the urine collection period.

title: Forgot to Save Urine During Collection Period
description: Indicates whether the participant forgot to save urine at any point during the urine collection period.

title: Hydrochloric Acid Added to Urine
description: Indicates whether hydrochloric acid (HCl) was added to the urine specimen during processing.

title: Number of Drops of Hydrochloric Acid Added to Urine
description: Number of drops of hydrochloric acid added to the urine specimen during processing.

title: Initial Urine pH
description: Initial pH of the urine specimen measured prior to any pH adjustment.

title: Sodium Hydroxide Added to Urine
description: Indicates whether sodium hydroxide (NaOH) was added to the urine specimen during processing.

title: Number of Drops of Sodium Hydroxide Added to Urine
description: Number of drops of sodium hydroxide added to the urine specimen during processing.

title: Poured Urine Into Container Immediately
description: Indicates whether the participant poured urine into the collection container immediately as instructed.

title: Urine Return/Pickup Date by Collection
description: The date on which the urine collection was returned or picked up, recorded separately for each of up to three collections.

title: Thawed Urine Sample Received by Lab
description: Flag indicating that a thawed urine sample was received by the laboratory (1 = thawed).

title: Any Urine Spilled
description: Indicates whether any urine was spilled during the collection process.

title: Largest Amount of Urine Spilled
description: The largest amount of urine spilled during a single spill event in the collection process.

title: Number of Times Urine Spilled
description: The number of times urine was spilled during the collection process.

title: Total Urine Collection Volume
description: Total volume of urine collected, measured in milliliters.

title: At Least 100 mL Urine Available
description: Indicates whether at least 100 mL of urine was available for collection and processing.

title: Total Urine Volume If Less Than 100 mL
description: Total urine volume collected when the volume was less than 100 mL.

title: Urine Volume (mL)
description: The total volume of urine collected, measured in milliliters.

title: Use of Listed Diet-Related Products (Cue Card)
description: Indicates whether the participant used any of the diet-related products shown on a cue card during the dietary practices interview.

title: Used Oral Contraceptive Pills to Control Acne in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant used oral contraceptive pills (birth control pills) during the past 12 months specifically to control acne.

title: Used Oral Contraceptive Pills for Birth Control in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant used oral contraceptive pills (birth control pills) during the past 12 months for the purpose of birth control.

title: Used Oral Contraceptive Pills to Control Menstrual Cramps in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant used oral contraceptive pills (birth control pills) during the past 12 months to control menstrual cramps.

title: Used Oral Contraceptive Pills for Other Reason in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant used oral contraceptive pills (birth control pills) during the past 12 months for a reason other than those listed; see USED_BC_12MO_OTHER_REASON_TEXT for the specified reason.

title: Used Oral Contraceptive Pills for Painful Ovulation in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant used oral contraceptive pills (birth control pills) during the past 12 months specifically for painful ovulation.

title: Used Oral Contraceptive Pills to Regulate Periods in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant used oral contraceptive pills (birth control pills) during the past 12 months to regulate menstrual periods.

title: Used Oral Contraceptive Pills to Treat Vaginal Bleeding in Past 12 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant used oral contraceptive pills (birth control pills) during the past 12 months to treat vaginal bleeding.

title: Used Birth Control to Control Acne at Age 20–30
description: Indicates whether the participant used birth control to control acne during ages 20–30.

title: Used Birth Control Pills for Contraception at Age 20–30
description: Indicates whether the participant used birth control pills for contraception during ages 20–30.

title: Used Birth Control to Control Menstrual Cramps at Age 20–30
description: Indicates whether the participant used birth control to control menstrual cramps during ages 20–30.

title: Used Birth Control for Other Reason at Age 20–30
description: Indicates whether the participant used birth control for a reason other than those listed during ages 20–30; see USED_BC_AGE20_30_OTHER_TEXT for the specified reason.

title: Used Birth Control for Painful Ovulation at Age 20–30
description: Indicates whether the participant used birth control for painful ovulation during ages 20–30.

title: Used Birth Control to Regulate Periods at Age 20–30
description: Indicates whether the participant used birth control to regulate menstrual periods during ages 20–30.

title: Used Birth Control for Vaginal Bleeding at Age 20–30
description: Indicates whether the participant used birth control to treat vaginal bleeding during ages 20–30.

title: Uses Very Few Grooming Products
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent uses very few grooming products (Question 19). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Usual Number of Drinks Per Week Before Stopping Drinking
description: Usual number of alcoholic drinks per week the participant consumed before stopping drinking.

title: Usually Wears What Is Handy
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent usually wears whatever clothing is handy (Question 26). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Vaginal Dryness in Past 3 Months
description: Indicates whether the participant experienced vaginal dryness in the past 3 months.

title: Age at Diagnosis of Valvular Heart Disease (Years)
description: Age in years at which the participant was diagnosed with valvular heart disease.

title: History of Valvular Heart Disease
description: Indicates whether the participant has or has had valvular heart disease.

title: Current Status of Valvular Heart Disease
description: Current status of the participant's valvular heart disease, indicating whether the condition is still present, controlled by medication or other means, or completely cured or gone.

title: Vigorous Exercise Class or Dancing Past Year (Any Month ≥1 Hour)
description: Indicates whether the participant engaged in a vigorous exercise class or vigorous dancing during the past 12 months for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Months Doing Vigorous Exercise Class or Dancing
description: Number of months in the past 12 months during which the participant engaged in a vigorous exercise class or vigorous dancing for at least one hour total time in any month.

title: Months Doing Vigorous Exercise Class or Dancing ≥3 Hours/Week
description: Number of months in the past year in which the participant did a vigorous exercise class or vigorous dancing for at least 3 hours per week. Asked only of participants who reported doing this activity for at least one hour total in any month of the past 12 months.

title: Duration of Vigorous Exercise (Minutes)
description: The number of minutes the participant exercised vigorously during the monitoring period.

title: Exercised Vigorously During Monitoring Period
description: Indicates whether the participant exercised vigorously at any point during the monitoring period.

title: Vigorous Job Activities (Lifting/Carrying/Digging) Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant performed any vigorous job activities such as lifting, carrying, or digging for at least one hour total time in any month during the past 12 months. Responses are No or Yes.

title: Months Doing Vigorous Job Activities (Lifting/Carrying/Digging)
description: Number of months in the past year in which the participant performed vigorous job activities such as lifting, carrying, or digging for at least one hour total time. Asked only of participants who reported doing this activity in the past 12 months.

title: Months Doing Vigorous Job Activities ≥5 Hours/Week
description: Number of months in the past year in which the participant performed vigorous job activities such as lifting, carrying, or digging for at least 5 hours per week. Asked only of participants who reported doing this activity for at least one hour total in any month of the past 12 months.

title: Times Violent with Other Family Member
description: Self-reported count of times the participant was violent with another family member.

title: Times Violent with Someone Known
description: Self-reported count of times the participant was violent with someone they know.

title: Times Violent with Someone Not Known
description: Self-reported count of times the participant was violent with someone they did not know.

title: Times Violent with Spouse or Lover
description: Self-reported count of times the participant was violent with a spouse or lover.

title: Visited Gynecologist or Primary Care Physician Because of Hot Flashes
description: Indicates whether the participant visited a gynecologist or primary care physician because of hot flashes or night sweats.

title: Vitamin A Supplement Frequency
description: Frequency with which the participant took vitamin A supplements, reported in units of day, week, or month.

title: Estimated Daily Vitamin A Intake from Diet (IU)
description: Estimated daily vitamin A intake from diet, in international units (IU), derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Estimated Daily Vitamin A Intake from Diet and Supplements (IU)
description: Estimated daily vitamin A intake from both diet and supplements combined, in international units (IU), derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Number of Vitamin A Supplements Taken
description: Number of vitamin A supplements taken per dose, as reported in the dietary supplement assessment.

title: Vitamin A Supplement Use
description: Indicates whether the participant took vitamin A supplements, with response options of No or Yes.

title: Vitamin B Supplement Frequency
description: Frequency with which the participant took vitamin B supplements, reported in units of day, week, or month.

title: Estimated Daily Vitamin B Intake from Diet and Supplements (mg)
description: Estimated daily vitamin B intake from both diet and supplements combined, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Number of Vitamin B Supplements Taken
description: Number of vitamin B supplements taken per dose, as reported in the dietary supplement assessment.

title: Vitamin B Supplement Use
description: Indicates whether the participant took vitamin B supplements, with response options of No or Yes.

title: Serum Vitamin B12
description: Serum vitamin B12 concentration measured in pg/mL.

title: Serum Vitamin B6
description: Serum vitamin B6 (pyridoxine) concentration measured in nmol/L.

title: Vitamin C Supplement Frequency
description: Frequency with which the participant took vitamin C supplements, reported in units of day, week, or month.

title: Estimated Daily Vitamin C Intake from Diet (mg)
description: Estimated daily vitamin C intake from diet, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Estimated Daily Vitamin C Intake from Diet and Supplements (mg)
description: Estimated daily vitamin C intake from both diet and supplements combined, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Number of Vitamin C Supplements Taken
description: Number of vitamin C supplements taken per dose, as reported in the dietary supplement assessment.

title: Vitamin C Supplement Use
description: Indicates whether the participant took vitamin C supplements, with response options of No or Yes.

title: Estimated Daily Vitamin D Intake from Supplements (mg)
description: Estimated daily vitamin D intake from supplements, in milligrams, derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Vitamin E Supplement Frequency
description: Frequency with which the participant took vitamin E supplements, reported in units of day, week, or month.

title: Estimated Daily Vitamin E Intake from Supplements (IU)
description: Estimated daily vitamin E intake from supplements, in international units (IU), derived from the Modified Block Food Frequency Questionnaire.

title: Vitamin E Supplement Use
description: Indicates whether the participant took vitamin E supplements, with response options of No or Yes.

title: VLDL Cholesterol (mg/dL)
description: Very low-density lipoprotein (VLDL) cholesterol concentration measured in mg/dL.

title: Voice Quality Rating
description: Interviewer rating of the subject's voice quality, scored as subdued, average, or strong.

title: Vomited After Glucose Drink Before Blood Collection
description: Indicates whether the participant vomited at any time after consuming the glucose drink but prior to the second blood collection during the oral glucose tolerance test.

title: Frequency of Vomiting to Lose Weight
description: Frequency with which the participant vomited to lose weight, ranging from less than one day a week to more than five times a week, as assessed on the Binge Eating Disorder Questionnaire (Question 10).

title: Vomiting to Lose Weight
description: Indicates whether the participant vomited to lose weight (Yes/No), as assessed on the Binge Eating Disorder Questionnaire (Question 10).

title: von Willebrand Factor Activity (%)
description: Von Willebrand factor activity, expressed as a percentage.

title: von Willebrand Factor Antigen (%)
description: Von Willebrand factor antigen level, expressed as a percentage.

title: Mean Waist Girth (cm)
description: Mean waist girth in centimeters, calculated as the average of repeated measurements taken at the same visit.

title: Waist Girth First Measurement (cm)
description: First measurement of participant waist girth, recorded in centimeters.

title: Waist Girth Second Measurement (cm)
description: Second measurement of participant waist girth, recorded in centimeters.

title: Waist/Hip Measurement Protocol Modified
description: Indicates whether the waist and hip measurement protocol was modified, with response categories including too tall, too obese, other modification, or no modification.

title: Waist Measurement Larger Than Hip Indicator
description: Indicates whether the waist measurement was larger than the hip measurement, used as a data quality check during the anthropometry assessment.

title: Waking During the Night
description: Self-reported indicator of whether the participant wakes up during the night.

title: Wake-Up Time AM/PM Indicator
description: AM or PM indicator for the participant's wake-up time on the salivary cortisol collection day.

title: Waking Too Early
description: Self-reported indicator of whether the participant wakes up too early in the morning.

title: Months Walking or Hiking (Including Walk to Work)
description: Number of months in the past year in which the participant took walks, hikes, or walked to work for at least one hour total time. Asked only of participants who reported doing this activity in the past 12 months.

title: Months Walking or Hiking ≥4 Hours/Week
description: Number of months in the past year in which the participant took walks, hikes, or walked to work for at least 4 hours per week. Asked only of participants who reported doing this activity for at least one hour total in any month of the past 12 months.

title: Walking or Hiking (Including Walk to Work) Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant took any walks, hikes, or walked to work for at least one hour total time in any month during the past 12 months. Responses are No or Yes.

title: Use of Water Softener in Home
description: Self-reported indicator of whether the participant uses a water softener in their home, relevant to dietary sodium exposure. Response options include 'No.'

title: Hours Over 5 Weekdays Doing Hard Activity
description: Total hours of hard physical activity accumulated over 5 weekdays, based on self-report.

title: Hours Over 5 Weekdays Doing Moderate Activity
description: Total hours of moderate physical activity accumulated over 5 weekdays, based on self-report.

title: Hours Over 5 Weekdays Doing Very Hard Activity
description: Total hours of very hard physical activity accumulated over 5 weekdays, based on self-report.

title: Hours of Sleep per Night on Weekdays
description: Self-reported hours of sleep per night on weekdays.

title: Hours Over 2 Weekend Days Doing Hard Activity
description: Total hours of hard physical activity accumulated over 2 weekend days, based on self-report.

title: Hours Over 2 Weekend Days Doing Moderate Activity
description: Total hours of moderate physical activity accumulated over 2 weekend days, based on self-report.

title: Hours Over 2 Weekend Days Doing Very Hard Activity
description: Total hours of very hard physical activity accumulated over 2 weekend days, based on self-report.

title: Hours of Sleep per Night on Weekend
description: Self-reported hours of sleep per night on weekend days.

title: Weekly Score for Hard Activity
description: Derived score summarizing weekly hard physical activity intensity and duration.

title: Weekly Score for Moderate Activity
description: Derived score summarizing weekly moderate physical activity intensity and duration.

title: Weekly Score for Total Physical Activity
description: Derived score summarizing total weekly physical activity across all intensity levels.

title: Weekly Score for Very Hard Activity
description: Derived score summarizing weekly very hard (vigorous) physical activity intensity and duration.

title: Received Professional Advice About Weight
description: Indicates whether a doctor, nurse, or other health professional gave the participant advice about their weight in the past 12 months.

title: Weight at Time of Echo
description: Body weight recorded at the time of the echocardiographic examination.

title: Weight Change Direction Code (Gain/Loss/Stable)
description: Coded variable indicating the direction of weight change between exams: A = weight gain, B = weight loss, C = stable weight.

title: Weight Change from Exam 7 to Current Exam (Pounds)
description: Change in weight in pounds between Exam 7 and the current exam (Exam 8), calculated from weights recorded at those two exams.

title: Trying to Change Weight in Past 12 Months
description: Participant's self-reported weight control intention in the past 12 months, indicating whether they were trying to lose weight, gain weight, stay about the same, or were not trying to do anything about their weight.

title: Name of Weight Control Program
description: Name of the organized weight control program attended by the participant, as assessed on the Binge Eating Disorder Questionnaire (Question 18).

title: Participation in Organized Weight Control Program
description: Indicates whether the participant attended meetings of an organized weight control program (Yes/No), as assessed on the Binge Eating Disorder Questionnaire (Question 18).

title: Difference Between Exam Weights (Absolute Value, Pounds)
description: Absolute value of the difference in measured weights between two consecutive exams, expressed in pounds.

title: Weight Discriminated at Home (Ever, Yes/No)
description: Frequency of weight discrimination experienced at home, reported as a combined yes/no and frequency response. The value label 'Rarely' indicates this variable captures frequency when discrimination was reported.

title: Weight Discriminated at School (Ever, Yes/No)
description: Frequency of weight discrimination experienced at school, reported as a frequency response (e.g., rarely) when discrimination was indicated.

title: Weight Discriminated at Work (Ever, Yes/No)
description: Frequency of weight discrimination experienced at work, reported as a frequency response (e.g., rarely) when discrimination was indicated.

title: Weight Discriminated Getting Housing (Ever, Yes/No)
description: Frequency of weight discrimination experienced when getting housing, reported as a frequency response (e.g., rarely) when discrimination was indicated.

title: Weight Discriminated Getting a Job (Ever, Yes/No)
description: Frequency of weight discrimination experienced when getting a job, reported as a frequency response (e.g., rarely) when discrimination was indicated.

title: Weight Discriminated Getting Medical Care (Ever, Yes/No)
description: Frequency of weight discrimination experienced when getting medical care, reported as a frequency response (e.g., rarely) when discrimination was indicated.

title: Weight Discriminated in Public (Ever, Yes/No)
description: Frequency of weight discrimination experienced on the street or in a public setting, reported as a frequency response (e.g., rarely) when discrimination was indicated.

title: Weight Discrimination at Home
description: Whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior because of their weight at home (yes/no).

title: Weight Discrimination at School
description: Whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior because of their weight at school (yes/no).

title: Weight Discrimination at Work
description: Whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior because of their weight at work (yes/no).

title: Weight Discrimination Getting Housing
description: Whether the participant ever experienced discrimination, was prevented from doing something, or was hassled or made to feel inferior because of their weight when getting housing (yes/no).

title: Weight Discrimination Getting a Job
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever experienced discrimination, been prevented from doing something, or been hassled or made to feel inferior when getting a job because of their weight.

title: Weight Discrimination Getting Medical Care
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever experienced discrimination, been prevented from doing something, or been hassled or made to feel inferior when getting medical care because of their weight.

title: Weight Discrimination in Public
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever experienced discrimination, been prevented from doing something, or been hassled or made to feel inferior on the street or in a public setting because of their weight.

title: Stress From Weight Discrimination
description: Self-reported rating of how stressful experiences of weight-based discrimination have been, including being prevented from doing something or being hassled or made to feel inferior because of weight.

title: Weight Discrimination Summary Score
description: A summary score for weight discrimination derived from the weight discrimination questionnaire items.

title: Participant Weight at Exam 3 (Pounds)
description: Participant weight recorded during Exam 3, used as a reference weight for weight change computation.

title: Participant Weight at Exam 4 (Pounds)
description: Participant weight recorded during Exam 4, used as a reference weight for weight change computation.

title: Participant Weight at Exam 5 (Pounds)
description: Participant weight recorded during Exam 5, used as a reference weight for weight change computation.

title: Participant Weight at Exam 7 (Pounds)
description: Participant weight in pounds recorded during Exam 7, used as a reference for computing weight change.

title: Participant Weight at Exam 8 (Pounds)
description: Participant weight in pounds recorded during Exam 8, used as a reference for computing weight change.

title: Participant Weight at Exam 9 (Pounds)
description: Participant weight in pounds recorded during Exam 9, used as a reference for computing weight change.

title: Weight at Follow-Up
description: Participant's body weight recorded at the follow-up contact.

title: Importance of Body Weight
description: Self-reported importance of body weight to the participant, with responses ranging from 'Not very important' to 'Were the most important things,' as assessed on the Binge Eating Disorder Questionnaire (Question 9).

title: Intentionality of Weight Gain
description: Indicates whether the weight gain observed between the prior exam and the current exam was intentional.

title: Intentionality of Weight Gain, Loss, or Stability
description: Indicates whether the participant's weight gain, weight loss, or weight stability since the prior exam was intentional.

title: Intentionality of Weight Loss
description: Indicates whether the weight loss observed between the prior exam and the current exam was intentional.

title: Intentionality of Stable Weight
description: Indicates whether the participant's relatively stable weight since the prior exam was intentional.

title: Body Weight (lb)
description: Participant's body weight recorded in pounds.

title: Number of Times Lost 10–19 lbs Since Last Exam
description: Self-reported number of times the participant lost 10–19 pounds since the last exam, captured as an ordinal frequency category (e.g., never, 1–4 times, more than 12 times).

title: Number of Times Lost 20–49 lbs Since Last Exam
description: Self-reported number of times the participant lost 20–49 pounds since the last exam, captured as an ordinal frequency category (e.g., never, 1–3 times, more than 11 times).

title: Number of Times Lost 5–9 lbs Since Last Exam
description: Self-reported number of times the participant lost 5–9 pounds since the last exam, captured as an ordinal frequency category (e.g., never, 1–5 times, more than 13 times).

title: Number of Times Lost 50–79 lbs Since Last Exam
description: Self-reported number of times the participant lost 50–79 pounds since the last exam, captured as an ordinal frequency category (e.g., never, 1–2 times, more than 10 times).

title: Number of Times Lost ≥80 lbs Since Last Exam
description: Self-reported number of times the participant lost 80 or more pounds since the last exam.

title: On Weight Loss Diet During Collection
description: Indicates whether the participant was on a weight loss diet during the urine collection period (No/Yes).

title: Frequency of Weight Loss Diet Intake
description: Frequency with which the participant follows a weight loss diet, as reported during the urine collection period.

title: Weight Control Method – Diet Foods or Products
description: Indicates whether the participant ate 'diet' foods or products as a method to lose weight or stay about the same weight in the past 12 months.

title: Weight Control Method – Prescription Diet Pills
description: Indicates whether the participant took diet pills prescribed by a doctor as a method to lose weight or stay about the same weight in the past 12 months.

title: Weight Control Method – Do Not Know
description: Indicates that the participant responded 'do not know' when asked how they tried to lose weight or stay about the same weight in the past 12 months.

title: Weight Control Method – Ate Less Food
description: Indicates whether the participant reported eating less food (amount) as a method used to lose weight or stay about the same during the past 12 months, as part of the Weight Change questionnaire.

title: Weight Control Method – Exercised
description: Indicates whether the participant reported exercising as a method to lose weight or stay about the same weight in the past 12 months.

title: Weight Control Method – Laxatives or Vomiting
description: Indicates whether the participant reported taking laxatives or vomiting as a method used to lose weight or stay about the same during the past 12 months, as part of the Weight Change questionnaire.

title: Weight Control Method – Liquid Diet Formula
description: Indicates whether the participant reported using a liquid diet formula as a method used to lose weight or stay about the same during the past 12 months, as part of the Weight Change questionnaire.

title: Weight Control Method – Switched to Low-Calorie Foods
description: Indicates whether the participant reported switching to foods with lower calories as a method used to lose weight or stay about the same during the past 12 months, as part of the Weight Change questionnaire.

title: Weight Control Method – Ate Fewer Carbohydrates
description: Indicates whether the participant reported eating fewer carbohydrates as a method used to lose weight or stay about the same during the past 12 months, as part of the Weight Change questionnaire.

title: Weight Control Method – Ate Less Fat
description: Indicates whether the participant reported eating less fat as a method used to lose weight or stay about the same during the past 12 months, as part of the Weight Change questionnaire.

title: Weight Control Method – Drank a Lot of Water
description: Indicates whether the participant reported drinking a lot of water as a method used to lose weight or stay about the same during the past 12 months, as part of the Weight Change questionnaire.

title: Weight Control Method – Other
description: Indicates whether the participant reported using another unspecified method to lose weight or stay about the same during the past 12 months.

title: Weight Control Method – Other Nonprescription Pills
description: Indicates whether the participant reported taking other pills, medicines, herbs, or supplements not requiring a prescription as a method used to lose weight or stay about the same during the past 12 months.

title: Weight Control Method – Refused
description: Indicates whether the participant refused to answer the question about methods used to lose weight or stay about the same during the past 12 months.

title: Weight Control Method – Skipped Meals
description: Indicates whether the participant reported skipping meals as a method used to lose weight or stay about the same during the past 12 months, as part of the Weight Change questionnaire.

title: Weight Control Method – Started or Resumed Smoking
description: Indicates whether the participant reported starting to smoke or beginning to smoke again as a method used to lose weight or stay about the same during the past 12 months, as part of the Weight Change questionnaire.

title: Body Weight
description: Body weight of the participant recorded at the DXA encounter.

title: Weight Greater Than 300 lbs Indicator
description: Indicates whether the participant's weight exceeded 300 pounds at the time of the DXA scan, relevant to DXA equipment capacity and scan feasibility.

title: Weight Measurement Protocol Modified
description: Indicates whether the protocol for weight measurement was modified during the exam visit.

title: Weighted Instrumental Support Score
description: A weighted score reflecting the level of instrumental support available to the participant.

title: Weighted Social Network Adequacy Score
description: A weighted score reflecting the adequacy of the participant's social network.

title: Ever Used Bupropion (Wellbutrin) to Quit Smoking
description: Indicates whether the participant has ever used bupropion (Wellbutrin) as a smoking cessation aid.

title: Bupropion (Wellbutrin) Use in Past Week
description: Indicates whether the participant used bupropion (Wellbutrin) in the past week.

title: Age at First Wheezy Chest Attack
description: Age in years at which the participant experienced their first wheezy chest attack.

title: Medication Required for Shortness of Breath Attacks
description: Indicates whether prescription medication has been required for shortness of breath attacks associated with wheezing.

title: Wheezy Chest Most Days or Nights
description: Indicates whether the participant has a wheezy chest on most days or nights.

title: Short of Breath Because of Wheezy Chest
description: Indicates whether the participant felt short of breath due to a wheezy chest.

title: Two or More Wheezy Chest Attacks
description: Indicates whether the participant has had two or more wheezing attacks associated with shortness of breath.

title: Wheezy Chest When Having a Cold
description: Indicates whether the participant's chest becomes wheezy when they have a cold.

title: Wheezy Chest Apart from Colds
description: Indicates whether the participant experiences a wheezy chest apart from colds.

title: Years with Wheezy Chest
description: Number of years the participant has had a wheezy chest.

title: Frequency of Wishing for Comforting
description: Participant-reported frequency of finding themselves wishing someone would comfort them, rated on a four-point scale from Frequently to Never.

title: Frequency of Wishing for More Close Friends
description: Participant-reported frequency of wishing they had more close friends, rated on a four-point scale from Frequently to Never.

title: Amount of Physical Activity at Work (Self-Rated)
description: Self-rated amount of physical activity at work compared with others, ranging from much lighter to much heavier.

title: Works in an Office Environment
description: Indicates whether the participant works in an office environment.

title: Occupational Physical Activity Index
description: A derived index score summarizing the level of physical activity performed at work.

title: How Often Lift Heavy Loads at Work
description: Self-reported frequency of lifting heavy loads at work, rated from never to very often, with an option for does not work.

title: How Often Physically Tired at Work
description: Self-reported frequency of feeling physically tired at work, rated from never to very often, with an option for does not work.

title: How Often Sit at Work
description: Self-reported frequency of sitting at work, rated from never to always, with an option for does not work.

title: How Often Stand at Work
description: Self-reported frequency of standing at work, rated from never to always, with an option for does not work.

title: Current Work, Homemaker, or Student Status
description: Self-reported indication of whether the participant is currently employed, a homemaker, or a student.

title: How Often Sweat at Work
description: Self-reported frequency of sweating at work, rated from never to very often, with an option for does not work.

title: Works to Improve Stamina
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent works to improve their stamina (Question 28). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: Distance from Home to Work (Miles)
description: Self-reported number of miles the participant must travel from home to their place of work.

title: Percent of Work Trip by Bike
description: The percentage of the participant's usual trip to work that is made by bicycle.

title: Percent of Work Trip by Car
description: The percentage of the participant's usual trip to work that is made by car.

title: Percent of Work Trip by Public Transportation
description: The percentage of the participant's usual trip to work that is made by public transportation.

title: Percent of Work Trip by Walking
description: The percentage of the participant's usual trip to work that is made by walking.

title: Travel Time from Home to Work (Minutes)
description: The amount of time in minutes it takes the participant to travel from their home to their place of work.

title: How Often Walk at Work
description: Self-reported frequency of walking at work, rated from never to always, with an option for does not work.

title: Hours per Workday Doing Hard Activity
description: Number of hours per workday the participant engaged in hard physical activity.

title: Hours per Workday Doing Moderate Activity
description: Number of hours per workday the participant engaged in moderate physical activity.

title: Hours per Workday Doing Very Hard Activity
description: Number of hours per workday the participant engaged in very hard physical activity.

title: Worked Outside Home in Past Year
description: Indicates whether the participant held an occupation and worked outside of their home in the past year.

title: Currently Working Part Time
description: Indicates whether working part time is one of the participant's current main daily activities or responsibilities.

title: Smoking Policy at Workplace
description: Describes the smoking policy at the participant's current workplace, ranging from no policy to a policy that limits or prohibits smoking; coded as not applicable for those who do not work full-time or part-time in an indoor office environment around others.

title: Would Pass Most Physical Fitness Tests
description: Self-report item from the Body Image Questionnaire asking whether the respondent believes they would pass most physical fitness tests (Question 3). Responses range from 1 (Definitely disagree) to 5 (Definitely agree).

title: History of Wrist Swelling
description: Participant-reported history of swelling in the wrist.

title: 3 mL Urine Aliquots for YALTA Quality Control
description: Indicates whether 3 mL urine aliquots for YALTA quality control were collected, processed as metabolic profile samples with brown stripe labeling for MEBRL-UMN.

title: YALTA Quality Control Sample Number
description: The number of YALTA quality control samples collected.

title: Number of YALTA QC Storage Aliquots
description: The number of YALTA quality control storage aliquots prepared from the urine specimen.

title: 10 mL QC Urine Aliquot for YALTA
description: Indicates whether a 10 mL quality control urine aliquot for YALTA was collected.

title: Number of YALTA Storage Aliquots
description: The number of YALTA storage aliquots prepared from the urine specimen.

title: 3 mL Urine Aliquots for YALTA Samples
description: Indicates whether 3 mL urine aliquots for YALTA urine samples were collected, processed as metabolic profile samples with brown stripe labeling for MEBRL-UMN.

title: 10 mL Urine Aliquot for YALTA Samples
description: Indicates whether a 10 mL urine aliquot for YALTA urine samples was collected.

title: Number of 3 mL YALTA Urine Aliquots
description: The number of 3 mL urine aliquots prepared for YALTA urine samples.

title: Number of 3 mL YALTA QC Urine Aliquots
description: The number of 3 mL quality control urine aliquots prepared for YALTA.

title: Physical Activity Compared to Year Before Baseline
description: Self-rated physical activity level compared to the year before the Year 0 (baseline) exam, scored on a scale from 1 (physically inactive) to 5 (very active), with 3 indicating moderately active.

title: Year 0 Examining Center
description: The CARDIA field center at which the participant was examined at the Year 0 baseline visit.

title: Year 0 Examining Center
description: The CARDIA field center at which the participant was examined at the Year 0 baseline exam.

title: Years Living in Marriage-Like Relationship
description: Number of years the participant has been living in a marriage-like relationship.

title: Years Married
description: Number of years the participant has been married.

title: Years Since Last Menstrual Period
description: Number of years since the participant's last menstrual period.

title: Years Ago Participant Stopped Drinking Alcohol
description: Number of years ago the participant stopped drinking alcohol.

title: Years Unemployed Since Last Exam
description: Total length of time (in years) the participant has been unemployed since the last CARDIA exam, asked only of those who reported being unemployed for more than two months (not including disability or retirement).

title: Years Widowed, Divorced, or Separated
description: Number of years the participant has been widowed, divorced, or separated.

title: Y-Tubed Diastolic Blood Pressure 1st Reading
description: First diastolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube connection during ambulatory blood pressure monitoring.

title: Y-Tubed Diastolic Blood Pressure 10th Reading
description: Tenth diastolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube connection during ambulatory blood pressure monitoring.

title: Y-Tubed Diastolic BP 2nd Reading
description: Second diastolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Diastolic BP 3rd Reading
description: Third diastolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Diastolic BP 4th Reading
description: Fourth diastolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Diastolic BP 5th Reading
description: Fifth diastolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Diastolic BP 6th Reading
description: Sixth diastolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Diastolic BP 7th Reading
description: Seventh diastolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Diastolic BP 8th Reading
description: Eighth diastolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Diastolic BP 9th Reading
description: Ninth diastolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Systolic BP 1st Reading
description: First systolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Systolic BP 10th Reading
description: Tenth systolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Systolic BP 2nd Reading
description: Second systolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Systolic BP 3rd Reading
description: Third systolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Systolic BP 4th Reading
description: Fourth systolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Systolic BP 5th Reading
description: Fifth systolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Systolic BP 6th Reading
description: Sixth systolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Systolic BP 7th Reading
description: Seventh systolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Systolic BP 8th Reading
description: Eighth systolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Y-Tubed Systolic BP 9th Reading
description: Ninth systolic blood pressure reading obtained using a Y-tube configuration.

title: Zinc Supplement Frequency
description: Frequency with which the participant took zinc supplements, reported in units of day, week, or month.

title: Number of Zinc Supplements Taken
description: Number of zinc supplements taken per dose, as reported in the dietary supplement assessment.

title: Zinc Supplement Use
description: Indicates whether the participant took zinc supplements, with response options of No or Yes.
